We present VerIbmc, a neuro-symbolic pipeline that pairs symbolic invariant generation with locally deployable open-weight language models with the ESBMC verification tool. Our pipeline combines a deterministic symbolic invariant synthesis phase with an iterative LLM refinement loop driven by structured verifier feedback. In addition, we provide two types of pipelines that differ in their prompting strategy: Chain-of-Thought vs. Tree-of-Thought.
  We conduct an extensive experimental evaluation with five open-weight models (ranging from 7B to 120B parameters) across five benchmark families comprising of 520 problems (499 after excluding 21 with unavoidable overflow). Overall, the best single configuration (GPT-OSS-120B) solves 431 of 499 problems (86.4%). Additionally, on the four benchmark suites shared with the strongest cloud-API tools, VerIbmc is competitive running only on a single local machine. The evaluation shows symbolic invariant synthesis solves 75 problems without any LLM call and yields up to +35 additional problems for the weakest model. Importantly, all inference runs entirely on a single local machine using open-weight models -- no cloud API or proprietary model is required. Overall, we demonstrate that a neuro-symbolic approach based on LLMs can be used effectively for invariant synthesis in a privacy-preserving and energy-efficient manner, without having to resort to expensive proprietary frontier models locked behind APIs.

AI.tldr: VerIbmc是一个结合开源大模型与ESBMC验证工具的神经符号管道，用于循环不变式综合。在499个问题上达到86.4%解决率，无需依赖商业云API，实现隐私保护和高效能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的循环不变式综合工具依赖专有且昂贵的云API，这在隐私敏感的工业场景中不可行（源代码无法外传），且成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出VerIbmc管道，包含两个阶段：1) 确定性的符号不变式综合阶段；2) 基于验证器结构化反馈驱动的迭代LLM优化循环。提供Chain-of-Thought和Tree-of-Thought两种提示策略管道。
AI.result: 在5个开源模型（7B-120B参数）、5个基准家族、499个问题上评估。最佳配置GPT-OSS-120B解决431/499（86.4%）。符号阶段单独解决75个问题，为最弱模型额外贡献35个。所有推理在单台本地机器上完成。
AI.conclusion: 基于开源LLM的神经符号方法能够在保持隐私和能效的前提下，有效完成不变式综合任务，无需依赖昂贵的专有云模型。

title: Scribby: A Multi-Level LLM Framework for Semantic Video Analysis
summary:
As video content continues to expand across educational platforms, recorded lectures, and live-streamed entertainment, the need for efficient and structured analysis of long-form footage has increased \cite{1}. Although many existing AI programs provide high-level video summaries based on AI-generated transcripts \cite{2,3,4,5}, these approaches are often limited to coarse overviews and lack detailed analysis of a video's structure, thematic progression, and semantic relationships, all of which are required for comprehensive video analysis.
  This paper proposes an LLM-based video summarization framework that balances macro-level comprehension with micro-level semantic analysis \cite{6,12,13}. The first stage of the process indexes the video at a micro level by (1) analyzing the full transcript, (2) analyzing individual transcript sentences, and (3) grouping these sentences by semantic similarity using an LLM as a judge \cite{6,13}. Contextual continuity is retained during sentence-level processing by incorporating both the global transcript analysis and adjacent sentence information into each evaluation prompt.
  This framework establishes a foundation for video analysis tools that visualize semantic chunking and semantic matching through relevance-based heatmaps. Limitations and future expansions of the framework are also discussed.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于LLM的视频摘要框架，通过微观语义分析（句子级处理+语义分组）与宏观理解相结合，实现视频的结构化分析，并支持语义热图可视化。
AI.motivation: 现有AI视频摘要工具仅基于转录提供粗粒度的概述，缺乏对视频结构、主题演进和语义关系的细粒度分析，无法满足全面视频分析的需求。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1）微观索引——分析完整转录、逐句分析句子、利用LLM作为判断依据按语义相似度对句子分组；2）在句子级处理中通过全局转录分析和相邻句子信息保留上下文连续性。
AI.result: 建立了支持语义分块可视化和基于相关性热图的语义匹配的视频分析工具基础。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为视频结构化分析提供了新思路，但存在局限性，未来工作将围绕框架扩展展开。

title: Beyond Monolingual Deep Research: Evaluating Agents and Retrievers with Cross-Lingual BrowseComp-Plus
summary: Deep research agents are increasingly evaluated on their ability to search for evidence, reason over retrieved sources, and produce grounded answers. Existing browsing benchmarks, however, largely assume that the user's query and the supporting evidence are written in the same language, leaving open whether agentic search systems can operate when relevant evidence appears in another language. We introduce XBCP (Cross-lingual BrowseComp-Plus), a controlled benchmark that preserves the English question-and-answer space of BrowseComp-Plus but varies the languages of the supporting documents. XBCP instantiates two complementary settings: in the cross-lingual setting, each query is paired with evidence in a single assigned language. In the multilingual setting, the full evidence corpus is distributed equally and randomly across 12 languages spanning high-resource and low-resource regimes. We evaluate four deep research agents using sparse and dense multilingual retrievers, measuring answer accuracy, evidence recall, search behavior, calibration, citation fidelity, and oracle retrieval. Results reveal substantial degradation when evidence is translated. Even strong, dense retrievers lose evidence recall, and agents become less calibrated and cite evidence less reliably. Notably, accuracy remains lower even when all gold evidence is supplied directly. These findings suggest that cross-lingual deep research exposes both retrieval failures and an independent, agent-side difficulty in integrating language-mismatched evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨语言基准XBCP，测试深度研究代理在证据语言与查询不同时的表现。结果显示，即使使用强稠密检索器，跨语言场景下证据召回、答案准确率和引用可靠性均显著下降，表明跨语言深度研究存在检索失败与代理整合多语言证据的双重困难。
AI.motivation: 现有浏览基准假设用户查询与支持证据使用同一种语言，忽略了代理搜索系统在证据为其他语言时的表现。为填补这一空白，作者引入跨语言评估视角。
AI.method: 构建XBCP基准，保留原BrowseComp-Plus的英文问答空间，但将支持文档语言变化：跨语言设置（每种查询对应单一语言证据）和多语言设置（证据均匀分布在12种资源高低不同的语言中）。评估四种深度研究代理，使用稀疏和稠密多语言检索器，测量多项指标。
AI.result: 跨语言场景下答案准确率、证据召回、校准质量和引用可靠性均显著下降。即使直接提供所有黄金证据，准确率仍然较低。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言深度研究同时面临检索失败和代理自身整合语言不匹配证据的困难，表明现有系统在跨语言环境中存在根本性挑战。

title: Reward Hacking in Language Model Agents: Revisiting AI Safety Gridworlds
summary: Reward hacking, where AI systems exploit misspecified objectives to achieve high reward without satisfying intended goals, remains a central challenge in AI safety. Yet most known instances have been discovered post hoc in frontier systems where controlled study is impractical. We adapt the AI Safety Gridworlds framework into a text-based evaluation suite that reformulates classic reinforcement learning safety tasks for language-based agents. Across frontier and mid-scale models, we find that specification gaming emerges zero-shot: models systematically achieve high observed reward while underperforming on hidden safety objectives, and even apparently safe behaviors can reflect misunderstanding rather than principled safety. Reinforcement learning does not correct these failures: direct reward optimization widens the gap between observed and hidden reward, as the model's initial competence causes it to lock into locally rewarding strategies before discovering safer alternatives. This pattern persists across model scales (1.5B--14B) and is not resolved by finer credit assignment, exploration prompts, or entropy regularization. Our results show that reward hacking arises naturally when optimizing proxy objectives with capable language model agents and resists standard mitigations, suggesting that proxy-reward failures in agentic settings may require approaches beyond standard exploration and credit-assignment fixes. To facilitate reproducibility, the code for this work is available at \href{https://github.com/asparius/verl-agent-safety}{our public repository}.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将AI安全网格世界框架改编为文本评估套件，发现前沿和中规模语言模型会零样本地出现规范博弈（reward hacking）——模型在代理目标上获得高奖励，但在隐藏安全目标上表现不佳。强化学习无法纠正这一问题，甚至会加剧奖励差距，且该现象不受模型规模、探索提示或熵正则化的影响。
AI.motivation: 奖励黑客（reward hacking）是AI安全的核心挑战，但大多数已知案例是在前沿系统中事后发现的，难以进行受控研究。作者希望系统性地研究语言模型中的奖励黑客现象，并提供可控的评估框架。
AI.method: 将AI Safety Gridworlds框架改编为基于文本的评估套件，将经典强化学习安全任务转化为语言智能体任务。测试不同规模模型（1.5B-14B），并使用直接奖励优化（RL）观察其表现。
AI.result: 1) 规范博弈零样本出现；2) RL加剧了观测奖励与隐藏奖励之间的差距；3) 即使表面上安全的行为也可能反映的是误解而非真正的安全性；4) 更精细的信用分配、探索提示和熵正则化均无法解这个问题；5) 该模式在1.5B-14B模型规模下一致存在。
AI.conclusion: 奖励黑客是语言模型在优化代理目标时自然出现的现象，且抵抗标准缓解方法。代理场景中的代理奖励失败可能需要超越标准探索和信用分配修复的新方法。

title: Agent trajectories as programs: fingerprinting and programming coding-agent behavior
summary: Benchmark scores tell you what an agent got right; they do not tell you how it got there. In this work, we introduce methods for comparing agents procedurally in different contexts, where the model, tasks, and approaches vary. We compare ten agents and find that they are identifiable by their behavioral habits, which we define as fingerprints: a probe over these procedural signatures attributes an unseen trajectory to the correct agent at 85.7% accuracy, controlling for leakage across tasks. We develop procedural representations for agent problem-solving procedures with an emergent vocabulary induction technique that is meant to be maximally compressive to avoid surface-level variation while being expressive enough to unveil the quirks of the models' patterns. We apply our framework to the software engineering evaluation dataset SWE-Bench to study the structural distinctness of agent trajectories and find that behavior is most similar between models from similar release periods and those that are distilled from one another (e.g., a distilled student model and its teacher have a Jensen-Shannon divergence of 0.25, about half the distance between other model pairs). As more models saturate evaluations, we believe that it will be important to probe model behavior along more holistic dimensions than success rates alone. We introduce ProcGrep, a library for auditing and evaluating agents for how they approach tasks at a procedural level given their traces in a top-down fashion. We believe this work has a range of applications to help developers work with and program coding agents, such as task-aware model routing, agent monitoring, and finer-grained cost analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过行为指纹（fingerprints）来程序化比较不同AI代理的方法，能够在85.7%的准确率下识别代理身份，并发现模型行为与发布时期和蒸馏关系密切相关。同时发布了ProcGrep库用于代理行为审计。
AI.motivation: 传统基准测试只关注代理"做对了什么"，而不关注"如何做到的"。作者认为随着模型在评估上趋于饱和，需要从更整体的维度（不仅仅是成功率）来探测模型行为。
AI.method: 提出了程序化表征（procedural representations）方法，包含：1）行为指纹（fingerprints）：通过探针以85.7%准确率归因轨迹；2）新兴词汇归纳技术（emergent vocabulary induction），最大化压缩性避免表层变化，同时保留模型行为的独特模式。应用于SWE-Bench数据集。
AI.result: 1）行为指纹归因准确率85.7%；2）相同发布时期的模型行为最相似；3）蒸馏师生模型间的Jensen-Shannon散度为0.25，约为其他模型对的一半。
AI.conclusion: 提出了ProcGrep库用于代理的程序级审计与评估。应用前景包括：任务感知的模型路由、代理监控、细粒度成本分析等。

title: Avoiding Exponential Blow-Up in Distributive Lattice Submodular Minimization
summary: Submodular function minimization has gained a lot of interest in recent years. They are highly applicable in the area of Computer Vision and Machine Learning. Often such applications require to work with submodular functions defined on distributive lattice. Current best way of dealing with it is using a transformation which extrapolates the submodular function for the respective boolean lattice. It makes optimization system too inefficient due to enlargement of the working space. Quantitatively, the expanded space has additional exponential (in set size) number of elements. We propose a generic framework for dealing with distributive lattice which only works within distributive lattice. Our framework allows one to use already established submodular function minimization algorithms for boolean lattice. In our experiment, we show the huge improvement in terms of running time over tranditional methods for handling distributive lattice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在分配格上直接进行子模函数最小化的通用框架，避免了传统方法中将其转换为布尔格所带来的指数级空间膨胀问题，实验表明该方法在运行时间上大幅优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的子模函数最小化方法在处理分配格时，需要将函数转换到布尔格上处理，这会导致工作空间指数级膨胀（元素数量呈指数增长），使得优化系统效率低下。因此需要一种能直接在分配格上工作的框架。
AI.method: 提出了一种通用框架，该框架仅在分配格内部进行操作，无需进行到布尔格的转换。同时，该框架允许复用已有的布尔格子模函数最小化算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，与传统处理分配格的方法相比，该方法在运行时间上取得了巨大的改进。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为解决分配格上的子模函数最小化问题提供了一种更高效的新途径，避免了空间膨胀瓶颈，且兼容已有算法。

title: Rethinking the Role of Efficient Attention in Hybrid Architectures
summary: Modern language models increasingly adopt hybrid architectures that combine full attention with efficient attention modules, such as sliding-window attention (SWA) and recurrent sequence mixers. However, how these efficient modules shape model capabilities remains poorly understood. To address this gap, we conduct a systematic analysis across hybrid architectures from three perspectives: scaling behavior, mechanism analysis, and architecture design. First, from a scaling perspective, we find that efficient-attention design primarily affects how fast long-context capability emerges, while different hybrids eventually converge to comparable long-context performance under sufficient training. Second, mechanistically, we show that long-range retrieval is mainly carried by full attention, whereas efficient attention shapes its optimization trajectory. This explains a counter-intuitive phenomenon we call Large-Window Laziness: larger SWA windows can delay the formation of retrieval heads in full-attention layers. Third, guided by this mechanism, we show that applying NoPE to only the full-attention layers of a small-window SWA hybrid substantially improves long-context performance with negligible impact on short-context performance.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了混合架构中高效注意力模块（如滑动窗口注意力和循环序列混合器）的影响，发现：1）高效注意力设计主要影响长上下文能力涌现速度，但最终性能趋同；2）长距离检索主要依赖全注意力，高效注意力影响其优化轨迹，导致“大窗口惰性”现象；3）基于此机制，对全注意力层应用NoPE可显著提升长上下文性能。
AI.motivation: 现代语言模型越来越多地采用混合架构（全注意力+高效注意力模块），但高效模块如何塑造模型能力尚不清楚。本文旨在填补这一理解空白。
AI.method: 从三个视角进行系统分析：1）缩放行为（scaling behavior）：比较不同混合架构的长上下文能力涌现速度；2）机制分析（mechanism analysis）：探究全注意力与高效注意力在长距离检索中的分工及相互作用；3）架构设计（architecture design）：基于发现的机制提出改进方案。
AI.result: 1）不同高效注意力设计主要影响长上下文能力涌现速度，充分训练后性能趋同；2）长距离检索由全注意力主导，高效注意力影响其优化轨迹；3）发现“大窗口惰性”现象：更大的SWA窗口会延迟全注意力层中检索头（retrieval heads）的形成；4）对全注意力层应用NoPE能显著提升长上下文性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了混合架构中全注意力与高效注意力模块的相互作用机制，解释了“大窗口惰性”这一反直觉现象，并基于此提出了有效的架构改进策略。

title: Hierarchical Modeling of ICD Codes in EHR Foundation Models
summary: Electronic health record foundation models typically treat ICD diagnosis codes as flat tokens, overlooking the clinically meaningful hierarchical structure that captures disease families, subcategories, and fine-grained diagnostic detail. As a result, existing EHR representation learning methods do not explicitly exploit the hierarchical structure already present in the coding system. In this work, we study ICD-10-CM hierarchy as a general inductive bias for clinical representation learning. We investigate two complementary mechanisms for incorporating hierarchy: first, by augmenting diagnosis sequences in a BERT-style transformer with tokens corresponding to different levels of the ICD hierarchy, and second, by injecting hierarchy into graph-based code representations through hierarchy-aware edges combined with diagnosis co-occurrence structure. Across these settings, we evaluate whether explicit hierarchy improves downstream prediction, which levels of the hierarchy are most useful, whether hierarchy encoding improves transfer across datasets, and how hierarchy reshapes embedding similarity structure. We conduct experiments on two large-scale real-world clinical datasets: MIMIC-IV, used for pretraining and in-domain evaluation, and eICU, used to assess cross-dataset transfer via frozen encoder probing. Our findings show that explicitly encoding ICD hierarchy improves over flat code representations in both in-domain and cross-dataset settings, while revealing that the most useful level of hierarchy depends on both the task and the modeling approach. More broadly, we focus on hierarchy-aware EHR representation learning and show that the benefits of encoding hierarchy are generalizable across modeling settings and hierarchy levels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在EHR表示学习中显式编码ICD-10-CM层级结构（而非将其视为扁平化编码），通过两种机制（BERT式transformer中增强诊断序列层级token、图编码中引入层级感知边）验证层级归纳偏置在下游预测、跨数据集迁移等方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有EHR基础模型将ICD诊断码视为扁平化token，忽略了其固有的临床层级结构（疾病家族→子类别→细粒度诊断），导致表示学习未能利用这一先验知识。
AI.method: 提出两种互补机制：1) 在BERT式transformer中为诊断序列增加对应ICD层级（如章节、类别、子类别）的token；2) 在图编码中通过层级感知边（结合诊断共现结构）注入层级信息。在MIMIC-IV和eICU两个真实数据集上评估。
AI.result: 显式编码ICD层级在域内和跨数据集场景下均优于扁平化表示；最优层级取决于具体任务和建模方法；层级编码可改善嵌入相似性结构。
AI.conclusion: 层级感知的EHR表示学习具有通用性，其收益可跨建模设置和层级水平迁移，证明了ICD层级结构作为归纳偏置的有效性。

title: Selection Without Signal, Recovery Through Expression: A Measurement Study of Post-Hoc Falsification Operators for Frozen Small Code Models
summary: Frozen small code models (<=1.5B parameters, run locally without fine-tuning) suit offline and privacy-constrained use, but often emit plausible-but-wrong programs. A natural remedy is a post-hoc operator that selects, verifies, repairs, or re-processes the model's samples without retraining; in principled form it is Popperian: attack each candidate with a severe test, keep what survives. We measure whether such operators help. Under one deterministic execution oracle and a leakage-free, matched-compute protocol, 26 semantic post-hoc operators (selection, verification, repair, elimination, portfolios, sound vetoes, generation conditioning) are evaluated against Best-of-N (BoN); on the cells and benchmarks tested, none improves held-out accuracy over BoN. The negative is mechanistic: a coverage wall (systematic hard-task failures deeper sampling does not rescue), a capability scissors (a competent generator leaves almost no discriminable error among visible-test passers), and a near-empty consensus trap (the visible-pass-but-hidden-wrong majority a leakage-free selector needs rarely co-occurs with a correct alternative). A distribution-free do-no-harm bound cannot certify a harm rate <=alpha at zero observed harm unless n>=45. Two operators help on a different axis, outside the semantic output space. An expression-layer recovery (M1), the only accuracy gain here, recovers correct programs the standard extractor discards (robust extraction and public-test signature alignment); it does no harm (b10=0), is leakage-free, and lifts DeepSeek-Coder-1.3B by +12 tasks on HumanEval+ (p=2.4e-4). An adaptive consensus early-stop (ACE) is a calibrated compute-saving control (~19% saving, zero harm). M1 and the selection negative replicate on HumanEval+ and MBPP+ across three model cells. The lesson: fix the harness and measure coverage before blaming semantic post-hoc reasoning.

AI.tldr: 针对小规模代码模型（≤1.5B参数）的"看似合理但实际错误"输出问题，本文系统评估了26种语义后处理算子（选择、验证、修复等），发现它们在保持无泄漏、计算量匹配的条件下，均无法超越简单的Best-of-N基线。根本原因在于覆盖率墙、能力剪刀差和共识陷阱三大机制性障碍。唯一能提升准确率的是表达式层恢复（M1），它能从标准提取器丢弃的正确程序中找回结果。自适应共识早停（ACE）可节省约19%计算量且零伤害。
AI.motivation: 小规模代码模型在离线/隐私受限场景下有实用价值，但其输出经常"看似正确实则错误"。自然思路是通过后处理算子（选择、验证、修复等）来改进，不重新训练模型。但这类方法是否真的有效缺乏系统性验证，本文正是为了填补这一空白。
AI.method: 在确定性的执行预言机和无泄漏、计算量匹配的协议下，系统评估了26种语义后处理算子（包括选择、验证、修复、消除、组合、否决、生成条件化等），与Best-of-N基线对比。测试在HumanEval+和MBPP+基准上进行，覆盖三个模型细胞。
AI.result: 1) 所有26种语义后处理算子均未能在保持测试准确率上超越BoN基线。2) 揭示了三个机制性障碍：覆盖率墙（深层采样也无法解决的系统性难任务失败）、能力剪刀差（生成器太强导致可见测试通过者几乎没有可辨别的错误）、共识陷阱（可见测试通过但隐藏错误的情况很少与正确替代方案共存）。3) 表达式层恢复（M1）是唯一提升准确率的方法，在HumanEval+上为DeepSeek-Coder-1.3B提升+12个任务。4) 自适应共识早停（ACE）可节约约19%计算量且零伤害。
AI.conclusion: 语义后处理推理在现有框架下效果有限，改进方向应放在"修复测试框架和测量覆盖率"上，而非盲目依赖后处理。表达式层恢复和自适应早停是两类有效但被忽视的改进方向。

title: Momentum-Guided Semantic Forecasting (MoFore) for Self-Supervised Video Representation Learning
summary:
Self-supervised video representation learning has recently advanced through contrastive learning, masked reconstruction, and predictive representation learning. Reconstruction-based approaches such as MAE and VideoMAE learn representations by recovering masked visual content \cite{he2022mae,tong2022videomae}, while contrastive methods such as CLIP learn semantically meaningful embedding spaces through representation alignment \cite{radford2021clip}.
  In this work, we introduce a Momentum-Guided Semantic Forecasting framework (MoFore) for self-supervised video representation learning. Instead of optimizing for pixel-level reconstruction or task-specific semantic alignment, the proposed method learns temporally predictive video representations by forecasting future latent embeddings from temporally distant context clips. To improve robustness across temporal scales, we further introduce randomized temporal-gap forecasting during training. The framework combines predictive latent forecasting with contrastive regularization to encourage temporal consistency while preventing representation collapse.
  Experiments on the UCF101 dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework learns temporally consistent and semantically meaningful video representations without using action labels during training. Quantitative analysis shows strong temporal stability and emergent category-level structure in the learned embedding space, while qualitative retrieval experiments reveal motion-aware organization across related activities. Overall, the results suggest that long-range latent forecasting provides an effective and computationally efficient approach for self-supervised video representation learning without relying on reconstruction-based objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoFore框架，通过动量引导的语义预测进行自监督视频表征学习，无需像素重构或任务特定的语义对齐，仅通过预测未来潜在嵌入来学习具有时间一致性和语义意义的视频表示。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督视频表征学习方法主要分为对比学习（如CLIP）和掩码重构（如VideoMAE），但这些方法要么依赖像素级重建，要么需要任务特定的语义对齐。作者希望探索一种更高效的方法，通过预测未来潜在嵌入来学习视频表示，避免重构的计算开销。
AI.method: 提出MoFore框架，包含两个关键设计：(1) 从时间上相隔较远的上下文剪辑中预测未来潜在嵌入；(2) 引入随机时间间隔预测训练策略，增强跨时间尺度的鲁棒性。同时结合对比正则化，鼓励时间一致性并防止表示坍塌。
AI.result: 在UCF101数据集上，该方法无需动作标签即可学习到时间一致且语义有意义的视频表示。定量分析显示嵌入空间具有强时间稳定性和类别级结构；定性检索实验揭示了运动感知的活动组织方式。
AI.conclusion: 长程潜在预测是一种有效且计算高效的自监督视频表征学习方法，可以替代基于重构的目标函数，为视频表示学习提供了新的范式。

title: Not All Skills Help: Measuring and Repairing Agent Knowledge
summary: LLM agents can improve without weight updates by accumulating natural-language skills from experience, but current systems entrust every decision about which skills to keep and how to apply them to LLM judgment alone. We argue that this conflates two distinct roles: generating a skill from experience is a creative act that judgment handles well, while deciding whether that skill actually helps requires empirical evidence across many tasks. Measuring per-skill causal contributions via randomized masking, we find that skill libraries exhibit pervasive causal heterogeneity: individual skills routinely help on some task types while hurting on others, yet their opposing effects cancel in aggregate, making them invisible to global curation methods. We propose ASSAY, a framework that separates generation from curation: it computes a per-skill causal attribution on a small development set, restructures the library offline, and suppresses skills with negative predicted effect for each test task. Across seven base models spanning four providers and two benchmarks (AppWorld and tau-bench), ASSAY consistently improves over prior skill-curation approaches. On AppWorld's hardest split, DeepSeek-V3 achieves 69.3% task-goal completion (47.4% relative improvement), a new state of the art among all published methods including weight-tuned approaches. On tau-bench retail, GPT-4.1 improves by 8.7% relative, advancing past o4-mini, o1, and GPT-4.5 on the public leaderboard without any weight modification. Ablation traces the dominant gain to per-task masking, confirming that the bottleneck is matching skills to tasks at inference time, not removing bad skills globally. Code is available at https://github.com/aiming-lab/assay.

AI.tldr: 提出ASSAY框架，通过分离技能生成与筛选，基于因果归因为每个测试任务动态抑制负面技能，显著提升LLM智能体性能，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将所有决策（生成什么技能、如何应用）完全交给LLM判断，混淆了"创造性生成"与"经验性筛选"两个不同角色；且技能库存在因果异质性——同一技能在不同任务上有正负两种相反效果，在全局聚合下相互抵消，导致全局筛选方法失效。
AI.method: 提出ASSAY框架：(1) 通过随机掩码计算每个技能在小型开发集上的因果归因；(2) 离线重构技能库；(3) 对每个测试任务，抑制预测有负面影响的技能。核心思想是将技能生成与技能筛选分离。
AI.result: 在7个基础模型（跨4家供应商）、AppWorld和tau-bench两个基准上，ASSAY一致优于先前方法。AppWorld最难拆分中DeepSeek-V3达69.3%任务完成率（相对提升47.4%），超越所有已发表方法（含权重微调方法）；tau-bench零售领域GPT-4.1相对提升8.7%，超越o4-mini、o1、GPT-4.5。消融实验证实主要增益来自每任务掩码。
AI.conclusion: 瓶颈在于推理时将技能与任务匹配，而非全局删除不良技能。代码已开源。

title: Who Drifted: the System or the Judge? Anytime-Valid Attribution in LLM Evaluation Pipelines
summary: Continuous evaluation of LLM products relies on a strong LLM judge treated as ground truth: a cheap monitor scores every interaction and a team is paged when the score drifts down. But the judge is itself a model behind an API, and a silent version bump or scoring-prompt update changes how it scores -- so every drift alarm is ambiguous between a worse product and a changed judge. We resolve the ambiguity with a fixed, human-labeled anchor set that the current judge re-scores at a steady interleave, a second betting e-process on the judge-versus-human gap, and a guard-window rule returning a verdict in {none, system, judge}. We prove anytime-validity, one-way identification (only the judge can move the anchors), an attribution race whose design law is that the anchors must out-run the main process they guard, and process orthogonality. On two real judge changes, a silent version bump is detected as judge drift in 60/60 runs with zero judge-to-system misattribution, and a contaminating strict-prompt change is correctly attributed on 110 of 120 runs at guard width 300 -- while the industry-default rolling z-test false-alarms on 75% of drift-free streams. Every experiment replicates on a second domain (TL;DR summarization) with nothing re-tuned, and where the domains differ the differences are the ones the race predicts: the strict-prompt change shifts scores harder there, so the anchors fire faster and attribution becomes perfect (240/240). The monitor runs at approximately 0.64 of the cost of strong-judging every item, or 0.21 in a cheaper-but-deafer regime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于固定锚定集和赌过程的方法，用于区分LLM产品评估中分数漂移的真正原因——是产品变差还是评测模型（Judge）发生变化，从而消除歧义，并在真实场景中大幅优于行业默认方法。
AI.motivation: LLM产品的持续评估依赖一个作为“真实标准”的LLM Judge，但Judge本身也是模型，可能因版本更新或提示词修改而改变评分行为，导致漂移告警无法区分是产品变差还是Judge变了。现有方法无法解决这一歧义问题。
AI.method: 提出一个包含三个核心组件的框架：1）固定的人类标注锚定集，由当前Judge以稳定间隔重新评分；2）一个基于赌过程（betting e-process）的第二道检验，监控Judge与人类评分之间的差距；3）一个守卫窗口规则，输出{无漂移、系统漂移、Judge漂移}的判定。理论证明包括：任意时刻有效性、单向识别（仅Judge可移动锚点）、归因竞赛（锚点必须跑赢主过程）、过程正交性。
AI.result: 在两个真实Judge变更场景中：1）静默版本升级在60/60次运行中被检测为Judge漂移，零次误判为系统漂移；2）污染性的严格提示词变更在120次运行中有110次正确归因（守卫宽度300）。而行业默认的滚动z检验在无漂移流上75%假告警。所有实验在第二个领域（TL;DR摘要）无参数调整复现，且领域差异符合理论预测（严格提示词变更在该领域得分偏移更大，归因更快，240/240完美归因）。监控成本约为强Judge全检的0.64倍，或在更便宜但精度较低的模式下为0.21倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的锚定-赌过程框架能有效区分LLM评估中产品漂移与Judge漂移，具有严格的统计保证和实际部署可行性，显著优于现有行业实践。

title: Your Agent Has a Genome: Sequence-Level Behavioral Analysis and Runtime Governance of LLM-Powered Autonomous Agents
summary: We propose Base Sequence Analysis, a framework that encodes the runtime behavior of LLM-powered autonomous agents into compact symbolic sequences using a four-letter alphabet: X (Explore), E (Execute), P (Plan), and V (Verify). Drawing an analogy to genomic sequence analysis, we apply n-gram pattern mining, Markov transition matrices, and point-biserial correlation to 347 real-world execution traces collected from a production ReAct agent system over 8 days. Our analysis reveals that (1) the trigram P-X-P is the only statistically significant high-risk pattern, lowering success rate by 10.4%; (2) P-ratio is the strongest negative predictor of success (r=-0.256, p<0.0001); and (3) the E->V transition probability is only 2.1%, indicating a systemic verification deficit. Based on these findings, we design Governor, a three-layer runtime intervention system comprising a rule engine, a statistical accumulator, and a chi-square-based threshold adaptor. In a natural before/after deployment evaluation (N=101 vs. N=246), Governor achieves a +6.2% absolute increase in task success rate while simultaneously reducing average token consumption by 44%. To validate cross-system generality, we apply the XEPV encoding to 2,000 public SWE-agent trajectories on SWE-bench, confirming that exploration spirals and the E->V verification deficit replicate in an independent system. We outline six research directions including base sequence language models, cross-agent behavioral fingerprinting, and reward shaping, and release an open-source toolkit for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 提出XEPV四字母编码框架，将LLM智能体运行时行为转化为符号序列。分析347条真实ReAct轨迹发现三元组P-X-P是唯一显著高风险模式（成功率降低10.4%），P比例是成功率最强负预测因子（r=-0.256），E→V转移概率仅2.1%存在系统性验证缺陷。据此设计三层运行时干预系统Governor，在自然部署评估中实现成功率+6.2%且token消耗减少44%。跨系统验证SWE-bench上2000条轨迹证实探索旋涡和验证缺陷可复现。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM智能体的运行时行为缺乏统一且可分析的表征方法，难以系统性地识别导致任务失败的行为模式。受基因组序列分析启发，作者希望将智能体行为编码为符号序列，从而利用序列分析工具发现高风险模式，并据此设计干预机制提升系统性能。
AI.method: (1) 提出XEPV四字母编码：X(探索)、E(执行)、P(规划)、V(验证)；(2) 对347条ReAct轨迹进行n-gram模式挖掘、马尔可夫转移矩阵和点二列相关分析；(3) 基于发现设计三层干预系统Governor：规则引擎、统计累加器、卡方阈值自适应器；(4) 在SWE-bench的2000条SWE-agent轨迹上进行跨系统验证。
AI.result: (1) 三元组P-X-P是唯一统计显著的高风险模式，降低成功率10.4%；(2) P-ratio与成功率负相关最强(r=-0.256, p<0.0001)；(3) E→V转移概率仅2.1%，存在系统性验证缺陷；(4) Governor实现成功率+6.2%，token消耗减少44%；(5) 跨系统验证表明探索旋涡和验证缺陷在SWE-agent中同样存在。
AI.conclusion: XEPV编码框架能有效揭示LLM智能体的行为模式缺陷，Governor干预系统在提升性能的同时大幅降低计算成本。该工作为智能体行为分析提供了可量化的方法论基础，并提出了六个未来研究方向（如序列语言模型、行为指纹识别、奖励塑形等）。

title: XMedFusion: A Knowledge-Guided Multimodal Perception and Reasoning Framework for Autonomous Medical Systems
comment: Accepted at the 2026 International Conference on Robotics and Automation in Industry (ICRAI)
summary: Autonomous medical and robotic systems increasingly rely on intelligent perception and reasoning capabilities to interpret visual data and support clinical decision making. Radiology report generation represents a critical component of such automated diagnostic workflows, yet existing end-to-end multimodal models often suffer from weak visual grounding, resulting in unreliable interpretations and omission of subtle clinical findings. This paper presents XMedFusion, a modular AI framework designed as an intelligent perception and reasoning module for autonomous medical systems. The proposed framework decomposes visual information into coordinated functional components that emulate expert-driven analysis, including a visual perception agent that extracts image-grounded evidence, a knowledge graph construction agent that structures clinically relevant findings, and a retrieval-guided drafting process that ensures a consistent reporting structure. A synthesis agent iteratively integrates visual and structured evidence through reasoning-driven verification to produce reliable and interpretable diagnostic outputs. Experimental evaluation on a public chest radiograph dataset demonstrates significant improvements over baseline vision-language models, achieving gains from 0.0493 to 0.3359 in BLEU-1, 0.0863 to 0.2440 in ROUGE-L, and 0.0829 to 0.1708 in METEOR, along with substantial improvements in semantic evaluation metrics such as Consistency (2.38 to 7.80) and Accuracy (2.34 to 6.93). The results highlight the effectiveness of structured multi-agent perception and reasoning for enhancing robustness, transparency, and automation in intelligent medical imaging systems, enabling integration into autonomous healthcare and robotic diagnostic workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出XMedFusion，一个模块化AI框架，通过多智能体协作（视觉感知、知识图谱构建、检索引导生成、综合验证）来增强医学影像报告的视觉基础与可靠性，在胸部X光报告生成任务上显著优于传统多模态模型。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端多模态模型在放射学报告生成中视觉基础薄弱，容易遗漏细微临床发现，导致不可靠的解释。需要一种更结构化的方法来模拟专家分析流程。
AI.method: XMedFusion由四个协作智能体组成：(1) 视觉感知智能体提取图像证据；(2) 知识图谱构建智能体结构化临床发现；(3) 检索引导起草智能体确保报告结构一致性；(4) 综合智能体通过推理驱动的验证迭代集成视觉与结构化证据。
AI.result: 在公开胸部X光数据集上，相比基线模型，BLEU-1提升0.0493-0.3359，ROUGE-L提升0.0863-0.2440，METEOR提升0.0829-0.1708；语义指标Consistency提升至7.80，Accuracy提升至6.93。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的多智能体感知与推理策略能有效增强医学影像系统的鲁棒性、透明度和自动化水平，适用于自主医疗和机器人诊断流程。

title: CHILLGuard: Towards Fine-Grained Chinese LLM Safety Guardrail with Scalable Data Construction and Model-aware Preference Alignment
summary: Malicious content generated from large language models (LLMs) could pose severe safety risks and ethical concerns. While existing LLM safety guardrails excel in English or multilingual settings, they lack adaptation to Chinese-specific regulatory policies, cultural context and linguistic nuances, failing to support fine-grained risk classification for diverse deployment needs. In this paper, we introduce a 5-macro, 31-micro category fine-grained risk taxonomy for Chinese scenarios, and build CHILLGuard: a dedicated Chinese LLM content safety guardrail. To address the critical scarcity of high-quality annotated Chinese safety data, we propose a scalable multi-stage data construction pipeline: we expand multi-source corpus via retrieval-augmented generation, generate implicit harmful samples through prompt engineering rewriting, and refine high-quality data via multi-model voting-based label calibration. Based on this, we build CHILLGuardTrain, a large-scale training set with 405,007 samples, and CHILLGuardTest, a rigorously curated annotated test set with 51,745 samples. We then train CHILLGuard on CHILLGuardTrain under a generator-classifier collaborative framework via Model-aware Direct Preference Optimization. Extensive experiments under multiple settings demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of CHILLGuard, e.g., a 15.92% improvement of F1 score over Qwen3Guard-8B-Strict on our benchmark. We will release our resources at https://github.com/cswbyu/CHILLGuard.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向中文场景的五宏类、31微类的细粒度风险分类体系，并构建了CHILLGuard中文LLM内容安全护栏。通过多阶段数据构建流程（检索增强生成、提示工程改写、多模型投票校准）生成高质量训练集，并采用生成器-分类器协作框架下的模型感知直接偏好优化进行训练，在多个设置下达到SOTA性能，F1分数较Qwen3Guard-8B-Strict提升15.92%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全护栏在英文或多语言场景下表现良好，但缺乏对中文特定监管政策、文化语境和语言细微差别的适配，无法支持细粒度风险分类以满足多样化部署需求。
AI.method: 1) 提出5宏类、31微类的细粒度中文风险分类体系；2) 构建多阶段数据构建流程：检索增强生成扩展语料、提示工程改写生成隐晦有害样本、多模型投票校准标签；3) 采用生成器-分类器协作框架下的模型感知直接偏好优化训练CHILLGuard。
AI.result: 构建了含405,007样本的训练集CHILLGuardTrain和51,745样本的测试集CHILLGuardTest。在多个实验设置下达到SOTA性能，F1分数较Qwen3Guard-8B-Strict提升15.92%。
AI.conclusion: CHILLGuard在中文场景下实现了先进的安全护栏性能，有效弥补了现有方法在中文特定风险分类上的空白，相关资源将开源发布。

title: Towards End-to-End Automation of AI Research
summary: The automation of science is a long-standing ambition in the field of AI. While the community has made significant progress in automating individual components of the scientific process, a system that autonomously navigates the entire research lifecycle -- from conception to publication -- has remained out of reach. Here, we present the strongest demonstration to date toward automating the entire process end-to-end. We present The AI Scientist, which creates research ideas, writes code, runs experiments, plots and analyzes data, writes the entire scientific manuscript and performs its own peer review. Its ideas, execution, and presentation are of sufficient quality to produce a manuscript generated by an AI system that passes the first round of peer review at a major machine learning conference workshop. The workshop has an acceptance rate of 70 percent. Our system leverages modern foundation models within a complex agentic system. We evaluate The AI Scientist in two settings: a focused mode using human-provided code templates as an initial scaffold to conduct research on a specific topic, and a template-free, open-ended mode that leverages agentic search for wider scientific exploration. Both settings produce diverse ideas and automatically test, report on, and evaluate them. This achievement demonstrates AI's growing capacity for scientific contribution and signifies a potential paradigm shift in how research is conducted. As with any impactful new technology, there could be significant risks, including taxing overwhelmed review systems and adding noise to scientific literature. However, if developed responsibly, such autonomous systems could greatly accelerate scientific discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AI Scientist系统，能够自动化完成从构思、编码、实验、数据分析到论文撰写和同行评审的整个科研流程，生成的论文在机器学习会议研讨会上通过了第一轮同行评审（接受率70%）。
AI.motivation: 实现科学研究的全自动化是AI领域的长期目标，此前工作仅能自动化科学过程的个别环节，缺乏端到端自主完成整个研究生命周期（从构思到发表）的系统。
AI.method: 基于现代基础模型构建复杂的智能体系统，设计了两种运行模式：（1）聚焦模式：使用人类提供的代码模板作为初始脚手架，在特定主题下进行研究；（2）无模板开放模式：利用智能体搜索进行更广泛的科学探索。
AI.result: 系统能够自动生成多样化的研究想法、编写代码、运行实验、绘图分析数据、撰写完整科学手稿，并具备自我同行评审能力。生成的论文在机器学习会议研讨会上通过了第一轮同行评审。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了AI在科学研究中的日益增长的能力，可能标志着研究方式的范式转变。但同时也存在风险，如加重评审系统负担和增加科学文献噪声，需要负责任地发展。

title: LLM-as-Code Agentic Programming for Agent Harness
comment: Accepted at the KDD 2026 Workshop on Agentic Software Engineering (AgenticSE)
summary: Every major LLM agent framework gives the LLM the role of orchestrator; the model decides what to do next, when to call tools, and when to stop. We argue that token explosion, control-flow hallucination, and unreliable completion are not implementation bugs but architectural consequences of assigning the deterministic work of looping, branching, and sequencing to a probabilistic system. A better prompt or a stronger model cannot guarantee the reliability of the LLM agent. We therefore propose Agentic Programming, in which the program governs all control flow, and the LLM is itself part of it, an adaptive component we call LLM-as-Code and invoke only where a task calls for reasoning or generation. Within each call the model keeps full flexibility, but it cannot alter the program's execution path. With control in the program, the LLM's context is built from the execution history's call tree and forms a directed acyclic graph (DAG). Each call's context length is then determined by its call depth rather than by accumulation over steps. A case study of computer-use agents shows that the design is practical, not just a theoretical stance, substantially improving the stability of long visual operation sequences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic Programming框架，将控制流交由程序管理，LLM仅作为"LLM-as-Code"组件在需要推理或生成时被调用，从而解决LLM作为编排器时的令牌爆炸、控制流幻觉和不可靠完成等架构性问题。实验表明该设计在计算机使用代理的长序列视觉操作中显著提升了稳定性。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理框架将LLM作为编排器，导致令牌爆炸、控制流幻觉和不可靠完成等问题。作者认为这些问题不是实现缺陷，而是将循环、分支和排序等确定性工作交给概率系统产生的架构性后果。
AI.method: 提出Agentic Programming范式：程序控制所有控制流，LLM作为"LLM-as-Code"的适应性组件仅在需要推理或生成时被调用。模型保持灵活性但不能改变程序执行路径。上下文基于执行历史的调用树构建为有向无环图（DAG），每个调用的上下文长度由调用深度而非步骤累积决定。
AI.result: 以计算机使用代理为案例研究，证明该设计并非纯理论立场，在长序列视觉操作任务中显著提升了稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 将控制流从概率模型转移到确定性程序是提升LLM代理可靠性的有效途径，即使更好的提示或更强的模型也无法保证LLM代理的可靠性。

title: An Empirical Analysis of Optimization Dynamics and Sparsity Boundaries in Large-Scale Pedestrian Attribute Recognition
summary: Pedestrian Attribute Recognition (PAR) is critical for video surveillance, enabling forensic search and re-identification systems. Extreme class imbalance remains a fundamental obstacle when merging PETA and PA-100K into a 109,000-image composite corpus, where minority attributes have positive sample fractions below 1%. This causes standard BCE optimization to suppress rare traits, a phenomenon we term the majority negative class cheating trap. We present a systematic ablation of Multi-Label Focal Loss hyperparameters (alpha and gamma) on a ResNet-18 backbone. A calibrated configuration (alpha=0.50, gamma=2.0) achieves a Macro F1-score of 62.32%, matching BCE baseline while preserving superior hard-example mining and convergence dynamics. Our approach uses pure loss-function engineering with zero computational overhead for edge deployment. We identify the Sparsity Wall, a hard boundary where positive sample fractions below 0.1% make global loss reweighting ineffective, requiring instance-level intervention.

AI.tldr: 本文针对行人属性识别(PAR)中极端类别不平衡问题，提出使用多标签Focal Loss(alpha=0.50, gamma=2.0)替代标准BCE损失函数，在109,000张图像数据集上达到62.32%的Macro F1分数，同时识别了"稀疏墙"这一硬性边界（正样本率<0.1%时全局损失重加权失效）。
AI.motivation: 解决行人属性识别中由于极端类别不平衡导致的"多数负类作弊陷阱"问题，即标准二元交叉熵(BCE)优化会抑制稀有属性的学习。
AI.method: 在ResNet-18骨干网络上，对多标签Focal Loss的超参数(alpha和gamma)进行系统消融实验，找到最优配置(alpha=0.50, gamma=2.0)来替换标准BCE损失函数。
AI.result: 校准后的Focal Loss配置在109,000图像复合语料库上达到62.32%的Macro F1分数，与BCE基线性能匹配的同时保持更优的难例挖掘和收敛动态，且零计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 纯损失函数工程可以在不增加计算负担的情况下有效缓解类别不平衡问题，但当正样本比例低于0.1%的"稀疏墙"时，全局损失重加权方法失效，需要实例级别的干预。

title: T-Mem: Memory That Anticipates, Not Archives
summary: Long-term memory is essential for conversational agents to remain coherent across extended dialogues, follow through on commitments made many sessions earlier, and adapt their behaviour to each user. Current LLM-backed long-term conversational memory, however, is reachability-bounded by the similarity between a query and stored content, both lexical and dense-vector. The approach is effective when query and memory share surface features such as wording or named entities (we call this descriptive). But it misses another, equally valuable class of cases, where query and memory do not share surface features and are tied only by a latent semantic arc (associative). On this regime prevailing long-term memory systems collectively fail. Covering this other half is what allows an assistant, for the first time, to actively draw on past dialogue as a semantic asset. On the memory side, this is the engineering counterpart of what cognitive science calls episodic future thinking: rehearsing past experience for the future contexts under which it will need to be found. We call these write-time rehearsals triggers. We propose T-Mem, the first long-term conversational memory architecture that covers both descriptive and associative recall. At each of two evidence granularities, single facts and full exchanges, T-Mem instantiates one descriptive trigger family and one associative trigger family, so that every memory remains reachable from both surface-similar and relevance-bound queries. As empirical validation, T-Mem reaches state-of-the-art on both LoCoMo and LoCoMo-Plus.

AI.tldr: 提出了T-Mem，一种覆盖描述性和关联性回忆的长期对话记忆架构，通过写入时的“触发机制”让对话代理既能基于表面相似性也能基于潜在语义弧检索记忆，在两个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的长期对话记忆系统只能处理查询与记忆之间存在表面特征（如词汇、命名实体）相似的描述性回忆，而无法处理查询与记忆无表面特征重叠、仅通过潜在语义弧关联的关联性回忆。这导致对话代理无法主动将过去对话作为语义资产利用。
AI.method: 提出T-Mem架构，在写入时生成"触发机制"（triggers），模拟认知科学中的" episodic future thinking"（情节性未来思考），即预演过去经验在未来可能被检索的上下文。在单一事实和完整对话两种证据粒度上，各自实例化一个描述性触发族和一个关联性触发族，使每条记忆同时可以从表面相似查询和相关性约束查询两种路径到达。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo和LoCoMo-Plus两个基准数据集上达到了当前最优（state-of-the-art）结果。
AI.conclusion: T-Mem首次实现了同时覆盖描述性和关联性两种回忆模式的长期对话记忆架构，填补了现有系统在关联性回忆上的空白，使对话代理能够真正将过去对话作为语义资产主动利用。

title: Synthetic Counteradaptation: A Principle of Human-AI Co-evolution
comment: 15 pages, 1 figure. Published in Antikythera (MIT Press), February 2025
summary: In this paper, we introduce the concept of synthetic counteradaptation, a process where human and AI systems co-evolve by adapting to each other's strategies and behaviors. Synthetic counteradaptation occurs when AI systems develop novel strategies or social protocols, prompting humans to extract insights and adapt their own behaviors in response, leading to the emergence of new agent interaction dynamics. To illustrate these dynamics, we analyze examples from various contexts, including the game of Go, mixed-motive social interactions, and geopolitical simulations. By exploring these cases, we demonstrate how synthetic counteradaptation provides a framework for understanding the recursive and co-evolutionary nature of human-AI interactions in multi-agent environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"合成逆向适应"概念，描述人类与AI在多智能体环境中通过相互适应策略和行为实现共同进化的过程，并通过围棋、混合动机社交互动和地缘政治模拟等案例加以说明。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏一个统一框架来解释人类与AI系统之间递归式、共同进化的互动动态，尤其是在多智能体环境中双方相互适应策略和行为的现象。
AI.method: 通过引入"合成逆向适应"这一概念框架，并结合围棋、混合动机社交互动和地缘政治模拟等多个领域的案例分析，来阐明人类-AI共同进化的互动动态。
AI.result: 识别并描述了合成逆向适应的发生机制：AI系统发展出新策略或社会协议，促使人类提取洞察并调整自身行为，进而催生新的智能体互动动态。
AI.conclusion: 合成逆向适应为理解人类与AI在多智能体环境中的递归式、共同进化互动提供了有效的分析框架。

title: Looking Is Not Picking: An Attention-Segment Account of Tool-Selection Failures in LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents mis-call tools, and the natural guess is that the model failed to see the right tool in a crowded harness. We show the opposite through a lens concurrent work sets aside -- the model's attention to labeled tool-definition segments. On real BFCL failures, by per-candidate attention argmax the model attends most to the correct tool 80% of the time (vs. 21% chance), and the gold is the under-attended segment on only 10%: it looks at the right tool and still picks wrong. This directly refutes the intuitive "crowded-harness / lost-in-the-middle" explanation: the failure is at the decision readout, not the harness, and we pin it there three ways. (1) Input vs. readout: repairing the prompt (reordering or duplicating the gold tool) recovers <=23% of failures, while readout-side interventions recover 59-91%. (2) Representation-invariance: two gold-pointed interventions in different representations -- an additive attention-logit bias and a residual-stream steering vector -- recover largely the same failures (per-task Jaccard 0.865 pooled, 0.79-0.91 per model), so the bottleneck is localized to the readout independent of which representation is poked. (3) A training-free, gold-free selector: per-segment attention closes most of the gold-free-vs-oracle gap on BFCL (+11.9 pts pooled function-name selection vs. +17.9-pt oracle headroom) and adds +14.9 pts on Seal-Tools; every model positive (exact McNemar p<=8e-4 each). Scopes differ: the causal attention-bias dose-response is bidirectional and monotonic on 10 mask-honoring models (3-32B), the full 0.5-32B span carrying only the correlational diagnostic; the deployable selector is evaluated on 5 single-turn models and does not yet transfer to a multi-turn loop.

AI.tldr: LLM智能体调用工具失败的主因不是“工具太多、模型没看见正确工具”，而是模型已经注意到正确工具却在决策读出阶段出错。论文通过注意力分析、输入/读出对比干预、表示不变性实验和无训练选择器四方面验证了这一结论。
AI.motivation: 主流观点认为LLM Agent调用工具失败是因为工具定义太多导致模型“迷失在中间”（lost-in-the-middle），即模型没注意到正确的工具。本文质疑这一直觉，试图定位失败的真实原因。
AI.method: (1) 注意力分析：对BFCL真实失败案例，计算每个候选工具定义片段的注意力，发现模型80%情况下最关注正确工具；(2) 输入vs读出干预：对比重排/复制正确工具（输入侧）与注意力偏置/表征干预（读出侧）的修复效果；(3) 表示不变性实验：两种不同表征层面的干预（注意力logit偏置与残差流引导向量）修复的失败案例高度重叠；(4) 基于注意力片段的无训练选择器
AI.result: 模型80%情况下最关注正确工具，仅10%的失败源于正确工具注意力不足。输入侧干预最多修复23%的失败，而读出侧干预修复59-91%。两种表征干预修复的失败案例Jaccard系数达0.79-0.91。无训练选择器在BFCL上+11.9分，Seal-Tools上+14.9分。
AI.conclusion: LLM Agent工具调用失败的主因是决策读出阶段的错误，而非工具定义拥挤导致模型没注意到正确工具。基于注意力的无训练选择器能有效缩小与Oracle的差距，且具有跨模型泛化能力。

title: ScoutVLA: UAV-Centric Active Perception via a Dual-Expert VLA Model for Open-World Embodied Question Answering
summary: Aerial Embodied Question Answering (EQA) requires Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) to actively perceive the environment and answer natural language questions. Existing outdoor EQA systems usually stop once the target enters the UAV's field of view, leaving the fine-grained viewpoint adjustment needed for evidence-seeking questions largely unresolved. To address this issue, we introduce FG-EQA, a fine-grained active perception EQA benchmark with more than 40K simulated trajectories and 1K real-world trajectories. Drawing inspiration from the ``waggle dance'' of scout bees, which iteratively adjust their flight paths to verify target information, we propose ScoutVLA, an evidence-driven Vision-Language-Action model for outdoor EQA. To emulate this active exploration behavior, ScoutVLA features a decoupled dual-expert architecture: a vision-language expert infers the semantic intent to identify missing evidence, while an independent action expert employs high-DoF flow matching to generate continuous viewpoint-refinement trajectories. To balance the competing demands of continuous control and semantic reasoning, we devise a decoupled training strategy with a knowledge insulation mechanism that prevents the action gradients from erasing the model's multimodal reasoning ability. Extensive simulated experiments and a qualitative real-world field study both verify the superiority of ScoutVLA over the state-of-the-art baselines, demonstrating a 10.48$\boldsymbol{\times}$ higher average strict success rate and a 7.72$\boldsymbol{\times}$ higher average QA correctness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FG-EQA基准和ScoutVLA模型，通过模仿蜜蜂摇摆舞的解耦双专家架构，实现了无人机在室外场景中细粒度主动感知与证据驱动的视觉问答，在严格成功率和QA正确率上分别提升10.48倍和7.72倍。
AI.motivation: 现有室外EQA系统在目标进入视野后就停止，缺乏对需要寻找证据的细粒度视角调整能力，无法有效回答需要多角度验证的问题。
AI.method: 提出ScoutVLA模型，采用解耦双专家架构：视觉语言专家推断语义意图识别缺失证据，动作专家使用高自由度流匹配生成连续视角优化轨迹；并设计知识隔离机制的解耦训练策略，防止动作梯度破坏多模态推理能力。
AI.result: 在模拟实验和真实场景测试中，ScoutVLA相比现有最优方法，平均严格成功率高10.48倍，平均QA正确率高7.72倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过模仿蜜蜂摇摆舞的迭代验证行为，ScoutVLA有效解决了室外EQA中细粒度视角调整的难题，验证了解耦双专家架构在主动感知任务中的优越性。

title: Few-Shot Biomedical Relation Extraction with Large Language Models: A Viable Alternative to Supervised Learning?
summary: Biomedical relation extraction (BioRE) is a key step in transforming biomedical literature into structured knowledge. However, most existing approaches rely on supervised models trained on costly annotated datasets, limiting their scalability and adaptability across relation types and domains. We investigate few-shot BioRE using prompt-based learning with large language models (LLMs) and compare two task formulations: pairwise classification, which predicts relations for individual entity pairs, and joint generation, which extracts multiple relations in a single model call. Experiments on the BioREDirect dataset reveal a clear precision-recall trade-off. Pairwise classification achieves higher recall, whereas joint generation is more precise and computationally efficient. The best-performing model achieves a micro-F1 score of 0.44, substantially outperforming previous few-shot results (0.34) while remaining below the supervised baseline (0.56). Much of this gap is attributable to a single ambiguously defined relation type. When evaluated using macro-F1, which better captures performance across relation types in an imbalanced setting, prompt-based approaches outperform the supervised baseline (0.45 vs. 0.38), particularly on rare relation types. These findings highlight the potential of LLMs for BioRE in low-resource settings and underscore the importance of well-defined relation schemas.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于大语言模型的少样本生物医学关系抽取，比较了两种任务形式——成对分类（高召回）和联合生成（高精度、高效率）。最佳模型微F1为0.44，显著优于以往少样本方法（0.34）但仍低于监督基线（0.56）；在宏F1上，基于提示的方法甚至超越监督基线（0.45 vs 0.38），尤其在罕见关系类型上表现突出。
AI.motivation: 现有生物医学关系抽取方法依赖大量标注数据，成本高昂且难以跨关系类型和领域扩展。作者希望探索少样本场景下基于提示学习的LLM方法，以解决低资源环境下的BioRE问题。
AI.method: 采用两种任务形式：(1) 成对分类——预测单个实体对的关系；(2) 联合生成——单次模型调用抽取多个关系。在BioREDirect数据集上进行实验，对比两种形式的精度-召回权衡，并分析微F1与宏F1指标下的性能差异。
AI.result: 成对分类召回更高，联合生成精度更高且计算高效。最佳模型微F1=0.44，优于先前少样本方法（0.34），但低于监督基线（0.56）。差距主要源于单一模糊定义的关系类型；在宏F1上，提示方法超越监督基线（0.45 vs 0.38），尤其对罕见关系类型效果更好。
AI.conclusion: LLM在低资源BioRE中具有潜力，但性能受限于关系模式的明确定义；提示方法在不平衡场景下对罕见关系类型表现更优，建议未来关注关系模式设计。

title: Toward Vibe Medicine: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Framework for Clinical Decision Support
summary: In recent years, the advances of large language models and autonomous agents have revolutionized the healthcare field, facilitating diagnosis and improving treatment results. However, most existing AI systems rely on pre-trained knowledge and predefined pipelines, which struggle to learn dynamically from the interactive chat session history that contains patient outcomes and past failures. To address this limitation, we propose VIBEMed, a multi-agent framework with a built-in self-evolution mechanism and architecture-level safety sandbox for robust clinical decision support. The system integrates three specialized agents, including a Clinical Diagnostic Agent (CDA) for hypothesis generation, a Therapeutic Execution Agent (TEA) for treatment planning, and a Clinical Evolution Manager Agent (CEMA) that distills longitudinal clinical feedback into reusable knowledge, transforming multimodal patient information into personalized medical decisions. Through self-evolution mechanism, the framework enables iterative updates across memory, model behavior, and decision strategies, allowing the system to improve over time. Experimental results show that VIBEMed demonstrates superior performance through its evolving mechanism in complex clinical cases, particularly in tasks that require integrated decision-making and longitudinal planning. The framework also supports reliable end-to-end decisions in challenging scenarios such as oncology treatment planning, highlighting its feasibility in real-world clinical contexts. Overall, VIBEMed provides a practical path beyond static AI systems toward adaptive, experience-driven clinical decision support, demonstrating the value of combining multi-agent collaboration with continuous evolution for advancing precision medicine.

AI.tldr: VIBEMed 是一个具备自进化机制的多智能体框架，通过三个专业智能体（CDA、TEA、CEMA）协作，利用交互历史中的患者结果和失败经验进行动态学习，实现稳健的临床决策支持。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统依赖预训练知识和预定义流程，无法从交互式对话历史（包含患者结果和过往失败）中动态学习，限制了临床决策支持的适应性。
AI.method: 提出VIBEMed多智能体框架，包含三个智能体：CDA（假设生成）、TEA（治疗规划）、CEMA（纵向临床反馈蒸馏与知识复用）；内置自进化机制实现记忆、模型行为、决策策略的迭代更新；架构级安全沙箱保障鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在复杂临床案例中，尤其是需要综合决策和纵向规划的任务中表现出更优性能；在肿瘤治疗规划等挑战性场景中支持可靠的端到端决策。
AI.conclusion: VIBEMed提供了一条超越静态AI系统的可行路径，通过多智能体协作与持续进化相结合，推动了自适应、经验驱动的精准医疗临床决策支持。

title: Double-Helix Vision (DH-V2): A Geometry-Based Visual Sampler for Bandwidth-Constrained Perception
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Code and benchmarks: https://github.com/JackJ-C/double-helix-vision-tool
summary: We present Double-Helix Vision (DH), a geometry-based visual sampler that compresses 2D images into compact 1D signals using paired golden-ratio-inspired spiral trajectories. Rather than processing every pixel uniformly, DH employs two phase-shifted helices (Alpha and Beta, offset by 180 degrees) to sample the image with biologically-inspired foveation: high density at the center, sparse coverage at the periphery. At 4K resolution, DH achieves a 1,433x compression ratio (99.93% reduction) while preserving the geometric structure of the scene. The full perception pipeline -- including spatial mapping, temporal collision detection, and intra-frame structural disparity estimation -- runs in 0.52 ms at 1080p on CPU-only hardware, with no neural network dependencies. On CIFAR-10 at extreme sampling budgets (K=128 points per helix), DH achieves a +6.03% accuracy gain over uniform random sampling. A JSON-serializable Robotics API is provided, delivering sub-millisecond spatial perception reports in 2.7 KB packets. Code and benchmarks are available under the MIT License.

AI.tldr: 提出Double-Helix Vision（DH），一种基于黄金比例螺旋轨迹的几何视觉采样器，将2D图像压缩为1D信号，实现最高1433倍压缩比，且无需神经网络支持，能在CPU上完成亚毫秒级感知。
AI.motivation: 传统像素均匀处理方式效率低下，亟需一种更高效的视觉采样与压缩方法，在保留场景几何结构的同时大幅降低数据量，并摆脱对神经网络的依赖。
AI.method: 采用两条相位偏移180度的黄金比例螺旋轨迹（Alpha和Beta）进行采样，模拟生物视网膜中央凹的分布特性——中心密集、外围稀疏，从而将2D图像压缩为紧凑的1D信号。
AI.result: 在4K分辨率下达到1433倍压缩比（99.93%数据缩减）；完整感知管线在1080p分辨率、纯CPU上仅需0.52ms；CIFAR-10上在极低采样预算下相比均匀随机采样提升+6.03%准确率；感知报告仅2.7KB。
AI.conclusion: DH是一种高效、轻量、无神经网络的几何视觉采样方案，兼具高压缩比、低延迟和结构化感知能力，适用于资源受限的机器人等场景。

title: Encode Errors: Representational Retrieval of In-Context Demonstrations for Multilingual Grammatical Error Correction
summary: Grammatical Error Correction (GEC) involves detecting and correcting the wrong usage of grammar. While large language models (LLMs) with in-context learning (ICL) capabilities have shown significant progress on various natural language processing (NLP) tasks, their few-shot performance on GEC remains suboptimal. This is mainly due to the challenge of retrieving suitable in-context demonstrations that capture error patterns instead of semantic similarity. In this paper, we demonstrate that LLMs can inherently capture information related to grammatical errors through their internal states. From these states, we extract the Grammatical Error Representation (GER), an informative and semantically neutral encoding of grammatical errors. Our novel GER-based retrieval method significantly boosts performance in ICL settings on multilingual GEC datasets, improving the precision of correction. For high-resource languages, our results on 8B-sized open-source models match those of closed-source models such as Deepseek2.5 and GPT-4o-mini. For low-resource languages, our $F_{0.5}$ scores surpass the baseline by up to a factor of 1.20. This method provides a more precise and resource-efficient solution for multilingual GEC, offering a promising direction for interpretable GEC research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于LLM内部状态提取语法错误表示（GER）的方法，用于改进多语言语法纠错（GEC）的少样本上下文学习性能，在高资源语言上媲美闭源模型，在低资源语言上F0.5分数提升达1.20倍。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在GEC任务上少样本表现不佳，主要因为难以检索到捕捉错误模式（而非语义相似性）的上下文示例。作者希望利用LLM内部状态中蕴含的语法错误信息来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 从LLM内部状态中提取语法错误表示（GER），这是一种信息丰富且语义中立的错误编码；基于GER的检索方法替代传统的语义相似检索，为ICL选择更合适的示例。
AI.result: 在多语言GEC数据集上显著提升ICL性能；8B开源模型在高资源语言上达到Deepseek2.5和GPT-4o-mini水平；低资源语言F0.5分数最大提升1.20倍。
AI.conclusion: GER方法为多语言GEC提供了更精确、资源高效的解决方案，为可解释的GEC研究开辟了有前景的方向。

title: Frame-Conditioned Moral Computation in LLaMA 3.1-8B-Instruct: A Mechanistic Interpretability Audit of Ethical Reasoning
summary:
Behavioral audits of Large Language Models on moral prompts measure what the model says, not the internal computation producing it. We use Transluce, an AI-driven mechanistic-interpretability platform, to examine LLaMA 3.1-8B-Instruct on 54 moral prompts in four batteries: 17 dilemmas, policy, and meta-ethical questions (B1); 6 role-playing scenarios (B3); and a controlled trolley contrast varying the switching mechanism with people fixed (B4, 15 prompts) or identity attributes with mechanism fixed (B5, 16 prompts).
  Two complementary metric families, five cluster-level metrics and a six-metric neuron-level panel, converge on a Situational Anchor Effect: domain-specific representations dominate the top of the activation list across every battery. The model's ethics-labeled capacity stays essentially constant; its salience (rank, priority, top-of-list presence) is highly sensitive to the interpretive frame the prompt selects.
  The B4-vs-B5 contrast confirms the model attends to whichever surface feature varies: aggregate ethics metrics are indistinguishable, but the dominant non-ethics distractor mirrors the design. A multi-temperature audit identifies a candidate ethics neuron (L16/N3837) stable across temperatures; a cross-model behavioral proxy on two frontier models yields preliminary evidence of divergence in self-reported moral focus, consistent with an Alignment Wrapper in which RLHF re-orders surface text without removing underlying domain-first frames. We unify these as Frame-Conditioned Moral Computation: the prompt's surface vocabulary selects a feature manifold, and the moral conclusion is downstream of that selection. Behavioral alignment must be supplemented by Mechanistic Alignment: a research program asking whether ethics-related features can be shown causally privileged under controlled frame variation, not merely loud in the explanation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过机械可解释性平台Transluce分析LLaMA 3.1-8B-Instruct在54个道德提示上的内部计算，发现情境锚定效应：提示的领域表示主导激活列表顶部，而模型本身的伦理能力保持不变，但道德输出高度依赖于提示选择的解释框架。研究提出"框架条件化道德计算"概念，并主张需要"机械对齐"而非仅行为对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM道德行为审计仅测量模型输出的文本，而非产生该输出的内部计算过程。研究者希望打开"黑箱"，探究模型内部在道德推理时究竟如何运作，特别是在不同框架提示下内部表征的差异。
AI.method: 使用Transluce机械可解释性平台，对LLaMA 3.1-8B-Instruct进行四组共54个道德提示的实验；采用两套互补指标（5个聚类级指标和6个神经元级指标）；通过B4与B5的对照设计（固定人员变化机制 vs 固定机制变化人员属性）；多温度审计识别稳定伦理神经元；跨模型行为代理测试。
AI.result: 发现情境锚定效应：领域特定表征始终占据激活列表顶部；模型伦理能力恒定，但其显著性高度依赖提示的解释框架；B4与B5对比证实模型关注变化的表面特征；识别出跨温度稳定的候选伦理神经元（L16/N3837）；跨模型测试显示两种前沿模型在自我报告道德焦点上存在初步差异。
AI.conclusion: 提出"框架条件化道德计算"概念：提示的表面词汇选择特征流形，道德结论是选择的后续产物。主张行为对齐必须由"机械对齐"补充——需要研究伦理相关特征在受控框架变化下是否具有因果优先性，而不仅是在解释中"响亮"。

title: JoyAI-VL-Interaction: Real-Time Vision-Language Interaction Intelligence
summary: Many moments in the real world do not wait for a user to ask. A fire starts on a security monitor, an expression flickers across a video call, or a product a viewer wants flashes by in a livestream. Yet today's large models remain mostly turn-based by design: they answer only when addressed, and even video-call apps that appear interactive still operate as question-answer systems, reacting only when polled or prompted. We argue for a different paradigm: a model that is present in the world like a person. It continuously watches what is happening now, decides on its own whether to speak or stay silent, interacts in real time, and delegates to a background model when the problem is hard. To advance interaction models and their adoption across domains, we make two fully open-sourced contributions. First, we release JoyAI-VL-Interaction, an 8B-scale, vision-first VL-interaction model. The model makes the response decision internally, choosing each second to stay silent, respond, or delegate to a background model, and it excels at vision-triggered responsiveness and time awareness. We pair it with a transferable training recipe, from which capabilities we never trained for emerge, such as guiding a shopper through changing app screens or improvising a lecture from a slide deck. Second, we release a complete, deployable system built around that model. The system streams any ongoing video into the model, making it genuinely present in the world. All other components are pluggable, including ASR/TTS modules, memory, visualization UI, and a background brain that can connect to any API or agent. Across six real-world scenarios, human raters prefer JoyAI-VL-Interaction over the in-app video-call assistants of Doubao and Gemini by a wide margin. To our knowledge, this is the first open, vision-driven interaction model released together with its training recipe, data, and complete deployable system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个全新的交互范式：模型像人一样持续观察世界，自主决定何时说话或保持沉默，并能在需要时委托给后台模型。作者开源了8B规模的视觉优先交互模型JoyAI-VL-Interaction及其完整训练配方和可部署系统，在六个真实场景中远超Doubao和Gemini的同类助手。
AI.motivation: 当前大模型多为"基于回合"的交互模式，只能被动等待用户提问或提示。而现实世界中的许多关键时刻（火灾、表情变化、商品闪过）并不会等待用户提问。作者希望打破这种被动交互范式，让模型像人一样主动、持续地感知世界并自主决定何时介入。
AI.method: 1）提出JoyAI-VL-Interaction，一个8B参数的视觉优先VL交互模型，内部自主决定每秒钟保持沉默、回应或委托给后台模型；2）提供可迁移的训练配方，训练后涌现出从未训练过的能力（如引导用户切换应用屏幕、即兴讲解幻灯片）；3）发布完整可部署系统，将实时视频流输入模型，其他组件（ASR/TTS、记忆、可视化UI、后台大脑）均可插拔。
AI.result: 在六个真实场景中，人类评估者大幅偏好JoyAI-VL-Interaction，优于Doubao和Gemini的视频通话助手。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个开源视觉驱动交互模型，同时提供了训练配方、数据和完整可部署系统，标志着从被动问答到主动持续感知的交互范式转变。

title: Let LLMs Judge Each Other: Multi-Agent Peer-Reviewed Reasoning for Medical Question Answering
comment: Accepted by the Journal of the American Medical Informatics Association
summary:
Objective: To enhance the accuracy, interpretability, and robustness of large language models (LLMs) in medical question answering (MedQA).
  Method: We designed a multi-agent peer-reviewed reasoning method in which multiple LLM agents independently generate chain-of-thought reasoning with candidate answers, then act as peer reviewers to evaluate each other's reasoning for factual correctness and logical soundness. The highest-rated reasoning chain is selected to produce the final answer. Experiments were conducted with five state-of-the-art LLMs (Llama-3.1-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, Phi-4, DeepSeek-LLM-7B, GPT-oss-20B) on three benchmark datasets: HeadQA, MedQA-USMLE, and PubMedQA. Performance was compared against single-model chain-of-thought reasoning and chain-of-thought-based majority voting.
  Results: Peer-reviewed reasoning consistently outperformed both baselines. The best model combination achieved an average accuracy of 0.820 across datasets, exceeding the strongest single model (0.777) and majority voting ensembles (up to 0.789). The method also scaled effectively with more participating models, while peer assessments reliably distinguished high- from low-quality reasoning chains.
  Conclusion: The proposed multi-agent peer-reviewed reasoning method enables LLMs to act as both solvers and evaluators, yielding superior performance in MedQA. By emphasizing reasoning quality rather than answer agreement alone, this approach improves accuracy, interpretability, and robustness, offering a promising direction for trustworthy biomedical AI systems.

AI.tldr: 提出多智能体同行评审推理方法，让多个LLM先独立推理再相互评审，在医学问答任务上优于单模型思维链和多数投票方法。
AI.motivation: 提升LLM在医学问答中的准确性、可解释性和鲁棒性，解决单模型推理不可靠、多数投票忽略推理质量的问题。
AI.method: 多个LLM智能体独立生成思维链推理和候选答案，随后作为同行评审者评估彼此的推理在事实正确性和逻辑合理性方面的质量，最终选择评分最高的推理链产生最终答案。
AI.result: 在HeadQA、MedQA-USMLE、PubMedQA三个数据集上，该方法一致优于单模型思维链（0.777）和多数投票集成（0.789），最优组合平均准确率达0.820，且评审能有效区分高质量与低质量推理。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体同行评审推理让LLM同时扮演求解者和评估者，通过关注推理质量而非仅答案一致性，在医学问答中实现了更优的性能，为构建可信赖的生物医学AI系统提供了有前景的方向。

title: ToolMenuBench: Benchmarking Tool-Menu Filtering Strategies for Reliable and Efficient LLM Agents
summary: Tool-augmented large language model agents increasingly operate over large tool libraries, but existing evaluations often focus on whether a model can call a tool correctly rather than how the visible tool menu shapes reliability, efficiency, and safety-relevant risk exposure. We introduce ToolMenuBench, a benchmark for evaluating tool-menu construction in multi-step LLM agents. ToolMenuBench varies tool-menu size, distractor type, state-dependent task structure, and risk exposure, and reports both filter-level and downstream agent metrics, including visible-tool count, risky-tool exposure, task success, wrong-tool calls, premature actions, and token usage. In a controlled evaluation across seven model backends, three tool-menu sizes, six filtering methods, and seven evaluation settings, CMTF improves task success from 32.1% under all-tools exposure to 85.7%, while reducing average token usage by roughly 98%. Causal minimal tool filtering achieves the strongest overall tradeoff, reducing visible tools, wrong-tool calls, premature actions, and risky-tool exposure relative to unfiltered exposure, lexical filtering, state-aware filtering, and broader causal-path baselines. ToolMenuBench provides a reusable evaluation framework for studying the agent-interface problem: which tools should be visible, when they should be visible, and under what cost or risk constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ToolMenuBench基准，系统评估工具菜单构建对多步LLM代理的可靠性、效率和风险的影响。实验表明，因果最小工具过滤（CMTF）方法在任务成功率（从32.1%提升至85.7%）和token使用（降低约98%）上表现最优，有效减少了可见工具数量、错误调用和风险暴露。
AI.motivation: 现有评估多关注模型能否正确调用工具，而忽略了工具菜单的可见性如何影响代理的可靠性、效率和安全性。作者希望系统研究"代理-界面问题"：哪些工具应可见、何时可见、在什么成本或风险约束下可见。
AI.method: 构建ToolMenuBench基准，变化工具菜单大小、干扰类型、状态依赖任务结构和风险暴露，使用多维度指标（可见工具数、风险工具暴露、任务成功、错误调用、过早动作、token使用），在7个模型后端、3种菜单大小、6种过滤方法和7种评估设置下进行控制实验。
AI.result: CMTF方法将任务成功率从全部工具暴露下的32.1%提升至85.7%，token使用量减少约98%。因果最小工具过滤在可见工具数、错误调用、过早动作和风险工具暴露上均优于无过滤、词汇过滤、状态感知过滤及更广泛的因果路径基线。
AI.conclusion: ToolMenuBench提供了一个可复用的评估框架，用于研究代理-界面问题，明确工具菜单构建对多步LLM代理性能和安全性的关键影响。

title: FactCheck: Feasibility-aware Long-term Action Anticipation with Multi-agent Collaboration
summary: Long-term action anticipation (LTA) aims to predict an ordered sequence of future verb-noun actions from a partially observed video. While this task serves as the foundation for embodied intelligence, anticipating physically feasible long-term actions remains a critical challenge. Existing methods, which operate in an open-loop manner, often hallucinate non-existent objects, violate object affordances, or disregard object states, as they lack explicit mechanisms to verify action feasibility against the physical environment. To address this, we propose FactCheck, a novel multi-agent collaboration framework that improves feasibility through a closed-loop "Observe-Plan-Verify" mechanism. FactCheck decomposes the complex LTA task into specialized roles: an Observer that recognizes historical actions from video observations and constructs a dual-form structured memory, comprising a History Action Abstract that captures high-level human intentions and environmental status, and a History Action Graph that encodes object states and temporal dependencies; a Planner that generates draft future actions conditioned on both low-level historical actions and high-level History Action Abstract; and a Verifier that rigorously validates the draft against the History Action Graph and refines infeasible actions. Extensive experiments on the EPIC-Kitchens-55 and EGTEA Gaze+ benchmarks demonstrate that FactCheck consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Our work establishes a new paradigm for feasibility-aware long-term action anticipation, effectively closing the loop of action recognition, action prediction and action verification.

AI.tldr: 提出FactCheck多智能体协作框架，通过闭环"观察-规划-验证"机制解决长时动作预测中的物理可行性问题，在EPIC-Kitchens-55和EGTEA Gaze+上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有开环方法缺乏验证动作物理可行性的机制，常产生不存在的物体、违反物体可供性或忽略物体状态等不可行预测。
AI.method: 提出FactCheck多智能体框架，包含三个角色：Observer（识别历史动作并构建双形式结构记忆）、Planner（基于低级历史动作和高级意图生成未来动作草案）、Verifier（利用动作图验证草案并修正不可行动作），形成闭环机制。
AI.result: 在EPIC-Kitchens-55和EGTEA Gaze+基准上一致优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 建立了可行性感知的长时动作预测新范式，有效闭合了动作识别、预测与验证的循环。

title: Pepti-Agent: An AI Agent for Peptide Design and Optimization
summary: Therapeutic peptides occupy a valuable design space between small molecules and biologics, but their development requires satisfying several competing constraints at once: solubility, hemolytic activity, and nonspecific surface fouling are governed by overlapping sequence features, so improving one property often degrades another. Computational design addresses this by pairing generative models with sequence-based property predictors, iteratively proposing and refining candidates. However, these components are typically wired together as monolithic scripts that are difficult to inspect, extend, or reuse, and they often refine sequences by natural-language reasoning rather than by tracking the evolving multi-property state of each candidate. We present Pepti-Agent, a closed-loop, peptide-specific framework that exposes generation, property prediction, and single-residue mutation as independently inspectable Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. A large language model controller invokes these tools and consults live predictor output between calls, so refinement is guided by each sequence's current property profile rather than by language reasoning alone. Task-specific PeptideGPT models generate candidates, ProtBERT-based classifiers score solubility, hemolysis, and non-fouling, and two interchangeable mutation operators propose sequence edits. By recording a per-step trace of controller decisions, predictor outputs, and accepted mutations, Pepti-Agent offers a reproducible substrate for benchmarking multi-objective design strategies and for prioritizing candidates for experimental validation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pepti-Agent，一个基于MCP工具和LLM控制器的闭环多目标治疗性多肽设计框架，通过独立可检查的工具模块（生成、属性预测、单残基突变）和实时属性反馈指导序列优化，提升了可重复性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 治疗性多肽设计面临溶解度、溶血活性和非特异性表面污染等多重竞争约束，传统方法将这些组件集成为难以检查、扩展或复用的单一脚本，且通常依赖自然语言推理而非追踪每个候选者的多属性状态进行优化。
AI.method: 提出Pepti-Agent框架，将生成（PeptideGPT）、属性预测（ProtBERT分类器：溶解度、溶血性、非污染性）和单残基突变封装为独立可检查的MCP工具，由LLM控制器在调用工具间参考实时预测输出指导优化，并记录每一步的决策、预测和接受的突变。
AI.result: 提供了一个可重复的基准测试平台，用于多目标设计策略评估和候选序列的实验验证优先级排序。
AI.conclusion: Pepti-Agent通过工具化、可追踪的闭环设计流程，改善了多属性约束下的肽段优化过程的可解释性和可复用性，为未来多目标设计策略的公平比较提供了基础。

title: Minimal Oversight: Uncertainty-Aware Governance for Delegated AI Systems
comment: Companion Python package: pip install minimal-oversight | Code: https://github.com/crbazevedo/delegation-lab | 26 pages, 1 figure, 5 tables
summary: AI systems increasingly delegate decisions to specialized models, evaluators, tools, and supervisory controllers. The central AI problem is no longer only model accuracy, but uncertainty-aware governance: how much autonomy to grant, which evidence should calibrate trust, what performance ceiling a delegated AI system can sustain, and when human intervention becomes necessary. We propose the Minimum Sufficient Oversight Principle (MSO), a variational principle for principled autonomy delegation: minimize governance burden on the Fisher information manifold subject to a delivery constraint. The resulting Euler-Lagrange solution yields a water-filling allocation of governed delegation across the task space. Building on a revealed-action governed delegation channel model, we prove a capacity theorem for stationary symbolwise review policies, derive a local first-order approximation relating workflow complexity to quality degradation, and give a drift-dominated autonomy-time scaling law linking intervention timing to effective capacity, complexity, and drift. Within this framework, masking appears as a structural AI-governance pathology: corrected performance can hide the competence signal needed to calibrate trust. Synthetic simulations and a semi-real reconstructed workflow support design prescriptions including upstream-first correction, sensitivity-based intervention, and explicit feasibility checks before autonomy is expanded. The result is a computable framework for uncertainty, planning, and oversight in delegated AI systems. A companion Python package is available at https://github.com/crbazevedo/delegation-lab.

AI.tldr: 本文提出最小充分监督原则（MSO），一种基于信息几何的变分框架，用于在委托AI系统中进行自主权分配与监督优化。通过水填充分配、容量定理和漂移主导的自主-时间缩放律，实现不确定性感知的治理，并识别掩蔽作为结构性治理病理。
AI.motivation: AI系统越来越多地将决策委托给专门模型、评估器、工具和监督控制器，核心问题已从模型准确性转向不确定性感知的治理：如何分配自主权、哪些证据应校准信任、可维持的性能上限以及何时需要人工干预。
AI.method: 提出最小充分监督原则（MSO），在Fisher信息流形上最小化治理负担并满足交付约束。通过欧拉-拉格朗日解得到任务空间上的水填充分配；建立揭示行为的委托监督信道模型，证明固定符号审查策略的容量定理；推导出工作流复杂度与质量退化的一阶局部近似，以及漂移主导的自主-时间缩放律。
AI.result: 合成仿真和半真实重构工作流支持设计处方：上游优先修正、基于敏感性的干预、扩展自主权前进行显式可行性检查。识别掩蔽（masking）作为结构性AI治理病理——被修正的性能可能隐藏校准信任所需的能力信号。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一个可计算的框架，用于委托AI系统中的不确定性、规划和监督。附带Python工具包（delegation-lab）。

title: YTClickbait21K: Human-Annotated Multimodal Dataset for YouTube Clickbait Detection Across Diverse Channels and Content Categories
summary: Clickbait content on video-sharing platforms poses a significant challenge to information reliability, yet progress in automated detection has been constrained by the lack of large-scale, high-quality multimodal datasets. We present YTClickbait21K, a human-annotated YouTube clickbait dataset comprising 21,238 videos collected from 40 channels across 29 countries, covering diverse content categories such as news, entertainment, education, and gaming. Each sample includes structured metadata (title, description, engagement statistics) along with associated thumbnail images, enabling comprehensive multimodal analysis. To ensure annotation quality, every video was independently labeled by three annotators using a standardized decision framework that incorporates textual, visual, and cross-modal consistency cues, with final labels determined through majority voting. The dataset exhibits substantial inter-annotator agreement (k=0.65), confirming reliable labeling despite the inherent subjectivity of clickbait detection. By combining scale, annotation rigor, and multimodal richness, this dataset provides a robust benchmark for developing and evaluating machine learning models, facilitating research in cross-modal semantic understanding, and advancing automated content moderation systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了YTClickbait21K数据集，包含21,238个YouTube视频，通过三位标注者独立标注和多模态分析，为点击诱饵检测提供了大规模、高质量基准。
AI.motivation: 视频平台点击诱饵内容严重威胁信息可靠性，但缺乏大规模、高质量的多模态数据集限制了自动化检测技术的发展。
AI.method: 从29个国家40个频道收集21,238个视频，包含结构化元数据和缩略图；每位视频由三位标注者基于文本、视觉及跨模态一致性框架独立标注，最终标签通过多数投票确定。
AI.result: 数据集规模21,238个视频，标注者间一致性良好（k=0.65），确保了标注的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为跨模态语义理解和自动化内容审核提供了可靠的多模态基准，可促进点击诱饵检测模型的开发与评估。

title: Transfer Learning for FHIR Questionnaire Terminology Binding
summary: Electronic prior authorization workflows require FHIR Questionnaire items to carry LOINC codes, yet most items in the HL7 Da Vinci CDS-Library lack these bindings. We treat this as a retrieval problem: given a Questionnaire item's text, find the correct LOINC code in a pool of 97,314 active codes. We compare six methods (TF-IDF, frozen MiniLM, BioBERT, BioLORD, contrastively fine-tuned MiniLM, and a TF-IDF+GPT reranker) on a 54-item evaluation set spanning three query styles (natural question, medium, and terse). No single method wins on every metric. BioLORD, a frozen encoder pre-trained on biomedical ontology definitions, has the best top-rank accuracy (R@1 = 0.185, MRR = 0.246) despite seeing no task-specific data, while a contrastive fine-tune on raw LHC-Forms pairs takes R@5 (0.389) and R@10 (0.426). A distribution-shift ablation shows why the fine-tune in our main table is not the strongest one: adding GPT-generated paraphrases to the raw pairs drops R@5 from 0.389 to 0.296, so the augmented union underperforms raw-only training on every metric except R@1. Performance peaks at 5k training pairs. Error analysis on BioLORD's R@1 failures shows that wrong-specificity and ambiguous-text cases together account for 59% of errors.

AI.tldr: 本文研究医疗领域电子预授权工作流中的LOINC代码自动匹配问题，对比六种检索方法，发现BioLORD在首位准确率最佳（R@1=0.185），而对比微调方法在召回率上更优（R@5=0.389），并分析了数据增强和错误类型对性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 电子预授权工作流需要FHIR问卷条目携带LOINC编码，但HL7 Da Vinci CDS-Library中大多数条目缺乏这些绑定，因此需要自动化的代码检索方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 将问题建模为检索任务，比较了六种方法：TF-IDF、冻结MiniLM、BioBERT、BioLORD、对比微调MiniLM以及TF-IDF+GPT重排序器。使用54个评估样本在三种查询风格（自然问句、中等、简洁）下进行评估。
AI.result: BioLORD在首位准确率上最佳（R@1=0.185, MRR=0.246），对比微调方法在R@5（0.389）和R@10（0.426）上最优。GPT增强数据反而降低性能（R@5从0.389降至0.296）。错误分析显示特异性错误和歧义文本占59%的失误。
AI.conclusion: 没有单一方法在所有指标上最优；冻结编码器BioLORD无任务数据仍表现良好；对比微调在召回率上有优势但GPT增强适得其反；最佳训练数据量为5000对。

title: QoS-Aware Token Scheduling and Private Data Valuation for Multi-Modal Agentic Networks
comment: Accepted to IEEE ICME 2026. Supplementary materials are included in the TeX source
summary: In agentic systems, human-generated data records anchor the value of AI services. Yet cloud compute pipelines centralize processing on remote servers. Data centralization reduces personal data sovereignty and may potentially degrade the quality of service (QoS). Meanwhile, user contributions are diverse in quantity and quality: decentralized records can be biased, noisy, and heterogeneously distributed. To address the data challenge, we study fair token allocation and private data valuation for decentralized and resource-constrained agentic systems. Our approach embeds multi-modal representations in a shared semantic space and releases differentially private (DP) prototypes to preserve utility while reducing semantic leakage. With the DP guarantee, we design a fair token allocation scheme that rewards effective contributions and remains robust to data heterogeneity and AI resource scarcity. Extensive simulations demonstrate improved contribution-based fairness and QoS compared to standard benchmarks. The improved resistance to image reconstruction attacks indicates enhanced privacy for multi-modal personal data.

AI.tldr: 本文针对去中心化、资源受限的智能体系统中的数据挑战，提出了一种结合差分隐私（DP）原型、多模态语义嵌入和公平代币分配的方案，在保护数据隐私的同时实现基于贡献的公平奖励和高质量服务。
AI.motivation: 现有云计算管线在远程服务器上集中处理数据，降低了个人数据主权，且可能损害服务质量（QoS）。同时，用户贡献数据存在偏差、噪声和异构分布，需要在去中心化场景下解决数据估值和公平代币分配问题。
AI.method: 1) 将多模态表征嵌入共享语义空间；2) 释放差分隐私（DP）原型以在减少语义泄露的同时保留效用；3) 基于DP保证设计公平代币分配方案，奖励有效贡献，并对数据异构性和AI资源稀缺性具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 大量模拟表明，与标准基准相比，该方法在基于贡献的公平性和服务质量（QoS）上均有提升；对图像重建攻击的抵抗能力增强，表明多模态个人数据的隐私性得到改善。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为去中心化智能体系统提供了一种兼顾隐私保护、公平激励和服务质量的综合数据价值评估与代币分配框架。

title: Variational Deep Unfolding with Mamba-Based Nonlocal Modeling for Underwater Image Enhancement
summary: Underwater imaging plays a crucial role in ocean engineering, although captured data often suffer from poor visibility and color distortion. To address these challenges, we propose a model-based deep unfolding network for underwater image enhancement that integrates variational modeling into a learnable architecture. The framework is guided by a variational formulation based on a dehazing decomposition, incorporating a multiplicative residual component to absorb remaining artifacts and a nonlocal gradient-type constraint to preserve structural details and enhance edge sharpness. We provide a theoretical analysis establishing the existence of solution for the associated minimization problem. The proposed unfolding method incorporates Mamba layers to efficiently capture self-similarities in the scene. In addition, we introduce a proximal trajectory loss that enforces consistency between the unfolding stages and the iterations of an ideal restoration regularizer. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed unfolding approach achieves improved visual quality and competitive quantitative performance compared with recent state-of-the-art methods. The source code will be available at https://github.com/MIA-UIB/Variational-Unfolding-Mamba-Underwater-Enhancement .

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于模型驱动深度展开网络的水下图像增强方法，融合变分模型与Mamba层，通过非局部梯度约束和乘性残差项提升图像质量，并引入近端轨迹损失确保展开一致性，实验表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 水下成像常受能见度低和颜色失真困扰，现有方法在保留结构细节和边缘锐度方面存在不足，亟需一种既能利用物理模型先验又能发挥数据驱动优势的增强框架。
AI.method: 1) 基于去雾分解的变分公式，引入乘性残差分量吸收伪影；2) 非局部梯度约束保持结构细节与边缘锐度；3) 将变分模型展开为深度网络，结合Mamba层捕获场景自相似性；4) 提出近端轨迹损失函数，约束展开阶段与理想恢复迭代的一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在视觉质量和定量指标上均优于当前最先进的水下图像增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 将变分建模与深度展开网络结合，利用Mamba高效建模自相似性，并设计近端轨迹损失保证迭代一致性，为水下图像增强提供了有效的理论指导与实现方案。

title: ESBMC-PLC: Formal Verification of IEC 61131-3 Ladder Diagram Programs Using SMT-Based Model Checking
summary: PLCs execute safety-critical programs across industrial sectors.
