The dominant PLC notation, ladder diagram (LD) per IEC 61131-3, remains absent from formal verification: SMT-based model checkers cannot process LD's rung-and-coil graphics. This paper presents ESBMC-PLC, the first open-source formal verifier with native LD support (PLCopen XML format), implemented as a new ESBMC frontend. ESBMC-PLC translates LD rungs to GOTO IR, models the PLC scan cycle as a while(true) loop with nondeterministic inputs, and checks safety properties via SMT-based bounded model checking or k-induction. A five-property YAML language (mutual_exclusion, invariant, absence, response, reachability) avoids temporal logic. A survey of 22 studies (2020-2026) identifies four research gaps; ESBMC-PLC closes two of them. Evaluation on 13 benchmarks (6 domains, 3 sources - including deployed CONTROLLINO PLCs and MathWorks Simulink PLC Coder) shows correct classification across 61 properties: all 9 author-constructed programs (Categories A/B) as expected, all 4 vendor programs (Category C) correctly unlabeled, with 8 bugs found (actionable counterexamples), 7 unbounded k-induction proofs, all runs under 60ms on Apple Silicon. Feature comparison with PLCverif shows that ESBMC-PLC is the only open-source tool that combines native LD, k-induction, and SMT bit-vector semantics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESBMC-PLC，首个原生支持梯形图（LD）的开源形式化验证工具，将PLC的LD程序转换为GOTO IR，通过SMT有界模型检测或k-induction验证安全属性，在13个基准测试的61个属性上全部正确分类，运行时间均低于60ms。
AI.motivation: PLC执行工业安全关键程序，但主流表示法梯形图（LD）缺乏形式化验证支持，基于SMT的模型检查器无法处理LD的梯级-线圈图形。
AI.method: ESBMC-PLC作为新的ESBMC前端，将LD梯形图转换为GOTO IR，将PLC扫描周期建模为带非确定性输入的while(true)循环，通过SMT有界模型检测或k-induction验证安全属性。定义了五属性YAML语言（互斥、不变、缺席、响应、可达性）避免时态逻辑。
AI.result: 在13个基准测试（6个领域、3个来源）61个属性上全部正确分类：9个自构建程序符合预期，4个供应商程序正确标记为未标注，发现8个bug（可操作反例），7个无界k-induction证明，所有运行均在60ms以内（Apple Silicon）。特征对比显示ESBMC-PLC是唯一结合原生LD、k-induction和SMT位向量语义的开源工具。
AI.conclusion: ESBMC-PLC填补了PLC梯形图形式化验证的空白，是首个开源原生LD验证器，通过22项研究调查识别了4个研究空白并填补了其中2个，在实践中证明了有效性。

title: Do we have the knowledge we need? Rethinking human-AI decision-making in corporations
comment: Proceedings of AutomationXP26 Workshop of the 2026 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems, April 14, 2026, Barcelona, Spain. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 8 pages
summary: Organizational knowledge is fragmented across a variety of software systems, tacit expertise, and manual documents that have traditionally been designed for human consumption. As AI systems are increasingly deployed and granted decision-making roles, they require access to this knowledge. This raises two questions: how should organizations store and maintain knowledge so that it remains accessible to both humans and future AI systems, and how should agency be allocated between humans and AI across tasks with different risks and levels of uncertainty? In this position paper, we describe how organizational knowledge evolves and contribute a framework that maps task attributes and knowledge availability to recommended agency allocations and control mechanisms. We illustrate the applicability of the framework on two different manufacturing tasks: a routine operation (visual quality inspection) and a one-off strategic decision (factory location), and conclude with opportunities for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个框架，用于根据任务属性和知识可用性，在组织中分配人类与AI之间的决策权，并应用于制造场景。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统被赋予决策角色，它们需要访问分散在各类软件、隐性知识和文档中的组织知识。现有知识存储方式主要面向人类，因此需要解决如何让知识同时被人类和未来AI系统访问，以及如何在不同风险和不确定性下分配人机决策权的问题。
AI.method: 这是一篇立场论文，描述了组织知识的演化过程，并提出一个将任务属性与知识可用性映射到推荐的代理分配和控制机制的框架。通过两个制造任务（视觉质量检测和工厂选址）说明框架的适用性。
AI.result: 提出了一个可操作的人机决策权分配框架，并在常规操作（视觉质检）和战略性一次性决策（工厂选址）两个不同任务上验证了其适用性。
AI.conclusion: 框架能够有效指导不同任务场景下的人机代理分配，未来研究可进一步拓展其应用范围。

title: Last But Not Least: Boundary Attention CalibratiON for Multimodal KV Cache Compression
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong vision-language reasoning, but long visual contexts enlarge the KV cache and increase decoding latency. Existing compression methods rely on observation window attention for stable token-importance estimation, yet this aggregation can dilute sparse visual evidence and discard answer-critical tokens under aggressive compression. Therefore, we identify last-query attention as a complementary source for recovering such evidence, but its answer-irrelevant signals can mislead retention. We propose BACON, a plug-and-play method that calibrates observation window attention with last-query evidence and suppresses isolated noise via intra-layer coherence and inter-layer persistence. Across diverse benchmarks, models, budgets, and compression methods, BACON improves multimodal KV compression by 7.5% on average under the most aggressive budget, with gains up to 30.9%.

AI.tldr: BACON是一种即插即用的KV缓存压缩方法，通过校准观察窗口注意力与最后查询注意力，并利用层内一致性和层间持久性抑制噪声，在多模态大语言模型的长视觉上下文压缩中平均提升7.5%（最高30.9%）。
AI.motivation: 现有基于观察窗口注意力的压缩方法会稀释稀疏的视觉证据，在激进压缩下丢弃关键token，而最后查询注意力虽能补充证据但会引入与回答无关的噪声信号。
AI.method: 提出BACON方法，校准观察窗口注意力与最后查询注意力的互补证据，并通过层内一致性（intra-layer coherence）和层间持久性（inter-layer persistence）抑制孤立噪声，实现即插即用的KV缓存压缩。
AI.result: 在多种基准、模型、预算和压缩方法下，BACON在最高压缩预算下平均提升多模态KV压缩7.5%，最高增益达30.9%。
AI.conclusion: BACON通过结合两类注意力的互补优势并抑制噪声，有效改善了激进压缩策略下多模态大模型的KV缓存压缩效果。

title: Evaluative Judgement in Teaching AI-based Translation: A Class-room Case Study of AI-Mediated Translation and Post-Editing
comment: Workshop on Teaching AI-based Translation and Technologies (TAITT 2026) - EAMT 2026
summary: Drawing on 23 anonymized student pro-jects from a fourth-year Machine Transla-tion and Post-editing course in a BA-level translation programme, this paper exam-ines how structured comparison of gen-eral-purpose LLMs and online MT sys-tems can elicit evaluative judgement in AI-mediated translation. Students translat-ed short specialised English Wikipedia texts into Catalan or Spanish, generated four system outputs, evaluated them using automatic metrics and human adequa-cy/fluency assessment, selected one output for post-editing, and justified their deci-sion in written reports. Descriptive counts are reported for all 23 projects, while qualitative interpretation is based on the 22 cases accompanied by written reports. Results show that students did not treat automatic metrics as final authority: final post-editing selections often diverged from metric rankings and were justified through adequacy, fluency, terminology, naturalness, and expected post-editing ef-fort. The study therefore does not bench-mark systems under controlled conditions; it analyses how students justified system choice within an authentic classroom as-signment.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了翻译专业学生如何通过结构化比较通用大语言模型和在线机器翻译系统，在AI辅助翻译中培养评估判断能力。研究发现学生并未将自动评估指标视为绝对权威，而是综合考量充分性、流畅性、术语、自然度和后期编辑工作量来做出选择。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于探索如何在AI翻译时代，通过课堂实践培养学生的评估判断能力（evaluative judgement），而非仅仅比较系统性能。研究背景是机器翻译和译后编辑课程的真实教学场景。
AI.method: 23名翻译专业学生将英文维基百科短文译为加泰罗尼亚语或西班牙语，生成4个系统输出（通用LLM和在线MT系统），使用自动评估指标和人工充分性/流畅性评估，选择其中一个输出进行译后编辑，并在书面报告中论证选择理由。采用描述性统计和定性分析。
AI.result: 学生对最终译后编辑系统的选择常与自动评估指标的排名不一致。他们通过充分性、流畅性、术语准确性、自然度和预期译后编辑工作量来论证选择，而非盲目信任自动指标。
AI.conclusion: 本研究并非在受控条件下进行系统基准测试，而是分析学生在真实课堂作业中如何论证系统选择，揭示了自动指标在培养评估判断中的有限权威性，以及人类评估维度的关键作用。

title: Large Language Models as Optimizers: A Survey of Direct vs. Tool-Augmented Approaches and Their Performance Frontiers
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables, accepted at 49th ICT and Electronics Convention, MIPRO - https://mipro.hr; Paper ID: #23463
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly involved in complex mathematical optimization, even if the pragmatic user who triggers them is unaware of it. After all, many real-world problems reduce to the search for better or the best solutions. The field of LLM-as-optimizer has three paradigms: direct optimization, tool-augmented optimization, and tool-creating optimization. Direct optimization uses iterative prompting and heuristic generation to navigate solution spaces. Tool-augmented optimization translates natural language problems into formal specifications and orchestrates external solvers. Tool-creating optimization goes further, using LLMs to discover reusable algorithms or heuristics that can be deployed at zero marginal LLM cost. We describe current performance frontiers based on the benchmarks from the literature. We identify the critical reasoning gap in current architectures and argue for trade-offs between the future potential of direct optimization and the auditability of tool-augmented optimization. Even future, more powerful models might opt for tool-making to improve operational efficiency for repetitive families of problems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了大语言模型作为优化器的三种范式：直接优化、工具增强优化和工具创造优化，分析了各自的性能边界与推理局限，并讨论了未来直接优化的潜力与工具增强优化的可审计性之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM越来越多地参与复杂数学优化问题，用户甚至可能意识不到这一过程。本文旨在系统梳理LLM-as-optimizer的三种范式，揭示当前架构中的推理差距，并为未来发展提供方向性建议。
AI.method: 通过文献调研，将LLM优化范式分为三类：直接优化（迭代提示+启发式生成）、工具增强优化（自然语言转形式化规范+外部求解器）、工具创造优化（LLM自动发现可复用的算法/启发式策略）。并基于现有基准测试描述性能前沿。
AI.result: 识别出当前架构中存在关键的推理差距；指出直接优化有未来潜力但可审计性差，工具增强优化可审计性强但依赖外部工具；工具创造优化可在零边际LLM成本下部署可复用算法。
AI.conclusion: 即便未来模型能力更强，对于重复性家族问题，工具创造优化可能仍是最优选择，因其兼顾效率和可复用性。

title: The Vision Encoder as a Privacy Boundary: Visual-Token Side Channels in Encoder-Free Vision-Language Models
summary: A vision encoder compresses image pixels into semantic embeddings, implicitly acting as a privacy boundary by preserving semantic content while attenuating pixel-local detail required for exact text recovery. Encoder-free vision-language models (VLMs) remove this boundary by routing image patches directly into the language-model token stream, thereby exposing an architectural privacy attack surface: intermediate visual tokens become a pre-output side channel. Under a token-access adversary, decoders invert visual-token streams from two encoder-free VLMs, Gemma4 and Fuyu, recovering recognizable image structure and readable held-out access codes, whereas matched encoder-based controls localize target regions but recover no exact strings. Within-model ablations show that the operative factor is spatial sampling fidelity of the visual-token grid, especially character-direction sampling density, rather than token or value count. The leakage is not limited to exported tokens: Gemma4 layer-0 key-value cache tensors are directly invertible, placing the side channel within KV caches commonly persisted by production serving stacks for decoding efficiency. The attack survives clutter, realistic document degradation, and zero-shot transfer to public document images, and it resists value-level defenses such as additive noise and quantization. Effective mitigation must therefore reduce spatial sampling, making removal of the vision encoder a first-class privacy decision in VLM deployment.

AI.tldr: 无编码器VLM因为直接将图像patch送入语言模型，导致视觉token成为隐私侧信道，可被攻击者逆恢复出图像内容和可读文本，而传统带编码器的VLM则能保护隐私；有效的缓解方案必须降低空间采样密度，移除视觉编码器应被视为隐私决策。
AI.motivation: 揭示无编码器视觉语言模型（VLM）因架构设计引入的隐私攻击面——视觉token作为预输出侧信道，可被攻击者利用恢复图像内容和敏感文本信息。
AI.method: 采用token-access攻击者模型，对两种无编码器VLM（Gemma4和Fuyu）进行解码器逆向攻击，并与带编码器的基线VLM进行对比；通过消融实验分析空间采样保真度（尤其是字符方向采样密度）对泄露的影响，并测试KV缓存泄露、抗噪性和零样本迁移能力。
AI.result: 无编码器VLM的视觉token流可被逆恢复出可识别的图像结构和可读的保留访问码，而带编码器的VLM仅能定位目标区域但无法恢复精确字符串；层0 KV缓存同样可直接逆推；攻击在有噪声、文档退化、零样本迁移下依然有效，且能抵抗加性噪声和量化防御。
AI.conclusion: 移除视觉编码器是无编码器VLM泄露隐私的根本原因，有效缓解必须降低空间采样密度，部署无编码器VLM时应将其视为首要隐私决策。

title: AthDGC: An Open Diachronic Greek Treebank with Indo-European Parallels
comment: 16 pages. Data paper for the v0.4 release of AthDGC. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20439182. Companion site: https://athdgc.github.io
summary: AthDGC ("Athens-PROIEL") is an open, end-to-end workflow and dataset. It is, to the best of our knowledge, the first openly licensed dependency-parsed treebank of Greek that spans eight diachronic periods, namely Archaic, Classical, Koine, Late Antique, Byzantine, Late Byzantine, Early Modern, and Modern Greek, under a single PROIEL XML 2.0 schema, with verse-level cross-alignment of the New Testament to Latin (Vulgate), Gothic (Wulfila), Old Church Slavonic (Marianus), and Classical Armenian. AthDGC builds on the PROIEL Treebank Family (Haug and Johndal 2008; Eckhoff et al. 2018), which established the schema and the Koine-Greek reference set for the project. Annotation uses the Stanford Stanza PROIEL-trained workflow; sentence-level alignment uses LaBSE, a multilingual sentence-embedding model; word-level alignment uses multilingual-BERT attention through the AwesomeAlign procedure. The v0.4 release provides curated samples and the open-source toolkit; the full annotated corpus partitions remain under v0.5 audit on the Greek national HPC. Quantitative scale, per-witness verse counts, and per-period annotated-row counts are reported in the v0.5 release notes, after the audit pass completes. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20439182.

AI.tldr: AthDGC 是一个开放、端到端的希腊语依存句法树库工作流与数据集，覆盖从古风时期到现代希腊语的八个历时阶段，基于 PROIEL XML 2.0 架构，并包含新约多语言对齐。v0.4 提供样本与开源工具，v0.5 完整语料正在审计中。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏一个开放许可、覆盖希腊语完整历史时期的依存句法树库，且缺少跨语言对齐资源，难以支持历时语言学研究与多语言对比分析。
AI.method: 采用 PROIEL XML 2.0 统一架构，标注使用 Stanford Stanza 的 PROIEL 工作流；句子级对齐使用 LaBSE 多语句嵌入模型，词语级对齐使用 multilingual-BERT 注意力机制（AwesomeAlign）。新约部分提供与拉丁语、哥特语、古教会斯拉夫语、古典亚美尼亚语的跨语言对齐。
AI.result: 构建了首个开放许可的八阶段希腊语依存句法树库，v0.4 发布 curated 样本与开源工具，v0.5 完整语料在希腊国家 HPC 上审计中，报告了每见证的诗句数和每时期的标注行数。
AI.conclusion: AthDGC 填补了历时希腊语依存句法树库的空白，为历时语言学、多语言对比研究提供了标准化、可复用的资源与工具。

title: Vision-Encoder Behavioral Fingerprints of Image-to-Image Generative Models: A Training-Paradigm-Driven Taxonomy of Six Commercial APIs
summary: We study six production image-to-image AI systems (gpt-image-1, Gemini 2.5 Flash Image, Flux Kontext, SDXL img2img, SD3 img2img, and Qwen Image Edit) under a content-adaptive sub-JND adversarial perturbation pipeline, scoring all outputs by frozen DINOv2 ViT-B/14 token distances against clean references. Across a 3,588-call corpus spanning COCO photographs, CelebA-HQ portraits, and AI-generated inputs, the six systems partition into two image-invariant behavioral bands on a 2D (patch_mean, ssim_clean) plane: edit-trained models (Flux Kontext, Qwen Edit, Gemini) cluster in a tight band, while T2I-base models adapted at sampling time (SDXL, SD3, gpt-image-1) cluster in a drift band.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了六种生产级图像到图像AI系统，通过内容自适应子JND对抗扰动流程评估，发现这些系统在2D平面上分为两个图像不变的响应带：编辑训练模型和采样时适应的T2I基础模型。
AI.motivation: 旨在探究不同商业图像到图像AI系统在面对对抗性扰动时的行为差异，揭示其内在的鲁棒性和表征不变性特征。
AI.method: 采用内容自适应子JND对抗扰动流程，使用冻结的DINOv2 ViT-B/14令牌距离评分，在3588次调用数据集（COCO照片、CelebA-HQ肖像、AI生成输入）上测试六种系统。
AI.result: 六种系统在2D平面上分为两个不同的行为带：编辑训练模型（Flux Kontext、Qwen Edit、Gemini）聚集在紧凑带，采样时适应的T2I基础模型（SDXL、SD3、gpt-image-1）聚集在漂移带。
AI.conclusion: 不同架构设计的图像生成系统在对抗扰动下表现出不同的不变性特征，可据此对系统进行有效分类。

title: SHARD: Safe and Helpful Alignment via Self-Reframing Distillation
summary: Large language models often struggle with sensitive prompts. They may refuse outright, provide generic safety boilerplate, or fail to address the user's legitimate informational needs that can be answered safely. We introduce SHARD, a self-reframing distillation method to improve safe-helpfulness. It first rewrites sensitive prompts to surface benign intent using philosophical guidelines, then reframes its original responses into safe, more helpful ones, and finally fine-tunes the model on its self-reframed responses. Across DNA and the English subset of LINGUASAFE, SHARD improves helpfulness for most model families while preserving safety. It also remains competitive with distillation from a larger teacher model, suggesting that models can internalize safe and helpful behavior elicited from their own. Warning: This paper contains content that may be offensive or harmful.

AI.tldr: 提出SHARD方法，通过自我重构蒸馏技术提升大语言模型在敏感提示下的安全-有用性平衡，模型可自行将敏感问题重写为安全且有帮助的回应。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理敏感提示时表现不佳：要么直接拒绝回答，要么给出模板化的安全回应，无法满足用户合理的信息需求。需要在安全性与有用性之间取得平衡。
AI.method: SHARD方法包含三个步骤：1) 利用哲学指南将敏感提示重写以暴露良性意图；2) 将模型的原始回应重构为安全且更有帮助的版本；3) 在模型自身重构的回应上进行微调（自我蒸馏）。
AI.result: 在DNA和LINGUASAFE英文子集上，SHARD在保持安全性的同时，提升了大多数模型家族的有用性。且与使用更大教师模型的蒸馏方法相比具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 模型能够从自身生成中内化安全且有用的行为，无需依赖外部更大教师模型，自我重构蒸馏是一种有效的安全-有用性平衡策略。

title: Agentic Retrieval and Reinforcement Learned Equation Chains: A Controlled Generation Framework for Complex and Novel Physics Word Problems
summary: Generating high-quality Physics Word Problems (PWPs) that are novel, complex, and solvable remains a challenging and underexplored problem in educational content generation. Existing approaches, many adapted from Math Word Problem (MWP) generation, often produce ambiguous, unsolvable, or structurally simple questions with limited linguistic diversity. We introduce ARVRE (Agentic Retrieval Value Reinforced Equation-chain), a two-stage framework for generating diverse and mathematically valid PWPs. In the first stage, a form of offline temporal-difference learning is used to construct valid chains of physics equations, while an agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) framework dynamically selects topic-specific concepts and vocabulary. This design enables explicit control over problem structure and difficulty. In the second stage, a Large Language Model (LLM) converts the equation chain and retrieved concepts into a natural-language physics question. By grounding generation in valid equation chains, our method preserves mathematical correctness while promoting linguistic diversity and contextual richness. Human and automated evaluations demonstrate that ARVRE generates PWPs that are more complex, novel, and solvable than those produced by existing approaches. These results highlight the potential of combining reinforcement learning, retrieval, and LLMs for reliable generation of educational physics content.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARVRE框架，通过两阶段生成高质量物理应用题：先利用离线时序差分学习构建有效的物理方程链，再通过智能体检索增强生成将方程链转化为自然语言问题，从而在保证数学正确性的同时提升问题的多样性、复杂性和可解性。
AI.motivation: 现有物理应用题生成方法存在模糊、不可解或结构简单等问题，且缺乏对生成问题新颖性和复杂性的关注。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用离线时序差分学习构建有效的物理方程链，并利用智能体RAG动态选择主题概念和词汇；第二阶段使用LLM将方程链和检索到的概念转化为自然语言物理问题。
AI.result: 人工和自动评估表明，ARVRE生成的问题比现有方法更复杂、更新颖、更具可解性。
AI.conclusion: 结合强化学习、检索和LLM的方法能有效生成可靠的教育物理内容，为教育内容生成提供了新方向。

title: Efficient Reinforcement for Visual-Textual Thinking with Discrete Diffusion Model
summary: RL-based post-training has been widely adopted to enable interleaved visual and textual reasoning in unified multimodal models capable of both text and image generation. However, most existing approaches are built upon autoregressive (AR) unified models, which require full image regeneration during visual reasoning. In this work, we demonstrate that multimodal discrete diffusion models are effective alternatives to AR models for reinforcement learning in interleaved reasoning, owing to their ability to perform efficient visual rollouts via localized visual editing rather than full image-token regeneration. This reduces rollout computation during GRPO by 26.9\% compared to AR baselines, with minimal performance drop. Despite the improved efficiency, we find that joint reward assignment, which employs a shared reward signal across modalities, introduces cross-modal interference between unrelated image and text token sequences during RL updates. To address this issue, we propose factorized reward assignment, a strategy that assigns rewards independently to text and vision segments. With factorized reward assignment, our RL approach achieves an 11.2% improvement over joint reward assignment and a 38.04% improvement over the base model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多模态离散扩散模型（替代自回归模型）的强化学习后训练方法，利用局部视觉编辑实现高效视觉推理，并通过分解奖励分配策略解决跨模态干扰问题，在GRPO中降低26.9%计算量，相比基线提升38.04%性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自回归（AR）的统一多模态模型在视觉推理时需要完整图像重建，计算成本高；同时，传统联合奖励分配会导致跨模态干扰，影响RL训练效果。
AI.method: 1) 采用多模态离散扩散模型替代AR模型，利用局部视觉编辑进行高效rollout（而非完整图像token再生）。2) 提出分解奖励分配（Factorized Reward Assignment），对文本和视觉片段独立分配奖励信号，避免跨模态干扰。
AI.result: GRPO推理计算量降低26.9%，性能仅有微小下降；分解奖励分配相比联合奖励分配提升11.2%，相比基础模型提升38.04%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态离散扩散模型是AR模型在交错推理RL中的有效替代方案，分解奖励机制能有效缓解跨模态干扰，实现效率与性能的双重提升。

title: Emergent retokenization symmetry in large language models: phenomenology and applications
summary: Tokenization introduces representational redundancy: under a fixed token vocabulary, every byte string admits many valid token encodings, or segmentations, that decode to the same surface string. However, given a prompt, most language model tokenizers break this representational symmetry by returning a canonical segmentation. Training only on canonical segmentations should influence inference behavior, and there is little reason to expect models to respect segmentation symmetry on downstream tasks. We find that this symmetry partially emerges during training. Here, we probe this emergent symmetry through experiments testing token compositional understanding, representation diversity, and task focused benchmark performance. We primarily use \textbf{retokenization} -- replacing a prompt's canonical tokenization with an alternative segmentation while preserving its bytes exactly. Relative to other prompt perturbations, retokenization is unusually clean because it isolates segmentation effects without changing syntax, semantics or surface form. We use retokenization to study sensitivity and robustness to semantically identical input representations across pretraining and post-training. Moreover, this partial retokenization symmetry suggests a distinct inference-time sampling axis. While temperature sampling generates diverse outputs from the model using its next-token probability distribution, retokenization generates diversity from the model's internal computations through semantically equivalent input representations. We find that while this retokenization sampling strategy can hurt performance on easy problems, it can also recover solutions that conventional sampling does not find. Overall, our work presents retokenization as a simple yet powerful probe of large language models, shedding light on compositional understanding and prompt sensitivity, and offering a novel sampling strategy.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出"重新分词"（retokenization）方法，通过替换提示词的规范分词方式（保持字节不变）来探测大语言模型对分词冗余的敏感性。实验发现模型在训练中部分学会了分词对称性，且重新分词可作为新的推理时采样策略，在牺牲简单任务性能的同时，能发现传统采样无法找到的解。
AI.motivation: 标准分词器会破坏分词对称性（同一字符串有多种合法分词方式），但模型只在规范分词上训练，这种训练偏差如何影响模型行为尚不明确。作者希望探究模型是否以及如何学习这种分词对称性，并利用该现象作为探测和理解LLM的新工具。
AI.method: 1. 提出"重新分词"（retokenization）：在保持字节完全不变的前提下，用替代分词方案替换提示词的规范分词。2. 通过三个维度实验：token组合理解、表示多样性、任务基准性能。3. 将重新分词作为一种推理时采样策略，与传统的温度采样进行对比。
AI.result: 1. 模型在训练中部分涌现了分词对称性（非完全对称）。2. 重新分词是一种干净的扰动方式，只改变分词而不改变句法、语义或表面形式。3. 作为采样策略，重新分词在简单任务上表现较差，但能恢复传统温度采样无法找到的解。
AI.conclusion: 重新分词是一种简单而强大的LLM探测工具，能揭示组合理解和提示敏感性，并为LLM提供一种新颖的采样策略。

title: Integrating Reasoning and Generalization in Text-to-SQL via Self-Enhanced Fine-Tuning
summary: Text-to-SQL aims to translate natural language questions into executable SQL queries over structured databases, enabling non-expert users to access data intuitively. While recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in this task, existing LLM-based approaches often struggle to strike a balance between strong reasoning capabilities and robust generalization. To address these limitations, we propose CoTE-SQL to enhance the LLM-based text-to-SQL generation with three key innovations: (i) self-enhanced reasoning traces distilled from LLMs without human annotation, (ii) structured chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting with modular decomposition and examples retrieval, and (iii) error-aware revision based on SQL execution feedback. Extensive experiments on the Spider and Bird benchmarks demonstrate that CoTE-SQL achieves new state-of-the-art performance among methods built on open-source LLMs with comparable model sizes on Bird (53.39% EX / 59.02 VES) and strong results on Spider (79.60% EX / 77.19 VES), with especially significant gains on complex queries. Results highlight the effectiveness of combining self-enhancement, structured reasoning, and execution-time feedback within an LLM-based framework for text-to-SQL design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoTE-SQL，通过自增强推理轨迹、结构化思维链提示和错误感知修正三大创新，提升LLM在Text-to-SQL任务中的推理能力和泛化性能，在Spider和Bird基准上取得SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-based Text-to-SQL方法难以在强推理能力和鲁棒泛化之间取得平衡，需要一种无需人工标注、能有效融合结构化推理和执行反馈的方法。
AI.method: CoTE-SQL包含三项创新：(i) 从LLM中蒸馏出自增强推理轨迹（无需人工标注）；(ii) 结构化思维链提示，包含模块化分解和示例检索；(iii) 基于SQL执行反馈的错误感知修正机制。
AI.result: 在Bird基准上达到53.39% EX / 59.02 VES，Spider基准上达到79.60% EX / 77.19 VES，尤其在复杂查询上提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 自增强、结构化推理与执行反馈三种策略的融合能有效提升LLM在Text-to-SQL任务中的性能，为基于开源LLM的Text-to-SQL方法提供了新的SOTA方案。

title: Position: The Systemic Lack of Agency in Visual Reasoning
summary: This paper argues that a systemic lack of Agency constrains the implicit reasoning capabilities of current Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Implicit reasoning refers to the ability to autonomously discover and utilize hidden visual evidence to bridge information gaps, rather than merely relying on explicitly specified targets. This capacity underlies human visual understanding and everyday reasoning. We argue that this limitation arises from a tendency to approach visual reasoning primarily as passive semantic retrieval, rather than as active, situated reasoning that depends on autonomous visual exploration. As a result, most existing benchmarks primarily assess Passive Capacity, leaving this aspect of reasoning largely unmeasured. To address this gap, we introduce the Visual Implicit Reasoning Diagnosing Benchmark (V-IRD), which targets this missing quadrant by requiring models to derive answers strictly through autonomous visual analysis. Our results show that, despite strong retrieval abilities, prominent VLMs struggle to utilize reference objects and to attend to visual evidence that requires self-directed inquiry. Simply put, strong semantic recognition does not equate to active visual exploration, revealing a critical gap in current VLMs. More information can be found at https://haoychen.github.io/Implicit-Reasoning/

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前视觉-语言模型（VLM）缺乏自主推理（Agency）能力，只能被动检索语义，无法主动探索视觉证据。为此提出了视觉隐式推理诊断基准（V-IRD），实验表明即使语义识别很强的VLM也难以进行自主视觉探索。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM将视觉推理视为被动语义检索，而非主动的、情境化的推理，导致隐式推理能力（即自主发现隐藏视觉证据填补信息缺口）严重不足，且现有基准未能有效衡量这一能力。
AI.method: 提出了V-IRD（Visual Implicit Reasoning Diagnosing Benchmark）基准，要求模型严格通过自主视觉分析来推导答案，而非依赖显式指定的目标。
AI.result: 尽管主流VLM在语义检索方面表现强劲，但在利用参考对象和关注需要自主探究的视觉证据方面表现糟糕，强语义识别不等于主动视觉探索。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM存在一个关键的能力缺口：缺乏主动视觉探索的Agency能力，这与其强大的语义识别能力形成鲜明对比，需要未来研究加以解决。

title: EIBench: A Simulator-Based Benchmark and Turn-Credit RL for Emotion Management
summary: Emotional intelligence (EI) in Large Language Models (LLMs) is often evaluated through static understanding tasks or single-response dialogue generation. However, emotion management is interactive: a good model should not only recognize a user's emotion, but also improve the user's emotional and relational state over several turns. We introduce EIBench, a simulator-based benchmark for interactive emotion management. EIBench contains 2,222 scenarios, with 2,009 for training and 213 for held-out testing. The scenarios are organized by a 2x2 taxonomy covering Support, Defense, Repair, and Charm, which together capture different forms of support, boundary maintenance, trust repair, and rapport building. In each scenario, an LLM simulator plays the user, updates an emotion-relation state after each turn, and maps the final state to an anchor-based score. This design makes EIBench both an evaluation benchmark and a training environment: the final state gives the outcome reward, while the per-turn state updates provide dense feedback for RL. We evaluate 15 open- and closed-source LLMs. Current models perform well on support and rapport-building scenes, but struggle with boundary maintenance under user pressure. To improve the EI ability of LLMs, we propose Centered Turn-Credit GRPO (CTC-GRPO), a GRPO extension that reuses the simulator's per-turn state updates as dense turn-level feedback while preserving the final outcome reward. CTC-GRPO improves Qwen3-8B from -22.4 to +22.4 on EIBench and also improves on out-of-distribution evaluations including SAGE (+12.4) and EQBench3 (+20.9%). Our results show that simulator-tracked user states can support both evaluation and training for multi-turn emotion management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EIBench——一个基于模拟器的交互式情绪管理基准，包含2,222个场景，涵盖支持、防御、修复和魅力四种情绪管理任务。通过模拟器追踪用户情绪-关系状态，既可评估又可训练LLM。并提出了CTC-GRPO方法，显著提升了模型的情绪管理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM情绪智能评估仅关注静态理解或单轮对话，忽略了情绪管理的交互性和多轮动态特性。需要一个能够同时支持评估和训练的交互式情绪管理基准。
AI.method: 构建EIBench基准，包含2,222个场景（支持、防御、修复、魅力四类），使用LLM模拟器追踪用户情绪-关系状态更新，提供最终结果奖励和每轮密集反馈。提出CTC-GRPO，复用模拟器的每轮状态更新作为密集的轮级反馈，同时保留最终结果奖励。
AI.result: 15个开源和闭源LLM评估显示，模型在支持和魅力场景表现良好，但在边界维护（防御）场景困难。CTC-GRPO将Qwen3-8B从-22.4提升至+22.4，并在OOD评测中SAGE提升+12.4，EQBench3提升+20.9%。
AI.conclusion: 模拟器追踪的用户状态可以同时支持多轮情绪管理的评估和训练，为提升LLM的情绪智能提供了有效框架。

title: NeuroSymbolic AI for Legal AI-TRISM: Trustworthy, Reliable, Interpretable, Safe Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have transformed natural language processing, but their lack of interpretable reasoning and tendency to hallucinate pose significant challenges for legal applications. While LLMs show promise for legal text analysis and generation, they struggle with accurate citation attribution and precedent verification. For example, in legal contexts, a single incorrect precedent can jeopardize a case. Current approaches to improve LLM reliability in legal domains suffer from two key limitations: inadequate integration of structured legal knowledge during training or fine-tuning, and insufficient verification mechanisms for generated legal content. To address these challenges, we propose the TRISM (Trustworthy, Reliable, Interpretable, Safe Models) framework, which integrates NeuroSymbolic AI principles with LLMs to leverage both neural learning capabilities and symbolic reasoning over structured legal knowledge. The TRISM approach addresses the above limitations while maintaining interpretable decision pathways. Our framework formalizes the extraction of symbolic knowledge from legal textual documents and incorporates Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) as a core component for grounding LLM outputs in verified legal sources. In this position paper, we make the following contributions: (1) An analysis of the limitations of AI in law; (2) Introduce RASOR RAG which creates foundations for neurosymbolic RAG by generating explicit interpretable rationales that could be formalized into symbolic representations; (3) A formalized methodology for creating symbolic legal knowledge bases that support both interpretable reasoning and output verification in LLMs; and (4) The TRISM framework for integrating symbolic legal knowledge with LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRISM框架，通过神经符号AI与RAG结合，解决LLM在法律领域缺乏可解释推理和引用验证的问题。
AI.motivation: LLM在法律应用中存在缺乏可解释推理路径、容易产生幻觉（如错误引用判例）的问题，现有方法在结构化法律知识整合和生成内容验证机制方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出TRISM框架，将神经符号AI原理与LLM结合：①从法律文本中提取符号化知识；②引入RASOR RAG生成可解释的推理依据；③构建符号化法律知识库；④通过RAG将LLM输出锚定在已验证的法律来源上。
AI.result: 本文为立场论文，尚未提供实验验证结果，主要贡献是提出了TRISM框架的概念设计、RASOR RAG方法以及符号化法律知识库的形式化构建方法论。
AI.conclusion: TRISM框架通过神经符号AI与RAG的结合，有望提升LLM在法律领域的可信度、可靠性和可解释性，但需要后续实验验证其有效性。

title: HSQ-VLM: A Novel Spatially-Constrained Quadrant Segmentation VLM Model for Explainability in Diabetic Retinopathy
summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is an aggressive retinal disease and a leading cause of global blindness, yet its clinical management is currently hindered by the black-box nature of diagnostic AI. While deep learning models achieve high classification accuracy, there is a critical lack of explainability methods capable of detailing the exact anatomical landmarks and lesion distributions that lead to a clinical decision for DR. Therefore, we propose HSQ-VLM, a novel quadrant segmentation pipeline on fundus images that utilizes a Landmark-Anchored Cartesian Cross-Attention mechanism to unify visual feature extraction with structured clinical reasoning. Unlike traditional methods that rely on arbitrary image partitioning, our pipeline implements 4-quadrant Topological Latent Partitioning (TLP) to dynamically align retinal features with a fovea-centered coordinate system. This allows the Vision-Language Model to generate natural language reports that quantify pathology with anatomical precision. On a dataset of 3,500 high-resolution fundus images, this innovative methodology achieved a lesion detection sensitivity of 99.6% for hemorrhages and 96.4% for microaneurysms, while demonstrating a significant reduction in boundary-ambiguity errors compared to standard segmentation baselines.

AI.tldr: HSQ-VLM是一种基于象限分割的眼底图像分析框架，通过地标锚定的交叉注意力机制，将视觉特征提取与结构化临床推理统一，实现了高精度的糖尿病视网膜病变病灶检测与可解释报告生成。
AI.motivation: 当前糖尿病视网膜病变诊断AI存在黑箱问题，缺乏能够详细解释解剖标志和病灶分布的可解释性方法。
AI.method: 提出HSQ-VLM，包含4象限拓扑潜在分区（TLP）和地标锚定笛卡尔交叉注意力机制，将视网膜特征与视凹中心坐标系对齐，生成结构化自然语言报告。
AI.result: 在3500张眼底图像上，出血检测灵敏度99.6%，微动脉瘤检测灵敏度96.4%，边界模糊错误显著低于标准分割基线。
AI.conclusion: HSQ-VLM通过解剖学精确的视觉-语言建模，显著提升了DR诊断的可解释性和病灶检测性能。

title: LLM-Assisted Stance Detection in Scientific Discourse: A Test Case in Bayesian Cognitive Science
summary: Qualitative coding is central to social science, but expert annotation is difficult to scale. LLMs offer a possible extension, yet require careful validation when the target construct is interpretive, theoretically loaded, and only indirectly expressed. We study this problem in a difficult case: detecting whether authors treat Bayesian models as descriptions of mental and neural mechanisms (realism) or as useful mathematical tools (instrumentalism). Our method combines a theory-driven codebook, expert-coded reference annotations, a diagnostic-gated prompt-optimization search yielding a shared zero-shot prompt for three frontier LLMs (GPT-5.1, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3 Pro Preview), and multi-rater reliability analysis. The final prompt achieved a held-out combined reliability score of 0.76 (harmonic mean of ICC = 0.79 and $α$ = 0.74), with all diagnostics satisfied. Deployed on 6,858 quotes from 210 articles, the three LLMs reached substantial quote-level agreement (ICC = 0.80; $α$ = 0.76; combined = 0.78) and near-perfect article-level rank stability ($r$ = 0.96-0.97 across rater pairs). The corpus was predominantly weakly realist, but article-level stances were rarely uniform: only 1.4% of articles used a single band, while 59.5% spanned four or more. Low-level perception/motor articles scored 8.8 Realism points higher than high-level cognition articles ($p < .001$, $d = 0.60$), quantifying a long-held qualitative intuition. We present this as an expert-led case study; the framework is intended to generalize to similar theoretically demanding tasks, not to all qualitative analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合理论驱动编码手册、专家标注参考、诊断门控提示优化搜索及多评估者信度分析的方法，利用三个前沿LLM（GPT-5.1、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3 Pro Preview）对贝叶斯模型是否被作者视为心智/神经机制描述（现实主义）或数学工具（工具主义）进行定性编码。最终提示在保留集上达到0.76的综合信度，部署于6,858条引文后，LLM间达成高度一致（ICC=0.80, α=0.76），文章层面排名稳定性接近完美（r=0.96-0.97）。发现语料整体偏弱现实主义，但文章内部立场多样，且低层感知/运动文章的现实主义得分显著高于高层认知文章（d=0.60）。
AI.motivation: 定性编码是社会科学的核心方法，但专家标注难以规模化。LLM提供了潜在的扩展方案，然而当目标构念是解释性的、承载理论负荷且仅间接表达时，需要仔细验证。本研究在“作者对贝叶斯模型持现实主义还是工具主义立场”这一难点问题上探索LLM辅助定性编码的可行性。
AI.method: 方法包括：(1) 理论驱动的编码手册；(2) 专家标注的参考注释；(3) 诊断门控的提示优化搜索，为三个前沿LLM（GPT-5.1、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3 Pro Preview）生成共享的零样本提示；(4) 多评估者信度分析。最终在6,858条引文上部署，评估引用级和文章级的评分者一致性。
AI.result: 保留集综合信度0.76（ICC=0.79, α=0.74）。部署后引用级信度：ICC=0.80, α=0.76, 综合=0.78；文章级排名稳定性：r=0.96-0.97。语料以弱现实主义为主，仅1.4%的文章使用单一立场区间，59.5%跨越四个及以上区间。低层感知/运动文章比高层认知文章高8.8现实主义分（p<.001, d=0.60）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了专家主导的LLM辅助定性编码框架能在理论高要求的任务上达到可接受的信度水平。该框架旨在推广至类似的理论密集型任务，而非所有定性分析场景。

title: Towards Next-Generation Healthcare: A Survey of Medical Embodied AI for Perception, Decision-Making, and Action
summary: Foundation models have demonstrated impressive performance in enhancing healthcare efficiency across a wide range of medical applications. Nevertheless, their limited ability to perceive, understand, and interact with the physical world significantly constrains their effectiveness in real-world clinical workflows, where safety-critical decision-making and physical execution are tightly coupled. Recently, embodied artificial intelligence (AI) has emerged as a promising physical-interactive paradigm for intelligent healthcare, enabling agents to operate in complex medical environments. As research in this area rapidly expands, understanding how intelligent agents function as integrated, end-to-end systems in clinical environments becomes increasingly critical. However, existing surveys on medical embodied AI largely emphasize individual aspects or functional components, lacking a unified system-level organization of the field. To support and consolidate recent advances, we systematically survey the core components of medical embodied AI, with a particular emphasis on the coordinated integration of perception, decision-making, and action. We further review representative medical applications and relevant datasets, and we analyze the major challenges encountered in real-world clinical practice. Finally, we discuss key directions for future research in this rapidly evolving field. The associated project can be found at https://github.com/VMVLab/Medical_Embodied_AI_Paper_List.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文系统综述了医疗具身人工智能（Embodied AI）领域，重点关注感知、决策和行动的协调集成，并回顾了代表性应用、数据集、挑战和未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型在医疗应用中缺乏对物理世界的感知、理解和交互能力，限制了其在安全关键的真实临床工作流中的效果。现有综述多关注个体方面或功能组件，缺乏系统级的统一组织。
AI.method: 系统性综述医疗具身AI的核心组件，特别强调感知、决策与行动的协同集成；回顾代表性医疗应用和相关数据集；分析真实临床实践中的主要挑战。
AI.result: 归纳了医疗具身AI的感知、决策、行动三大核心组件的协调集成方式；总结了代表性应用和可用数据集；识别了现实临床环境中的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 医疗具身AI作为有前景的物理交互范式，可在复杂医疗环境中运行；未来研究需聚焦于解决现有挑战，推动端到端系统在临床中的实际落地。

title: S23DR 2026: End-to-End 3D Wireframe Prediction via DETR-Style Set Prediction with Contrastive Denoising
summary: We present WireframeDETR, our submission to the Structured Semantic 3D Reconstruction (S23DR) 2026 Challenge, which requires predicting a 3D building wireframe from multi-view COLMAP point clouds. Our method applies DETR-style set prediction directly to 3D point clouds, producing wireframes as sets of edge coordinate pairs without any intermediate vertex detection stage. We introduce three technical contributions: (1) contrastive denoising training that stabilises noisy Hungarian matching in early epochs; (2) a multi-scale encoder that aggregates the last encoder layer outputs via learned scalar weights; and (3) progressive auxiliary loss weighting that concentrates gradient signal on the decoder layers that most benefit from it. Our model achieves a public test HSS of 0.575 (F1~=~0.664, IoU~=~0.516) and a best validation HSS of 0.534 on the cleaned val split.

AI.tldr: WireframeDETR 是一种直接基于3D点云预测建筑线框的DETR方法，无需中间顶点检测，通过对比去噪训练、多尺度编码器和渐进式辅助损失加权三项技术，在S23DR 2026挑战中取得HSS 0.575的成绩。
AI.motivation: 现有3D建筑线框重建方法通常依赖中间顶点检测步骤，导致流程复杂且误差累积。作者希望设计一种端到端的直接预测方法，简化管线并提升重建质量。
AI.method: (1) 采用DETR风格的集合预测架构，直接从3D点云预测线框（边坐标对集合）;(2) 对比去噪训练，稳定早期匈牙利匹配的不稳定性;(3) 多尺度编码器，通过学习标量权重聚合最后一层编码器的输出;(4) 渐进式辅助损失加权，将梯度信号集中到最受益的解码器层。
AI.result: 公开测试集HSS为0.575（F1≈0.664，IoU≈0.516），在清理后的验证集上最佳HSS为0.534。
AI.conclusion: WireframeDETR验证了DETR架构直接用于3D点云线框重建的可行性，三项技术改进有效提升了训练稳定性和重建精度，为结构化三维重建提供了新的端到端方案。

title: LLM Judges Have Dark Current: A Psychometric Datasheet for LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation
summary: LLM-as-a-judge systems are now routinely used for open-ended model evaluation, where human preference annotation is costly, slow, and difficult to reproduce. Yet these judges are often reported as scalar accuracy, win-rate, or agreement devices. We argue that a judge should instead be reported as a measurement instrument. We introduce a Judge Datasheet protocol that measures dark current under true-vacuum inputs, stable cross-sensitivity to same-quality surface variation, positional false preference, target sensitivity on a controlled quality ladder, and the criterion or operating point induced by tie instructions. The direction-stability decomposition reveals that apparent Delta0 preference can be stable surface response or disguised position bias. In a three-judge open-weight case study, Llama-3.1-8B shows high dark current and presentation-conflicted Delta0 behavior, Qwen2.5-14B is vacuum-clean and target-sensitive but mixes stable and positional over-discrimination, and Qwen2.5-32B is vacuum-clean with low stable cross-sensitivity and low positional false preference. A strict tie criterion eliminates Qwen32B Delta0 false preference but absorbs marginal Delta1 target signals into ties while preserving Delta5 sensitivity. The results show that prompting moves the criterion, not the resolution. We do not claim that the downstream mechanism hypothesis that motivated this work is confirmed; the contribution is a metrological protocol for measuring the measuring device before downstream claims are made.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Judge Datasheet 的元评估协议，用于系统化测量 LLM-as-a-judge 系统的各类偏差与噪声，包括暗电流、交叉敏感性、位置偏差、目标敏感性和判断标准，并通过三个开源模型的案例研究展示了该协议的有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前 LLM-as-a-judge 系统仅以标量准确率、胜率或一致性等指标报告性能，缺乏作为测量仪器所需的系统性偏差与噪声评估。
AI.method: 提出 Judge Datasheet 协议，测量五个维度：真空输入下的暗电流、同质量表面变化的交叉敏感性、位置性虚假偏好、控制质量阶梯上的目标敏感性、以及平局指令引起的判断操作点。引入方向-稳定性分解区分真实Delta0偏好与位置偏差。
AI.result: 案例研究发现：Llama-3.1-8B 暗电流高且存在呈现冲突的Delta0行为；Qwen2.5-14B 真空洁净且目标敏感，但混合了稳定与位置性的过度区分；Qwen2.5-32B 真空洁净且交叉敏感性与位置偏差均低。严格平局标准消除了Qwen32B的Delta0虚假偏好，但将边缘Delta1目标信号吸收为平局。
AI.conclusion: 提示改变的是判断标准(criterion)，而非分辨率。本文贡献在于提供一个在下游声明之前先测量测量工具本身的计量学协议，而非确认下游机制假说。

title: Advanced Machine Learning and Deep Learning Techniques for Enhanced Cattle Identification and Detection: A Comprehensive Review
comment: Published in the journal of Annals of Emerging Technologies in Computing (AETiC), 34 pages, 5 Figures. The Article is available here: http://aetic.theiaer.org/archive/v10/v10n2/p1.html
summary: The need for effective cattle identification technology is now more acutely felt than ever in maintaining biosecurity, food safety, and supply chain efficacy in livestock management. This paper presents a systematic review of recent research in cattle identification using machine learning and deep learning techniques. The present systematic review measures the effectiveness of traditional and modern cattle identification techniques using studies from major academic databases, where articles were subjected to full-text review. Among these techniques, classical Machine Learning Techniques such as K-Nearest Neighbors and Support Vector Machines have demonstrated good results in cattle identification; however, Deep Learning Techniques, such as Convolutional Neural Networks, Residual Networks, and You Only Look Once, are better in cognition, detection, and identification tasks. Feature extraction relies on common techniques like Local Binary Pattern (LBP), Speeded-Up Robust Features (SURF), and Scale-Invariant Feature Transform (SIFT), while key features commonly used in these studies include muzzle prints and coat patterns. The review highlights key hurdles involving cattle identification, such as the limited number of publicly accessible datasets, issues with data quality susceptible to environmental changes and animal mobility, and high demand for real-time processing ability. The paper aims to inform researchers, policymakers, and stakeholders about implementing scalable, humane, and effective cattle identification systems to achieve sustainable livestock management.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了基于机器学习和深度学习的牛只识别技术，比较了传统方法（KNN、SVM）与深度学习方法（CNN、ResNet、YOLO）的优劣，指出深度学习在识别任务中表现更优，特征提取常用LBP、SURF、SIFT，关键特征包括鼻纹和皮毛图案，并讨论了数据集有限、数据质量差、实时处理需求高等挑战。
AI.motivation: 在畜牧业中，有效的牛只识别技术对维护生物安全、食品安全和供应链效率至关重要，但目前缺乏对该领域研究的系统性梳理。
AI.method: 对主要学术数据库中的相关研究进行系统综述，经过全文筛选后，对比传统机器学习（KNN、SVM）与深度学习（CNN、ResNet、YOLO）技术，并分析特征提取方法（LBP、SURF、SIFT）和关键特征（鼻纹、皮毛图案）。
AI.result: 经典机器学习技术（KNN、SVM）在牛只识别中表现良好，但深度学习技术（CNN、ResNet、YOLO）在认知、检测和识别任务中更优；常用特征包括鼻纹和皮毛图案；主要挑战包括公开数据集有限、数据质量受环境影响、动物移动性以及实时处理需求高。
AI.conclusion: 本文旨在为研究人员、政策制定者和利益相关者提供参考，推动实现可扩展、人道且有效的牛只识别系统，以促进可持续畜牧业管理。

title: Multi-HMR 2: Multi-Person Camera-Centric Human Detection, Mesh Recovery and Tracking
summary: Most advances in human mesh recovery (HMR) have focused on pelvis-centered recovery, overlooking metric 3D localization and detection accuracy in the camera coordinate system - two key factors for real-world applications such as human-robot interaction and social scene understanding. Current evaluation protocols often ignore these aspects, emphasizing per-person, root-centered recovery rather than camera-space perception. As a result, existing approaches rely on fixed camera assumptions or handcrafted post-processing, limiting their robustness and practical deployment. We introduce Multi-HMR 2, a simple yet robust DETR-based framework for Multi-person Camera-centric Human detection, mesh Recovery, and tracking. Multi-HMR 2 predicts a scene-consistent camera together with human meshes, enabling metric 3D localization without ground-truth intrinsics. Moreover, by distilling image-based memory features from SAM2, Multi-HMR 2 extends to tracking, achieving consistent identity association without video supervision. Despite its conceptual simplicity - no handcrafted components, no video input, and no ground-truth cameras - Multi-HMR 2 achieves state-of-the-art pelvis-centered performance while substantially improving detection accuracy and metric 3D localization.

AI.tldr: Multi-HMR 2 是一个基于DETR的多人体网格恢复框架，通过预测场景一致的相机参数实现度量3D定位，并利用SAM2蒸馏实现无视频监督的跟踪，在保持骨盆中心恢复性能的同时大幅提升检测精度和3D定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的人体网格恢复方法聚焦于骨盆中心的恢复，忽视了相机坐标系下的度量3D定位和检测精度，而这两点对人机交互和社交场景理解等实际应用至关重要。现有协议和评估标准也忽略了这些方面。
AI.method: 基于DETR框架，预测场景一致的相机参数（无需真实内参），并通过从SAM2蒸馏图像记忆特征实现跟踪，无需视频监督和手工设计组件。
AI.result: 在保持最先进的骨盆中心恢复性能的同时，显著提升了检测精度和度量3D定位能力。
AI.conclusion: 简单且鲁棒的框架，无需手工设计组件、视频输入和真实相机参数，即可实现出色的多人相机中心检测、网格恢复和跟踪。

title: Distilling Examples into Task Instructions: Enhanced In-Context Learning for Real-World B2B Conversations
comment: Accepted for publication in Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics 2026
summary: In-context learning (ICL) is the standard method for low-resource classification, yet its efficacy in specialized domains remains largely unexplored. We address the challenge of classifying semantically complex, multi-party B2B conversations, where traditional ICL encounters significant limitations, especially as context length increases due to the concatenation of multiple few-shot examples. We introduce the \texttt{Call Playbook} dataset, featuring five classification tasks derived from real-world B2B conversations targeting core sales concepts. To bridge the gap between performance and practical utility, we propose novel knowledge extraction methods that distill verbose examples into compact, interpretable representations of structured classification criteria and precise task descriptions. Our approach achieves a 99\% reduction in token usage and improves macro-averaged AUC by up to 7\% over traditional ICL. Notably, it remains robust as context grows, unlike advanced token compression baselines which degrade by over 9 F1 points. Importantly, our framework enables direct refinement of classification logic, addressing critical needs for transparency, efficiency, and user interaction in real-world NLP applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种知识提取方法，将冗长的少量样本压缩为紧凑、可解释的结构化分类标准和任务描述，在B2B对话分类任务上实现99%的令牌缩减和高达7%的AUC提升，且随上下文增长保持鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统上下文学习（ICL）在专业领域（特别是多参与方B2B商业对话分类）中效果有限，随着少量样本拼接导致上下文长度增加，性能显著下降。需要一种既高效又可解释的方法来弥合性能与实际应用之间的差距。
AI.method: 提出了知识提取方法，将冗长的示例蒸馏为紧凑、可解释的结构化分类标准和精确的任务描述表示，替代传统的多示例拼接方式。
AI.result: 令牌使用量减少99%；宏平均AUC提升高达7%；在上下文增长时保持鲁棒性，而高级令牌压缩基线方法F1分数下降超过9个点。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅显著提升了性能与效率，还支持分类逻辑的直接优化，满足真实NLP应用对透明性、效率和用户交互的关键需求。

title: Overcoming the Impedance Mismatch: A Theoretical Roadmap for Fusing Foundation Models and Knowledge Graphs
comment: 12 pages. Accepted at the ACL 2026 4th Workshop on Towards Knowledgeable Foundation Models (https://openreview.net/forum?id=hXDYsNAq8m)
summary: Modern artificial intelligence remains fundamentally divided between the continuous, probabilistic spaces of Foundation Models and the discrete, deterministic structures of Knowledge Graphs. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) attempts to connect them by serializing graph data into text, we argue this lexical bridging is merely a superficial patch. In this paper, we formalize the underlying structural and geometric friction as the \textit{Impedance Mismatch}. By categorizing current neuro-symbolic integration strategies into a three-tiered hierarchy, we demonstrate that neither surface-level prompt injection nor continuous representation alignment can preserve the strict logical motifs required for reliable multi-hop reasoning. We define the specific mathematical limits, such as the Lexical Bottleneck and Topological Collapse, that show current architectures will eventually hallucinate or conflate semantic nodes. To achieve true semantic fusion, we propose a rigorous theoretical roadmap. We advocate for natively internalizing discrete symbolic structures through Structured Residual Streams, utilizing Vector Symbolic Architectures for latent sub-graph injection, and performing model updates via Orthogonal Subspace Editing. This actionable framework paves the way for models that seamlessly fuse the precision of symbolic logic with the expressivity of parametric memory.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了大型语言模型与知识图谱之间的"阻抗不匹配"问题，指出现有RAG方法仅是表面修补。作者通过理论分析定义了词汇瓶颈和拓扑坍缩等数学极限，并提出结构化残差流、向量符号架构和正交子空间编辑等融合框架。
AI.motivation: 当前基础模型（连续概率空间）与知识图谱（离散确定结构）之间存在根本性的结构与几何摩擦，现有的RAG方法仅通过序列化将图数据转为文本，是一种浅层修补，无法保留多跳推理所需的严格逻辑模式。
AI.method: 本文提出三层次神经符号融合分类法，定义了阻抗不匹配的具体数学极限（词汇瓶颈、拓扑坍缩），并构建了理论框架：1) 结构化残差流内化离散符号结构；2) 向量符号架构实现潜在子图注入；3) 正交子空间编辑进行模型更新。
AI.result: 论证了表面级提示注入和连续表示对齐均无法可靠保留多跳推理所需的逻辑模式，当前架构最终会产生幻觉或混淆语义节点。
AI.conclusion: 只有通过内化离散符号结构的框架，才能实现符号逻辑的精确性与参数化记忆的表达性的无缝融合，为真正融合两种范式的模型铺平道路。

title: An Ensemble Deep Learning Approach for Reliable and Scalable Lemon Leaf Disease Classification
comment: 5 pages, 12 figures, 3 Tables, Presented at 18th IEEE International Conference on Computational Intelligence and Communication Networks (CICN) 2026
summary: Early detection of plant diseases is crucial to plants and for the farmers. Plant diseases reduce fruit yield and quality, and plants are more susceptible to other stresses when they are infected. The lemon leaf disease dataset contains 1354 images. The dataset has 9 classes. Among the 9 classes only one class is for healthy leaf, and the other 8 classes are leaf diseases. The dataset was split into training (70%), testing (15%) and validation (15%) sets after comprehensive preprocessing. Two pretrained models (InceptionV3 and MobileNetV2) were applied and then combined these models using an ensemble technique to boost robustness. Ensemble models showed a promising performance of 99.27% accuracy. Adversarial Training is applied to improve models' ability and ensure reliable predictions under noisy data. Grad-CAM visualization highlights the important regions of leaf images that validate the model prediction with confidence level.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于集成深度学习模型（InceptionV3 + MobileNetV2）的柠檬叶片病害检测方法，在9分类数据集上达到99.27%的准确率，并采用对抗训练提升鲁棒性，使用Grad-CAM进行可视化解释。
AI.motivation: 植物病害的早期检测对作物产量和质量至关重要，感染病害的植物更容易遭受其他胁迫，因此需要高效准确的自动检测方法。
AI.method: 使用1354张柠檬叶片图像（9类，其中8类为病害），按70%/15%/15%划分训练/测试/验证集；分别训练InceptionV3和MobileNetV2预训练模型，再通过集成学习融合两者；应用对抗训练增强鲁棒性；使用Grad-CAM可视化模型关注区域。
AI.result: 集成模型达到99.27%的准确率，对抗训练提高了模型在噪声数据下的预测可靠性，Grad-CAM可视化验证了模型关注了叶片的关键区域。
AI.conclusion: 集成深度学习方法能有效检测柠檬叶片病害，结合对抗训练和可视化解释增强了模型的实用性和可信度，为精准农业中的病害检测提供了可行方案。

title: Extending Item Response Theory for Efficient and Meaningful Multilingual Evaluation
summary: Multilingual benchmarks are central to evaluating large language models (LLMs) across languages, but they suffer from three issues: exhaustive evaluation scales linearly with the number of languages, automatic translation introduces errors that are easily missed at scale, and some items conflate general and culture-specific knowledge. We address all three with a unified statistical framework, Multilingual-IRT, which extends Item Response Theory with per-language difficulty deviations, split discriminability separating content from language effects, and per-language ability residuals. Fitting Multilingual-IRT on 25 LLMs across 29 languages of MMLU-Pro-X, we show that its fitted parameters support three practical applications: predicting unobserved (item, LLM, language) instances with 11-16% lower binary cross-entropy than the strongest accuracy-based baseline, surfacing candidate translation errors distributed across all 28 non-English languages, whereas accuracy-based baselines concentrate detections in a few languages, and recovering culture-specific items that accuracy-based baselines miss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Multilingual-IRT，一个基于项目反应理论的统计框架，用于解决多语言基准测试中评估成本高、翻译错误难发现、知识混淆三大问题。在 25 个 LLM × 29 种语言 × MMLU-Pro-X 上验证，该框架能更准确地预测未观测样本、更均衡地发现翻译错误、并识别被传统方法忽略的文化专属题目。
AI.motivation: 现有 multilingual benchmarks 存在三大问题：1) 多语言评估成本随语言数线性增长；2) 自动翻译引入的错误难以大规模捕捉；3) 部分题目混淆了通用知识与文化专属知识。本文旨在用一个统一框架同时解决这三个问题。
AI.method: 提出 Multilingual-IRT 框架，扩展经典项目反应理论，引入三个核心组件：每种语言的难度偏差（per-language difficulty deviations）、区分内容与语言效应的拆分可辨别性（split discriminability）、以及每种语言的能力残差（per-language ability residuals）。在 25 个 LLM 和 29 种语言的 MMLU-Pro-X 数据集上拟合模型。
AI.result: 相比最强的基于准确率的基线方法，该框架在预测未观测 (item, LLM, language) 实例上二元交叉熵降低 11-16%；能均匀地在所有 28 种非英语语言中发现翻译错误候选，而准确率基线方法仅集中在少数语言中；还能恢复准确率基线方法遗漏的文化专属题目。
AI.conclusion: Multilingual-IRT 是一个有效的统计框架，能够同时解决多语言评估中的效率、错误检测和文化敏感性三大问题，为未来多语言 LLM 评估提供了更细粒度、更可靠的建模方法。

title: Where Did It Go Wrong? Process-Level Evaluation of Web Agents with Semantic State Tracking
summary: Web agents act through long interaction sequences, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only terminal success, discarding all process information and offering little guidance on improvement. In this work, we conduct a process-level analysis of web agents. We introduce WebStep, a benchmark of 1,800 task instances with controlled difficulty and automatic semantic state tracking. Each website exposes a deterministic semantic MDP alongside the GUI: the agent operates on the interface, while the environment records high-level states and transitions in the background, enabling fine-grained analysis without manual annotation. Based on the semantic trajectory, we first show that process metrics reveal differences invisible to outcome evaluation: three agents whose success rates cluster within 31-33% diverge in exploration reach versus execution accuracy. Then, decomposing by skill characterizes the nature of these differences, exposing opposite per-skill rankings hidden within the same website: e.g., on Housing, OpenAI CUA outperforms Qwen3.5 by 23.7% on commit actions yet underperforms it by 15.6% on filtering, pinpointing a concrete skill to improve even within a domain. Bifurcation analysis further localizes the decisive error that loses the task and shows that this error is agent-specific rather than shared. Finally, these differences widen as tasks grow harder: success rate is similar on easy tasks but separates sharply as exploration becomes more demanding. Our process-level analysis opens a new avenue in web agent evaluation, providing fine-grained and actionable insight into where and how each agent should be improved.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WebStep基准（1800个任务实例），通过语义MDP对Web Agent进行过程级分析，发现过程指标能揭示结果评估无法体现的差异，精准定位各Agent在不同技能上的优劣，并指出这些差异在困难任务中会显著扩大。
AI.motivation: 现有Web Agent基准只评估最终成功与否，丢弃了所有过程信息，无法为改进提供指导。作者希望引入过程级分析，提供细粒度、可操作的改进洞察。
AI.method: 构建WebStep基准（1800个任务实例），每个网站同时暴露GUI和确定性的语义MDP，自动记录高层状态和状态转换，实现无需人工标注的细粒度分析。通过过程指标、技能分解、分叉分析等方法进行评测。
AI.result: 1) 过程指标揭示结果评估无法看到的差异：三个成功率相近（31-33%）的Agent在探索范围和执行精度上表现不同。2) 技能分解发现同一网站内技能排名相反（如Housing上OpenAI CUA在commit动作上优于Qwen3.5 23.7%，但在filtering上落后15.6%）。3) 分叉分析定位到决定任务失败的关键错误，且错误具有Agent特异性。4) 困难任务中差异显著扩大。
AI.conclusion: 过程级分析为Web Agent评估开辟了新方向，能提供细粒度、可操作的改进建议，精确定位每个Agent在何处以及如何改进。

title: Understanding Cross-Modal Contributions in Continual Vision-Language Models: A Theoretical Perspective
summary: Continual vision-language models are commonly addressed through sequential fine-tuning; however, although this paradigm enables adaptation to new environments (tasks), it inherently emphasizes the contribution of previously learned environments (tasks) at the expense of the stability required to preserve previously acquired knowledge. While existing approaches have adequately studied continual learning and catastrophic forgetting in vision-language models (VLMs), the theoretical understanding of modality-specific contributions across a sequence of environments remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we present a new theoretical perspective to understand the cross-modal (vision-language) contributions to consecutive environments. We empirically evaluate our theoretical findings on large VLMs and demonstrate their effectiveness in capturing environment-level cross-modal contributions. Our analysis provides deeper insights into continual VLMs, highlighting their contribution robustness to varying task orders and inter-task similarities, and their improved generalization performance.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论角度探讨了持续视觉-语言模型在不同环境（任务）序列中跨模态（视觉-语言）贡献的问题，提出了新的理论视角来理解跨模态贡献，并通过实验验证了其有效性，展示了在任务顺序变化和跨任务相似性下的鲁棒性和泛化性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，但对视觉-语言模型中模态特定贡献在连续环境序列中的理论理解尚属空白，作者希望填补这一理论空缺。
AI.method: 提出一个新的理论视角来分析跨模态（视觉-语言）贡献如何在不同环境序列中变化，并在大规模VLMs上进行了实证验证。
AI.result: 该理论方法能够有效捕捉环境层面的跨模态贡献，对任务顺序变化和跨任务相似性表现出鲁棒性，并提升了泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 该理论分析为持续视觉-语言模型提供了更深入的理解，揭示了跨模态贡献的鲁棒性及其对泛化能力的积极影响。

title: Beyond English: Uncovering the Multilingual Gap in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action models have recently demonstrated promising capabilities in learning generalist robot policies from large-scale multimodal data. However, most existing VLA systems are trained and evaluated primarily with English instructions, leaving their ability to understand and execute instructions in other languages largely unexplored. While the underlying large language models often possess multilingual capabilities, it remains unclear whether these multilingual capabilities transfer to VLAs during training. In this work, we present the first systematic study of multilingual instruction following in VLA models. We first construct multilingual instructions by extending existing benchmarks with translations of their instructions. Using these instructions, we evaluate several representative VLA models across a range of tasks in simulation settings. Our experiments reveal a significant multilingual gap: models trained primarily on English instructions exhibit substantial performance degradation when evaluated on other languages, even when the underlying language backbone is multilingual. We provide several findings and analyses to understand the multilingual gap. Cross-lingual transfer behavior analysis shows that performance drops correlate with both instruction understanding and action execution. Representation analyses suggest that multilingual instruction-caused representation shifts may contribute to the multilingual gap. Motivated by these findings, we further explore strategies to improve multilingual performance in VLAs. We propose a simple yet effective multilingual fine-tuning approach, Multilingual Principal Component Alignment, which leverages Principal Component Analysis to get the principal component subspace and align projected multilingual representations, effectively reducing the multilingual performance gap.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究VLA模型在多语言指令跟随中的表现，发现存在显著的多语言差距（性能大幅下降），并提出了一种基于主成分分析对齐的多语言微调方法来缩小这一差距。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型主要基于英语指令训练和评估，其多语言指令跟随能力尚未被探索，尽管底层LLM具备多语言能力，但这种能力是否迁移到VLA中尚不明确。
AI.method: 1) 构建多语言指令数据集（翻译现有基准）；2) 评估多个代表性VLA模型并分析多语言差距；3) 提出Multilingual Principal Component Alignment方法，利用PCA获取主成分子空间并对齐投影后的多语言表示。
AI.result: 1) 发现了显著的多语言差距：非英语指令下性能大幅下降；2) 性能下降与指令理解和动作执行均相关；3) 多语言指令引起的表示偏移可能是导致差距的原因；4) 所提方法有效缩小了多语言性能差距。
AI.conclusion: VLA模型存在严重的多语言指令跟随差距，但通过表示对齐的方法可以有效缓解。

title: Multi-agent Framework for Time-Sensitive Complementary Collaboration in Minecraft
summary: We present TickingCollabBench, a Minecraft-based multi-agent benchmark for a novel class of time-sensitive complementary collaboration tasks. Our benchmark reflects four core characteristics of real-world collaboration: agent heterogeneity, mandatory collaboration, dynamic environments, and strict real-time constraints with failure risks. To enable this, we develop the TickingCollab framework, which supports the generation of diverse dynamic environments and abstracts Minecraft's primitive APIs to enable declarative YAML task specifications for composing these events. Building on this, we design a feasibility-aware automated benchmark generation pipeline, where an LLM drafts structurally diverse task configurations and feasibility verifier filters out invalid ones using approximate constraints. Evaluations demonstrate that lang latency and inherent difficulty of coordinating under partial observability and agent heterogeneity cause LLMs to frequently fail under dynamic environments and fall significantly short of a global-knowledge oracle.

AI.tldr: 提出了TickingCollabBench，一个基于Minecraft的多人协作基准测试，专注于时间敏感的互补协作任务，反映现实协作的四个核心特征：智能体异质性、强制协作、动态环境、严格实时约束与失败风险。
AI.motivation: 现有协作基准缺乏对时间敏感的互补协作任务的全面评估，未能充分反映现实世界中动态环境、智能体异质性和实时约束等关键特征。
AI.method: 开发了TickingCollab框架，支持动态环境生成并抽象Minecraft原始API实现声明式YAML任务规范；设计了可行性感知的自动化基准生成流水线，由LLM起草多样化任务配置，可行性验证器过滤无效配置。
AI.result: 评估表明，在动态环境下，由于语言延迟、部分可观测性和智能体异质性导致的协调困难，LLMs频繁失败，远低于全局知识oracle的性能。
AI.conclusion: 现有LLM在多智能体时间敏感协作任务中表现不佳，特别是在动态环境和部分可观测条件下，尚需进一步提升其协调能力。

title: Improved Knowledge Distillation for Land-Use Image Classification
summary: In the present article, an improved Knowledge Distillation (KD) framework has been proposed for efficient compression of deep convolutional neural networks for land-use image classification task. Motivated by the need to achieve competitive classification accuracy while reducing computational complexity, a teacher-student learning paradigm is adopted in which a VGG16 network transfers knowledge to a lightweight MobileNetV2 model. The proposed framework integrates hard supervision from ground truth labels with a soft supervision strategy that combines Kullback-Leibler divergence and Cosine Similarity losses. Experiments conducted on three land-use datasets show that the proposed KD-based method yields improved performance, and achieves an accuracy of 99.04%, outperforming both baseline student training and single-loss distillation approaches, while retaining substantial model compression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的知识蒸馏框架，利用VGG16教师网络将知识迁移至轻量级MobileNetV2学生网络，结合硬标签监督与KL散度+余弦相似度软监督策略，在三个土地利用图像数据集上达到99.04%的准确率，优于基线方法，同时实现模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 在土地利用图像分类任务中，需要在保持高分类精度的同时降低深度卷积神经网络的计算复杂度，实现模型的高效压缩。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生学习范式，VGG16作为教师网络，MobileNetV2作为轻量级学生网络；训练时结合硬标签监督（真实标签）与软监督策略，软监督损失由KL散度和余弦相似度损失组合构成。
AI.result: 在三个土地利用数据集上，该方法达到99.04%的准确率，优于基线学生训练和单一损失蒸馏方法，同时实现显著的模型压缩。
AI.conclusion: 提出的改进KD框架能有效平衡分类性能与模型压缩，为土地利用图像分类提供了一种高效的轻量化解决方案。

title: Vernier: Probing Representational Misalignment Behind Lexical Gaps in Causal Reasoning
summary: Instruction-tuned language models can answer the same causal-reasoning question differently after its English variable names are replaced by type-preserving placeholders, although the structural causal model and the gold answer are unchanged. We ask whether this lexical gap reflects information loss in the placeholder view or a misaligned read-out from a representation that still carries answer-relevant content. Vernier uses a paired-view weight update as an instrument and then inspects the mechanism left after the gap closes. In the working regimes, the evidence favours representational misalignment. A variable-name probe becomes more accurate on the placeholder view, and activation patching on Qwen-7B, Qwen-14B, and Llama-3.1-8B shows that the decision-token representation can transfer answer identity between views. The update that realigns the views is counterfactual augmentation over original and placeholder prompts, while the answer-subspace KL mainly sharpens intermediate answer-belief agreement. Success is bounded by model family, scale, and task. CRASS transfer is reliable across Qwen scales and Llama, e-CARE remains weak, and preliminary non-causal rename tasks show a similar qualitative pattern.

AI.tldr: 指令微调语言模型在因果推理中，当变量名被替换为占位符时，答案会变化。研究发现这种词汇差异并非信息丢失，而是表征对齐问题。通过配对视图权重更新（Vernier）发现，激活修补和变量名探针表明表征存在错位，而反事实增强可重新对齐视图，但成功率受模型规模、家族和任务限制。
AI.motivation: 探究指令微调语言模型在因果推理任务中，当变量名被替换为占位符后答案变化的原因——是信息丢失还是表征读取错位。
AI.method: 使用Vernier（配对视图权重更新）作为工具，通过变量名探针、激活修补（Qwen-7B/14B、Llama-3.1-8B）和反事实增强（原始+占位符提示）来分析和对齐视图。
AI.result: 证据支持表征错位假说；变量名探针在占位符视图上更准确；决策token表征可在视图间传递答案；反事实增强可重新对齐视图；答案子空间KL主要强化中间答案信念一致性；成功率受模型家族、规模和任务影响（CRASS在Qwen和Llama上可迁移，e-CARE较弱）。
AI.conclusion: 指令微调模型在因果推理中变量名替换导致的答案变化，根源是表征读取错位而非信息丢失；反事实增强可部分缓解，但效果受限于模型能力和任务类型。

title: Recurrent Reasoning on Symbolic Puzzles with Sequence Models
summary: Large language models often appear strong on symbolic and algorithmic tasks, yet this apparent strength can hide brittle behaviour when problems become longer, harder, or slightly out of distribution. A major limitation of current reasoning benchmarks is that many primarily test whether a model can produce a valid answer, while paying less attention to whether the solution is minimal, robust, and stable under controlled difficulty scaling. We introduce RecurrReason, a difficulty-controlled benchmark of four recurrent logic puzzles (Tower of Hanoi, River Crossing, Block World, and Checkers Jumping) with BFS-optimal trajectories and a single interpretable difficulty parameter $N \in \{1,\dots,10\}$, totalling 10{,}817 unique puzzles and 285{,}933 moves. We benchmark two Transformer families, an encoder-decoder model (T5-style) and a decoder-only model (GPT-2-style), under consistent data splits and evaluation criteria, training on $N{=}1$ to $7$ and evaluating on both held-out in-distribution instances and harder out-of-distribution instances at $N{=}8$ to $10$. Fine-tuned pre-trained T5 achieves 97.27\% validation and 81.00\% OOD accuracy on Block World; all models score 0.00\% on River Crossing under all conditions. Failure mode analysis reveals that architecture is a stronger determinant of success than scale. Pre-training transfers only to puzzles with locally structured transition functions. Our code and dataset will be open-sourced upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 RecurrReason 基准，包含四个递归逻辑谜题（汉诺塔、过河、积木世界、跳棋），通过 BFS 最优轨迹和可控难度参数 N∈{1,…,10} 评估 LLM 的推理鲁棒性。实验表明：架构比规模更重要，预训练仅对具有局部结构化转移函数的谜题有效，所有模型在过河谜题上准确率为 0%。
AI.motivation: 现有推理基准主要测试模型能否生成有效答案，但忽略了在难度扩展下解决方案是否最小化、鲁棒且稳定。作者希望建立难度可控的基准，系统评估模型在更长、更难、分布外场景下的推理退化情况。
AI.method: 构建 10,817 个唯一谜题（共 285,933 步）的 RecurrReason 基准，每个谜题有 BFS 最优解和单一可解释难度参数 N。在 N=1~7 上训练，在 N=8~10 上评估分布外性能。对比两个 Transformer 家族（T5 编码器-解码器 和 GPT-2 解码器-仅），进行故障模式分析。
AI.result: 微调后的预训练 T5 在积木世界上验证准确率 97.27%，OOD 准确率 81.00%；所有模型在过河谜题上准确率均为 0.00%。架构是比规模更强的成功决定因素；预训练仅对具有局部结构化转移函数的谜题有帮助。
AI.conclusion: 当前 LLM 在推理任务上的表面能力具有脆弱性，尤其在需要全局规划或难度扩展时。架构选择比模型规模更重要，且预训练带来的迁移收益高度依赖于任务的结构特性。

title: Deep Learning in Seismic Interpretation: Federated Advances in Salt Dome Segmentation
summary: Salt-dome delineation is a critical, high-impact task in subsurface geological interpretation, driving decisions in hydrocarbon exploration, reservoir modeling, and drilling safety. While convolutional encoder-decoder architectures have delivered significant improvements in automated salt segmentation, their widespread application is severely limited by data sovereignty concerns, dataset bias, and the scarcity of labeled seismic volumes. This paper introduces FedSaltNet, a Federated Learning (FL) framework explicitly engineered for robust, generalizable, and privacy preserving salt-dome segmentation. We couple a lightweight Small U-Net backbone, chosen for its efficiency and regularization properties with a novel Foreground-Weighted (FG-WEIGHTED) aggregation strategy designed to tackle domain-specific class imbalance. Through an extensive comparative study emulating non-IID conditions across four diverse seismic datasets (TGS, SEAM, F3, GBS), we demonstrate two critical findings: The FG-WEIGHTED algorithm effectively mitigates data heterogeneity, yielding a 4.0% relative improvement in Intersection over Union (IoU) over the best conventional FL method. The simple U-Net architecture proved essential, outperforming the higher capacity ResNet-18 U-Net variant by 166% in average IoU, underscoring the necessity of architectural simplicity in data-constrained federated environments. FedSaltNet provides a validated, high-performance solution that establishes the viability of federated deep learning for collaborative, next-generation subsurface interpretation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedSaltNet，一个用于盐丘分割的联邦学习框架，结合轻量Small U-Net和FG-WEIGHTED聚合策略，在隐私保护下实现鲁棒分割，相比传统FL方法IoU提升4.0%。
AI.motivation: 盐丘分割是地下地质解释的关键任务，但现有深度学习方案受限于数据主权、数据集偏差和标注稀缺，无法广泛应用。需要一种兼顾隐私保护与泛化能力的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出FedSaltNet框架，采用轻量Small U-Net作为骨干网络（因其高效和正则化特性），并设计FG-WEIGHTED（前景加权）聚合策略，解决联邦学习中非独立同分布（non-IID）下的类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在四个地震数据集（TGS, SEAM, F3, GBS）上的实验表明：FG-WEIGHTED策略相比最佳传统FL方法IoU提升4.0%；Small U-Net相比ResNet-18 U-Net平均IoU高出166%，说明架构简洁在数据受限的联邦环境中至关重要。
AI.conclusion: FedSaltNet验证了联邦深度学习在协作式地下地质解释中的可行性，为隐私保护下的高精度盐丘分割提供了有效解决方案。

title: Retrievable Gradients: Continual Post-Training Without Cumulative Weight Drift
summary: Continual post-training enables models to absorb emerging knowledge after deployment, but repeatedly updating shared parameters can accumulate weight drift, potentially causing catastrophic forgetting and degrading general capabilities. Retrieval-augmented generation avoids such parameter drift, yet often lacks the depth of parametric knowledge integration. In this paper, we propose ReGrad (Retrievable Gradients), a new paradigm that treats gradients as retrievable units of knowledge. ReGrad pre-computes document-specific gradients offline, stores them in an indexed Gradient Bank, and retrieves only query-relevant gradients at inference time for temporary weight adaptation. However, raw language-modeling gradients are optimized for token-level document reconstruction rather than for query-driven knowledge use. We therefore introduce a bi-level meta-learning objective that reshapes document-derived gradients into generalizable adaptation signals for downstream tasks. Experiments across general and domain-specific settings show that \textsc{ReGrad} outperforms CPT and RAG baselines, enabling scalable and reversible parametric knowledge injection without accumulating weight drift.

AI.tldr: ReGrad提出将梯度作为可检索的知识单元，通过预计算文档梯度并存储在梯度库中，在推理时检索相关梯度进行临时权重调整，避免了持续训练中的权重漂移和灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 持续后训练（CPT）会导致权重漂移和灾难性遗忘，而检索增强生成（RAG）虽然避免了参数漂移但缺乏参数化知识融合的深度。现有方法无法同时实现可扩展、可逆的参数化知识注入且不积累权重漂移。
AI.method: ReGrad将梯度视为可检索的知识单元，包括：(1) 离线预计算文档特定梯度，存储在索引化的梯度库中；(2) 推理时检索查询相关梯度用于临时权重调整；(3) 引入双层元学习目标将文档梯度重塑为下游任务可泛化的适应信号。
AI.result: 在通用和领域特定设置下，ReGrad优于持续后训练（CPT）和检索增强生成（RAG）基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ReGrad实现了可扩展、可逆的参数化知识注入，且不积累权重漂移，解决了CPT和RAG各自面临的局限性。

title: Do LLMs Reliably Identify Correct Information Units in Aphasic Discourse?
summary: Correct Information Units (CIUs) are central to discourse assessment in aphasia because they quantify communicative informativeness rather than linguistic form alone. However, CIU scoring is time intensive and requires trained raters. This study examined whether instruction-tuned large language models (LLMs) can reliably perform token-level CIU classification from aphasic discourse transcripts. Sixteen picture-description transcripts elicited with the Cat Rescue stimulus were annotated for CIU status according to Nicholas and Brookshire (1993). The sample spanned four severity strata: control, mild, moderate, and severe aphasia. Four publicly available instruction-tuned LLMs were benchmarked under zero-shot and two few-shot prompting conditions across five stratified random seeds. Performance was evaluated against consensus human labels using accuracy, precision, recall, F1, and Cohen's kappa. Zero-shot prompting was insufficient across models. In contrast, few-shot prompting yielded substantial gains and produced competitive performance for three viable models. Mean few-shot F1 scores ranged from 0.776 to 0.817 across Llama-3.1-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, and Mistral-7B, with no significant differences between fixed global and per-chunk local example selection. Phi-3-mini was unstable and did not yield reliable performance. Viable models showed high recall but lower precision, suggesting systematic over-classification of tokens as CIUs. Performance also varied by discourse severity, with the weakest results in more severe aphasia. Few-shot LLM prompting can support automated CIU identification without gradient-based task training, but agreement with human annotation remains insufficient for fully autonomous use. These findings support LLM-based CIU scoring as a promising human-in-the-loop component of discourse assessment systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了指令微调的大语言模型（LLMs）在失语症语篇中自动识别正确信息单元（CIUs）的能力。零样本提示效果不足，而少样本提示显著提升性能，三个模型（Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Mistral-7B）的F1分数在0.776-0.817之间，但精度较低（倾向于过度分类），且重度失语症表现最弱。结论认为LLM可作为人工参与系统的组件，但尚不能完全自主使用。
AI.motivation: CIU是失语症语篇评估的核心指标，但人工评分耗时且需要专业训练。为提高评估效率，研究者探索能否利用指令微调LLM自动完成CIU的token级分类。
AI.method: 使用Cat Rescue图片描述任务收集16个语篇样本，涵盖正常、轻、中、重度失语症四个层次。采用四个公开指令微调LLM（Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Mistral-7B、Phi-3-mini），分别在零样本和两种少样本提示条件下测试，使用五个分层随机种子，以人工共识标签为基准评估准确率、精确率、召回率、F1和Cohen's kappa。
AI.result: 零样本提示效果不足；少样本提示下，Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Mistral-7B的F1均值为0.776-0.817，全局与局部示例选择无显著差异。Phi-3-mini不稳定。模型召回率高但精确率低（倾向于过度分类为CIU），重度失语症表现最弱。
AI.conclusion: 少样本LLM提示可在不进行梯度训练的情况下支持自动化CIU识别，但与人工标注的一致性尚不足以完全自主使用。LLM可作为人工参与（human-in-the-loop）语篇评估系统的组件。

title: Mask Proposal Voting Based on Geodesic Framework for Robust Image Segmentation
summary: Despite great advances, finding accurate segmentation remains a challenging task, especially in scenarios with cluttered backgrounds, complex intensity variations and topology appearance. Minimal path models have exhibited their strong ability in addressing image segmentation tasks. However, the performance of minimal paths-based segmentation approaches is heavily influenced by model initialization, hence limiting their application scope in practice. In this work, we propose a novel mask proposal voting framework that overcomes the major drawback of classical approaches, allowing robust segmentation even in complicated scenarios. Firstly, we introduce an efficient method for constructing adaptive domain cuts as a constraint for initializing the region-based min-cut evolution, by which diverse and reliable mask proposal candidates can be generated, substantially increasing the possibility of accurately covering the objective region by these proposals. Secondly, we propose a new mask voting scheme to build a voting score map encoding the final segmentation information. In contrast to classical path voting methods, our model allows incorporating priors to assign different importance to each individual mask. As a consequence, the proposed segmentation model is capable of accurately delineating object boundaries under complex scenarios, and is insensitive to initialization. Experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art minimal path-based approaches in both accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩膜投票框架的新方法，通过构建自适应域切割生成多样化掩膜候选，并采用加权投票机制融合分割信息，克服了传统最小路径方法对初始化的高度敏感性，在复杂场景下实现了更准确、鲁棒的分割。
AI.motivation: 传统最小路径分割方法严重依赖模型初始化，在复杂背景、强度变化和拓扑外观场景下性能受限，亟需一种对初始化不敏感且鲁棒的分割方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出自适应域切割方法，高效约束基于区域的min-cut演化，生成多样且可靠的掩膜候选；2) 提出新的掩膜投票方案，允许引入先验信息为每个掩膜分配不同重要性权重，构建投票得分图以编码最终分割信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在准确性和鲁棒性上一致优于当前最先进的最小路径分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的掩膜投票框架能够有效解决最小路径方法对初始化的依赖问题，在复杂场景下实现精确的目标边界分割，具有较好的实际应用前景。

title: EHRNote-ChatQA: A Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Multi-Turn Clinical Question Answering over Longitudinal Discharge Summaries
summary: Discharge summaries are crucial clinical documents containing the context of a patient's overall hospital stay, and are routinely reviewed by medical experts for patient readmission, ongoing care, and diagnostic decision-making. When reviewing them, medical experts often must iteratively synthesize information across multiple summaries while verifying the evidence supporting each answer. Although large language models (LLMs) are increasingly explored for clinical question answering, existing benchmarks do not sufficiently reflect this setting: they often evaluate exam-style medical knowledge or focus on single-turn question answering with limited evidence-grounding evaluation. We introduce EHRNote-ChatQA, the first benchmark for evidence-grounded multi-turn clinical question answering over patients' multiple discharge summaries. Built from de-identified MIMIC-IV discharge summaries, EHRNote-ChatQA contains 967 patient-level multi-turn samples spanning one to five notes and 16,072 medical-expert-verified QA pairs (8,036 content questions, each paired with an evidence-grounding question) across eight clinical categories. The benchmark is constructed through an expert-informed pipeline combining discharge-summary structuring schema, expert-curated multi-turn QA templates, and LLM-based generation, followed by review and revision of every single QA sample by 11 medical experts. Benchmarking 22 open- and closed-source LLMs reveals several challenges, including that LLMs struggle more with evidence grounding than content answering, multi-turn errors compound across turns, and single-turn clinical QA performance does not reliably transfer to this setting. These findings establish EHRNote-ChatQA as a rigorous and practical benchmark for evaluating clinical QA systems. The dataset will be made publicly available through PhysioNet credentialed access.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了EHRNote-ChatQA，一个基于MIMIC-IV出院小结构建的、首个用于多轮临床问答的证据溯源基准数据集，包含967个患者级样本和16,072个医学专家验证的QA对，并通过评估22个LLM发现模型在证据溯源、多轮错误累积等方面面临挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有临床问答基准多为考试式医学知识或单轮问答，缺乏对医生实际工作场景（需在多个出院小结间迭代综合信息并验证证据）的反映，因此需要构建一个多轮、证据溯源的临床问答基准。
AI.method: 采用专家指导的数据构建流程：(1) 出院小结结构化标注；(2) 专家策划多轮问答模板；(3) LLM辅助生成；(4) 11位医学专家逐条审核修正。数据源自去标识化的MIMIC-IV出院小结，覆盖8个临床类别，每个内容问题都配有一个证据溯源问题。
AI.result: 评估22个开源和闭源LLM发现：(1) 模型在证据溯源任务上比内容回答更困难；(2) 多轮错误会随着轮次累积放大；(3) 单轮临床问答性能不能可靠迁移到多轮场景。
AI.conclusion: EHRNote-ChatQA是一个严谨且实用的临床问答系统评估基准，揭示了现有LLM在多轮临床问答中的关键不足，数据集将通过PhysioNet认证访问公开。

title: Artificial Intelligence Index Report 2026
summary: Welcome to the ninth edition of the AI Index report. As AI continues to advance rapidly, the question becomes whether the systems built around it can keep up. Governance frameworks, evaluation methods, education systems, and the data infrastructure needed to track AI's impact are struggling to match the pace of the technology itself. That gap between what AI can do and how prepared we are to manage it runs through every chapter of this year's report. New in this edition, the report tracks how AI is being tested more ambitiously across reasoning, safety, and real-world task execution, and why those measurements are increasingly difficult to rely on. It also features new estimates of generative AI's economic value alongside emerging evidence of its labor market effects, an analytical framework on AI sovereignty, and a science chapter developed in collaboration with Schmidt Sciences. For the first time, the report features standalone chapters on AI in science and AI in medicine, reflecting AI's growing impact across these two domains.

AI.tldr: 第九届AI指数报告揭示了AI技术能力与社会治理能力之间日益扩大的鸿沟，涵盖推理评估、安全测试、经济影响、劳动力市场变化、AI主权等议题，并首次设立了AI科学和AI医学专题章节。
AI.motivation: AI技术飞速发展，但围绕其建立的治理框架、评估方法、教育体系和数据基础设施难以跟上技术步伐，这种"能力-准备度"差距是报告的核心驱动力。
AI.method: 追踪AI在推理、安全、现实任务执行方面的测试进展；评估生成式AI的经济价值和劳动力市场影响；构建AI主权分析框架；与Schmidt Sciences合作开发科学章节。
AI.result: 发现AI评估越来越难以可靠进行；首次估算生成式AI的经济价值并揭示劳动力市场效应；首次设立AI在科学与医学领域的独立章节。
AI.conclusion: AI技术能力与社会管理能力之间的差距持续扩大，亟需更完善的数据基础设施、评估体系和治理框架来应对这一挑战。

title: FlexPooling with Simple Auxiliary Classifiers in Deep Networks
summary: In computer vision, the basic pipeline of most convolutional neural networks consists of multiple feature extraction layers, where the input signal is downsampled to a lower resolution in each subsequent layer. This downsampling process is commonly referred to as pooling, which is an essential operation in CNNs. Pooling improves robustness against transformations, reduces the number of trainable parameters, increases the receptive field, and lowers computation time.
