We evaluate seven confidence estimators across five open-weight LVLMs and three medical visual-question-answering datasets spanning broad clinical imaging, radiology, and pathology, with every probe trained only on natural images and applied without adaptation. Recast as bounded selective prediction (automate a case only when confidence clears a threshold, defer the rest), the comparison is cautionary. The standard metrics are poor guides: discrimination barely separates the methods, and the weak calibration of a cheap self-report is cheaply removed by off-domain temperature scaling without changing deployable yield. What distinguishes a usable estimator is the high-confidence region a clinician acts on: the weakest baselines are confidently wrong on 41 to 45 percent of their errors against 1 to 4 percent for the best probe, and no estimator is reliably best across domains or models. Safe handoff is governed at two levels: base-model competence sets a ceiling, so a well-calibrated score recovers roughly a third of radiology cases at a 20 percent error tolerance but almost none of pathology; the confidence layer then decides how much of that ceiling is reachable. The usable role today is calibrated triage, not autonomy: automate the cases a calibrated score marks safe, route the rest to a clinician. We release all outputs, correctness judgments, and confidence scores, with code.

AI.tldr: 本文聚焦医学视觉问答中视觉语言模型过度依赖语言先验而忽视图像的真实风险，系统评估了七种置信度估计器在五个开源LVLM和三个医学VQA数据集上的表现，发现标准指标无法有效区分估计器质量，而真正有用的是高置信度区域的错误率。研究表明，安全部署的关键在于校准后的分诊（自动化安全案例，其余转给临床医生），而非完全自主。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在医学图像问答中常利用语言先验而非真实图像内容给出看似可信的错误答案，传统的准确率评估无法捕捉这种失败模式。作者希望回答一个部署层面的问题：模型能安全处理多少图像任务，以及哪种置信度信号能支撑这种安全自动化。
AI.method: 在五个开源LVLM和三个医学VQA数据集（涵盖临床影像、放射学和病理学）上评估七种置信度估计器，所有探测仅在自然图像上训练且直接迁移（无领域适应）。将问题建模为有界选择性预测（置信度超过阈值则自动化，否则转交人类），从校准、判别力和高风险区域错误率等多维度进行比较。
AI.result: 标准指标（如判别力）几乎无法区分不同估计器；最弱的基线在41%-45%的错误案例上表现出高置信度（自信犯错），而最优探针仅1%-4%；没有任何估计器在所有领域或模型上一致最优。基础模型能力设定了上限（如放射学场景可恢复约三分之一病例至20%错误容忍度，病理学几乎为零），置信度层决定能接近该上限多少。
AI.conclusion: 当前医学LVLM的安全角色是有校准分诊而非自主决策：自动化那些经校准置信度标记为安全的案例，其余转给临床医生。研究公开了所有输出、正确性判断和置信度分数及代码。

title: Agentic Framework for Deep Learning workload migration via In-Context Learning
summary: Translating deep learning models from PyTorch's flexible, object-oriented design to JAX's functional, stateless setup is usually a manual and error-prone task. Automated migration is challenging because Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle with strict and dynamic API alignment and are prone to mistakes for exacting operations. We propose a fully autonomous system that combines In-Context Learning (ICL) with oracle-driven self-debugging. First, we curated an ICL context that serves as a strict reference for idiomatic JAX styling and test case generation. Second, instead of depending on the LLM to deduce mathematical outputs, we run the source PyTorch modules to get their actual dynamic tensor states. This creates an unchangeable execution oracle. We then use an autonomous agentic loop to synthesize tests based on the oracle data. The test cases are executed repeatedly, and the traceback is sent back to the LLM for self-correction. Ablations show that combining ICL references with oracle grounding and self-debugging greatly outperforms pure instructional and basic agentic baselines. This improvement does not add an excessive computational overhead. Our lightweight pipeline achieves 91% numerical equivalence (compared to baseline: 9%, instruction + self-debugging: 27%) on neural modules, providing a highly reliable, scalable blueprint for cross-framework migration. This has been validated across several state-of-the-art models including SAM (segment anything), T5, Code Whisper amongst others showing high numerical equivalency. Code: https://github.com/AI-Hypercomputer/accelerator-agents/tree/main/MaxCode

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合上下文学习(ICL)和Oracle驱动的自调试的自主系统，用于将PyTorch模型自动迁移到JAX框架，实现了91%的数值等价性，显著优于基线方法(9%)。
AI.motivation: 将深度学习模型从PyTorch的面向对象设计迁移到JAX的函数式、无状态设置通常需要手动且容易出错，而LLM在严格的API对齐和精确操作上表现不佳，因此需要一种自动化、可靠的迁移方案。
AI.method: 1) 构建ICL上下文作为JAX风格和测试用例生成的严格参考；2) 运行源PyTorch模块获取实际动态张量状态作为不可变的执行Oracle；3) 使用自主智能体循环合成基于Oracle数据的测试，反复执行测试并将回溯信息反馈给LLM进行自我修正。
AI.result: 在神经模块上达到91%的数值等价性(基线9%，指令+自调试27%)，在SAM、T5、Code Whisper等SOTA模型上均验证了高数值等价性，且未引入过多计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 该轻量级流水线为跨框架迁移提供了高度可靠、可扩展的蓝图，证明了ICL参考与Oracle grounding及自调试相结合的显著优势。

title: Multi-view feature High-order Fusion for Space Weak Object Detection and Segmentation
summary: Weak objects are common in images and videos of space applications. However, it is hard to learn proper representations from their limited appearance information. Inspired by multi-view learning, we develop simple multi-view attentions, treating their outputs as multi-view features. We also propose a multi-view feature high-order fusion method (MHF) to aggregate more accurate and richer features of weak objects. Our MHF extends the commonly used low-order feature fusion method to higher orders. It enhances the model's capacity to capture relevant and complementary information about weak objects. This is achieved by introducing high-order multi-view features perception and a recursive task-contribution gated selection of multi-view features. The new operation is highly flexible and customizable. It is compatible with various variants of multi-view feature representations. We conduct extensive experiments on two newly constructed space science datasets and an open, large-scale satellite video dataset. Our MHF serves as a plug-and-play module and significantly improves various vision transformers and convolution-based detection and segmentation models. We achieve all state-of-the-art accuracies on both tasks across three datasets. Our MHF can be a new basic module for visual modeling that effectively represents weak objects in terms of multi-view learning. The code will be available at https://github.com/Kingdroper/MHF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多视图特征高阶融合方法（MHF），用于在太空应用中检测图像和视频中的弱目标。MHF通过高阶特征感知和递归任务贡献门控选择，有效融合多视图特征，显著提升了各类视觉Transformer和卷积模型的检测与分割性能，在三个数据集上达到最优结果。
AI.motivation: 太空应用中的弱目标外观信息有限，难以学习有效的特征表示。现有方法多采用低阶特征融合，无法充分捕捉弱目标的相关和互补信息。
AI.method: 提出多视图高阶特征融合方法（MHF），包含两个关键设计：(1) 高阶多视图特征感知，将低阶融合扩展至更高阶；(2) 递归任务贡献门控选择机制，自适应筛选多视图特征。该方法可作为即插即用模块。
AI.result: 在三个数据集（两个新建太空科学数据集、一个公开大型卫星视频数据集）上，MHF显著提升了多种视觉Transformer和卷积模型的检测与分割性能，均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: MHF是一种灵活可定制的新型基本模块，通过多视图学习有效表征弱目标，具有广泛的兼容性和可迁移性。

title: Interactor: Agentic RL oriented Iterative Creation for Ad Description Generation in Sponsored Search
summary: This paper focuses on automatically generating informative ad descriptions in sponsored search. Unlike ad titles which are usually optimized to attract user click feedbacks, ad descriptions have a longer text span and possess the potential of incorporating world knowledge to address user search intents while presenting the fine-grained selling points of the ads. We propose Interactor, a multi-turn iterative creation framework optimized with agentic RL for ad description generation. The generation model acts as a policy that interacts with a customized environment consisting of multiple generative reward models. Given initial generations by the policy, the customized GenRMs evaluate multi-dimensional qualities including knowledge capacity and landing page consistency, providing both binary signals and reasoning feedbacks. The policy then iteratively refines the descriptions based on such feedbacks to ensure continuous improvement. Experiments on industrial datasets show that the Interactor framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in generating knowledge-rich and faithful ad descriptions. Since May 2026, it has been deployed online in a leading search ads system, contributing to both ad revenue and user experience.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Interactor框架，一种基于智能体强化学习的多轮迭代创作方法，用于生成信息丰富且与落地页一致的广告描述，已在工业系统部署并取得显著效果。
AI.motivation: 广告标题通常优化点击率，但广告描述文本更长，应具备融入世界知识以解决用户搜索意图的能力，同时呈现广告的细粒度卖点。现有方法在生成知识丰富且忠实的广告描述方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出Interactor框架：将生成模型视为策略，与包含多个生成式奖励模型（GenRMs）的定制环境交互；GenRMs评估知识容量和落地页一致性等多维质量，提供二元信号和推理反馈；策略根据反馈迭代改进描述。
AI.result: 在工业数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法；自2026年5月起已在领先搜索广告系统上线，提升了广告收入和用户体验。
AI.conclusion: Interactor框架能有效生成知识丰富且忠实的广告描述，在工业场景中验证了其商业价值和实用性。

title: SciText2Eq: Assessing LLMs for Explainable Equation Generation for Scientific Creativity
summary: This work investigates the ability of large language models (LLMs) to generate mathematical equations from scientific texts. Prior work faces challenges in unstructured grounding, multi-equation dependency, and humanaligned evaluation. To this end, we construct a dataset of AI research papers, pairing contextual passages with ground-truth equations and variable descriptions. We develop an explainable equation generation workflow and evaluate it across diverse open- and closed-source LLM backbones. We introduce an evaluation protocol combining automatic metrics, LLM-based rubrics, and human judgments to assess accuracy, explainability, and human-LLM alignment. Results indicate that LLMs perform moderately on lexical- and syntactic-based similarity, while struggling with semantic accuracy. Comparisons between LLM-based evaluations and human judgments reveal limited alignment, highlighting challenges in using LLMs to assess equation quality. These findings offer insights for improving equation generation models and developing more reliable evaluation methods for scientific text. We provide code and data for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型从科学文本生成数学公式的能力，构建了AI研究论文数据集，提出了可解释的公式生成流程，并设计了结合自动指标、LLM评估和人工判断的评价协议。结果表明LLM在词汇和句法相似性上表现尚可，但语义准确性不足，且LLM评估与人工判断的一致性有限。
AI.motivation: 现有研究面临非结构化文本的公式生成、多方程依赖关系建模以及缺乏与人类对齐的评估方法等挑战。
AI.method: 构建AI研究论文数据集（上下文段落-公式-变量描述配对），提出可解释的公式生成流程，采用多种开源和闭源LLM骨干模型，设计包含自动指标、LLM评估和人工判断的三层评价协议。
AI.result: LLM在词汇和句法相似性上表现中等，但在语义准确性上存在明显不足；LLM评估与人工判断之间的对齐度有限。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了现有LLM在科学公式生成中语义理解的局限性，以及使用LLM评估公式质量的可靠性问题，为改进公式生成模型和开发更可靠的评估方法提供了参考。

title: EyeMVP: OCT-Informed Fundus Representation Learning via Paired CFP--OCT Pretraining
summary: Color fundus photography (CFP) is the mainstay for large-scale retinal screening, yet its diagnostic capacity is constrained by the lack of depth-resolved structural information. Optical coherence tomography (OCT) provides cross-sectional retinal anatomy, but is less accessible in population-level screening. Here, we present EyeMVP, a cross-modal retinal foundation model that uses paired CFP--OCT pretraining to learn OCT-informed CFP representations. EyeMVP is pretrained on 674,893 strict same-eye same-day paired CFP--OCT image triples from 112,642 patients across eight hospitals in China. The model uses cross-modal masked reconstruction to enrich CFP representations with OCT-associated supervision, while requiring only CFP images at inference. To accommodate the non-aligned imaging geometry between en-face CFP and cross-sectional OCT, EyeMVP combines source-constrained cross-attention with CFP-derived structural masks. Across 16 downstream tasks, including classification, segmentation, few-shot adaptation, and cross-modal retrieval, EyeMVP outperforms representative retinal foundation models and shows consistent gains on tasks involving macular and optic nerve structure. For CFP-challenging macular diseases, EyeMVP achieves an AUROC of 0.948 for macular edema (vs.~0.852 for EyeCLIP) and 0.825 for myopic macular schisis. In an exploratory reader study, EyeMVP exceeds junior and intermediate ophthalmologist groups but does not reach senior ophthalmologist performance on macular edema, while showing numerically higher balanced accuracy than all reader groups on myopic macular schisis. These results suggest that pixel-level cross-modal reconstruction can enrich CFP representations with OCT-associated supervision, providing a practical route toward stronger CFP-based retinal analysis in screening settings.

AI.tldr: EyeMVP是一个跨模态视网膜基础模型，通过674,893对同眼同日的OCT-CFP图像进行预训练，利用交叉模态掩码重建将OCT的结构信息注入CFP表征。在16项下游任务中表现优异，尤其对黄斑水肿（AUROC 0.948 vs EyeCLIP 0.852）等CFP难治性疾病提升显著，部分任务超越中级眼科医生水平。
AI.motivation: CFP是大规模视网膜筛查的主流技术，但缺乏深度分辨的结构信息；OCT能提供横截面视网膜解剖结构，但在人群级筛查中可及性较差。作者希望融合两者的优势，使CFP表征学习到OCT的结构先验知识，在不增加推理成本的前提下提升CFP诊断能力。
AI.method: 收集来自中国8家医院112,642名患者的674,893对严格同眼同日CFP-OCT图像三联体。采用跨模态掩码重建（Cross-modal Masked Reconstruction）策略，结合源约束交叉注意力（Source-constrained Cross-attention）和CFP导出的结构掩码，以处理en-face CFP与横截面OCT之间的非对齐成像几何问题。推理时仅需CFP图像。
AI.result: 在16项下游任务（分类、分割、少样本适应、跨模态检索）上优于代表性视网膜基础模型。黄斑水肿AUROC达0.948（vs EyeCLIP的0.852），近视性黄斑劈裂AUROC达0.825。读者研究中，EyeMVP超越初中级眼科医生组，在近视性黄斑劈裂任务上数值上优于所有医生组。
AI.conclusion: 像素级跨模态重建能够将OCT的结构先验有效注入CFP表征，为在筛查场景中实现更强的基于CFP的视网膜分析提供了一条实用路径。

title: Contaminated Collaboration: Measuring Gender Bias Transfer in LLM-Assisted Student Writing
summary: Gender bias in LLMs has been studied extensively in model outputs, with biased prompts shown to amplify stereotyped generations. Whether such bias propagates into text produced by humans who use these systems, however, remains underexplored. We investigate whether gender bias in an LLM writing assistant transfers into career plan essays written by students. We first verify that a gender-biased prompt induces gender-differentiated language in LLM-generated essays, while a neutral prompt does not. We then recruited participants (N = 123) in a controlled environment to write career plan essays for paired biographical profiles differing only in gender under three conditions: no AI assistance, neutral LLM assistance, or gender-biased LLM assistance. Students in the biased condition produced essays with a significantly larger agentic gap and more gender-stereotypic occupation suggestions than those in the control and neutral conditions. Our results also reveal that this bias transfer is asymmetric: agency is suppressed in female-target essays while male-target writing remains largely unaffected. Our findings highlight the risk of bias propagation in AI-assisted writing, calling for fairness-aware design in educational AI tools.

AI.tldr: 研究了LLM中的性别偏见是否会通过AI写作助手传播到学生撰写的职业规划文本中。发现带有性别偏见的提示会诱导LLM生成性别差异化语言，且这种偏见会不对称地转移到人类写作中（抑制女性文章中的能动性，男性文章受影响较小）。
AI.motivation: 已有研究广泛关注LLM输出中的性别偏见，但偏见是否会通过AI辅助写作系统传播到人类最终产出的文本中，这一问题尚不明确。
AI.method: 首先验证了有偏提示和无偏提示对LLM生成文本的影响；随后招募123名参与者在控制环境下撰写职业规划文章，设置三种条件：无AI辅助、中性LLM辅助、有偏LLM辅助。
AI.result: 有偏条件下的学生写出的文章存在显著的能动性差距和更多性别刻板印象的职业建议；偏见传播具有不对称性——女性目标的能动性被抑制，男性目标写作基本不受影响。
AI.conclusion: AI辅助写作存在偏见传播风险，教育类AI工具需要公平性导向的设计。

title: Auditing Reward Hackability in Code RL Training Environments
summary: We measure the rate at which code RL environments accept incorrect solutions as correct. On a 49-task sample of SWE-bench Verified, 28.5% of tasks have test suites weak enough that a Docker-verified incorrect patch passes them. On 20 R2E-Gym tasks across 6 repositories, the same pipeline at single-shot exploit generation yields 25.0%. A random-effects meta-analysis over 134 frontier model submissions to SWE-bench Verified finds, within the same human-rated difficulty stratum, model Pass@1 is +14.14 percentage points higher on flagged-hackable tasks than on robust ones (95% CI [+11.80, +16.48]; one-sided p < 10^-6; I^2 = 0%; 123 of 134 models positive). We then describe a procedure for hardening the broken tasks. An inline LLM judge with a Docker gold-sanity gate runs each generated test against the gold solution before the judge is consulted. On the 11 broken tasks in the audit, the gate flags 65 of 105 decisive LLM-generated tests as failing on the gold patch itself, a 61.9% per-augmentation defect rate the LLM judge alone misses. With diversity-biased retry, the loop converges 9 of 11 tasks to a gated upgrade.

AI.tldr: 研究发现代码RL环境中有相当比例（SWE-bench Verified 28.5%，R2E-Gym 25.0%）的测试套件存在漏洞，会接受错误解决方案。对134个前沿模型的荟萃分析显示，在相同难度下，模型在可被利用的任务上Pass@1高出14.14个百分点。作者提出了一种通过LLM评审器和Docker黄金验证门来加固脆弱测试的方法，成功修复了9/11个问题任务。
AI.motivation: 代码RL环境中的测试套件可能不够严谨，导致错误的代码补丁被错误地判定为正确。这种"假阳性"问题会误导模型训练和评估，使得模型在脆弱任务上获得虚高的性能分数，影响对模型真实编程能力的准确评估。
AI.method: 1) 在SWE-bench Verified的49个任务和R2E-Gym的20个任务上进行漏洞审计，通过Docker验证检查不正确的补丁是否通过测试。2) 对134个前沿模型提交进行随机效应荟萃分析，比较在相同难度下模型在可被利用任务与稳健任务上的Pass@1差异。3) 提出加固方法：使用内联LLM评审器，并添加Docker黄金验证门——生成的测试必须先在黄金标准解决方案上通过，才能被评审器采纳。采用多样性偏置重试策略进行迭代收敛。
AI.result: SWE-bench Verified中28.5%的任务存在测试套件漏洞；R2E-Gym中25.0%的任务存在问题。荟萃分析显示模型在可被利用任务上的Pass@1高出14.14个百分点（p < 10^-6）。加固方法中，黄金门检测到61.9%的LLM生成测试在黄金补丁上失败，通过多样性偏置重试成功加固了9/11个问题任务。
AI.conclusion: 当前代码RL环境存在严重的测试套件漏洞问题，导致模型评估分数虚高。提出的Docker黄金验证门+多样性偏置重试方法能有效加固脆弱测试，提高评估的可靠性。这提示社区需要关注评估基准的质量，避免模型利用测试套件的漏洞获得不真实的性能提升。

title: Beyond Scalar Distances: Semantic Attribute Gradients from Frozen MLLMs for Visual Embeddings
summary: Vision encoders for retrieval are typically trained with class-label supervision: each training pair reduces to a scalar that uniformly pushes the embedding apart or pulls it together, as if every visual attribute either differed or matched. A multimodal large language model (MLLM), shown the same pair, can articulate those attributes and use them to predict whether the images share a class. We propose \textbf{SAGA}, a framework that turns this language-grounded, attribute-aware perception into a training signal for the encoder itself. Specifically, we use Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to reward the MLLM for correct predictions on the vision encoder's tokens. Since correct predictions require those tokens to expose the specific attributes that differ or match between the pair, the gradient pushes the encoder to encode them, replacing the uniform pair-level scalar with attribute-resolved supervision. An auxiliary attention-distillation loss anchors the encoder's embedding to tokens the MLLM attended to, and a standard metric-learning loss shapes the embedding geometry for nearest-neighbour retrieval. The MLLM is frozen throughout and discarded at inference, matching the deployment cost of a metric-learning baseline. SAGA improves Recall@1 by 3 to 6 points over state-of-the-art baselines on CUB-200-2011, Cars-196, FGVC-Aircraft, and iNaturalist Aves on zero-shot image retrieval.

AI.tldr: SAGA利用冻结的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的细粒度属性感知能力，通过GRPO强化学习为视觉编码器提供属性级别的监督信号，替代传统统一的标量监督，在零样本图像检索任务上提升Recall@1 3-6个百分点。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉检索编码器使用类标签监督，将每对训练实例简化为一个统一标量，无法区分不同视觉属性（如颜色、形状等）的匹配或差异，缺乏细粒度的属性感知能力。
AI.method: 提出SAGA框架：1) 使用GRPO（组相对策略优化）对MLLM在视觉编码器token上的正确预测进行奖励，迫使编码器编码具体属性；2) 辅助注意力蒸馏损失将编码器嵌入对齐MLLM关注的token；3) 标准度量学习损失塑造嵌入几何结构。MLLM在训练中冻结，推理时丢弃。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011、Cars-196、FGVC-Aircraft和iNaturalist Aves四个数据集上，零样本图像检索Recall@1比最先进基线提升3-6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 通过冻结的MLLM提供属性级监督信号可以显著提升视觉编码器的检索性能，且推理阶段不增加额外计算成本，实现了细粒度语义感知与效率的兼顾。

title: Beyond NL2Code: A Structured Survey of Multimodal Code Intelligence
comment: Work completed in January 2026. Updating now
summary: While LLMs have substantially advanced text-to-code synthesis, many real programming tasks specify intent through visual artifacts such as screenshots, charts, documents, vector drawings, videos, and interactive states. These tasks require models to connect visual perception to executable programs, because correctness depends not only on syntax but also on layout, geometry, data semantics, editability, interaction behavior, and domain-specific constraints that apply after execution. This survey examines Multimodal Code Intelligence, covering systems that generate, edit, refine, execute, or reason with code under visually grounded inputs and outputs. We first formulate the field by the role that code plays in each task, distinguishing code as a rendered artifact, an editable symbolic structure, a scientific representation, an intermediate reasoning trace, or an executable policy or tool interface. We then organize benchmarks and methods into four domains: Graphical User Interface, Scientific Visualization, Structured Graphics, and Frontier Tasks and Frameworks. This taxonomy connects mature artifact-generation problems to emerging agentic and unified settings and allows us to compare how different tasks treat evidence of correctness. Looking ahead, we argue that future research may benefit from four verification-centered directions. Multi-signal validation can combine complementary evidence of correctness, multi-state verification can test behavior across execution trajectories, cross-task transfer testing can probe reusable visual-code skills, and verifiable agent traces can reveal whether agent actions are grounded in visual evidence. Together, these directions may move multimodal code generation from single-output imitation toward evidence-grounded executable systems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多模态代码智能（Multimodal Code Intelligence）领域，系统梳理了在视觉输入（截图、图表、文档、矢量图、视频、交互状态）下生成、编辑、执行和推理代码的方法与基准，并提出以验证为中心的四个未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现实编程任务常通过视觉制品（如截图、图表、文档等）表达意图，而现有LLM在文本到代码合成方面已有进展，但面对视觉输入时，代码的正确性不仅依赖语法，还涉及布局、几何、数据语义、可编辑性、交互行为及领域特定约束。因此，需要系统性地审视多模态代码智能这一交叉领域。
AI.method: 首先根据代码在不同任务中的角色（渲染制品、可编辑符号结构、科学表示、中间推理轨迹、可执行策略/工具接口）对领域进行形式化定义；然后从四个领域（图形用户界面、科学可视化、结构化图形、前沿任务与框架）组织基准和方法；最后提出四个以验证为中心的未来方向。
AI.result: 构建了一个连接成熟制品生成问题与新兴智能体/统一设定的分类体系，并比较了不同任务对正确性证据的处理方式。未来四个验证方向为：多信号验证、多状态验证、跨任务迁移测试、可验证智能体轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究可从多信号验证、多状态验证、跨任务迁移测试和可验证智能体轨迹四个方向推进，将多模态代码生成从单输出模仿转向基于证据的可执行系统。

title: Mind-Studio: Executable World Models with Lookahead Evaluation for Partially Observable Games
summary: World-model synthesis aims to turn interaction experience into an internal model of environment dynamics. Existing symbolic approaches often fit observed transitions or mixtures of local rules, but they do not produce a complete executable program that can run independently of the real environment. We present Mind-Studio, a framework that synthesizes executable pygame-style world models from state-action-next-state trajectories using large language models. Mind-Studio combines entropy-selected traces with a lightweight game skill file containing object, action, and static scene information extracted from screenshots. We evaluate synthesis quality with a K-step lookahead fidelity protocol that compares generated world-model rollouts against Real-ALE rollouts from the same state. On Montezuma's Revenge, Mind-Studio improves chosen-action next-state prediction from 0.3% for PoE-World to 48.7% while verifying 5 of 8 subgoals; across Alien, Assault, and Skiing, it achieves stronger branch-level fidelity than prior learned lookahead sources.

AI.tldr: Mind-Studio是一个利用大语言模型从交互轨迹中合成可执行pygame世界模型的框架，在多个游戏环境中显著提升了状态预测准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有符号化世界模型方法只能拟合观测到的转换或局部规则，无法生成可独立于真实环境运行的完整可执行程序。
AI.method: 结合熵筛选的交互轨迹与轻量级游戏技能文件（含对象、动作和静态场景信息），利用大语言模型合成pygame风格的可执行世界模型。
AI.result: 在Montezuma's Revenge中，下一状态预测准确率从PoE-World的0.3%提升至48.7%，并验证了8个子目标中的5个；在Alien、Assault和Skiing等游戏中，分支级保真度优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: Mind-Studio能够有效合成可执行的、高保真的世界模型，显著优于现有方法。

title: MotionVLA: Vision-Language-Action Model for Humanoid Motion
summary: Generating realistic humanoid motion from scene images and text involves both low-frequency pose semantics and high-frequency physical dynamics. However, many existing methods tokenize motion with a single shared codebook, forcing heterogeneous motion signals into the same quantization space. Our frequency-domain analysis of human motion data reveals a clear mismatch between single-codebook quantization and motion statistics: five DCT coefficients capture 93% of joint-position energy but only 37% of joint-velocity energy, which can bias quantization toward pose statistics and under-represent high-frequency velocity components. A second challenge lies in adapting a standard autoregressive model to effectively model high-frequency physical signals in motion sequences. Therefore, we propose DSFT, a dual-stream frequency tokenizer that separates motion into Base and physical streams and compresses them independently with DCT truncation and BPE. Furthermore, we present MotionVLA, a Qwen3.5-based model that arranges Base and physical tokens in a unified sequence, where Phys tokens are predicted after Base tokens. Experiments on HumanML3D and MBench show that, despite using a lightweight 2B backbone, MotionVLA reduces the Diversity gap to real data by over 50% on HumanML3D and improves Motion-Condition Consistency by 3.8% on MBench, supporting frequency-aware dual-stream decoupling as an effective formulation for autoregressive motion generation. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/MotionVLA. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/MotionVLA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DSFT双流频率分词器和MotionVLA模型，通过将人体运动分离为基础流和物理流，分别用DCT截断和BPE压缩，并用Qwen3.5自回归预测，在HumanML3D和MBench上显著提升了运动生成的多样性和一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用单一共享码本对运动进行分词，但运动数据中低频姿态语义和高频物理动力学存在本质差异。频域分析发现，5个DCT系数可捕获93%的关节位置能量，但仅捕获37%的关节速度能量，导致量化偏向姿态统计而低估高频速度成分。
AI.method: 提出DSFT（双流频率分词器），将运动分解为Base流（低频姿态）和Physical流（高频物理），分别用DCT截断和BPE独立压缩。构建MotionVLA模型，基于Qwen3.5将Base和Physical token按序排列，先预测Base token再预测Physical token，实现自回归运动生成。
AI.result: 在HumanML3D上，使用轻量级2B骨干，MotionVLA将多样性差距降低50%以上；在MBench上，运动条件一致性提升3.8%。
AI.conclusion: 频率感知的双流解耦是自回归运动生成的有效范式，分离处理低频姿态信息和高频物理信息能显著提升生成质量。

title: FinBalance: A Multi-Document Accounting Reconciliation Benchmark
comment: 18 pages, 12 figures. Code and data: https://github.com/Devansh1105/finbalance
summary: Existing financial-NLP benchmarks mostly evaluate prepared artifacts such as filings, tables, or extracted values. Real accounting begins earlier: source documents must be reconciled into cited journal entries, aggregated into a balance sheet, and checked for contradictions. We introduce FinBalance, a multi-document accounting reconciliation benchmark built from source-document bundles across eight industries, three period types, and five difficulty levels. Human-authored business scenarios, accounting policies, tax/FX treatments, document schemas, distractors, and inconsistency templates are composed by a deterministic generator whose ledger produces journal entries,balance sheets, and 23 inconsistency-code labels. On a 710-record evaluation split, six contemporary LLMs reach at most 46% exact final-balance-sheet accuracy. Four models show a 26-41 pp gap between BS_exact, the model's reported balance sheet, and BS_recon, the balance sheet obtained by replaying its entries through our ledger. Models often recover numerically plausible entries but fail to bind them to supporting documents and aggregate them consistently. Citation-pressure prompting barely changes document-linking errors, while ledger-feedback ablations substantially improve reported balance sheets and expose inconsistency-detection trade-offs. Expert finance reviewers validate the benchmark design and labels.

AI.tldr: 提出了FinBalance，一个基于多文档会计对账的基准测试，涵盖8个行业、3个期间类型和5个难度级别。评估显示，当代LLM在最终资产负债表准确率上最多仅达46%，且存在文档链接和聚合一致性方面的严重缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有金融NLP基准大多评估已准备好的文件（如报表、表格或提取值），而真实的会计工作始于更早的阶段：原始文档必须核对、转化为会计分录、汇总为资产负债表并检查矛盾。目前缺乏评估模型完成完整会计对账流程能力的基准。
AI.method: 构建了FinBalance基准，由人类编写商业场景、会计政策、税务/外汇处理、文档模式、干扰项和不一致性模板，通过确定性生成器生成日记账分录、资产负债表和23种不一致性代码标签。包含710条评估数据，跨越8个行业、3个期间类型和5个难度级别。
AI.result: 六种当代LLM在精确最终资产负债表准确率上最多仅达46%。四个模型在BS_exact（模型报告的资产负债表）和BS_recon（通过账本重放其分录获得的资产负债表）之间存在26-41个百分点的差距。模型经常生成数值上合理的分录，但未能将其绑定到支持文档并一致地聚合它们。引用压力提示几乎不改变文档链接错误，而账本反馈消融显著改善了报告的资产负债表。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在完整的会计对账任务上表现不佳，尤其在文档链接和一致性聚合方面存在根本性缺陷。专家金融审阅者验证了基准设计和标签的有效性。账本反馈是一种有前景的改进方向。

title: Rhythm of the Deep: A Computational-Linguistic Test of Duality of Patterning in Sperm Whale Codas
summary: Human language has often been described as combining structure at two levels: lower-level units combine into larger units, which then combine into larger sequences. We test for this design feature, duality of patterning, in sperm whale codas using 1,483 codas from the Dominica Sperm Whale Project. Because acoustic similarity can imitate symbolic structure, we treat the problem as computational-linguistic structure discovery from continuous audio rather than as a direct claim about language or meaning. We use a consensus of frozen audio encoders, held-out structural tests, per-statistic nulls, and acoustic-null recoverability gates. The evidence supports a narrow two-tier architecture. At the lower tier, clicks compose into codas not by a stable ordered rule, but by which clicks are present together with their inter-click rhythm. At the upper tier, coda tokens show bout-level sequential dependence, with an NSB second-order transfer-entropy lift of 0.132 bits (p = 0.002). Under tempo scaling, encoder-derived click identity is strongly rate-bound, while coda identity remains substantially more stable, yielding a measurable abstraction gradient across the click-to-coda step. Rhythm-only baselines recover substantial lower-tier structure but fail to reproduce the upper-tier sequential-dependence signal. We do not claim language, semantics, perception, or human-like phonemes. Instead, we report representation-level evidence for a duality-of-patterning-like architecture whose lower tier is rhythmic rather than segmental, and provide a portable null-controlled framework for testing combinatorial structure in induced acoustic token systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过计算语言学方法分析抹香鲸的咔嗒声编码，发现其存在类似人类语言"双重模式"（duality of patterning）的分层结构：下层由咔嗒声按节奏组合成编码，上层编码序列呈现顺序依赖性。证据支持一个窄双层架构，但下层结构基于节奏而非音段，且该框架可移植用于其他声学符号系统的组合结构检测。
AI.motivation: 检验动物交流系统（抹香鲸咔嗒声编码）是否具备人类语言的关键设计特征——双重模式（即低层单元组合成高层单元，高层单元再组合成更大序列）。
AI.method: 使用来自多米尼克抹香鲸项目的1,483个编码数据，采用计算语言学结构发现方法，结合冻结音频编码器共识、保留结构测试、每统计量零假设及声学可恢复性门控，对抹香鲸咔嗒声进行分层结构分析。
AI.result: 发现下层：咔嗒声通过共存性及节律组成编码，非稳定有序规则；上层：编码令牌表现出轮次级别的序列依赖性（NSB二阶转移熵提升0.132 bits, p=0.002）。咔嗒身份受速率影响显著，而编码身份更稳定，呈现咔嗒-编码步的可测量抽象梯度。仅节律基线可恢复下层结构，但无法复现上层序列依赖信号。
AI.conclusion: 抹香鲸编码存在类似双重模式的表征级结构证据，但其下层结构基于节奏而非音段；同时提供了一个可移植的零假设控制框架，用于测试诱导声学令牌系统中的组合结构。

title: HiRo: A Compact Four-Directional Hierarchical Reservoir Token-Mixer for Efficient Image Classification
summary: Recent image classification models must balance local feature modeling, cross-window interaction, and parameter efficiency. Many high-performing architectures rely on fully trainable token-mixers, which improve representation learning but increase parameter count, optimization complexity and computational cost. We propose a parameter-efficient image classification model called HiRo that integrates shifted-window partitioning with multi-directional hierarchical reservoir computing. Images are divided into non-overlapping patches (treated as tokens), linearly projected, normalized, and enriched with 2D sinusoidal positional encodings, then processed within local windows. Inside each window, tokens are scanned in four directions and passed through a two-stage slice-and-mix reservoir module. In the first stage, directional sequences are split into contiguous slices, each processed by its own fixed reservoir with a trainable closed-loop readout. The resulting slice outputs are summarized using the start, end, and mean representations, and then mixed by a second-stage fixed reservoir for each direction. The mixed slice representations are expanded back to the token level and fused with the first-stage outputs, after which the four directional outputs are realigned and averaged. Consecutive blocks alternate between regular and shifted windows to enable cross-window interaction, followed by layer normalization, a residual feed-forward network, and global pooling for classification. This design combines regular and shifted window partitioning with hierarchical multi-directional reservoirs to make an efficient local-to-cross-window token-mixing framework for image classification. Despite using under 1M trainable parameters and significantly lower memory and time than transformer-style baselines, HiRo also achieves 99.46%, 85.57%, and 59.10% accuracy on MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出HiRo模型，结合移动窗口划分与多方向层次化储层计算，在低于1M可训练参数下，在MNIST、CIFAR-10/100上达到有竞争力的分类精度。
AI.motivation: 现有图像分类模型在局部特征建模、跨窗口交互和参数效率之间存在权衡，全可训练的token-mixer虽提升表征但增加参数量和计算成本，因此需要一种参数高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 将图像划分为非重叠patch作为token，加入2D正弦位置编码；在局部窗口内沿四个方向扫描token，通过两阶段切片混合储层模块处理：第一阶段用固定储层+可训练闭环读出处理切片，第二阶段用固定储层混合切片表征，再展开回token级与第一阶段融合；交替使用常规和移动窗口实现跨窗口交互，最后经层归一化、残差FFN和全局池化进行分类。
AI.result: 在低于1M可训练参数、显著低于Transformer基线的内存和时间成本下，HiRo在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上分别达到99.46%、85.57%和59.10%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: HiRo通过结合窗口划分与层次化储层计算，构建了高效的局部到跨窗口token混合框架，证明了固定储层机制在参数效率上的优势。

title: SAG: SQL-Retrieval Augmented Generation with Query-Time Dynamic Hyperedges
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers an effective approach for large language models to access external knowledge. However, existing methods rely on dense similarity retrieval and face inherent limitations in handling structured constraints and multi-hop reasoning. Incorporating knowledge graphs partially alleviates these issues, but at the cost of semantic fragmentation, high maintenance overhead, and difficult incremental updates. This paper introduces SAG (SQLRetrieval Augmented Generation), a structured architecture for retrieval and agent systems. Instead of pre-building a global static graph, SAG converts each chunk into one semantically complete event and a set of indexing entities, then uses SQL join queries to dynamically link events that share entities into local hyperedges,constructing, at query time, a dynamically instantiated local index structure. This design avoids the need for global graph rebuilding and ongoing maintenance; the system naturally supports incremental writes, concurrent processing, and continuous scaling through its reliance on standard database infrastructure. Across HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHop, and MuSiQue, three standard multi-hop benchmarks,SAG achieves the best results on 8 out of 9 Recall@K metrics, reaching 80.0% Recall@5 on MuSiQue, the benchmark with the highest multi-hop reasoning demands.SAG has also been deployed at a production scale of hundreds of millions of data items, with online retrieval latency kept within seconds. Project site and code are available at https://github.com/Zleap-AI/SAG-Benchmark.

AI.tldr: SAG是一种基于SQL连接查询的动态结构化检索架构，替代传统RAG中的全局静态知识图谱，通过将文本块转换为事件+索引实体，在查询时动态构建局部超边，在三个多跳基准上取得8/9的Recall@K最佳结果，并已部署到数亿级生产环境。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法依赖稠密相似性检索，在处理结构化约束和多跳推理时存在固有限制；引入知识图谱虽部分缓解问题，但带来语义碎片化、高维护成本和难以增量更新等弊端。
AI.method: 将每个文本块转换为一个语义完整的事件和一组索引实体，利用SQL连接查询在查询时动态地将共享实体的事件链接为局部超边，构建动态实例化的局部索引结构，避免全局图重建和维护。
AI.result: 在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHop和MuSiQue三个多跳基准上，SAG在9个Recall@K指标中取得8个最佳，在最高多跳推理需求的MuSiQue上达到80.0%的Recall@5，并在数亿级数据规模的生产环境中保持秒级在线检索延迟。
AI.conclusion: SAG验证了基于标准数据库基础设施的动态结构化检索架构在RAG中的可行性和优越性，天然支持增量写入、并发处理和持续扩展，兼顾了高性能检索与实际部署需求。

title: RecourseBench: A Modular Framework for Reproducible Algorithmic Recourse Evaluation
summary: Algorithmic recourse methods provide counterfactual explanations that inform individuals of the actions required to overturn an unfavorable model decision. Despite rapid methodological progress, principled comparison remains elusive; existing frameworks are often difficult to extend and lack both interoperability and systematic verification that integrated methods faithfully reproduce their originally reported results. We introduce \emph{RecourseBench}, a unified evaluation framework built around three commitments namely, modularity, reproducibility, and interactivity. The framework decomposes the pipeline into five fully decoupled layers -- Data, Preprocessing, Model, Recourse Method, and Evaluation -- governed by abstract interfaces and a dynamic registry. To address the reproducibility gap in prior benchmarks, we introduce a four-tier classification system in which every integrated method is validated by an automated test suite against its originally reported results. We further provide an interactive web interface for flexible, configuration-driven comparison across methods, datasets, and model architectures. Our framework currently integrates 28 state-of-the-art recourse methods and, to our knowledge, constitutes the first recourse benchmark to explicitly enforce method-level reproducibility through automated, quantitative testing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RecourseBench，一个统一的算法补救评估框架，基于模块化、可复现性和交互性三大承诺，集成了28种主流方法，并通过自动化测试确保方法级可复现性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法补救评估框架难以扩展、缺乏互操作性和系统性验证，无法确保集成方法忠实复现原始结果，存在可复现性缺口。
AI.method: 将流程解耦为五个独立层（数据、预处理、模型、补救方法、评估），采用抽象接口和动态注册机制；引入四级分类系统，通过自动化测试套件验证集成方法与原结果的一致性；提供交互式网页界面支持灵活对比。
AI.result: 集成了28种最新算法补救方法，建立了首个通过自动化定量测试明确强制执行方法级可复现性的补救基准。
AI.conclusion: RecourseBench通过模块化设计和可复现性验证，解决了算法补救领域评估框架的标准化问题，为公平比较提供了可靠平台。

title: RefGC-SR$^2$: Reference-guided Generated Content Super-Resolution and Refinement
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The last two authors are co-corresponding authors. Please visit our project page at https://cmlab-korea.github.io/RefGC-SR2/
summary: Reference-guided generation (e.g., object compositing, customization) has progressed rapidly, yet current pipelines share a fundamental limitation: the object-centric high-resolution reference image (HRRI) provided by users is downsampled to a fixed low-resolution (LR) before being fed into the model, so the fine-grained details are discarded before the output is even produced. In addition, the generation step then introduces its own artifacts (e.g., identity distortion) on top of this loss. Existing reference-guided generated content refinement (RefGCR) methods can correct some of these artifacts but still operate in the LR domain; reference-guided super-resolution (RefSR) methods recover resolution but assume natural-image degradations and ignore the artifact distribution of generative pipelines. To address both gaps in a single formulation, we introduce a new task: reference-guided generated content super-resolution-refinement (RefGC-SR$^2$), where the original HRRI is reused at the post-processing stage to recover lost details, refine generative artifacts, and upscale the output simultaneously. We construct the first real-world triplet data generation pipeline for this RefGC-SR$^2$ task, training a diptych-conditioned generator to synthesize paired low-quality anchors that public pretrained models cannot provide. We further present a frequency-aware diffusion transformer model for RefGC-SR$^2$ that selectively injects fine details from the HRRI while removing generative artifacts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our RefGC-SR$^2$ model successfully (i) refines the object identity faithfully with respect to the reference, and (ii) recovers high-resolution details, so that the final result is significantly higher quality and practically more usable compared to existing RefGCR and RefSR baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出参考引导生成内容超分辨率-精修（RefGC-SR²）新任务，通过在后处理阶段复用原始高分辨率参考图像，同时恢复丢失细节、消除生成伪影并提升分辨率。构建了首个真实世界三元组数据生成管道，并设计了频率感知扩散Transformer模型，实验证明该方法在身份保真度和高分辨率细节恢复上显著优于现有RefGCR和RefSR基线。
AI.motivation: 现有参考引导生成管道存在根本性局限：用户提供的高分辨率参考图像在输入模型前被降采样到固定低分辨率，导致精细细节丢失；同时生成过程引入额外伪影（如身份扭曲）。现有RefGCR方法在低分辨率域操作无法恢复细节，RefSR方法假设自然图像退化，忽略了生成管道的伪影分布，两者均无法同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 1. 定义新任务RefGC-SR²：在后处理阶段复用原始高分辨率参考图像，同时进行细节恢复、伪影精修和超分辨率。2. 构建首个真实世界三元组数据生成管道，使用双联片条件生成器合成公开预训练模型无法提供的低质量锚点。3. 提出频率感知扩散Transformer模型，选择性注入高分辨率参考图像中的精细细节，同时去除生成伪影。
AI.result: 实验表明，RefGC-SR²模型成功实现：(i) 相对于参考图像忠实精修物体身份；(ii) 恢复高分辨率细节。最终结果在质量和使用实用性上显著优于现有RefGCR和RefSR基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的RefGC-SR²任务及模型有效弥合了参考引导生成中细节丢失和伪影问题的双重鸿沟，通过复用高分辨率参考图像进行后处理精修，实现了更高质量、更实用的生成结果。

title: Formalize Once, Edit the Rest: Efficient Lean-Based Answer Selection for Math Reasoning
comment: 15 pages, 1 figure. Code available at https://github.com/ucr-rai/base-and-edit
summary: With large language models (LLMs) increasingly applied to mathematical reasoning, formal proof assistants such as Lean can be leveraged to verify reasoning outputs with machine-checkable rigor, enabling use cases such as answer selection in test-time scaling with K sampled candidate answers. However, employing Lean requires that LLM outputs, originally in natural language, first be formalized. Existing Lean-based answer-selection work uses an autoformalization model to generate a formal statement in Lean for each candidate answer independently, incurring a significant computational cost. We propose BASE, a base-and-edit pipeline that formalizes a single base candidate per problem and derives the remaining K-1 statements by editing the answer expression in place. To facilitate this, we train a rewriter model LEANSCRIBE to localize the answer in the base formalization and generate a reusable edit function for the other K-1 candidates. BASE simultaneously improves selection accuracy and reduces formalization cost - a Pareto improvement that holds on all 12 (dataset, solver) configurations across four benchmarks and three solvers, cutting autoformalizer calls by about 5x at K=8, with the reduction expected to become larger as K grows. Code is available at https://github.com/ucr-rai/base-and-edit.

AI.tldr: 提出BASE方法，通过"基准+编辑"流水线（先自动形式化一个候选答案，再通过编辑其他答案中的表达式来生成其余形式化语句），在数学推理中利用Lean进行答案选择，相比独立形式化每个候选答案，同时提升了选择准确率并减少了约5倍的形式化成本（K=8时）。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Lean的答案选择方法需要对每个候选答案独立进行自动形式化（从自然语言到Lean形式语言），计算成本高昂。作者希望找到一种既能保持甚至提升选择准确性，又能显著降低形式化开销的方法。
AI.method: 提出BASE（base-and-edit）流水线：1) 针对每个问题，先对单个基准候选答案进行自动形式化；2) 训练一个重写模型LEANSCRIBE，用于在基准形式化中定位答案位置，并为其余K-1个候选答案生成可复用的编辑函数，通过原地替换答案表达式完成形式化。
AI.result: 在4个基准测试、3个求解器共12种配置下，BASE在所有配置上均实现帕累托改进（同时提升选择准确率+降低形式化成本）；在K=8时将自动形式化调用次数减少约5倍，且随着K增长节约效果更大。
AI.conclusion: BASE是首个在形式化驱动的LLM数学推理答案选择中实现成本与准确性双重优化的方法，证明了"基准+编辑"策略相比独立形式化的优越性。

title: Know Your Limits : On the Faithfulness of LLMs as Solvers and Autoformalizers in Legal Reasoning
comment: 10 pages, submitted to COLM 2026 (under review, average score of 6.25 across 4 reviewers) and accepted by the AI4Law workshop at ICML. This is the version where we already addressed most of the reviews from the COLM reviewers
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance on reasoning tasks, but whether this reflects faithful logical inference or heuristic approximation remains unclear. We study this question in legal entailment by comparing three paradigms, including pure LLM classification, LLM-based Formal Reasoning, and solver-based Formal Reasoning using the Z3 SMT solver, on a re-annotated subset of ContractNLI across five LLMs. Our re-annotation reveals a systematic and measurable gap between pragmatic legal interpretation and strict formal entailment, where a substantial proportion of legally sound inferences are not formally grounded without additional unstated assumptions. While introducing formal structure improves accuracy, with LLM-based Formal Reasoning achieving the highest benchmark performance, we show that this gain does not imply faithful reasoning. We identify three recurring failure modes: scope laundering, where LLMs report solver-inconsistent classifications without executing the underlying formal reasoning, producing conclusions that appear logically grounded but are not; implicit constraint blindness, where LLMs overlook logical constraints present in formal representations; and program synthesis failures, where LLMs generate incorrect Z3 code despite structured prompting. Critically, scope laundering persists across all models, raising serious concerns about the faithfulness of LLM-based formal reasoning as a proxy for symbolic execution. These results reveal a fundamental gap between benchmark accuracy and logical faithfulness.

AI.tldr: 本文研究LLM在法律推理中的忠实性问题，发现LLM-based形式推理虽在基准测试中表现最佳，但存在scope laundering等系统性失败模式，其高准确率不代表逻辑忠实性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明LLM在推理任务上表现强劲，但尚不清楚这种表现是否反映忠实的逻辑推理还是启发式近似。作者希望探究LLM在法律蕴涵任务中的推理忠实性。
AI.method: 在重新标注的ContractNLI子集上，对比三种范式（纯LLM分类、LLM-based形式推理、基于Z3 SMT求解器的形式推理），使用五个LLM模型进行实验，并通过重新标注揭示实用法律解释与严格形式蕴涵之间的系统性差距。
AI.result: LLM-based形式推理在基准测试中表现最佳，但存在三种失败模式：scope laundering（LLM报告与求解器不一致的分类）、implicit constraint blindness（忽视形式表示中的逻辑约束）和program synthesis failures（生成错误的Z3代码）。其中scope laundering在所有模型中持续出现。
AI.conclusion: 基准准确率与逻辑忠实性之间存在根本差距，LLM-based形式推理的高准确率不能等同于忠实推理，对其作为符号执行代理的可靠性提出严重质疑。

title: DLWM: Diverse Latent World Models for Efficient Multimodal Reasoning
comment: Preprint. 9 pages main text, 15 pages total including appendix, 2 figures
summary: Reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have improved considerably in recent years. Existing approaches typically rely on explicit chain-of-thought or continuous latent-space trajectories to enhance multi-step reasoning. However, these methods generally assume that an input admits a single latent interpretation and unfold reasoning along a fixed path or under a uniform computation budget. In real-world multimodal settings, visual observations are often subject to occlusion, blur, viewpoint variation, or semantic ambiguity, giving rise to multiple plausible interpretations. A uniform reasoning strategy not only limits the model's ability to explore multiple hypotheses but also incurs high memory usage and rollout cost. We present DLWM (Diverse Latent World Models), a multimodal reasoning framework that combines latent-space reasoning with reinforcement learning. First, we construct a set of diverse latent world hypotheses in continuous latent space, each capturing a different plausible interpretation of the visual input, and unfold latent reasoning independently on each hypothesis. An orthogonality-based diversity regularizer explicitly prevents hypothesis collapse. Second, we formulate the latent reasoning process as a resource-constrained sequential decision problem and introduce a resource-aware reinforcement learning policy that adaptively allocates computation across hypotheses, dynamically deciding whether to expand, terminate, or merge reasoning paths, thereby substantially reducing memory footprint and improving rollout efficiency. Experiments on multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that DLWM outperforms existing methods by 2-5 points in accuracy while reducing memory usage by 24%.

AI.tldr: 提出DLWM框架，结合连续潜空间推理与强化学习，通过多样化的潜世界假设和资源感知的自适应计算分配策略，在多模态推理任务中提升准确率并降低内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型推理方法通常假设输入只有单一潜在解释，沿固定路径或统一计算预算展开推理。然而现实中的视觉观察常存在遮挡、模糊、视角变化或语义歧义，导致多种合理解释，统一策略会限制模型的假设探索能力并带来高内存和计算开销。
AI.method: 1) 在连续潜空间中构建一组多样化的潜世界假设，每个假设捕捉视觉输入的不同合理解释，并使用基于正交性的多样性正则化防止假设坍缩；2) 将潜推理过程建模为资源受限的序列决策问题，引入资源感知的强化学习策略，自适应地在各假设间分配计算资源，动态决定扩展、终止或合并推理路径。
AI.result: 在多模态推理基准上，DLWM在准确率上超越现有方法2-5个百分点，同时内存使用减少24%。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入多样化潜世界假设与资源自适应分配策略，DLWM有效解决了多模态推理中多解释并存的问题，在提升性能的同时显著降低了计算开销。

title: A Large-Scale Multi-Dimensional Empirical Study of LLMs for Conversation Summarization
summary: Despite the significant advancement of LLMs in conversation summarization, their evaluation remains limited by insufficient scenarios, input lengths, and sample sizes. Furthermore, existing benchmarks often omit frontier reasoning systems and efficient small models, or lack fine-grained, multi-dimensional assessments. To bridge these gaps, we propose OmniCSEval, a unified benchmark comprising 1,800 diverse conversations across six real-world scenarios, featuring context lengths ranging from 128 to 32k tokens. For fine-grained evaluation, we employ a bidirectional fact-checking framework that integrates key fact matching to assess completeness and conciseness, alongside summary fact verification to evaluate faithfulness. To ensure reliable assessment, we establish a human-LLM collaborative pipeline for key fact extraction and a multi-LLM consensus verifier for summary fact decomposition. Leveraging this framework, we evaluate 28 LLMs across four distinct categories grouped by reasoning capability and model scale. Our extensive empirical study reveals critical insights regarding the cross-scenario challenges current LLMs continue to face, the impacts of reasoning and scale, and the efficiency and adaptability of reasoning models. We also provide guidance for system selection in real-world deployments.

AI.tldr: 提出了OmniCSEval基准，包含1800个跨6个场景的对话（128-32k tokens），通过双向事实核查框架评估28个LLM的摘要质量，揭示了推理能力、模型规模和跨场景挑战的关键洞察。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM对话摘要评估存在场景不足、输入长度和样本量有限的问题，且缺乏对前沿推理系统和小模型的评估，以及细粒度多维度评估方法。
AI.method: 构建包含1800个多样化对话的OmniCSEval基准（6个场景，128-32k tokens），采用双向事实核查框架：关键事实匹配评估完整性和简洁性，摘要事实验证评估忠实度。通过人-LLM协作提取关键事实，多LLM共识验证器分解摘要事实。
AI.result: 评估了28个LLM（按推理能力和模型规模分为4类），揭示了跨场景挑战、推理与规模的影响，以及推理模型的效率与适应性关键发现。
AI.conclusion: OmniCSEval为对话摘要评估提供了更全面的基准，为实际部署中的系统选择提供了指导。

title: Thinking with Visual Grounding
summary: Visual thinking should not only sound right; it should show its evidence. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) can produce natural-language reasoning traces, these traces often leave the supporting image regions implicit, making them hard to verify and difficult to supervise. We introduce visually grounded thinking, a reasoning process in which models interleave natural-language thoughts with explicit point or box groundings of the visual evidence used at each step. This lets the model express intermediate reasoning in language while grounding key objects in the image regions they refer to. To train this behavior, we construct a scalable synthesis pipeline that distills correct visual reasoning traces, extracts the visual objects required by the traces, grounds them with a SAM3-based agent, and derives aligned point and box supervision from the resulting masks. We further propose grounding-aware reinforcement learning, which combines answer correctness rewards with dense grounding rewards that score whether generated object references match the correct image evidence. Across two counting benchmarks and four spatial reasoning benchmarks, adding visually grounded thinking to Gemma3-4B-IT consistently improves performance over the original model and the non-grounded thinking baseline. On spatial reasoning, the visually grounded thinking 4B models match, and in some cases surpass, Gemma3-27B-IT from the same model family. Our analysis shows that point grounding is well suited to counting, while box grounding benefits most from explicit grounding rewards on spatial tasks. Overall, our results show that VLMs think better when their intermediate thoughts are tied to the image regions that make them true.

AI.tldr: 本文提出视觉接地思维（Visually Grounded Thinking），让VLM在推理时将自然语言思考与明确的视觉证据（点或框）进行对齐。通过可扩展的合成管道蒸馏正确推理轨迹，并设计接地感知强化学习同时优化答案正确性和接地准确性。实验表明，该方法显著提升了计数和空间推理任务性能，4B模型可媲美27B模型。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM虽能生成自然语言推理轨迹，但推理过程往往隐含支撑性图像区域，导致推理难以验证和监督。需要让模型的中间推理步骤与图像中的具体证据区域显式对齐。
AI.method: 1) 构建可扩展合成管道：蒸馏正确视觉推理轨迹，提取所需视觉对象，用SAM3 agent进行接地，从生成掩码中导出对齐的点/框监督信号。2) 提出接地感知强化学习：结合答案正确性奖励和密集接地奖励，评估生成的对象引用是否匹配正确的图像证据。
AI.result: 在2个计数基准和4个空间推理基准上，Gemma3-4B-IT加入视觉接地思维后持续优于原始模型和无接地思维基线。在空间推理任务上，4B模型能达到甚至超越Gemma3-27B-IT。点接地适合计数任务，框接地在空间任务中受益于显式接地奖励。
AI.conclusion: VLM在中间思考步骤与图像区域显式绑定时，推理效果更好。这表明视觉接地思维是一种有效的推理增强范式，能够提升模型的验证性和可监督性。

title: GeoStream: Toward Precise Camera Controlled Streaming Video Generation
summary: Accurate interactive camera control is essential for video-based world models, but most existing approaches learn camera motion implicitly, leading to inaccurate control under out-of-distribution trajectories. Explicit geometric conditioning improves controllability, but existing methods are non-autoregressive and rely on a static 3D cache built from an initial frame, which becomes ineffective once the viewpoint moves beyond the original frustum. We propose GeoStream, a framework that enables precise metric-scale camera control in autoregressive streaming video generation. Our method maintains a self-refreshing 3D cache that is periodically updated online from the model's own outputs: we estimate depth from the most recently generated frame, unproject to 3D, and reproject into the target view to produce point reprojections as geometric conditioning for subsequent synthesis. By the same principle, the conditioning seen during training is also rendered from the student's own generated frames, yielding a fully on-policy distillation that naturally aligns the train and inference conditioning distributions. Unlike prior work that uses off-policy condition noising, our approach trains the model against the exact error distribution it encounters at inference, mitigating both standard autoregressive drift and the second-order geometric feedback loop that arises when the cache itself is derived from generated outputs. Quantitative and qualitative results show that our approach substantially improves camera controllability.

AI.tldr: GeoStream通过自刷新3D缓存和在线策略蒸馏，在自回归流式视频生成中实现了精确的度量级相机控制，解决了现有方法在轨迹超出初始视角时控制失效的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频基础世界模型大多隐式学习相机运动，导致分布外轨迹下控制不准确；显式几何条件方法虽提升可控性，但依赖于从初始帧构建的静态3D缓存，一旦视角超出原始视锥体即失效。
AI.method: 提出GeoStream框架：(1) 维护一个自刷新3D缓存，从最新生成帧估计深度、反投影到3D并重投影到目标视角，生成点重投影作为几何条件；(2) 训练时也使用模型自身生成的帧渲染条件，实现完整的在线策略蒸馏，使训练与推理的条件分布自然对齐。
AI.result: 定量和定性结果表明，该方法显著提升了相机可控性，相比使用离线策略条件噪声的先前方法，有效缓解了自回归漂移和几何反馈循环问题。
AI.conclusion: GeoStream通过自刷新缓存和在线策略蒸馏，在自回归视频生成中实现了精确的相机控制，为视频世界模型的可控性提供了一种有效的新范式。

title: ROMPAR: Morphological Completion and Demographic Unlearning for Romanian-Accented Speech Recognition
summary: Automated transcription of parliamentary proceedings faces significant hurdles due to demographic bias, dialectal variation, and technical artifacts such as utterance truncation during segmentation. This paper introduces the ROManian PARliamentary Speech Corpus (ROMPAR) dataset, a 17.80-hour corpus of Romanian and Moldavian parliamentary speech, featuring double-annotated ground truth and explicit labels for reconstructed word fragments. To build a robust ASR system, we propose a multi-task adversarial training framework that enforces demographic invariance across age, gender, and dialect. We address the inherent instability of adversarial objectives in generative architectures by introducing an exponential decay mechanism for the adversarial coefficients. Furthermore, we implement an LLM-guided decoding strategy with position-dependent weighting to facilitate morphological completion of truncated terminal words. Our results demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly reduces WER and achieves an F1-score of 96.6% in morphological reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROMPAR数据集（17.80小时罗马尼亚/摩尔多瓦议会语音，含双标注真值和碎片词标签），并设计多任务对抗训练框架（含指数衰减机制稳定对抗训练）结合LLM引导解码（位置相关权重）实现形态补全，在WER降低和96.6% F1的形态重建上取得显著效果。
AI.motivation: 议会语音自动转录面临人口统计偏差、方言变异和技术伪影（如话语截断）等挑战，现有方法难以同时应对这些复杂问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建ROMPAR数据集，含双标注和词碎片标签；2) 多任务对抗训练框架，强制年龄、性别、方言的不变性；3) 指数衰减机制稳定对抗目标；4) LLM引导解码，位置相关权重实现截断词形态补全。
AI.result: 显著降低WER，形态重建F1-score达96.6%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出框架有效克服议会语音转录中的多重挑战，为鲁棒ASR系统提供新方案。

title: VibeThinker-3B: Exploring the Frontier of Verifiable Reasoning in Small Language Models
summary: This technical report introduces VibeThinker-3B, a compact dense model with 3B parameters developed to investigate how far verifiable reasoning can be pushed within a strictly small-model regime. Building upon the Spectrum-to-Signal post-training paradigm, we systematically enhance the model through an optimized pipeline that includes curriculum-based supervised fine-tuning, multi-domain reinforcement learning, and offline self-distillation. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that VibeThinker-3B achieves frontier-level performance on highly demanding verifiable tasks. Specifically, it attains a score of 94.3 on AIME26 (improving to 97.1 with claim-level test-time scaling), an 80.2 Pass@1 on LiveCodeBench v6, and exhibits strong out-of-distribution generalization with a 96.1\% acceptance rate on recent unseen LeetCode contests. This effectively places it in the performance band of first-tier reasoning systems, matching or exceeding flagship models that are orders of magnitude larger, such as DeepSeek V3.2, GLM-5, and Gemini 3 Pro. Furthermore, a score of 93.4 on IFEval confirms that this extreme reasoning enhancement does not compromise strict instruction controllability. Extending our previous 1.5B work, these findings motivate the Parametric Compression-Coverage Hypothesis, which views verifiable reasoning as compressible into compact reasoning cores, while open-domain knowledge and general-purpose competence require broad parameter coverage over facts, concepts, and long-tail scenarios. This perspective suggests that compact models are not merely deployment-efficient substitutes, but a complementary path toward frontier-level performance in parameter-dense capability regimes.

AI.tldr: VibeThinker-3B是一个仅3B参数的紧凑稠密模型，通过频谱到信号后训练范式、课程SFT、多领域RL和离线自蒸馏等优化，在AIME26、LiveCodeBench等严格可验证推理任务上达到前沿水平，性能比肩甚至超越比其大数个数量级的旗舰模型，同时保持严格的指令可控性。
AI.motivation: 探索在严格的小模型(3B参数)规模下，可验证推理能力究竟能被推至何种极限，并验证可验证推理是否可压缩为紧凑推理核心的假设。
AI.method: 基于Spectrum-to-Signal后训练范式，通过课程式监督微调、多领域强化学习、离线自蒸馏的优化流水线进行系统增强。
AI.result: AIME26达到94.3(测试时缩放提升至97.1)，LiveCodeBench v6 Pass@1为80.2，最新LeetCode竞赛接受率96.1%，IFEval得分93.4，性能与DeepSeek V3.2、GLM-5、Gemini 3 Pro等旗舰模型相当或超越。
AI.conclusion: 提出参数压缩-覆盖假设：可验证推理可压缩为紧凑推理核心，而开放域知识和通用能力需要广泛参数覆盖。紧凑模型不仅是部署高效的替代品，更是通向参数密集能力体制前沿的互补路径。

title: Variational Network with Wavelet-based UNET in Accelerated MRI Reconstruction from Under Sampled K-space Data
summary: Fully sampled MRI requires dense k-space acquisition, leading to long scan times, reduced clinical throughput, and increased sensitivity to patient motion. Accelerated MRI addresses this by acquiring undersampled k-space data and reconstructing the missing information computationally. However, reconstruction from undersampled measurements is highly ill-posed and can introduce aliasing artifacts, noise amplification, and loss of anatomical detail. Although conventional parallel imaging and compressed sensing methods mitigate these issues, and deep learning methods have further improved reconstruction quality, preserving high-frequency structures under aggressive undersampling remains challenging. In this work, we propose a Variational Network with a Wavelet-based U-Net (W-UNet) for accelerated MRI reconstruction. The framework combines physics-guided iterative reconstruction with learnable multi-scale frequency representations. Standard pooling operations are replaced with Discrete Wavelet Transform and Inverse Wavelet Transform modules, enabling lossless downsampling while preserving low-frequency structure and high-frequency edge details. Integrated into the refinement and sensitivity map estimation stages, the proposed design improves artifact suppression, feature preservation, and reconstruction fidelity in both single-coil and multi-coil settings. Experiments on fastMRI knee and M4Raw brain datasets show state-of-the-art performance. Ablation studies further confirm the effectiveness of wavelet-based feature decomposition for accelerated MRI reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合变分网络与基于小波的U-Net（W-UNet）的加速MRI重建方法，通过离散小波变换替代标准池化实现无损下采样，在fastMRI膝盖和M4Raw脑部数据集上取得了最优性能。
AI.motivation: 加速MRI重建中，现有方法在处理高度欠采样下高频结构保持方面仍存在挑战，传统并行成像、压缩感知及深度学习方法难以在激进欠采样下同时抑制伪影并保留细节。
AI.method: 将变分网络（Variational Network）与基于小波的U-Net（W-UNet）结合，用离散小波变换（DWT）和逆小波变换（IWT）模块替代标准池化操作，实现无损下采样，同时保留低频结构与高频边缘细节。该设计集成在重建的细化阶段和灵敏度估计阶段，适用于单线圈和多线圈设置。
AI.result: 在fastMRI膝盖数据集和M4Raw脑部数据集上取得了最先进的性能，消融实验验证了小波特征分解的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于小波的变分网络方法能够在加速MRI重建中有效抑制伪影、保留特征并提高重建保真度，尤其是在高频结构保持方面表现出色。

title: GRACE-DS: a Guarded Reward-guided Agent Correction Environment in Data Science
summary: We introduce GRACE-DS, a Guarded Reward-guided Agent Correction Environment in Data Science for pre-deployment evaluation of LLM-powered AutoML agents. GRACE-DS is a set of evaluation metrics in an isolated environment that can be applied to tabular ML tasks specific to a particular organization. It exposes agents to realistic workflow stages, from planning and data inspection through feature engineering, model development, validation, and code repair to final submission, while hidden executable validators measure not only final predictive performance but also leakage avoidance, reproducibility, protocol validity, correction behavior, and reward alignment. The strongest structured regime, flexible iterative interaction (our approach), achieves higher end-to-end normalized hidden-test quality than single-shot generation, unstructured interaction, and restart-based baselines, while also improving protocol-valid completion. Validated across more than 7,000 episodes, these results establish GRACE-DS as a robust platform for assessing the capacity of LLM-based AutoML agents to execute machine learning workflows under production-like conditions and in accordance with organization-specific requirements.

AI.tldr: GRACE-DS 是一个用于评估 LLM 驱动的 AutoML 代理在数据科学任务中预部署性能的受保护奖励引导环境，支持多阶段工作流评估和隐藏验证器检测。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法缺乏对 LLM 驱动的 AutoML 代理在多阶段、生产化数据科学工作流中的全面评估，尤其是在协议合规性、泄漏避免、可重复性等组织特定要求方面。
AI.method: 构建隔离评估环境 GRACE-DS，设计多阶段工作流（规划、数据检查、特征工程、模型开发、验证、代码修复、提交）和隐藏可执行验证器，测量预测性能、泄漏避免、可重复性、协议有效性、修正行为和奖励对齐。
AI.result: 灵活迭代交互模式（最强结构化机制）在端到端标准化隐藏测试质量上优于单次生成、非结构化交互和基于重启的基线，同时提升了协议有效完成率，在超过 7000 个 episode 上验证。
AI.conclusion: GRACE-DS 为评估 LLM 驱动的 AutoML 代理在生产化条件及组织特定约束下执行机器学习工作流的能力提供了稳健平台。

title: LiteOdyssey: A Lightweight Reasoning AI Agent for Interpretable Rare-Disease Diagnosis
summary: Most medical AI systems improve by scaling additional machinery: more fine-tuning data, more agents, and/or larger retrieval databases. In rare-disease diagnosis, however, such scaling can produce systems that are difficult to deploy, audit, and maintain. We asked whether state-of-the-art diagnostic performance could instead be achieved by extending the reasoning chain of a single AI agent: guiding it with a diagnostic policy, developed through human-AI collaboration and augmenting with freely available biomedical tools. We introduce LiteOdyssey, a lightweight rare-disease diagnostic framework that guides reasoning language model through a clinical genetics workflow. This framework was developed through Policy Iteration with Human Feedback (PIHF) and uses dynamic access to public biomedical tools. On two challenging benchmarks that provide only patient clinical features, LiteOdyssey achieved state-of-the-art performance, with an overall disease Recall@1 of 59.3% over the combined 1,243 cases of LIRICAL (n = 370) and the PhenoPacket Store (n = 873). Both benchmarks have a high proportion of ultra-rare disease (a prevalence below 1 in 1,000,000, with ultra-rare shares of approximately 45% and 52.8%, respectively). On the more difficult PhenoPacket subset, where causal diseases were not mapped to Orphanet in our rarity-mapping pipeline, LiteOdyssey achieved 60.7% Recall@1, compared with 10.7% for the same baseline model (GPT-5.4) without tools. This performance was achieved without fine-tuning, multi-agent ensembles, or a large case-retrieval database. Gains were also observed in the following: on cases never seen during development, on a private cohort of real-world rare disease patients, and on a smaller open-weights model. LiteOdyssey suggests a path toward rare-disease AI systems that are accurate, easier to deploy, and more transparent for physician review.

AI.tldr: LiteOdyssey是一个轻量级罕见病诊断框架，通过扩展单一AI智能体的推理链（而非增加数据、模型或数据库规模），结合人类反馈策略迭代和公开生物医学工具，在1243例病例上实现了59.3%的Recall@1，无需微调或多智能体集成。
AI.motivation: 现有医学AI系统主要通过扩展数据、智能体或检索数据库来提升性能，但在罕见病诊断中，这种扩展方式会导致系统难以部署、审计和维护。作者希望探索是否可以通过扩展单一AI智能体的推理链（而非增加系统规模）来达到最优诊断性能。
AI.method: 提出LiteOdyssey框架，核心方法包括：(1) 通过人类反馈策略迭代（PIHF）引导推理语言模型遵循临床遗传学工作流；(2) 动态访问公开生物医学工具辅助诊断；(3) 不依赖微调、多智能体集成或大型病例检索数据库。
AI.result: 在LIRICAL（370例）和PhenoPacket Store（873例）组合数据集上达到59.3%的Recall@1。在更困难的PhenoPacket子集上达到60.7% Recall@1，而基线模型（GPT-5.4）仅10.7%。在未见病例、真实世界患者队列和小型开源模型上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: LiteOdyssey展示了通过扩展推理链而非系统规模来实现高性能罕见病诊断的可行路径，具有更高的部署便利性和医生审查透明度。

title: Label Shift Aware Adaptation for Online Zero-shot Learning with Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP)
summary: Vision-language models like Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) have been extensively studied in data-scarce scenarios. A particularly challenging and realistic task in this area is online zero-shot learning with CLIP, where unknown test samples are predicted sequentially in random order by CLIP while keeping the feature extraction and model parameters fixed during the sequential inference phase. Most existing approaches in this setting address the problem by adapting representations online using incoming test samples, while neglecting the distribution of the data on which CLIP was initially trained. This mismatch can lead to degraded performance when the label distribution in the test data differs from that of the training domain. To address this gap, we propose Label Shift Aware (LSA), which formulates the online zero-shot classification task as a domain adaptation problem. Specifically, LSA adapts the predictions computed by CLIP, which was trained on an unknown source distribution, to a target distribution using only unlabeled test data, and applies label shift correction to mitigate the mismatch between the source and target domains. The extensive experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate that the proposed LSA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art online zero-shot learning methods based on CLIP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LSA方法，将CLIP的在线零样本学习任务视为领域适应问题，通过标签偏移校正来缓解源域与目标域之间的分布不匹配，在多个数据集上持续优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有在线零样本学习方法在适应测试样本时忽视了CLIP预训练数据的分布信息，当测试数据的标签分布与训练域不同时性能会下降。
AI.method: 提出LSA（Label Shift Aware）方法，将在线零样本分类任务建模为领域适应问题，利用无标签测试数据对CLIP的预测结果进行自适应调整，并应用标签偏移校正来缓解源域与目标域之间的分布不匹配。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，LSA持续优于基于CLIP的最先进的在线零样本学习方法。
AI.conclusion: LSA通过标签偏移感知的领域适应策略，有效解决了CLIP在线零样本学习中源域与目标域分布不匹配的问题。

title: Bridging the Usability Gap: Lessons from Interpreting Studies for Machine Interpreting Design
summary: Machine interpreting (MI), the live, real-time branch of speech translation, has achieved remarkable progress on standard benchmarks, with some systems approaching human parity on textual fidelity. Yet the user experience remains far inferior to interpreter-mediated communication, revealing what we term the \emph{accuracy illusion}: systems that appear accurate on paper but fail in practice to support smooth, goal-oriented interaction. This paper defines MI as a distinct subfield of speech translation, with its own characteristics and the need for evaluation methods grounded in communicative effectiveness rather than isolated fidelity metrics. Drawing on insights from interpreting studies, we identify critical dimensions of professional interpreting practice that are overlooked by current systems, and consolidate them into three interdependent design priorities for future MI: \emph{agency} (context-sensitive initiative and repair), \emph{grounding} (multimodal and discourse-level situational awareness), and \emph{experience} (adaptive improvement through real interaction). Together, these priorities chart a path toward closing the usability gap and enabling systems that can sustain authentic multilingual communication in real time.

AI.tldr: 本文指出机器口译（MI）在标准基准测试上已接近人类水平，但用户体验远逊于人工口译，存在"准确性幻觉"——系统在纸面准确但实际无法支撑顺畅的交互。作者将MI定义为语音翻译的子领域，提出应以交际有效性而非孤立保真度来评估，并基于口译研究提炼出三个设计优先级：能动性、基础构建和体验。
AI.motivation: 现有机器口译系统在标准评测上表现优异甚至接近人类，但用户实际体验差，存在"准确性幻觉"——保真度高但交互失败。需要重新定义评估方法，从口译研究中汲取洞见，弥合评测与真实使用之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 通过梳理口译研究的专业视角，识别当前系统忽视的关键维度，将其归纳为三个相互依赖的设计优先级：能动性（上下文感知的主动干预与修复）、基础构建（多模态与话语层情境感知）和体验（通过真实交互自适应改进）。
AI.result: 提出了三个设计优先级（能动性、基础构建、体验）作为未来机器口译的发展方向，旨在弥合"可用性差距"，实现能够支撑真实多语交际的实时系统。
AI.conclusion: 机器口译应从追求孤立的文本保真度转向关注交际有效性，以口译实践为参照，以能动性、基础构建和体验为设计优先方向，才能真正实现有实际可用性的实时多语交流。

title: The Quality-Utility Paradox: Why High-Reward Data Impairs Small Model Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Knowledge distillation from powerful reasoning models is widely used to improve Small Language Models (SLMs) on mathematical reasoning, often assuming that traces with higher reward model scores provide more useful supervision. We identify a counterintuitive \textbf{Quality-Utility Paradox} in mathematical reasoning distillation. Data refined or synthesized by a stronger Oracle obtains higher perceived quality according to reward models, yet consistently underperforms traces generated by the SLM itself and selected through rejection sampling across Qwen2.5, LLaMA-3, and DeepSeek families. Our analysis shows that Oracle refinement couples logical repair with distributional drift away from the SLM's native reasoning distribution. This drift increases the learner's adaptation cost and can outweigh the benefit of improved reasoning logic. To test this mechanism, we introduce \textbf{Style-Aligned Refinement}, which preserves the native trajectory of the SLM while retaining logical repair from the Oracle. This intervention lowers adaptation cost and restores downstream utility. These findings suggest that effective mathematical reasoning distillation should jointly optimize perceived solution quality and learner-data compatibility, rather than relying solely on reward-model scores. The datasets and code are available at https://github.com/Dracoqhl/Quality-Utility-Paradox.

AI.tldr: 论文发现数学推理蒸馏中存在“质量-效用悖论”：用强模型（Oracle）优化后的数据虽然奖励模型评分更高，但反而比SLM自生成+拒绝采样的数据效果更差，原因是Oracle优化带来了分布偏移，增加了学习成本。
AI.motivation: 揭示数学推理蒸馏中一个反直觉现象——高质量（高奖励模型评分）的Oracle优化数据反而导致SLM性能下降，并探究其背后的机制。
AI.method: 1. 在Qwen2.5、LLaMA-3、DeepSeek系列上进行对比实验；2. 分析Oracle refinement同时带来逻辑修复和分布漂移；3. 提出Style-Aligned Refinement方法，保留SLM原生轨迹的同时融入逻辑修复。
AI.result: Oracle优化数据虽然奖励模型评分更高，但在数学推理任务上始终不如SLM自生成+拒绝采样的数据；Style-Aligned Refinement降低了分布偏移的学习成本，恢复了下游效用。
AI.conclusion: 数学推理蒸馏应同时优化感知质量与学习器-数据兼容性，不能仅依赖奖励模型评分；Style-Aligned Refinement是解决该悖论的有效手段。

title: Enabling Real-Time Point-of-Care Ultrasound Segmentation: A GPU-Free Deployment in Resource-Limited Settings
summary: Ultrasound imaging is the most widely adopted medical modality globally due to its low cost and portability, yet artificial intelligence (AI) deployment remains constrained by reliance on GPU-accelerated models, creating a structural paradox where the cost of "intelligence" exceeds that of the imaging device itself. Here, we present the systematic adaptation and extensive evaluation of UltraSeg, an ultra-lightweight architecture originally developed for colonoscopic polyp segmentation, now engineered for point-of-care ultrasound (POCUS) across ten public datasets spanning six anatomical sites (breast, thyroid, kidney, carotid, fetal, and small-animal tumor). We systematically validate both variants in ultrasound domains: UltraSeg-130K (0.13M parameters) achieves 89.7 FPS on single-core CPUs and 34.8 FPS on a refurbished mobile device, while UltraSeg-500K (0.5M parameters) delivers 44.6 FPS on CPU and 16.1 FPS on mobile device. UltraSeg-500K matches or exceeds the Dice performance of the 31M-parameter UNet and approaches 105M-parameter TransUNet in average performance, with superior zero-shot cross-dataset generalization on external validation sets (UDIAT, DDTI). By enabling clinical-grade segmentation without GPU dependency, this work brings AI costs in line with ultrasound accessibility, making advanced diagnostics available in resource-limited settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UltraSeg超轻量分割架构（0.13M/0.5M参数），无需GPU即可在CPU和移动设备上实现临床级超声图像分割，性能媲美UNet（31M参数）和TransUNet（105M参数），解决了AI"智能"成本高于成像设备本身的结构性矛盾。
AI.motivation: 超声成像虽广泛应用，但现有AI分割模型依赖GPU加速，导致"智能"成本超过设备本身，限制了在资源匮乏环境中的部署。
AI.method: 系统性地将UltraSeg（原结肠镜息肉分割架构）迁移至POCUS领域，在两个变体（130K和500K参数）上进行验证，涵盖10个公开数据集、6个解剖部位。
AI.result: UltraSeg-130K在单核CPU达89.7 FPS，移动设备34.8 FPS；UltraSeg-500K在CPU达44.6 FPS，移动设备16.1 FPS，Dice性能匹配或超越UNet和TransUNet，且在外部验证集上零样本泛化更优。
AI.conclusion: UltraSeg实现了无GPU依赖的临床级超声分割，将AI成本与超声可及性对齐，使先进诊断在资源受限环境中成为可能。

title: Who Flips? Self- and Cross-Model Counterarguments Reveal Answer Instability in LLMs
comment: Accepted to the non-archival workshops AI4Good and AIWILD at ICML 2026
summary: Standard accuracy benchmarks are designed to test how closely large language models (LLMs) approach correct answers, but are not suitable for testing whether LLMs stick with a correct answer when that answer is challenged by a plausible counter-argument. We introduce a controlled protocol for evaluating answer stability: after a model answers a multiple-choice question correctly, we challenge the model's answer with a coherent argument for an incorrect option and measure whether the model flips. The setup a) isolates argumentative content from overt social pressure and b) varies argument length, self-attribution, and cross-model source. Across seven frontier models and 57 MMLU subjects, flip rates range from 17.5% to 97.3%, revealing large differences in stability that are not captured by accuracy metrics alone. We find that self-attribution consistently increases flip rates (mean +7.1pp, up to +18.7pp). Also, pooling wrong-answer arguments across models and selecting the most effective one per question yields stronger adversarial challenges than relying on any single source model. We further construct MaxFlip, a curated challenge set that amplifies flips by up to +23.6pp over standard self-generated challenges. We release the protocol, challenge records, and MaxFlip to support stability evaluation alongside standard accuracy benchmarks. Materials are available at https://github.com/nafisenik/WhoFlips and https://hf.co/datasets/nafisehNik/WhoFlips.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种评估大语言模型答案稳定性的新方法，通过向模型提出看似合理的反驳论点来测试其是否会改变正确回答，实验发现7个前沿模型的翻盘率在17.5%-97.3%之间，且自归因会显著增加翻盘率。
AI.motivation: 现有准确率基准只能测试LLM接近正确答案的程度，无法评估模型在面临看似合理的反驳时是否仍能坚持正确回答，因此需要一种新的稳定性评估方法。
AI.method: 设计一个受控协议：在LLM正确回答选择题后，向其展示一个支持错误选项的连贯论点，观察模型是否会改变答案。协议隔离了论点内容与社会压力，并变化论点长度、自归因和跨模型来源。在7个前沿模型和57个MMLU主题上进行测试。
AI.result: 翻盘率范围从17.5%到97.3%，准确率无法反映稳定性差异；自归因平均增加7.1个百分点（最高18.7pp）的翻盘率；跨模型选择最有效错误论点比单源模型更具挑战性；构建的MaxFlip挑战集比标准自生成挑战提高翻盘率最高23.6pp。
AI.conclusion: 准确率基准不足以评估LLM的推理稳健性，需要将稳定性评估纳入标准测评体系；团队开源了协议、挑战记录和MaxFlip数据集。

title: AI Pluralism and the Worlds It Misses
comment: To be presented at the ICML Pluralistic Alignment Workshop
summary: AI pluralism is often framed as a problem of representing diverse values, preferences, users, or outputs. This paper argues that this framing is incomplete because AI systems also impose ontologies: they define what counts as an entity, relation, feature, harm, benefit, and valid form of evidence. We define ontological flattening as the conversion of situated, contested, and historically specific meanings into a restricted technical category, proxy, aggregation rule, or benchmark target that is treated as neutral and difficult to contest. The paper develops a bounded conceptual and qualitative synthesis across value pluralism, pluralistic alignment, participatory and democratic AI, procedural justice, science and technology studies, accountability research, aggregate themes from 11 expert interviews, and three urban AI companion cases. The cases illustrate how pluralistic methods can improve or structure model behavior while still compressing categories, proxies, aggregation rules, and revision rights before affected actors have procedural standing. We introduce Pluralistic Lifecycle Governance (PLG) as a preliminary qualitative audit scaffold for documenting ontological openness, epistemic inclusion, procedural authority, evaluation pluralism, and lifecycle accountability. PLG is not presented as a validated scoring instrument; it is a framework for making the evidence and governance conditions of pluralistic AI explicit.

AI.tldr: 本文批评当前的AI多元主义主要关注价值观、偏好和用户的多样性，而忽视了AI系统强加的“本体论”问题——即AI如何定义实体、关系、特征、危害、利益和有效证据。作者提出“本体扁平化”概念，并通过概念综合、专家访谈和三个城市AI案例，开发了“多元生命周期治理”（PLG）作为初步的定性审计框架，用于记录AI系统在本体开放、认识包容、程序权威、评估多元和生命周期问责方面的条件。
AI.motivation: 当前AI多元主义的讨论局限于价值观、偏好和用户的多样性，忽略了AI系统在更根本层面（本体论）施加的约束——即哪些实体、关系、特征被认可，哪些被排除。这种“本体扁平化”使得本应情境化、有争议的意义被压缩为看似中立、难以质疑的技术类别。
AI.method: 采用有界概念与定性综合方法，融合价值多元主义、多元对齐、参与式与民主AI、程序正义、STS、问责研究等多领域文献；结合11位专家访谈的聚合主题；以及三个城市AI伴生案例，展示多元方法如何在改善模型行为的同时仍在受影响行动者获得程序地位之前压缩类别、代理、聚合规则和修订权利。
AI.result: 提出了“多元生命周期治理”（PLG）框架，这是一个初步的定性审计架构，涵盖本体开放、认识包容、程序权威、评估多元和生命周期问责五个维度。PLG并非已验证的评分工具，而是用于使多元AI的证据和治理条件显性化的框架。
AI.conclusion: AI多元主义需要超越价值观和偏好的表层多样性，关注更深层的本体论问题。PLG框架为记录和评估AI系统在本体扁平化方面的治理条件提供了初步工具，但尚需进一步验证和完善。

title: Adaptive Inference-Time Scaling via Early-Step Latent Verification for Image Editing
summary: Instruction-based image editing has made notable progress with recent advances in generative models. However, the quality of the edited result is still influenced by the randomly sampled initial noise, particularly in complex editing scenarios. An unsuitable initial noise may lead to unsatisfactory editing results. Recent inference-time scaling methods address this issue by sampling multiple initial noises and selecting better candidates. Nevertheless, most of them follow a decode-then-verify scheme which introduces an efficiency-accuracy trade-off. When decoding is performed after limited inference steps, the decoded images often remain too noisy for reliable assessment, whereas sufficiently denoised images require much higher computational cost. To address this issue, we propose VeriLatent, a plug-and-play adaptive inference-time scaling framework with early-step latent verification for image editing. Specifically, we propose a novel verifier that scores each initial noise through a latent-space editing activation map at an early stage. It identifies promising candidates by assessing whether they can induce an effective edit in the correct region. This enables efficient early pruning without decoding latents into images. Building on this, we further develop an adaptive search strategy for inference-time scaling. It allocates inference budgets according to editing difficulty, thereby reducing the number of function evaluations (NFE). Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks and different base models demonstrate that VeriLatent consistently improves both editing performance and inference-time scaling efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出VeriLatent框架，通过在早期潜空间验证初始噪声质量，实现无需解码的高效推理时缩放，提升图像编辑性能与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有指令图像编辑在复杂场景下受初始噪声影响大，推理时缩放方法虽然通过采样多个噪声来缓解，但存在解码-验证的效率-精度权衡：少步解码噪声太大无法可靠评估，充分解码则计算成本高。
AI.method: 提出VeriLatent：1）设计潜空间编辑激活图验证器，在早期步骤对初始噪声进行评分，无需解码为图像；2）基于此开发自适应搜索策略，根据编辑难度动态分配推理预算，减少函数评估次数。
AI.result: 在多个基准和不同基模型上，VeriLatent一致提升了编辑性能和推理时缩放效率。
AI.conclusion: VeriLatent是一种即插即用的高效推理时缩放框架，通过早期潜空间验证解决了效率与精度的权衡问题。

title: Scaling Human and G2P Supervision for Robust Phonetic Transcription
summary: Expert phonetic annotation is costly, especially for non-standard dialects and atypical speech. A common alternative is using Grapheme-to-Phoneme (G2P) models to auto-generate phonetic labels from text transcripts at scale. We study how automatic phonetic transcription performance scales with human and G2P supervision in English. Using a curated 80-hour benchmark spanning native, non-native and post-stroke speech, we identify a supervision quality threshold: G2P supervision helps only when fewer than 20-30 hours of human annotation are available. Beyond this threshold, it provides no significant benefit and can reduce cross-dialect robustness. What is effective after this threshold is ASR pretraining which we use to achieve a 2.3x reduction in weighted phone feature error rate over prior systems, with strong gains on non-native and aphasic speech. These results suggest that quantity-driven G2P scaling may yield diminishing returns for robust generalization.

AI.tldr: 研究发现G2P自动标注仅在人工标注数据少于20-30小时时有帮助，超过该阈值则无效甚至降低跨方言鲁棒性；而ASR预训练可显著提升性能，使加权音素特征错误率降低2.3倍。
AI.motivation: 专家语音标注成本高昂，尤其对于非标准方言和非典型语音；需要寻找自动生成音标标签的替代方案，并探究其在不同监督条件下的效能边界。
AI.method: 构建80小时基准数据集（涵盖母语者、非母语者及中风后语音），对比人工标注和G2P自动标注在不同数据规模下的表现，并引入ASR预训练方法。
AI.result: G2P监督存在阈值效应：仅在人工标注数据不足20-30小时时有效；超越该阈值后，ASR预训练带来2.3倍加权音素特征错误率降低，尤其在非母语和失语症语音上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 数量驱动的G2P扩展在提升鲁棒泛化方面收益递减，ASR预训练是更有效的替代方案。

title: TimeVista: Exploring and Exploiting Vision-Language Models as Judges for Time Series Forecasting
summary: High-quality time series forecasting is pivotal for real-world decision-making. However, traditional point-wise metrics often fail to reveal complex temporal patterns and align poorly with human intuitive preferences. While the ''LLM-as-a-Judge'' paradigm has revolutionized text evaluation by providing flexible, human-aligned judgment, its application to time series remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we leverage Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as judges for time series forecasting, harnessing their ability to comprehend time series plots grounded in textual information. Specifically, we propose a novel framework integrating micro- and macro-level judgments informed by contextual information to evaluate time series forecasting. To this end, we introduce TimeVista, a comprehensive VLM-as-a-Judge benchmark comprising 5563 time series samples paired with detailed evaluation rubrics. Extensive meta-evaluations demonstrate that VLMs are highly reliable judges, achieving significantly higher consistency with human preferences than conventional metrics. Building upon our benchmark, we comprehensively assess recent Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) under the VLM-as-a-Judge paradigm.
