Our results demonstrate that VLMs serve as robust and interpretable judges, providing a comprehensive, human-aligned standard for evaluating time series models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将视觉语言模型(VLM)作为时间序列预测的评判者，构建了TimeVista基准，包含5563个样本和详细评估标准。实验表明VLM评判者比传统指标更符合人类偏好，为时间序列模型评估提供了人类对齐的新标准。
AI.motivation: 传统的时间序列预测评估指标（如点对点误差）无法捕捉复杂的时间模式，且与人类的直觉偏好对齐较差。同时，"LLM作为评判者"范式在文本评估领域取得了成功，但在时间序列领域尚未被探索。
AI.method: 提出VLM-as-a-Judge框架，利用视觉语言模型理解基于文本信息的时间序列图表，整合微观和宏观层面的上下文判断来评估预测结果。并构建了TimeVista基准（5563个时间序列样本及详细评估标准）用于元评估。
AI.result: VLM作为评判者与人类偏好的一致性显著高于传统指标；在TimeVista基准上全面评估了最新的时间序列基础模型(TSFMs)。
AI.conclusion: VLM可以作为鲁棒且可解释的评判者，为时间序列模型评估提供全面、人类对齐的新标准。

title: City landscape in sight: A crowdsourced framework for unlocking urban-scale window view perceptions from real estate imagery
summary: City landscapes viewed through home windows influence quality of life, yet perceptions of actual window views at the urban scale remain understudied. This study presents an approach for large-scale mapping of perceptions using 12,334 window view images (WVIs) collected from actual residential properties listed on real estate platforms in Wuhan, China, representing a rarely explored form of urban view imagery that offers advantages over the rendered or simulated window views commonly examined in previous studies. Through a non-immersive virtual reality platform, we collected 27,477 pairwise comparisons across six perceptual dimensions (e.g.\ Vivid) from 304 participants based on 499 WVIs. A hybrid neural network model was trained to predict human perceptions of all crowdsourced WVIs and map their spatial distribution. Results reveal significant spatial autocorrelation with distinct hot and cold spots across the whole city. Floor level strongly influences human perceptions: while higher floors offer more preferred and extensive window views, lower-floor windows provide residents with quiet and vivid views. An inference model further shows that window view composition matters considerably: high ratios of sky, trees, and low-rise buildings enhance people's preferences and perceptions of vividness, whereas high ratios of high-rise buildings increase perceptions of monotony and oppression. Importantly, these effects are non-linear: the excessive presence of certain elements can alter their impact on human perception. This work advances urban-scale understanding of residents' visual experiences and provides evidence-based guidance for human-centric urban planning and real estate to optimise visual landscapes from windows.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用中国武汉12,334张真实房产窗口视图图像，结合非沉浸式虚拟现实收集的27,477对人类感知比较，训练混合神经网络模型预测六种感知维度的空间分布。发现楼层高度和视图构成（天空、树木、建筑比例）非线性地影响居民对窗口景观的偏好与感知。
AI.motivation: 城市窗口景观影响生活质量，但实际窗口视图在大规模城市尺度上的感知研究仍然不足。现有研究多使用渲染或模拟视图，缺乏基于真实房产实际视角的大规模感知分析。
AI.method: 从房产平台获取12,334张真实窗口视图图像（WVIs），选取其中499张通过非沉浸式虚拟现实平台收集304名参与者的27,477对六维度（如生动性）感知比较，训练混合神经网络模型预测所有图像感知，并进行空间分布制图与统计推断分析。
AI.result: 窗口视图感知具有显著空间自相关，存在明显热点与冷点。楼层高度影响显著：高楼层提供更偏好、更广阔的视野，低楼层则提供安静与生动视图。视图组成影响呈非线性：高比例天空、树木、低层建筑提升偏好与生动感，高层建筑比例高则增加单调与压抑感，且过度存在会改变其影响方向。
AI.conclusion: 该工作推动了城市尺度下居民视觉体验的理解，为以人为本的城市规划和房地产优化窗口视觉景观提供了循证指导。

title: In-Domain Supervised Pathology Report Classification: A Reproducible Pipeline from Data Curation to Production-Matched Evaluation
summary: We introduce an in-domain supervised pipeline designed to counter the out-of-distribution performance drop that hampers supervised biomedical NLP models, a problem observed when models trained on pathology reports are moved across cancer registries. Our contribution is a reproducible recipe for training a supervised classifier from routinely collected cancer registry data. It describes how to build the in-domain training set and a production-matched holdout, and to choose operating points that keep the false-negative rate (FNR) very low while keeping reviewer workload manageable. The pipeline standardizes data curation with facility-stratified sampling and separate handling of reports linked to registry cases, and includes a blinded manual audit to estimate positive-case prevalence and label noise. On a 418k-report holdout set, the Kentucky model achieved FNR 0.003 and false-positive rate (FPR) 0.097, improving over the Seattle-trained MOSSAIC OncoID baseline (FNR 0.010, FPR 0.183) and raising F1 from 0.860 to 0.922. In a blinded manual review of 600 reports, estimated positive prevalence declined from 0.500 to 0.398, indicating substantial label noise with errors concentrated in rare primary sites.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于域内监督的流水线方法，用于解决生物医学NLP模型在跨癌症登记处部署时出现的分布外性能下降问题。通过从常规收集的癌症登记数据中训练分类器，并采用设施分层采样、生产匹配保留集、盲法人工审核等技术，在418k份报告的保留集上实现了FNR 0.003、FPR 0.097的优异性能，显著优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 解决监督式生物医学NLP模型在跨癌症登记处迁移时遇到的分布外性能下降问题，即模型在病理报告上训练后，在不同癌症登记处部署时性能显著降低。
AI.method: 提出了一种可复现的域内监督流水线：(1) 从常规收集的癌症登记数据构建域内训练集和生产匹配的保留集；(2) 采用设施分层采样标准化数据整理，单独处理与登记病例相关的报告；(3) 通过盲法人工审核估计阳性病例患病率和标签噪声；(4) 选择能保持极低假阴性率(FNR)且控制审核工作量的操作点。
AI.result: 在418k份报告的保留集上，肯塔基模型达到FNR 0.003、FPR 0.097，优于西雅图训练的MOSSAIC OncoID基线(FNR 0.010, FPR 0.183)，F1从0.860提升至0.922。盲法人工审核600份报告显示，阳性患病率从0.500降至0.398，表明存在显著标签噪声，错误集中在罕见原发部位。
AI.conclusion: 该域内监督流水线能够有效提升跨癌症登记处部署的NLP模型性能，通过可复现的训练方法和严格的性能评估，显著降低了假阴性率并提高了F1分数，同时揭示了标签噪声问题，为实际部署提供了可靠方案。

title: PAL-Bench: Evidence-Grounded Profile Reconstruction from Longitudinal Personal Albums
summary: Longitudinal personal albums are weak-schema multimodal databases: noisy perceptual records whose key facts require joins across faces, text, timestamps, locations, and repeated events. Existing visual, video, document, and lifelog benchmarks test sub-problems, but not album-scale profile reconstruction with social identity binding and evidence citation. Benchmarking this task is difficult because the ground truth needed for evaluation--owner profiles, social graphs, face-name maps, and evidence provenance--is private state that real albums cannot safely release. We introduce PAL-Bench, a controlled benchmark for evidence-grounded reconstruction under a public-record contract. Its Evidence Compiler builds latent private worlds, programs target-level evidence paths, renders album pixels, re-measures them through perception pipelines, and exports audited public/private views. Agents receive only perception-derived public records; targets, identifier maps, and evidence paths remain hidden. PAL-Bench contains 50 synthetic users, 36,659 public photo records, and 2,799 targets over owner facts, identities, and relations. A privacy-preserving audit with 10 participants confirms that PAL-Bench evidence structures match real private albums, though equivalent releases remain privacy-prohibitive. Across seven systems and two compute-matched diagnostics, a seven-metric protocol reveals a gap between plausible profile summarization and faithful social reconstruction: systems recover some owner facts but struggle with recurring identities and evidence citation. PAL-TRACE, a reference framework that freezes identity bindings before owner-fact mining, performs best but leaves hard identity resolution far from solved. PAL-Bench provides a testbed for perceptual entity resolution, multimodal data integration, temporal evidence aggregation, and provenance-aware structured prediction.

AI.tldr: PAL-Bench是一个用于评估证据驱动的个人档案重建任务的合成基准，包含50个合成用户、36,659张照片和2,799个目标。它通过证据编译器构建隐式私有世界，生成可审计的公开/私有视图，解决了真实相册无法安全释放地面真值的隐私难题。实验表明现有系统在身份解析和证据引用方面存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基准（视觉、视频、文档、生活日志）只测试子问题，无法评估"相册级别的个人档案重建"，包括社会身份绑定和证据溯源。真实相册因隐私问题无法释放包含真实标注（用户画像、社交图、人脸-姓名映射等）的数据集。
AI.method: 提出PAL-Bench框架，包含Evidence Compiler，流程为：1) 构建隐式私有世界；2) 编程目标级证据路径；3) 渲染相册像素；4) 通过感知管道重新测量；5) 导出可审计的公开/私有视图。代理只能访问感知导出的公开记录，目标和证据路径保持隐藏。
AI.result: 包含50个合成用户、36,659张照片和2,799个目标。隐私审计确认其证据结构与真实相册匹配。在7个系统和2个计算匹配诊断中，7指标协议揭示：系统能恢复部分用户事实，但在身份解析和证据引用上表现不佳。PAL-TRACE表现最好，但硬身份解析仍未解决。
AI.conclusion: PAL-Bench为感知实体解析、多模态数据融合、时序证据聚合和溯源感知的结构化预测提供了测试平台。当前系统在可信的社交重建与简单的摘要总结之间存在显著差距，身份解析仍是一个开放挑战。

title: Keep It in Mind: User Centric Continual Spatial Intelligence Reasoning in Egocentric Video Streams
summary: We introduce UCS-Bench, a dataset spanning 170+ hours of egocentric visual observations with 8.1K+ timestamped questions for diagnosing User-Centric Continual Spatial intelligence in egocentric video streams. UCS-Bench targets a new problem that emphasizes dynamic spatial reasoning, long-term memory, and their alignment with users' real-time locations. We propose DirectMe, a framework that incrementally constructs and maintains a structured spatial memory from streaming egocentric observations. DirectMe enables robust tracking and recall of object locations, all relative to the user's movement over time. By tightly coupling visual perception with memory updates and spatial reasoning, our approach supports long-horizon queries that require recalling interactions, resolving viewpoint-induced ambiguities, and adapting to dynamic scenes. Our experiments show that DirectMe significantly improves the spatial reasoning of leading multimodal LLMs; it also surpasses many spatially aware and long-form streaming video models. We hope our benchmark and solution will advance spatial intelligence research for egocentric AI assistants. Data and code are available at https://github.com/cocowy1/UCS-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UCS-Bench数据集（170+小时第一视角视频，8.1K+带时间戳问题）和DirectMe框架，用于诊断和提升以用户为中心的持续空间智能，在动态空间推理、长时记忆与用户实时位置对齐方面显著优于现有多模态大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对第一视角视频流中持续空间智能的评估基准，尤其在动态空间推理、长期记忆维护及与用户实时位置对齐方面存在空白。
AI.method: 构建UCS-Bench数据集（170+小时第一视角视频、8.1K+时间戳问题）；提出DirectMe框架，通过增量构建和维护结构化空间记忆，将视觉感知、记忆更新与空间推理紧密耦合，支持长程时空查询。
AI.result: DirectMe显著提升了多模态大模型的空间推理能力，并超越了多种空间感知和长视频流模型。
AI.conclusion: UCS-Bench和DirectMe为第一视角AI助手的空间智能研究提供了新的基准和有效解决方案，数据和代码已开源。

title: From Argument Components to Graphs: A Multi-Agent Debate with Confidence Gating for Argument Relations
comment: Accepted for publication in the proceedings of KES 2026
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly assessed and utilized in the field of Argument Mining (AM), thanks to their strong general reasoning capabilities. However, standard training-free models often miss sophisticated details, specifically in contexts where two parts of the text have to be analyzed together. Furthermore, self-correction mechanisms tend to reinforce initial hallucinations in reasoning. Overcoming these limitations typically requires expensive, domain-specific supervised fine-tuning. Recent work has shown that a multi-agent paradigm can address such weaknesses for the component classification task through dialectical refinement with a Proponent-Opponent-Judge architecture, setting a promising direction for training-free approaches in the field. In this paper, we extend and evaluate this framework on the Argument Relation Identification and Classification (ARIC) task, reformulating it as a debate over component pairs. Besides that, we introduce a confidence gating mechanism that enables debating only on the uncertain cases and accepting the initial prediction when confidence is high. On the UKP Argument Annotated Essays v2 corpus, we demonstrate that the selective debate achieves the highest Macro F1 among all training-free methods, while debate over all samples degrades performance below that of one of the baselines. All generative approaches also outperform fine-tuned RoBERTa models on Macro F1, suggesting that the under-representation of the Attack class was more damaging to supervised fine-tuning than to inference-only models. Additionally, our framework produces human-readable debate transcripts, offering interpretability absent from both single-agent and supervised classifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体辩论的选择性置信门控机制，用于论证关系识别与分类任务，在UKP语料库上实现了无训练方法中的最佳Macro F1，同时保持了可解释性。
AI.motivation: 标准无训练LLM在论证挖掘中难以处理需要联合分析文本对的任务，且自纠正机制会强化初始幻觉；而监督微调成本高昂。因此需要一种无需微调且能有效处理成对文本分析的训练免费方法。
AI.method: 将论证关系识别与分类任务重构为组件对之间的辩论，采用Proponent-Opponent-Judge三智能体架构，并引入置信门控机制——仅在模型对初始预测不确定时才触发辩论，置信度高时直接接受初始预测。
AI.result: 在UKP Argument Annotated Essays v2语料库上，选择性辩论在所有无训练方法中取得最高Macro F1；全部样本辩论反而低于基线；所有生成式方法均超过微调RoBERTa，表明Attack类欠表示对监督微调损害更大。
AI.conclusion: 选择性辩论框架有效平衡了性能与效率，避免了不必要的辩论开销，同时生成可读的辩论记录，弥补了单智能体和监督模型缺乏可解释性的不足。

title: Measuring Whether LLM Tutors Teach or Solve: A Diagnostic for Educational Impact
summary: Large language models are increasingly proposed as educational tutors, yet stronger task-solving ability does not necessarily imply stronger learning support. Motivated by recent calls to measure the social impact of NLP systems in practice, we study whether public LLM tutoring benchmarks distinguish learning-supportive behavior from mere answer production. We propose a lightweight diagnostic based on the gap between solving-oriented and pedagogy-oriented benchmark performance. Using public MathTutorBench leaderboard results, we show that these dimensions are only partially aligned: across eight publicly reported models, the correlation between solving and pedagogy composites is 0.421, and several models shift meaningfully in rank when evaluation moves from solving to pedagogy. We then analyze the public TutorBench sample and show that agency-relevant behaviors are explicitly encoded in benchmark rubrics, especially in active-learning settings that reward guiding questions, calibrated hints, and non-disclosive scaffolding. Together, these findings suggest that educational-impact evaluation should not treat task success as a sufficient proxy for learning support. We argue that public tutoring benchmarks can better support positive-impact evaluation by reporting solving-oriented and pedagogy-oriented scores separately and by making disclosure-sensitive, student-agency-preserving criteria more explicit.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，大语言模型在教育辅导场景中，任务解决能力并不等同于学习支持能力。通过分析公共基准测试，发现"解题导向"与"教学导向"的评估结果存在低相关性（0.421），部分模型排名发生显著变化。研究建议将两类指标分开报告，并强化对学生主体性和非泄露性引导的评估标准。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM辅导基准多侧重任务解决能力，但更强的解题能力未必意味着更好的教学支持。作者呼吁关注NLP系统在真实教育场景中的社会影响，并检验当前基准是否能区分"解题"与"教学"。
AI.method: 提出一种轻量级诊断方法，基于"解题导向"与"教学导向"基准性能之间的差距。使用MathTutorBench的公开排行榜数据，计算两组指标间的相关性，并分析排名变动。进一步通过TutorBench样本分析主动学习场景中评分标准对引导性提问、校准提示等教学行为的编码情况。
AI.result: 8个公开模型在解题与教学指标间的相关系数仅为0.421，多个模型在两类评估中排名显著不同。基准评分标准明确编码了体现学生主体性的教学行为，尤其在主动学习设置中。
AI.conclusion: 教育影响力评估不应将任务成功视为学习支持的充分代理指标。建议公共辅导基准应将解题导向与教学导向分数分开报告，并明确披露与非泄露性、保护学生主体性相关的评估标准。

title: Comparing Human Gaze and Vision-Language Model Attention in Safety-Relevant Environments
comment: 30 pages, 33 figures. Submitted as a preprint. Code and data available upon reasonable request
summary:
Human visual attention plays an important role in how people perceive and respond to environments containing potential risks. This study investigates whether large vision-language models can identify the same regions of a scene that attract human attention in safety-relevant environments. Eye-tracking data were collected from ten participants viewing 33 scene images representing environments with varying levels of potential risk using Pupil Invisible wearable glasses. Gaze coordinates were mapped onto stimulus images to generate population-averaged human gaze heatmaps. In parallel, GPT-4o was prompted through the OpenAI Vision Application Programming Interface (API) to generate spatial predictions of visual attention, which were converted into saliency maps for comparison with human gaze patterns.
  Spatial alignment between human gaze heatmaps and model-generated saliency maps was evaluated using four complementary metrics: Pearson correlation (r = 0.515 +- 0.117), Normalised Scanpath Saliency (NSS = 0.988 +- 0.323), Kullback-Leibler divergence (KL = 1.766 +- 0.844), and Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve using the Judd formulation (AUC-Judd = 0.806 +- 0.076). A cross-model comparison with Gemini Pro, Gemini Flash, and Claude showed that all models exceeded the AUC-Judd chance baseline of 0.5 and achieved positive NSS scores. Gemini Pro demonstrated the strongest spatial localisation according to three of the four metrics, whereas GPT-4o produced the closest distributional match to human attention as measured by KL divergence.
  These findings suggest that large vision-language models can identify regions that broadly correspond to where humans direct visual attention in safety-relevant scenes without requiring eye-tracking training data. The results highlight the potential of vision-language models as a scalable tool for approximating human attentional patterns.

AI.tldr: 本研究探究大型视觉语言模型（如GPT-4o、Gemini Pro等）能否在没有眼动追踪训练数据的情况下，识别出安全相关场景中吸引人类视觉注意的区域。通过比较人类注视热图与模型生成的显著性图，发现模型能够较好地近似人类注意力分布，其中Gemini Pro在空间定位上表现最优，GPT-4o在分布匹配上最佳。
AI.motivation: 人类视觉注意在风险感知中至关重要，但传统眼动追踪方法成本高、规模受限。本研究旨在探索视觉语言模型能否作为一种可扩展的工具，替代或补充眼动实验，用于预测安全相关环境中的人类注意力分布。
AI.method: 收集10名被试观看33张安全相关场景图像的眼动数据，生成群体平均注视热图；通过OpenAI Vision API提示GPT-4o生成空间注意力预测（显著性图）；使用皮尔逊相关系数、归一化扫描路径显著性（NSS）、KL散度和AUC-Judd四种指标评估对齐程度；并与Gemini Pro、Gemini Flash和Claude进行跨模型比较。
AI.result: GPT-4o与人类注视热图的空间对齐结果为：r=0.515±0.117, NSS=0.988±0.323, KL=1.766±0.844, AUC-Judd=0.806±0.076。所有模型均超过AUC-Judd基线0.5且NSS为正。Gemini Pro在三个指标上空间定位最强，GPT-4o在KL散度上分布匹配最佳。
AI.conclusion: 大型视觉语言模型无需眼动训练数据即可识别安全相关场景中与人类视觉注意大致对应的区域，展示了其作为可扩展工具近似人类注意力模式的潜力。

title: PVminerLLM2: Improving Structured Extraction of Patient Voice via Preference Optimization
summary:
Motivation: Patient-generated text contains critical information on patients' lived experiences, social context, and care engagement, but remains largely unstructured, limiting its use in patient-centered outcomes research. Prior work introduced the PV-Miner benchmark and PVMinerLLM models for structured extraction. However, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) alone struggles with rare, fine-grained, and unevenly distributed errors, particularly in token-critical structured outputs.
  Results: We present PVminerLLM2, an improved set of LLMs for structured patient voice extraction that applies preference optimization to address token-critical errors beyond the reach of supervised fine-tuning. Our method introduces (i) a preference objective with token-level gated stabilization term that prevents degradation of absolute token likelihood under preference optimization, and (ii) confusion-aware preference pair construction to better capture low-separation distinctions. We further incorporate token-importance weighting and inverse-frequency reweighing to address token imbalance and class skew. Across multiple model sizes, PVMinerLLM2 consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving gains of up to 4.43% (Code), 3.50% (Sub-code), and 1.55% (Span), and outperforms baseline LLM trained with existing preference optimization methods.
  Availability and Implementation: The supplementary material, code, evaluation scripts, and trained models for PVminerLLM2 are publicly available at: https://github.com/Data-Mining-Lab-Yale/PVminerLLM2

AI.tldr: 本文提出PVminerLLM2，通过偏好优化（含token级门控稳定项和混淆感知偏好对构建）改进结构化患者文本抽取，在Code/Sub-code/Span指标上分别提升4.43%/3.50%/1.55%。
AI.motivation: 患者生成文本蕴含丰富信息但缺乏结构化，现有SFT方法难以处理细粒度、分布不均的token级关键错误。
AI.method: 提出偏好优化框架：(i) token级门控稳定项防止偏好优化导致绝对似然退化；(ii) 混淆感知偏好对构建捕捉低区分度差异；(iii) token重要性加权与逆频率重加权处理类别不平衡。
AI.result: 在多种模型规模下，PVminerLLM2在Code、Sub-code、Span上分别提升4.43%、3.50%、1.55%，超越现有偏好优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 偏好优化能有效弥补SFT在token级关键错误上的不足，显著提升结构化患者语音抽取性能。

title: Sensor-Conditioned Representation Learning via Scene-Relevant Observation Quotients
summary: Learned representations in intelligent sensing systems are often evaluated by reconstruction fidelity or downstream prediction accuracy, but these criteria do not specify which latent distinctions are justified by the sensing process. In sensor-conditioned environments, nuisance factors can change measurements without changing the scene, while distinct scenes may be indistinguishable under limited sensing capability. This paper formulates sensor-conditioned representation correctness as preserving sensing-supported scene distinctions while suppressing nuisance-induced and sensor-unsupported variation. We introduce the scene-relevant observation quotient, a representation target induced by sensing-supported distinguishability after nuisance canonicalization, and develop Observation-Quotient Tucker-Structured Autoencoding (OQ-TSAE), a scene-nuisance factorized framework with diagnostics for false distinction, false merge, nuisance sensitivity, and latent ordering consistency. Experiments on a controlled benchmark show that quotient-consistent supervision improves representation-correctness diagnostics over reconstruction-oriented, metric-learning, and contrastive-learning baselines. Sensitivity, perturbation, and ablation studies show the importance of quotient-aligned supervision, reliable quotient relations, and quotient geometry. Complementary real-radar experiments show that a reconstruction-only OQ-TSAE variant retains competitive downstream utility, robustness under observation degradation, and low seed-to-seed variability. These results suggest that sensor-conditioned representations should be evaluated not only by predictive utility, but also by whether their latent geometry preserves sensing-justified scene distinctions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出传感器条件化表示的正确性应保持感知支持的场景区分、抑制 nuisance 和感知不支持的变化，并引入场景相关观测商（OQ）作为表示目标，开发了 OQ-TSAE 框架，实验证明商一致监督优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有表示学习评价标准（重建保真度、下游预测精度）无法指明哪些潜在区分是感知过程所合理的，需要形式化传感器条件化表示的正确性。
AI.method: 提出场景相关观测商（scene-relevant observation quotient），基于感知支持的区分性经 nuisance 规范化后诱导表示目标；开发 OQ-TSAE（Observation-Quotient Tucker-Structured Autoencoding）框架，包含场景- nuisance 因子化结构及假区分、假合并、nuisance 敏感性、潜在排序一致性等诊断指标。
AI.result: 在受控基准上，商一致监督优于重建、度量学习、对比学习基线；敏感性、扰动和消融实验证明了商对齐监督、可靠商关系及商几何的重要性；真实雷达实验中，纯重建 OQ-TSAE 变体仍保持竞争性下游效用、观测退化鲁棒性和低种子间变异性。
AI.conclusion: 传感器条件化表示不仅应通过预测效用评价，还应考察其潜在几何是否保持了感知合理的场景区分。

title: Show the Signal, Hide the Noise: Spectral Forcing for Pixel-Space Diffusion
summary: Pixel-space diffusion models are trained on full-bandwidth noisy images, yet the useful signal available to the denoiser is strongly frequency dependent. Under rectified-flow diffusion and natural-image power-law spectra, the per-band data-to-noise contour $k^{*}(t) = (1-t)^{-2/α}$ separates a signal-bearing low-frequency region from a noise-dominated high-frequency region at each time $t$. We show that this implicit coarse-to-fine structure is not merely descriptive: it induces a capacity-allocation problem. A standard pixel-space denoiser must discover the moving bandwidth boundary internally and can spend computation on frequency-time regions where the optimal prediction collapses to deterministic baselines rather than data-distribution modeling. To make this boundary explicit, we introduce Spectral Forcing, a parameter-free, time-conditional 2D-DCT low-pass operator applied to the noisy input before the patch embedder. Its cutoff expands monotonically with the diffusion time and becomes the identity at the data endpoint. Through controlled synthetic experiments, we identify the regime in which the operator is beneficial: coarse patch tokenization and data whose high-frequency content is predominantly noise rather than essential signal. On ImageNet-256 with JiT-700M/32, Spectral Forcing consistently improves both FID and Inception Score across different training epochs, demonstrating robust gains throughout training; at finer tokenization, the spectral forcing is still competitive. We further insert the unchanged operator into SenseNova-U1, a unified text-to-image model, where it improves DPG-Bench and GenEval, showing that the input-side spectral prior transfers beyond class-conditional generation. These results suggest a route to capacity-efficient pixel-space diffusion by showing the signal and hiding the noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Spectral Forcing方法，在像素空间扩散模型的输入侧施加时间条件化的2D-DCT低通滤波，显式分离信号主导的低频区域和噪声主导的高频区域，从而解决标准去噪器需内部学习移动带宽边界导致的容量分配问题。该方法在ImageNet-256和SenseNova-U1上均取得一致的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 像素空间扩散模型中，有用信号与噪声在频域上的分布高度不均匀：低频以信号为主，高频以噪声为主。标准去噪器需要内部学习这个随扩散时间变化的频带边界，却将计算资源浪费在那些最优预测退化为确定性基线的频率-时间区域上，而非真正用于数据分布建模。作者希望显式利用这一隐式粗到细结构来解决容量分配问题。
AI.method: 提出Spectral Forcing，一种无参数的、时间条件化的2D-DCT低通算子。在噪声输入进入patch嵌入器之前，施加该低通滤波，其截止频率随扩散时间单调扩展，在数据端点退化为恒等映射。通过该算子显式分离信号和噪声频带，使去噪器专注于真正的数据建模。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-256上（JiT-700M/32），Spectral Forcing在不同训练轮次下一致提升FID和Inception Score；在更细粒度的token化下仍保持竞争力。在统一文生图模型SenseNova-U1上，DPG-Bench和GenEval指标均有提升，表明该方法可迁移至类别条件生成之外的场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过输入侧的频谱先验显式分离信号和噪声，可以有效提升像素空间扩散模型的容量效率，为构建更高效的扩散模型提供了一条可行路径。

title: Long-Context Modeling via GSS-Transformer Hybrid Architecture with Learnable Mixing
summary: Modeling long-range dependencies remains a central challenge in natural language processing. Transformer architectures achieve strong performance via self-attention but scale quadratically ($O(N^2)$) with sequence length, while State Space Models (SSMs) scale linearly ($O(N)$) but suffer from a selective recall bottleneck, struggling to retrieve precise information from compressed states. This creates a fundamental tradeoff between efficiency and perplexity. To tackle these challenges, we propose the \textit{Parallel Hybrid Architecture (PHA)}, which runs Gated State Spaces (GSS), Grouped Query Attention (GQA), and Feed-Forward Networks (FFNs) as independent parallel branches fused by a learnable mixing mechanism. Instead of forcing SSMs to approximate attention or serializing the two paradigms, PHA allows each branch to specialize: GSS captures global context, while attention performs selective retrieval, with FFN providing complementary processing. On WikiText-103, PHA achieves 16.51 PPL at 125M parameters, outperforming Hedgehog (16.70) and H3-125M (23.70). Scaling to 180M parameters yields 16.42 PPL, which gives comparable results with the pure attention baseline while delivering 24\% higher throughput and up to 40\% lower memory usage at long contexts. On OpenWebText, our 125M model achieves 19.72 PPL, outperforming standard Transformers (20.60) and GSS hybrid baselines (19.80). These results demonstrate that separating sequence modeling paradigms into parallel specialists enables Transformer-level perplexity with substantially improved efficiency for long-context language modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出Parallel Hybrid Architecture (PHA)，通过并行运行Gated State Spaces、Grouped Query Attention和FFN三个独立分支并融合，在保持Transformer级困惑度的同时显著提升长序列效率。
AI.motivation: Transformer的O(N²)复杂度与SSM的O(N)但选择性召回瓶颈之间存在根本性权衡，需设计兼顾高效与低困惑度的架构。
AI.method: PHA将GSS（全局上下文）、GQA（选择性检索）和FFN（互补处理）作为三个独立并行分支运行，并通过可学习的混合机制进行融合，而非串行化或强制近似。
AI.result: 125M参数：WikiText-103上16.51 PPL（优于Hedgehog 16.70和H3 23.70）；180M参数：16.42 PPL（与纯注意力基线相当），吞吐量提升24%，长上下文内存降低40%。OpenWebText上19.72 PPL优于Transformer 20.60和GSS混合基线19.80。
AI.conclusion: 将序列建模范式分离为并行专家分支，能够在保持Transformer级困惑度的同时大幅提升长上下文语言建模效率。

title: Latent Thought Flow: Efficient Latent Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly rely on intermediate reasoning, yet explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) suffers from a linguistic space bottleneck: each thought must be decoded into tokens, causing high inference overhead. Latent reasoning moves deliberation into continuous space, but existing methods mostly learn deterministic or reward-maximizing paths, lacking a principled way to allocate probability across trajectories with different correctness and costs. We propose Latent Thought Flow (LTF), which models reasoning as variable-length continuous trajectories and trains a sampler to match a reward-induced posterior over answer quality and computation cost. We instantiate this with a continuous GFlowNet using stochastic latent transitions. To handle sparse answer supervision, we introduce an Entropy-Weighted Subtrajectory Balance objective for intermediate rewards and a reference-prior regularizer to anchor exploration. Experiments under finetuning and transfer learning settings show that LTF outperforms explicit CoT and latent reasoning baselines, improving accuracy by 9.5% while reducing reasoning length by 27.2% on average compared with strong latent reasoning baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出Latent Thought Flow (LTF)，一种在连续空间中建模推理为可变长度轨迹的方法，通过GFlowNet学习后验分布，在提升9.5%准确率的同时将推理长度减少27.2%。
AI.motivation: 显式CoT受限于语言空间瓶颈，每个推理步骤需解码为token导致高推理开销；现有隐式推理方法缺乏在正确性和计算成本之间分配概率的原则性方式。
AI.method: 将推理建模为连续空间中的变长轨迹，使用连续GFlowNet训练采样器匹配奖励诱导的后验分布；引入Entropy-Weighted Subtrajectory Balance目标处理稀疏答案监督，并采用reference-prior regularizer约束探索。
AI.result: 相比强隐式推理基线，准确率提升9.5%，推理长度减少27.2%。
AI.conclusion: LTF在微调和迁移学习两种设置下均优于显式CoT和现有隐式推理方法，验证了在连续空间中通过原则性概率分配进行推理的有效性。

title: SPARK: Spatial Policy-driven Adaptive Reinforcement learning for Knowledge distillation
summary: Low-bit quantization enables deployment of image restoration (IR) networks on resource-constrained devices, but introduces rounding noise that disproportionately degrades high-frequency regions such as edges and fine textures. Existing knowledge distillation (KD) methods apply distillation signals uniformly across all spatial locations, overlooking the varying reconstruction difficulty across image regions. To address this, we propose SPARK (Spatial Policy-driven Adaptive Reinforcement Learning for Knowledge Distillation), a framework that adaptively allocates distillation effort using a lightweight reinforcement learning (RL) policy network. At each training step, a difficulty feature extractor computes four signals, namely Laplacian variance, pixel variance, student reconstruction error, and teacher-student knowledge gap, which are fed into a compact policy CNN that produces a stochastic spatial weight map to modulate the KD loss during quantization-aware training (QAT). SPARK is IR task-agnostic, adds no inference cost, and integrates into any existing QAT pipeline without architectural changes. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that SPARK consistently outperforms PTQ, QAT, and state-of-the-art (SOTA) KD approaches across multiple student architectures, achieving reconstruction quality closest to the full-precision teacher under significant computational constraints.

AI.tldr: SPARK是一个基于强化学习的空间自适应知识蒸馏框架，通过策略网络动态生成空间权重图，指导低比特量化下的图像恢复网络训练，在不增加推理成本的前提下显著提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 低比特量化虽能降低计算开销，但引入的舍入噪声会不均匀地损害图像高频区域（如边缘和纹理），而现有知识蒸馏方法对所有空间位置采用统一的蒸馏信号，忽视了不同区域重建难度的差异性。
AI.method: 提出SPARK框架：1）轻量级难度特征提取器计算拉普拉斯方差、像素方差、学生重建误差和师生知识差距四个信号；2）紧凑策略CNN生成随机空间权重图；3）在量化感知训练（QAT）中利用该权重图调制KD损失，实现自适应蒸馏。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，SPARK在多种学生架构下一致优于PTQ、QAT及最先进的KD方法，在显著计算约束下达到最接近全精度教师模型的重建质量。
AI.conclusion: SPARK是IR任务无关的框架，无需架构修改即可集成到任何现有QAT流程中，且不增加推理成本，有效解决了低比特量化下图像恢复的空间不均匀退化问题。

title: Towards Pareto-Optimal Tool-Integrated Agents with Pareto Ranking Policy Optimization
summary: Recent advances in tool-integrated language agents have significantly improved their ability to solve complex reasoning tasks. However, existing alignment methods predominantly focus on maximizing task accuracy, while overlooking auxiliary objectives such as tool-use efficiency, which are essential for practical deployment. To address this gap, we introduce ParetoPO, a two-stage multi-objective optimization framework for aligning tool-using large language models (LLMs) under competing objectives. In the first stage, ParetoPO leverages hypervolume-guided dynamic scalarization to adapt reward weights based on global Pareto frontier progress. In the second stage, it replaces scalarized learning signals with Pareto-ranking-based advantage computation, promoting nondominated trajectories through dominance-aware credit assignment. This design enables fine-grained, action-level optimization across multiple conflicting objectives. Experimental results on mathematic reasoning and multi-hop QA tasks show that ParetoPO consistently discovers policies with superior accuracy-efficiency trade-offs compared to static and heuristic baselines.

AI.tldr: ParetoPO是一个两阶段多目标优化框架，用于对齐使用工具的大语言模型，在准确性和效率之间实现更好的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有工具集成语言智能体的对齐方法主要关注最大化任务准确率，忽视了工具使用效率等辅助目标，而这些在实际部署中至关重要。
AI.method: 第一阶段利用超体积引导的动态标量化，基于全局帕累托前沿进展自适应调整奖励权重；第二阶段用基于帕累托排名的优势计算替代标量化学习信号，通过优势感知的信用分配促进非支配轨迹。
AI.result: 在数学推理和多跳问答任务上，ParetoPO相比静态和启发式基线方法，能够持续发现具有更优准确率-效率权衡的策略。
AI.conclusion: ParetoPO通过帕累托最优思想实现了多目标对齐，能够对多个冲突目标进行细粒度的动作级优化。

title: SpecAlign: Efficient Specification-Grounded Alignment of Large Language Models via Synthetic Data
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, alignment is no longer governed by a single universal notion of safety or helpfulness, but instead by provider- or application-specific model specifications. These specifications are typically long, structured, and frequently updated, yet existing alignment pipelines lack a systematic mechanism to operationalize them as training signals. In this paper, we propose specification-grounded alignment, a new alignment paradigm that treats provider-authored model specifications as the primary alignment target rather than abstract principles or static benchmarks. To instantiate this paradigm, we introduce SpecAlign, a framework that synthesizes alignment data directly from specification documents. SpecAlign combines structured rule annotation, controllable specification instantiation, and multi-agent adversarial data synthesis to generate fine-grained, boundary-aware preference pairs that capture both compliant behaviors and meaningful specification violations. Experiments across multiple model specifications and backbone models demonstrate that training with SpecAlign consistently improves rule compliance while preserving general capabilities and avoiding over-conservative behavior. These results suggest that grounding alignment in explicit model specifications enables rapid, precise, and scalable adaptation of LLM behavior to evolving policy requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的对齐范式——基于规范的对齐（specification-grounded alignment），并实现SpecAlign框架，能从模型规范文档中自动生成细粒度的偏好数据，提升大语言模型对复杂、结构化规则的遵循能力。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法依赖抽象原则或静态基准，无法系统性地处理供应商或应用特定的、长篇幅、结构化且频繁更新的模型规范文档。
AI.method: SpecAlign框架结合了结构化规则标注、可控规范实例化和多智能体对抗数据合成三个模块，从规范文档中生成细粒度、边界感知的偏好对，涵盖合规行为和有意义的违规行为。
AI.result: 在多种模型规范和骨干模型上的实验表明，SpecAlign训练持续提升了规则遵循能力，同时保持了一般能力，避免了过度保守的行为。
AI.conclusion: 将对齐过程锚定于明确的模型规范，能够实现对大语言模型行为的快速、精确、可扩展的适配，以应对不断变化的策略需求。

title: Landmark-free Assessment of Lower-limb Alignment with Implicit Neural Shape Functions from Knee Radiographs
summary: Radiographic assessment of lower-limb alignment (LLA) is important for predicting joint health and surgical outcomes in total knee arthroplasty. Traditional measurement methods are manual and time-consuming, while recent machine learning approaches typically rely on locating a fixed set of anatomical landmarks. This dependence limits flexibility and may require re-annotation when clinical definitions change. To address this, we propose an automated workflow using Implicit Neural Shape Functions (INSF). Rather than relying on explicit landmark coordinates, we encode the anatomy into a compact latent space and regress clinical alignment measurements directly from these latent codes. This architecture allows for rapid extendability to new tasks without altering the backbone representation. We trained our method on an internal dataset of 566 knee radiographs, each annotated with the outline of the femur and tibia. We evaluated it on both an internal test dataset of 50 patients and a separate external set of 402 preoperative cases from the MRKR dataset. Manual clinical measurements are available for these data, and the MRKR measurements will be made publicly accessible. Performance was comparable to state-of-the-art landmark-based methods and manual agreement, while offering a flexible shape representation that can be extended to additional measurement tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式神经形状函数（INSF）的自动化下肢力线对齐（LLA）评估方法，通过将解剖结构编码到紧凑潜在空间并直接回归临床测量值，避免了传统依赖于固定解剖标志点的局限性，在内外数据集上取得了与现有方法及人工标注相当的精度，且具备良好的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 传统LLA测量依赖人工耗时标注，而现有机器学习方法基于固定解剖标志点，灵活性差，临床定义变化时需重新标注。因此，作者希望提出一种不依赖固定标志点、灵活可扩展的自动化测量方案。
AI.method: 利用隐式神经形状函数（INSF）编码股骨和胫骨的轮廓形状，将解剖结构映射到紧凑的潜在空间，然后从潜在编码中直接回归临床对齐测量值，无需显式定位和解剖标志点。
AI.result: 在内部566张膝关节X光片训练，50例内部测试集和402例外部MRKR数据集上评估，性能与最先进的基于标志点的方法及人工标注一致性相当。
AI.conclusion: INSF方法提供了一种灵活的形状表示，可避免对固定解剖标志点的依赖，并易于扩展到其他测量任务，为临床LLA评估提供了一种高效且可推广的自动化方案。

title: AuAu: A Benchmark for Auditing Authoritarian Alignment in Large Language Models
summary: The worldwide surge of authoritarianism, combined with the increasing central role in users' everyday lives, raises the question of to what extent specific models exhibit or promote authoritarian attitudes and characteristics. We introduce AuAu, a comprehensive benchmark that aims to assess the risk of LLMs generating responses with authoritarian tendencies. This benchmark combines three evaluation approaches: (i) psychometric questions from an extensive pool of 15 human validated instruments; (ii) contextual behavior vignettes probing intended actions in concrete situations; and (iii) responses to realistic user prompts. Unlike prior work, AuAu evaluates not only a general closeness towards authoritarianism but also the established sub-concepts Authoritarian Aggression, Authoritarian Submission, and Conventionalism. Evaluating 17 models from China, the EU, Russia, and the USA, we find that all tested models exhibit substantial authoritarian response rates under the psychometric evaluation, though rates drop significantly in increasingly more realistic downstream task. We further find that an authoritarian system prompt easily manipulates 15 out of 17 models to promote increased authoritarianism. Our results underscore the need for continued, systematic auditing of LLM-based AI systems to detect and ultimately mitigate undesired authoritarian tendencies in generated output. Our code and data are available at: https://github.com/andreaseinwiller/AuAu

AI.tldr: 本文提出AuAu基准测试，评估大语言模型生成具有威权主义倾向内容的风险。通过心理测量问卷、情境行为测试和真实用户提示三种方法，测试了来自中国、欧盟、俄罗斯和美国的17个模型。结果显示所有模型在心理测量评估中均表现出显著威权倾向，但在更真实的场景中比例下降。此外，威权系统提示可轻易操纵15/17个模型输出更多威权内容。
AI.motivation: 全球威权主义浪潮兴起，加之LLM在用户日常生活中日益核心化，引发了对特定模型是否展现或促进威权态度和特征的问题关注。现有研究缺乏系统性评估框架。
AI.method: 构建AuAu综合基准，包含三种评估方法：1) 15个人类验证的心理测量工具；2) 情境行为测试（具体情境下的意图行为）；3) 真实用户提示响应。评估来自中、欧盟、俄、美的17个模型，并测试威权系统提示的影响。
AI.result: 所有模型在心理测量评估中均表现出显著威权响应率；在更真实的下游任务中威权响应率显著下降；威权系统提示可轻易操纵15/17个模型提升威权输出。
AI.conclusion: 研究凸显了对LLM AI系统进行持续、系统审计的必要性，以检测并最终减轻生成输出中不期望的威权主义倾向。

title: State-Grounded Multi-Agent Synthetic Data Generation for Tool-Augmented LLMs
summary: Training tool-augmented LLM agents requires large corpora of multi-turn, tool-grounded conversational data that is expensive to annotate, privacy-constrained in production settings, and largely absent from public datasets. We present StateGen, a synthetic data generation platform that produces scored, reasoning-trace-rich training conversations by orchestrating a four-role LLM loop: a persona-conditioned user simulator, an agent under test, a state-grounded tool simulator, and a multi-axis LLM judge. The key architectural contribution is an authoritative state manager that maintains a structured world-state object across turns, enforcing a backend-is-truth invariant that eliminates the dominant class of tool-call hallucinations by construction. StateGen extends naturally to hierarchical multi-agent settings by declaring sub-agents as tools, all sharing a single state object. We report results on 64,698 evaluated conversations across three production corpora: tool-call hallucination scores reach 9.66/10, the system supports persona-driven variation via a 23-dimensional trait vector, and a cleanly separated train and golden evaluation set split confirms the data is not memorization bait (per-criterion gap analysis). Comparison with eight external systems shows that no single publicly available platform combines multi-turn generation, state-grounded tool simulation, hierarchical multi-agent support, and built-in judge scoring.

AI.tldr: StateGen是一个合成数据生成平台，通过四角色LLM循环和权威状态管理器，自动生成多轮、带工具调用、含推理轨迹的训练对话数据，有效消除工具调用幻觉，支持分层多智能体扩展。
AI.motivation: 训练工具增强型LLM代理需要大量多轮、带工具调用的对话数据，但这类数据人工标注成本高、生产环境隐私受限、公开数据集缺乏，现有系统无法同时满足多轮生成、状态接地工具模拟、分层多智能体支持和内置评判打分。
AI.method: 提出StateGen平台，核心是四角色LLM循环（用户模拟器、被测试代理、状态接地工具模拟器、多轴LLM评判器）加权威状态管理器，后者维护结构化世界状态对象，强制执行后端即真实（backend-is-truth）不变性，从构造上消除工具调用幻觉；通过将子代理声明为工具共享同一状态对象，自然扩展到分层多智能体场景。
AI.result: 在64,698条生产对话上评估：工具调用幻觉评分达9.66/10；支持23维特征向量驱动人物角色变化；训练集与黄金评估集分离良好，非记忆诱饵；与8个外部系统对比，无单一公开平台能同时提供多轮生成、状态接地工具模拟、分层多智能体支持和内置评判打分。
AI.conclusion: StateGen有效解决了工具增强型LLM训练数据匮乏和幻觉问题，在数据质量、角色多样性、系统完整性方面优于现有方案，是首个同时具备多轮合成、状态接地、分层扩展和自动评判的综合数据生成平台。

title: Focus, Align, and Sustain: Counteracting Gradient Dilution in Incremental Object Detection
summary: Adapting Detection Transformers to Incremental Object Detection (IOD) poses a systemic challenge, as set-based optimization is inherently destabilized by sequential learning. In this work, we identify Gradient Dilution as the root cause of performance degradation, wherein optimization signals required to preserve old knowledge are progressively weakened. This phenomenon manifests as a cascading erosion of preservation gradients in magnitude, direction, and support coverage, driven by three tightly coupled factors: Signal Dispersion, where foreground gradients are overwhelmed by background noise; Assignment Drift, where stochastic query-target matching induces inconsistent gradient trajectories; and Support Attrition, where gradients from retained samples insufficiently cover the old-class feature space, weakening decision boundaries under interference from new classes. To counteract this, we propose FAS, a unified framework that Focuses, Aligns, and Sustains gradient flow throughout incremental learning. Specifically, we introduce prior-injected queries to focus discriminative signals by filtering background interference at the source. We further propose deterministic anchor distillation to align query-target assignments and enforce semantic consistency across stages under unstable matching. Finally, we devise manifold-support replay to sustain distributional support of old classes, counteracting representational erosion induced by continual updates. Extensive experiments show that FAS restores robust optimization dynamics and outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving over 5.0 AP improvement in the challenging 40+10x4 incremental setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAS框架，通过聚焦（Focus）、对齐（Align）、维持（Sustain）梯度流来解决增量目标检测中由梯度稀释（Gradient Dilution）导致的性能退化问题，在40+10x4设置下AP提升超5.0。
AI.motivation: 现有Detection Transformers在增量目标检测中性能严重退化，作者将根本原因归结为梯度稀释（Gradient Dilution），即旧知识所需的优化信号在增量学习中被逐步削弱。
AI.method: 提出FAS统一框架：（1）先验注入查询（prior-injected queries）过滤背景干扰以聚焦判别信号；（2）确定性锚点蒸馏（deterministic anchor distillation）对齐查询-目标分配，确保跨阶段语义一致性；（3）流形支持回放（manifold-support replay）维持旧类分布支持，抵御表征侵蚀。
AI.result: 大量实验表明FAS恢复了鲁棒的优化动态，在40+10x4增量设置下AP提升超过5.0，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FAS框架通过系统性地解决梯度稀释的三个耦合因素（信号分散、分配漂移、支持衰减），有效恢复了增量学习中的优化动态，为基于Transformer的增量目标检测提供了有效方案。

title: XAI-Grounded Explanation Generation for Speech Deepfake Detection with Training-Free Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Speech deepfake detection (SDD) systems require trustworthy explanations for reliable decision-making. Existing explanation ways mainly fall into two categories. Traditional explainable AI (XAI), such as gradient-based attribution, produces low-level attribution signals tightly coupled with model decisions, and harder to be understood by human than natural language explanations. Meanwhile, large language model (LLM)-based explanation generation often produces generic and ungrounded descriptions due to the lack of heuristic evidence and task-specific supervision, stemming from limited grounded explanation datasets for SDD. We therefore propose a training-free explanation framework that integrates XAI evidence with multimodal LLMs to generate grounded and specific explanations. Using the PartialSpoof dataset, we construct a grounded explanation dataset and show that methods with XAI increase inside accuracy by over 45\%, verified through human evaluation and faithfulness checks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的解释框架，结合可解释AI（XAI）证据与多模态大语言模型（LLM），为语音深度伪造检测（SDD）生成基于证据的、具体且可信的解释。在PartialSpoof数据集上，该方法将内部准确率提升了超过45%，并通过人工评估和忠实性检查验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有SDD解释方法存在两类问题：传统XAI（如梯度归因）产生的低级归因信号难以被人类理解；基于LLM的解释生成因缺乏启发式证据和任务特定监督，往往产生通用且无根据的描述。因此需要一种能结合XAI证据与LLM能力、生成基于证据且具体解释的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种无需训练的解释框架，将XAI生成的归因证据（如梯度信号）与多模态大语言模型相结合，利用XAI证据引导LLM生成基于证据的、具体的自然语言解释。使用PartialSpoof数据集构建了基于证据的解释数据集。
AI.result: 在PartialSpoof数据集上，结合XAI的方法将内部准确率提升了超过45%，并通过人工评估和忠实性检查验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该训练-free框架有效整合了XAI的忠实性与LLM的表达能力，为语音深度伪造检测提供了更可信、更易理解的解释方案，解决了现有方法中解释可理解性与证据基础之间的矛盾。

title: Architectural Wisdom: A Framework for Governing Optimization in AI Systems
summary: Modern AI systems exhibit structural failures that capability scaling alone does not reliably fix: they optimize under-specified objectives with no architectural mechanism to question whether the objective should be optimized at all. Engagement maximization can amplify harmful pathways; tool-using agents can commit irreversible actions; preference-trained language models can become sycophantic. We argue that this failure is a wisdom problem, not an intelligence problem. We use "wisdom" in a deliberately architectural sense, not as a claim about virtue, consciousness, or moral omniscience. Intelligence accepts a goal and optimizes within it; wisdom interrogates whether the goal should be optimized at all. The two are separable architectural properties. We propose architectural wisdom as a corrigible objective-governance layer above the optimization substrate. The layer makes three structural commitments explicit and nondegenerate before any action: temporal horizon, relational boundary, and irreversibility. It is realized by four components (Structural Utility Transform, Moral Admissibility Interface, Arbitration and Escalation Controller, Value Revision Channel) that compute a six-coordinate wisdom tuple over horizon, relational coverage, irreversibility, admissibility, value revision, and auditability. We motivate the architecture by eight cases drawn from contemporary AI failures, secular wisdom traditions, and hard ethical situations, and defend the distinction against the intelligence-completeness thesis using goal-questioning over goal-taking, Bostrom's orthogonality, structural separation in our exemplar cases, and persistent failure modes despite capability scaling. The framework is the conceptual contract for a larger architecture whose formal specifications and empirical validation are developed in subsequent work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI系统的失败本质上是智慧（wisdom）问题而非智能（intelligence）问题，并设计了一个可纠正的目标治理架构，通过四个组件计算六维智慧元组，在行动前明确约束时间视野、关系边界和不可逆性。
AI.motivation: 现代AI系统存在结构性失败：能力扩展无法可靠修复目标模糊、奖励滥用（如推荐系统放大有害内容）、工具代理不可逆行动、语言模型谄媚等问题。其根源是AI缺少质疑目标是否应被优化的架构机制。
AI.method: 提出架构智慧（architectural wisdom）作为可纠正的目标治理层，置于优化基座之上。包含四个组件：结构效用变换、道德可接受性接口、仲裁与升级控制器、价值修订通道。输出六维智慧元组：时间视野、关系覆盖率、不可逆性、可接受性、价值修订、可审计性。
AI.result: 通过八个当代AI失败案例、世俗智慧传统和伦理困境进行动机验证，反驳了智能完备性论题（intelligence-completeness thesis），论证目标质疑与目标接受的可分离性、Bostrom正交性、能力扩展下持续性失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架是更大架构的概念蓝图，后续工作将进行形式化规范与实证验证。

title: Trusted Multi-View Deep Learning Classification of Fetal Congenital Heart Disease with Feature-level and Decision-level Fusion
summary: Congenital heart disease (CHD) refers to the abnormal anatomical structure caused by the abnormal development of the heart and great vessels during embryonic development. Traditional diagnostics often fail to achieve high accuracy and efficiency, especially given the complexity of cardiac anatomy. This study presents a specialized multi-view deep learning framework for CHD binary classification using echocardiographic images. A large-scale CHD dataset, including five views, was used to train the model, enabling it to integrate multi-angle image data. The framework utilizes advanced feature extraction and attention mechanisms to improve diagnostic precision and reliability. An uncertainty-based decision-making component is also integrated to handle low-quality images, enhancing diagnostic outcomes. Experimental results show that this method achieves top-tier performance on our dataset and provides a robust tool for early CHD detection, underscoring its potential for clinical use. The dataset and source code will be released upon paper acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多视角深度学习框架的先天性心脏病（CHD）超声图像二分类方法，利用五视图数据、特征提取与注意力机制，并结合不确定性决策模块，在大型数据集上实现了优异的诊断性能，为临床早期检测提供了有力工具。
AI.motivation: 传统诊断方法在先天性心脏病检测中准确率和效率不高，尤其面对心脏解剖结构的复杂性，亟需一种更精准、可靠的自动化诊断方法。
AI.method: 构建了一个多视角深度学习框架，使用包含五个视图的大规模CHD超声数据集进行训练，集成特征提取与注意力机制，并加入基于不确定性的决策模块以处理低质量图像。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法在数据集上达到了顶级性能，能够有效进行早期CHD检测。
AI.conclusion: 该多视角深度学习框架在CHD二分类任务中表现优异，具备临床应用潜力，数据集与源代码将在论文接收后公开。

title: GRACE: Step-Level Benchmark for Faithful Reasoning over Context
summary: Many reasoning tasks require models to reason over input context, from document-grounded question answering to rule-based deduction. Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting produces traces that appear transparent, yet individual steps can silently deviate from the source evidence, even when the final answer is correct. Existing methods detect hallucinations at the response level but fail to identify where in the chain a failure occurs or what type it is. We introduce GRACE, the first human-annotated step-level faithfulness benchmark with a data-driven error taxonomy for context-grounded textual reasoning. GRACE covers CoT traces from 10 models across 4 source datasets, with each step annotated for faithfulness, error category, and natural language explanation. A data-driven taxonomy, discovered bottom-up via unsupervised clustering, organizes failures into two tracks: GRACE-Inference (deductive errors) and GRACE-Grounding (factual grounding errors), with four categories each. The evaluation set is human-annotated and challenging by design. Our experiments reveal substantial headroom for current models. In addition, integrating step-level faithfulness signals into reinforcement learning pipelines improves both downstream accuracy and reasoning reliability.

AI.tldr: GRACE是首个面向上下文推理的步骤级忠实度基准，包含人工标注的CoT推理链错误分类（推理错误与事实接地错误各4类），实验表明现有模型在此基准上表现不足，而将步骤级忠实度信号融入强化学习可提升准确性与推理可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT提示虽然表面透明，但中间步骤可能悄然偏离源证据，而现有方法只能在响应层面检测幻觉，无法定位链条中具体出错位置及错误类型。
AI.method: 构建GRACE基准：涵盖10个模型在4个源数据集上的CoT轨迹，每步标注忠实度、错误类别及自然语言解释；通过无监督聚类自下而上发现错误分类体系（推理错误与事实接地错误各4类）。
AI.result: 实验表明现有模型在该基准上存在显著提升空间；将步骤级忠实度信号整合到强化学习流程中，可同时提升下游准确性与推理可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 步骤级忠实度评估对提升推理链可靠性至关重要，GRACE为后续研究提供了细粒度的评估标准与改进方向。

title: AdaSTORM: Scaling LLM Reasoning on Dynamic Graphs via Adaptive Spatio-Temporal Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable potential in dynamic graph reasoning, but suffer from a scaling bottleneck: current models can only handle graphs with tens of nodes, constrained by exponential reasoning overhead and finite context windows. While multi-agent systems (MAS) offer collective reasoning and topology-aware orchestration, capabilities naturally suited for graph-structured tasks, their application to dynamic graphs remains unexplored. This paper presents Scaling LLM Reasoning on Dynamic Graphs via Adaptive Spatio-Temporal Multi-Agent Collaboration (AdaSTORM), a framework that reformulates large-scale dynamic graph reasoning into two stages: (i) Adaptive Partitioning, partitioning large-scale dynamic graphs into subregions that match the model's reasoning capacity while minimizing inference cost; and (ii) Collaborative Reasoning, aligning graph partition topologies with a spatio-temporal decoupled multi-agent architecture. AdaSTORM is the first multi-agent framework tailored for dynamic graph reasoning. Extensive experiments show that AdaSTORM successfully breaks through the scaling bottleneck, scaling reasoning to thousand-node graphs with over 90% accuracy across several large-scale dynamic graph settings without external tools, significantly outperforms seven competitive baselines. Furthermore, it achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on existing benchmarks and generalizes robustly to real-world datasets. The source code is available at: https://github.com/irisorchid107/AdaSTORM/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaSTORM，一种自适应的时空多智能体协作框架，将大规模动态图推理分解为自适应划分和协作推理两阶段，突破了大模型在处理动态图时的规模瓶颈，能在千节点图上达到90%以上准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在动态图推理中受限于指数级推理开销和有限上下文窗口，只能处理数十个节点的图；多智能体系统虽天然适合图结构任务，但尚未被应用于动态图。因此需要一种能突破规模瓶颈的、面向动态图的多智能体推理框架。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：(1) 自适应划分——将大规模动态图划分为与模型推理能力匹配的子区域，同时最小化推理成本；(2) 协作推理——将图划分拓扑与时空解耦的多智能体架构对齐，实现结构化协同推理。
AI.result: 成功将推理规模拓展至千节点图，在多个大规模动态图设定下准确率超90%，无需外部工具，显著超越7个强基线模型；在现有基准上达到SOTA，并能在真实世界数据集上鲁棒泛化。
AI.conclusion: AdaSTORM是首个面向动态图推理的多智能体框架，有效突破了LLM在动态图上的规模瓶颈，验证了多智能体协同与图结构任务结合的可行性与优越性。

title: MamBOA: State-Space Architecture for Video Recognition
summary: Fine-grained action recognition demands temporal reasoning that general-purpose architectures address through different cost-accuracy tradeoffs: 3D dense operators couple computation to the input volume, while difference-based methods approximate motion through rigid, hand-crafted subtraction of uncontextualized features - each reflecting a deliberate design choice with corresponding limitations in expressiveness or flexibility. We present MamBOA, a backbone-agnostic temporal framework built upon a novel interleaved scan structure that recasts the selective state-space recurrence (S6) as a native motion synthesizer. By interleaving consecutive feature representations extracted from a pretrained backbone into a single alternating sequence, the proposed scan structurally drives the recurrence to encode both temporal observations of each position within a shared hidden state, separated by only a single decay step - rendering the inter-frame transition an intrinsic component of the state dynamics rather than an externally computed quantity. A cascade of dedicated alignment and decoding operations then distills this joint encoding into an explicit motion representation, which a dual-path pooling mechanism adaptively aggregates by balancing attention-driven selection with uniform temporal coverage. The framework interfaces seamlessly with CNN, Transformer, and Mamba backbone families, adding only ~2.1 GFLOPs per feature pair. On Diving48, MamBOA achieves 85.02% Top-1 accuracy with an image-pretrained backbone and 86.24% with a video-pretrained backbone processing the entire video in a single forward pass - demonstrating that structurally induced state-space dynamics constitute a principled and general foundation for motion modeling.

AI.tldr: MamBOA是一个与骨干网络无关的时序动作识别框架，利用交错扫描结构将状态空间模型(S6)重塑为运动合成器，通过交织连续帧特征使帧间过渡成为状态动力学的内在组成部分，在Diving48上达到85.02%-86.24%的Top-1准确率，仅增加约2.1 GFLOPs。
AI.motivation: 现有细粒度动作识别方法存在权衡：3D稠密算子的计算量与输入体积耦合，而差分方法通过手工设计的无上下文特征减法近似运动，各有表达力或灵活性的局限。作者希望提出一种将状态空间递归作为原生运动合成器的通用框架，解决这些局限。
AI.method: 提出MamBOA框架，核心是交错扫描(Interleaved Scan)结构：将连续帧特征交织为交替序列，驱动S6状态空间递归在同一隐藏状态中编码相邻帧的时间观测；通过级联的对齐与解码操作提取显式运动表示；采用双路径池化机制在注意力选择和均匀时序覆盖间自适应聚合。
AI.result: 在Diving48上，MamBOA使用图像预训练骨干达85.02% Top-1准确率，视频预训练骨干达86.24%。框架与CNN、Transformer、Mamba骨干无缝对接，仅增加约2.1 GFLOPs/特征对。
AI.conclusion: 结构诱导的状态空间动力学为运动建模提供了有原则且通用的基础，MamBOA证明了S6递归可以作为原生运动合成器，且该框架具有良好的骨干无关性和计算效率。

title: Weaving Multi-Source Evidence for Biomedical Reasoning: The BioMedHop Benchmark and BioWeave Framework
summary: Biomedical question answering (QA) increasingly requires reasoning over interacting entities, where supporting evidence is scattered across biomedical knowledge graphs, literature documents, and web-accessible resources. However, existing biomedical QA benchmarks mainly focus on exam-style knowledge, literature comprehension, or short-range multi-hop inference, leaving source-conditioned graph reasoning and evidence topology construction underexplored. To fill this gap, we introduce BioMedHop, a multi-source graph-grounded benchmark for evaluating biomedical reasoning over structured evidence topologies. BioMedHop contains 10,045 instances across KG, document, web, and hybrid evidence settings, covering shared-neighbor matching, intersection reasoning, path-based reasoning, and counting, with option-based, open-ended, and numeric count renderings. To support this benchmark, we further propose BioWeave, a source-aware reasoning framework that retrieves biomedical KG paths, gathers supporting clues from documents and web sources, assembles them into a unified evidence graph, and verifies answers through entity-level evidence support. Comprehensive experiments show that BioWeave achieves the best overall performance among compared methods on BioMedHop, outperforming the strong hybrid baseline ToG-2 by 10.5% in the overall average. Moreover, BioWeave consistently improves different LLM backbones and enables smaller models, such as Qwen3-4B, to achieve reasoning performance comparable to GPT-4-Turbo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BioMedHop，一个多源图基生物医学问答基准，涵盖知识图谱、文档、网络及混合证据设置，包含10,045个实例及四种推理类型。同时提出BioWeave框架，通过构建统一证据图并验证答案，在各项指标上优于现有方法，使小模型（如Qwen3-4B）达到接近GPT-4-Turbo的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有生物医学问答基准主要聚焦于考试型知识、文献理解或短程多跳推理，忽视了源条件图推理和证据拓扑结构构建，无法满足生物医学中交互实体、跨知识图谱/文献/网络资源分散证据的推理需求。
AI.method: 构建BioMedHop基准（10,045实例，涵盖KG/文档/网络/混合四种证据设置及四种推理类型），提出BioWeave框架：检索KG路径→从文档和网络收集线索→组装为统一证据图→通过实体级证据支持验证答案。
AI.result: BioWeave在BioMedHop上整体平均性能最佳，超过强混合基线ToG-2达10.5%；一致提升不同LLM骨干性能；使Qwen3-4B小模型达到接近GPT-4-Turbo的推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 多源图基推理对生物医学问答至关重要，BioWeave通过结构化证据拓扑构建有效提升了推理能力，且具备模型无关性和规模可扩展性。

title: Exploiting Search in Symbolic Numeric Planning with Patterns
comment: Under Review at the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research
summary: In this paper, we present a procedure for numeric planning based on Symbolic Pattern Planning (SPP). Given a numeric planning problem $Π$, a pattern $\prec$ is a sequence of actions used to define a formula encoding the subsequences of $\prec$ executable from a starting state $S$. Cardellini, Giunchiglia, and Maratea (2024a) follow the Planning as Satisfiability approach by defining, at each step $n \ge 0$, a formula $Π^\prec_n$ in which $(i)$ the pattern $\prec$ is computed only for $n=0$ in the initial state $I$ of $Π$, and then exploited at each step $n$, $(ii)$ the starting state $S$ is set to $I$, and $(iii)$ the set $G$ of goals is required to hold in the last state that can be reached by one of the subsequences of $\prec$ concatenated $n$ times. The procedure begins with $n=0$, terminates as soon as $Π^\prec_n$ is satisfiable, and otherwise proceeds by incrementing $n$. In this paper, possibly at each step, $(i)$ we symbolically search for an intermediate state $P$ reachable from $I$, closer to a goal state, $(ii)$ dynamically recompute the pattern $\prec_h$ -- to be used in the next step -- in $P$, $(iii)$ refine the pattern $\prec_g$ used to reach $P$, and $(iv)$ start the new search from the state $S$ which can be either the initial state $I$ or the last computed intermediate state $P$, exploiting the computed patterns $\prec_g$ and $\prec_h$ to define the pattern $\prec$ to be used in the search. In particular, at each step, we define a formula $Π^{\prec}_{S,P}$ encoding the existence of a state $P'$ closer than $P$ to a goal state, with $P'$ reachable from the starting state $S$ when using the pattern $\prec$. We present different techniques for producing such formulas, each corresponding to a different strategy for exploring the search space. We prove their correctness and completeness, the latter under certain conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于符号模式规划（SPP）的数值规划过程。该方法在每一步动态重新计算模式，搜索更接近目标状态的中间状态，并定义公式编码从起始状态到更优中间状态的可达性，从而改进搜索效率。论文证明了所提方法的正确性和在特定条件下的完备性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模式规划的数值规划方法（Cardellini等人，2024a）虽然利用模式编码动作子序列，但模式仅在初始状态计算一次后固定使用，缺乏对搜索过程中状态变化的适应性，可能导致搜索效率低下。
AI.method: 提出一种动态模式规划方法。在每一步：(i) 符号化搜索从初始状态I可达且更接近目标的中间状态P；(ii) 在P处动态重新计算模式$\prec_h$用于下一步；(iii) 优化用于到达P的模式$\prec_g$；(iv) 选择起始状态S为I或P，结合$\prec_g$和$\prec_h$定义新模式$\prec$。每步定义公式$\Pi^{\prec}_{S,P}$编码从S出发利用模式$\prec$到达比P更接近目标的状态P'的存在性。
AI.result: 提出了多种对应不同搜索空间探索策略的公式构造技术，并证明了算法的正确性和在特定条件下的完备性。
AI.conclusion: 该动态模式规划方法能够根据搜索过程自适应调整模式，提升数值规划的效率，且具有理论保证。

title: Enhancing Precision Agriculture with a Hybrid Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Class Plant Disease Classification and Interpretability
summary: This study proposes an overall deep learning architecture for multi-class classification of plant diseases from high-resolution leaf imagery, with a particular interest in investigating the behavior of ResNet-50 and a hybrid ResNet + Vision Transformer (ViT) design. A specially gathered image database with 15,200 training images and 3,800 validation images spanning 38 classes across multiple crops, including tomato, apple, grape etc. were subjected to preprocessing steps such as resizing, normalization, and data augmentation to enhance model robustness. Multiple architectures, including ResNet-50, MobileNetV2, and EfficientNet-B0, were trained and compared with the hybrid ResNet + ViT model. All models were fine-tuned using the AdamW optimizer and cross-entropy loss, with early stopping applied to prevent overfitting and ensure generalization. Furthermore, interpretability techniques such as Grad-CAM and saliency maps were implemented to indicate disease-relevant regions, while segmentation-based analysis was performed to identify the affected parts of a leaf. For every one of the considered architectures, ResNet-50 led to the highest accuracy of 98.74%, whereas the hybrid ResNet + ViT model achieved a competitive accuracy of 98.58%, showing that the hybrid architectures were effective in capturing both local and overall information. The experimental results showcase the promise of transformer-based models to achieve highly accurate, interpretable, and computationally efficient computer-based multi-class multi-disease classification systems, providing helpful assistance for cultivation management practices as well as for precision farming.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的植物病害多分类架构，对比ResNet-50与混合ResNet+ViT模型，在38类15,200张叶片图像上，ResNet-50达98.74%准确率，混合模型达98.58%，并结合Grad-CAM等可解释性技术定位病害区域。
AI.motivation: 现有植物病害分类方法在精度和可解释性上仍有提升空间，且需要探索混合架构（CNN+Transformer）在捕捉局部与全局特征方面的潜力，以构建高效、可解释的智能农业病害诊断系统。
AI.method: 构建包含38类、15,200张训练图像和3,800张验证图像的多作物叶片数据集；经预处理（resize、归一化、数据增强）后，训练ResNet-50、MobileNetV2、EfficientNet-B0及混合ResNet+ViT模型；使用AdamW优化器与交叉熵损失微调，采用早停策略防止过拟合；通过Grad-CAM和显著性图进行可解释性分析，并利用分割分析识别叶片病害区域。
AI.result: ResNet-50达到最高准确率98.74%，混合ResNet+ViT模型也取得了98.58%的竞争性准确率，验证了混合架构在捕捉局部与全局信息方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的混合模型在植物病害分类中展现出高精度、可解释性和计算效率的潜力，可为精准农业和作物管理提供实用辅助工具。

title: PACT: Privileged Trace Co-Training for Multi-Turn Tool-Use Agents
summary: Multi-turn tool-use agents must reason, call tools, and adapt to observations across several interaction turns. Post-training such agents is challenging, as reinforcement learning often suffers from sparse rewards and weak credit assignment despite matching the prompt-only inference setting, while supervised fine-tuning on expert traces provides dense process supervision but can over-constrain the model to fixed trajectories. To tackle this, we propose PACT, a Privileged trAce Co-Training framework for multi-turn tool-use agents. The key idea is to use expert traces only as training-time optimization signals rather than rollout-time hints. PACT keeps rollout generation prompt-only, then uses expert traces to guide optimization through two complementary signals: a trace-conditioned RL surrogate that evaluates prompt-only rollouts under expert-trace context, and a component-aware SFT loss that supervises reasoning prefixes and tool-calls with annealed strength. To reduce over-reliance on the training-only trace context, PACT further introduces a prompt-only anchoring. We also provide a latent-trace view that connects the two trace-based objectives and explains how expert traces can guide optimization without being used during rollout generation. Experiments on FTRL, BFCL, and ToolHop show that PACT consistently improves over strong SFT- and RL-based baselines, highlighting the value of privileged trace co-training for multi-turn tool-use learning.

AI.tldr: PACT提出了一种特权轨迹共训练框架，利用专家轨迹作为训练时优化信号而非推理时提示，通过轨迹条件RL替代目标和组件感知SFT损失来训练多轮工具使用智能体，实验表明该方法显著优于SFT和RL基线。
AI.motivation: 多轮工具使用智能体的后训练面临两难：强化学习存在稀疏奖励和弱信用分配问题，而监督微调虽然提供密集过程监督却可能过度约束模型到固定轨迹。因此需要一种既能利用专家轨迹的密集监督信号，又不会在推理时限制模型探索的方法。
AI.method: PACT的核心是仅将专家轨迹用作训练时的优化信号而非推理时的提示。具体包括：(1) 轨迹条件RL替代目标——在专家轨迹上下文中评估纯提示生成的rollout；(2) 组件感知SFT损失——以退火强度监督推理前缀和工具调用；(3) 纯提示锚定机制，减少对训练时轨迹上下文的过度依赖；(4) 潜轨迹视角统一两个基于轨迹的目标。
AI.result: 在FTRL、BFCL和ToolHop三个基准上，PACT一致优于强SFT和RL基线，证明了特权轨迹共训练在多轮工具使用学习中的价值。
AI.conclusion: PACT成功解决了多轮工具使用智能体训练中稀疏奖励与过度约束之间的两难，证明了特权轨迹共训练是一种有效的折中方案，为未来工具使用和智能体学习提供了新范式。

title: Phase-Aware Guidance Injection for Recurrent MAPPO in Assembly-Line Disruption Recovery
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, accepted by the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2026)
summary: Disruption recovery in industrial assembly lines requires timely decisions under machine faults, worker absence, and emergency orders. Existing methods either rely on rigid handcrafted recovery logic or learn adaptive policies that do not readily exploit heterogeneous external recovery knowledge at decision time to reduce abnormal recovery time (ART) and preserve on-time delivery (OTD). To address this gap, we propose a phase-aware guidance injection framework that augments a trained recurrent MAPPO (RMAPPO) scheduling policy through logit-level action bias during evaluation. The framework provides a unified decision-time interface for rule-based, replay-based, and online LLM-based guidance, while activating intervention only during abnormal and recovery phases. Experiments on a custom AssemblyLineEnv show that high-quality rule guidance yields the strongest gains, replay-based guidance degrades smoothly under imperfect availability, and online LLM guidance still provides useful intermediate improvements. These results show that decision-time guidance injection can exploit heterogeneous recovery hints without redesigning the actor.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种阶段感知的引导注入框架，在评估阶段通过logit级动作偏置增强训练好的RMAPPO调度策略，利用基于规则、回放和在线LLM的异构恢复知识，减少异常恢复时间并保障按时交付。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖僵硬的固定恢复逻辑，要么学习自适应策略但无法在决策时有效利用异构的外部恢复知识来减少异常恢复时间并保障按时交付。
AI.method: 提出阶段感知的引导注入框架，在评估阶段通过logit级动作偏置增强训练好的RMAPPO调度策略，提供统一的决策时接口支持基于规则、回放和在线LLM的引导，仅在异常和恢复阶段激活干预。
AI.result: 高质量规则引导增益最强；回放引导在可用性不完美时平滑退化；在线LLM引导提供有用的中间改进。
AI.conclusion: 决策时引导注入可以在不重新设计智能体的情况下利用异构恢复提示，有效降低异常恢复时间并保障按时交付。

title: Decoupled Motion Representation Learning for Moving Infrared Small Target Detection
summary: Infrared small target detection in dynamic scenes remains challenging due to the highly coupled motions among targets, imaging platforms, and dynamic backgrounds. Existing multi-frame methods usually perform implicit temporal modeling, where coherent background dynamics dominate motion correspondence learning, leading to an inherent trade-off between detection and false alarms. In this work, we observe that background motions exhibit strong global coherence, whereas small targets mainly correspond to sparse local motion anomalies. Moreover, many false-alarm responses maintain high consistency with globally coherent motion patterns, indicating that they mainly originate from coherent background dynamics rather than genuine target motions. Based on these observations, we propose a decoupled motion representation learning framework for moving infrared small target detection. Specifically, an explicit motion branch is introduced to model globally coherent motion dynamics using pretrained optical flow priors, together with a structure-preserving self-supervised adaptation strategy for infrared motion correspondence learning. Meanwhile, an implicit motion branch based on deformable feature alignment is designed to capture target-sensitive local motion anomalies under coherent motion guidance. Furthermore, a coherent-motion-guided local anomaly reasoning module is proposed to identify and suppress coherent-motion-induced false responses during localized motion modeling. Extensive experiments on two challenging infrared small target detection benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches, particularly in dynamic scenes with complex motions, while maintaining favorable inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文针对动态场景中红外小目标检测难题，提出解耦运动表征学习框架：通过显式运动分支（光流先验+自监督适应）建模全局相干背景运动，隐式运动分支（可变形对齐+相干运动引导）捕捉目标局部异常运动，并设计相干运动引导的局部异常推理模块抑制虚假响应。实验在两个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多帧的方法通常进行隐式时序建模，但相干背景运动会主导运动对应学习，导致检测与虚警之间存在固有权衡。作者观察到背景运动具有强全局相干性，而小目标对应稀疏局部运动异常，且许多虚警响应与全局相干运动模式高度一致，因此需要解耦背景运动与目标运动。
AI.method: 1) 显式运动分支：利用预训练光流先验建模全局相干运动，配合结构保持的自监督适应策略进行红外运动对应学习。2) 隐式运动分支：基于可变形特征对齐捕捉目标敏感的局部运动异常，并受相干运动指导。3) 相干运动引导的局部异常推理模块：在局部运动建模过程中识别并抑制相干运动引起的虚假响应。
AI.result: 在两个具有挑战性的红外小目标检测基准上，该方法在动态场景中一致优于现有SOTA方法，同时保持较好的推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式解耦全局相干背景运动与局部目标异常运动，有效缓解了背景运动主导导致的检测-虚警权衡问题，验证了运动解耦策略在红外小目标检测中的有效性。

title: Creative Collision: Directorial Persona Steering and Competition in Large Language Models
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 Workshop on Human-AI Co-Creativity
summary: Activation steering has emerged as a powerful tool for shaping the behaviour of large language models at inference time, yet most prior work injects a \emph{single} semantic direction into the residual stream. We study the richer setting in which two semantically opposing steering vectors are superimposed -- a regime we call \textbf{Creative Collision}. Concretely, we construct directorial persona vectors for Steven Spielberg (optimistic, redemptive moral valence) and Martin Scorsese (dark, morally ambiguous) via mean-difference activation contrast on curated screenplay-derived corpora, then interpolate between them with a scalar mixing parameter $α\in [0,1]$ and a steering coefficient $λ$. Across five evaluation axes -- moral valence, generation coherence, surface style, directional dominance, and vector geometry -- three principal findings emerge: (i)~Spielberg's representational signature exhibits robust \emph{directional dominance}, suppressing Scorsese's moral influence across almost the entire interpolation range; (ii)~intermediate collision points paradoxically \emph{improve} generation coherence relative to pure single-director steering at high $λ$; and (iii)~both personas localise maximally to layer~28 of a 40-layer decoder-only transformer, revealing a shared \emph{moral-tone substrate}. These results illuminate the geometry of competing semantic directions in transformer residual streams and have direct implications for controllable creative generation and value-aligned narrative synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在大型语言模型的残差流中叠加两个语义相反的激活向量（Creative Collision），发现斯皮尔伯格（乐观）的表示信号在几乎所有插值范围内压制了斯科塞斯（黑暗）的表示，且中间碰撞点反而能提升生成连贯性，两个风格向量在28层共享一个道德-语调基底。
AI.motivation: 先前激活引导研究仅注入单一语义方向，缺乏对多个对立语义方向在残差流中竞争与交互机制的理解。本文旨在探索两个相反导演风格向量叠加时的几何特性与行为规律。
AI.method: 通过均值差异激活对比构建斯皮尔伯格（乐观、救赎）和斯科塞斯（黑暗、道德模糊）两个导演人格向量，使用标量混合参数α和引导系数λ在残差流中进行插值，并在五个评估轴（道德效价、生成连贯性、表面风格、方向主导性、向量几何）上进行分析。
AI.result: (i) 斯皮尔伯格向量在几乎整个插值范围内表现出鲁棒的方向主导性，压制了斯科塞斯的道德影响；(ii) 中间碰撞点在高λ时反而比纯单导演引导提升了生成连贯性；(iii) 两种人格在40层解码器的第28层达到最大定位，揭示了一个共享的道德-语调基底。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现揭示了Transformer残差流中竞争语义方向的几何特性，对可控创意生成和价值对齐叙事合成具有直接指导意义。

title: Medical Heuristic Learning: An LLM-Driven Framework for Interpretable and Auditable Clinical Decision Rules
summary: Predictive modeling for clinical tabular data is central to clinical decision support and therefore requires not only strong predictive performance but also transparent decision logic. Although deep learning and tree-based ensemble methods can achieve high accuracy, their black-box nature remains a major obstacle to clinical deployment. This challenge is further compounded by common characteristics of medical data, including limited sample sizes, severe class imbalance, and feature evolution arising from changes in diagnostic criteria and clinical documentation. To address these issues, we propose Medical Heuristic Learning (MHL), an instantiation of the learning-beyond-gradients paradigm for clinical tabular prediction. Instead of relying on neural network weight updates, MHL uses a large language model (LLM)-driven workflow that integrates statistical probes, medical knowledge probes, rule synthesis, and code-level iterative refinement to optimize a deterministic and executable decision system. The resulting model is expressed not as opaque parameters, but as versioned pure-Python decision rules that are explicitly interpretable, fully auditable, and clinically grounded. MHL also supports continual learning by starting from previously validated rules and iteratively revising them using updated feature information under data drift or feature evolution. Comprehensive experiments on medical datasets show that MHL achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods while maintaining strong behavior in small-sample and highly imbalanced settings. The results further indicate that this explicit rule update mechanism can help alleviate catastrophic forgetting under feature evolution. Overall, these findings suggest that non-gradient-based heuristic systems offer a transparent and adaptable alternative for high-stakes clinical decision support.

AI.tldr: 提出医疗启发式学习（MHL），一种不依赖梯度更新的可解释临床预测方法，通过LLM驱动的流程生成纯Python决策规则，在保持与深度学习方法可比性能的同时，提供透明、可审计且支持持续学习的临床决策支持系统。
AI.motivation: 临床表格数据预测需要高精度与透明决策逻辑，但现有深度学习和树集成方法虽准确率高，其黑箱特性阻碍临床部署；同时医疗数据面临样本量有限、类别严重不平衡、诊断标准变化导致特征演化等挑战。
AI.method: 提出Medical Heuristic Learning (MHL)，采用"超越梯度学习"范式，利用大语言模型驱动的工作流，整合统计探测、医学知识探测、规则合成和代码级迭代优化，生成版本化的纯Python决策规则系统，而非依赖神经网络权重更新。
AI.result: 在医疗数据集上，MHL达到了与最先进方法相当的性能，在样本量小和高度不平衡设置下表现良好；显式规则更新机制有助于缓解特征演化下的灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 非梯度启发性系统为高风险临床决策支持提供了一种透明且可适应的替代方案。

title: G2IA: Geometry-Guided Instance-Aware Retrieval and Refinement for Cross-Modal Place Recognition
summary: Cross-modal place recognition (CMPR) enables camera-only robots to localize against pre-built LiDAR maps in autonomous navigation scenarios. This image-to-point-cloud setting is challenged by two coupled ambiguities: the modality gap between perspective RGB appearance and sparse metric geometry, and perceptual aliasing among urban places with similar roads, facades, intersections, and object arrangements. Instead of treating CMPR as a single global descriptor matching problem, we argue that reliable retrieval requires both geometry-aware representation alignment and fine-grained candidate verification. In this paper, we propose G2IA, a geometry-guided instance-aware framework for image-to-point-cloud place recognition. In the retrieval stage, visual geometry priors from VGGT and instance features are integrated to construct place descriptors that are more compatible with LiDAR-derived map representations. In the refinement stage, the retrieved candidates are re-ranked by explicitly verifying whether local instance shapes and their relative spatial layouts are consistent across modalities. Experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that G2IA consistently improves image-to-point-cloud place recognition under different localization thresholds, and exhibits strong cross-dataset generalization.

AI.tldr: G2IA是一个几何引导的实例感知框架，通过结合视觉几何先验和实例特征进行跨模态地点识别，并在重排序阶段验证实例形状和空间布局一致性，显著提升了图像到点云的地点检索性能。
AI.motivation: 跨模态地点识别面临两个耦合的歧义：RGB外观与稀疏点云几何之间的模态差异，以及城市环境中相似道路、立面、交叉口等导致的感知混淆。现有方法将CMPR视为单一全局描述子匹配问题，作者认为可靠的检索需要同时考虑几何感知的表征对齐和细粒度候选验证。
AI.method: 提出G2IA框架，包含两阶段：1) 检索阶段：整合VGGT的视觉几何先验和实例特征，构建与LiDAR地图表征更兼容的地点描述子；2) 重排序阶段：显式验证局部实例形状及其相对空间布局在跨模态间的一致性，对检索候选进行重排序。
AI.result: 在公开基准上，G2IA在不同定位阈值下均能持续提升图像到点云地点识别的性能，并展现出强大的跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了几何感知表征对齐和实例级细粒度验证对于解决跨模态地点识别中双重歧义的有效性，G2IA为相机-机器人仅凭图像在LiDAR地图中定位提供了可靠方案。

title: Who Should Lead Decoding Now? Tracking Reliable Trajectories for Ensembling Masked Diffusion Language Models
summary: Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) have emerged as a distinct paradigm for sequence generation. As MDLMs become diverse in capabilities and knowledge coverage, an important question is how to combine their knowledge. Toward this, we first investigate the unique decoding dynamics of MDLMs. We find that successful generations exhibit stable confidence dynamics over answer-relevant positions, while unreliable trajectories can often be corrected by injecting promising intermediate states from other models. Guided by this observation, we propose $\textbf{TIE}$ ($\textbf{T}$rajectory-based $\textbf{I}$terative $\textbf{E}$nsembling), a knowledge fusion framework in which MDLMs iteratively identify reliable decoding trajectories and relay them across models. TIE tracks confidence dynamics over answer-relevant positions to determine which model currently follows a more reliable trajectory and selectively transfers partially denoised sequences across models. As the model on the more promising trajectory often changes across denoising steps, TIE allows different models to contribute complementary strengths at different stages of generation. Strong performance across diverse reasoning tasks, along with our analyses, suggests that TIE offers a practical approach to the underexplored problem of MDLM ensembling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIE框架，通过追踪掩码扩散语言模型在解码过程中的置信度动态，在模型间传递可靠的部分去噪序列，实现多模型知识融合，在推理任务上取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs）在能力和知识覆盖上日益多样化，如何有效融合多个MDLMs的知识成为一个重要但尚未充分探索的问题。
AI.method: 提出TIE（Trajectory-based Iterative Ensembling）框架：通过追踪模型在答案相关位置的置信度动态来判断哪个模型当前遵循更可靠的解码轨迹，并在不同解码阶段将部分去噪序列从更可靠的模型传递给其他模型，实现跨模型的知识接力融合。
AI.result: 在多种推理任务上展现出强劲性能，验证了TIE框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TIE为MDLM集成这一未被充分探索的问题提供了一种实用的解决方案，揭示了不同模型在不同生成阶段可以互补贡献的特性。

title: Whose hotel does the AI recommend? An algorithm audit of reputation signals in LLM-assisted hotel selection
summary: Travelers increasingly ask large language model (LLM) assistants which hotel to book, making these systems gatekeepers of property visibility -- yet what moves their recommendations is undocumented. We conduct a pre-specified algorithm audit using a randomized choice-based conjoint: across personas, prompt templates, and twelve open-weight and proprietary models, assistants choose among five hotels whose guest rating, review volume and recency, management response, chain affiliation, price, eco-certification, and list position are independently randomized. We estimate the average marginal component effect of each signal on the probability of recommendation. Guest rating and price dominate (a top rating raises selection by 31.6 percentage points; a high price lowers it by 30.0), reproducing human valence-and-price primacy but over-weighting eco-certification and ignoring management response. List position -- a content-free artifact -- shifts recommendations causally, worth about \$12 per night. Stated reasons track revealed weights imperfectly. The findings ground generative engine optimization and the accountability of AI infomediaries in causal evidence.

AI.tldr: 通过随机选择联合分析算法审计，发现LLM酒店推荐中客房评分和价格主导决策，生态认证权重过高，列表位置等无关因素也有显著因果影响。
AI.motivation: 旅行者日益依赖LLM助手推荐酒店，但这些系统的推荐机制尚未被系统记录和理解，存在信息透明度问题。
AI.method: 采用预注册的算法审计方法，使用随机化选择联合分析（choice-based conjoint），跨多个角色设定、提示模板以及12个开源和闭源模型，随机化五个酒店的评分、评论量/时效、管理回复、连锁品牌、价格、生态认证和列表位置等属性，估计各信号的边际成分效应。
AI.result: 客房评分和价格主导推荐（高评分提升31.6pp，高价格降低30.0pp）；生态认证被过度加权；管理回复被忽略；列表位置（无信息量的位置排序）存在显著因果效应，约值12美元/晚；模型声称的理由与实际权重不完全一致。
AI.conclusion: 研究为生成式搜索引擎优化（generative engine optimization）和AI信息中介的问责机制提供了因果证据基础。

title: HemExp: Clinically-Guided Latent Diffusion for Modeling Hematoma Expansion
summary: Hematoma expansion (HE) after spontaneous intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH) is a major determinant of acute triage and treatment decisions in neurosurgical care. However, most existing methods provide either a binary expansion risk or a single follow-up volume, limiting uncertainty-aware decisions. We introduce HemExp, a clinically-guided latent diffusion model that generates patient-specific follow-up non-contrast CT images, along with segmentations of intraparenchymal and intraventricular hemorrhage. Generation is conditioned on baseline imaging, clinical variables, and an explicit expansion indicator, enabling controllable simulation of realistic clinical scenarios. HemExp uses a hemorrhage-aware multi-head variational autoencoder and models progression as the difference between baseline and follow-up latent representations with a conditional diffusion model. The model is trained on paired scans from 450 patients across multiple centers and evaluated on 107 patients from a held-out institution. HemExp produces spatial HE probability maps by generating multiple synthetic follow-up images per patient to estimate distributions of plausible follow-up hematoma volumes. Perturbing clinical inputs such as symptom-onset-to-imaging time or anticoagulant status shifts the predicted follow-up volume distribution.
