summary: In this report, we present LOGOS (Language Of Generative Objects in Science), a scientific generative language model that unifies heterogeneous tasks across the natural sciences within a single autoregressive framework based on a shared scientific grammar. It encodes diverse scientific objects and their spatial interactions as token sequences over a common vocabulary. By representing spatial contact and constraint patterns as discrete tokens, the model captures complex structural interactions in a purely sequential manner, without relying on explicit coordinates or geometric neural networks. This unified representation enables a wide range of downstream tasks to be formulated consistently as next-token prediction in the same grammar space, creating strong alignment between continued multi-domain pre-training and downstream objectives. Across diverse tasks, LOGOS consistently matches or outperforms domain-specific baselines, providing preliminary evidence for the feasibility of "one model fits all" in the natural sciences. We train LOGOS models at different scales (1B, 3B, and 8B parameters) and find a consistent positive correlation between model size and performance. This suggests that the future of AI for Science (AI4S) may not lie in building an independent technical stack that is separated from large language models (LLMs). Instead, it may depend on deeply aligning scientific foundation models with LLMs through shared architectures, shared training paradigms, and shared inference infrastructure, so that LLMs can truly become a new entry point for AI4S. We release the model weights and associated resources to facilitate further research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LOGOS，一个统一自然科学中异构任务的生成式语言模型，通过共享科学语法将科学对象及其空间交互编码为离散token序列，实现"一个模型适配所有科学任务"，并在1B至8B参数规模上验证了模型性能与规模的正相关关系。
AI.motivation: 现有AI for Science方法多为领域特定模型，缺乏统一的框架来覆盖不同自然科学任务；同时，科学基础模型与大规模语言模型之间存在技术栈分离，阻碍了LLM在科学领域的深入应用。
AI.method: 提出LOGOS模型，设计共享科学语法将科学对象及其空间接触、约束模式编码为离散token序列，无需显式坐标或几何神经网络；统一多领域预训练与下游任务均为同一语法空间中的next-token预测。
AI.result: 在多种任务上与领域特定基线模型表现持平或更优；训练了1B、3B、8B三种参数规模的模型，发现模型规模与性能之间存在一致的正相关。
AI.conclusion: 证明了"一个模型适配所有自然科学"的可行性，指出AI4S的未来方向并非建立独立技术栈，而是通过与LLM共享架构、训练范式和推理基础设施来实现深度对齐，使LLM成为AI4S的新入口。

title: Domain-Guided Prompting of the Segment Anything Model for Seismic Interpretation: The Role of Attributes, Visualization, and Hybrid Prompts
summary: The advent of large pretrained foundation models for computer vision has significantly improved the efficiency of visual data interpretation. The Segment Anything Model (SAM), in particular, offers powerful zero shot segmentation capabilities through prompt based interaction, thus making it a promising tool for seismic interpretation. However, most existing applications of SAM rely on fine tuning for specific geological targets, which requires extensive labeled data, incurs high computational cost, and often compromises the model's generalization capability. In this study, we introduce a principled framework for zero shot adaptation of foundation models to seismic data. The framework is built on two key components: (1) aligning seismic attributes and visualization choices (e.g., colormaps) with the geological target of interest, and (2) employing a hybrid prompting strategy that combines sparse user defined point prompts with dense mask prompts derived from SAM's internal feature activations. We systematically evaluate this framework across multiple geological targets, datasets, prompt configurations, and seismic attribute representations. Our results demonstrate that geologic target aware selection of seismic attributes and colormaps, combined with hybrid prompting, enhances the separability of geological features and improves boundary delineation and segmentation accuracy relative to point based prompting alone. Our findings show that, when these components are jointly applied, SAM can achieve competitive segmentation performance in a fully zero shot setting, thereby eliminating the need to retrain SAM for each geologic feature. This work establishes a practical and scalable pathway to leverage foundation models in seismic interpretation, reducing reliance on labeled data while preserving model generality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种零样本适配框架，通过结合地质目标感知的地震属性与颜色映射选择，以及混合提示策略（稀疏用户点提示+密集掩码提示），使SAM模型无需微调即可在零样本条件下有效完成地震数据分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的SAM地震解释应用依赖微调，需要大量标注数据、计算成本高，且会损害模型泛化能力。因此亟需一种无需微调、保持模型通用性的零样本适配方法。
AI.method: 框架包含两个关键组件：(1) 将地震属性与可视化颜色映射与地质目标对齐；(2) 混合提示策略，融合稀疏用户点提示和基于SAM内部特征激活的密集掩码提示。
AI.result: 地质目标感知的属性与颜色映射选择结合混合提示，相比纯点提示更好地增强了地质特征的可分离性，提升了边界描绘与分割精度，在零样本条件下取得了有竞争力的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为利用基础模型进行地震解释提供了实用且可扩展的路径，减少了对标注数据的依赖，同时保留了模型的通用性。

title: LESS Is More: Mutual-Stability Sampling for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer a promising alternative to autoregressive decoding by iteratively refining masked sequences, enabling parallel token updates and bidirectional conditioning. Their practical efficiency, however, is limited by sampling procedures that execute a fixed number of reverse denoising steps selected before decoding, spending computation on already-stable positions and sometimes committing unstable ones too early. We present \textsc{LESS}, a training-free, model-agnostic adaptive sampler that treats token commitment as an online stopping problem. \textsc{LESS} implements mutual-stability sampling through a joint stability rule that makes a masked position eligible for unmasking only when its top-1 prediction has high confidence, its top-1 token persists across recent reverse steps, and its predictive distribution is stable under top-$K$ inter-step Jensen--Shannon divergence. We evaluate \textsc{LESS} on Dream-7B, LLaDA-8B, and LLaDA-1.5-8B, covering full-sequence diffusion and semi-autoregressive blockwise sampling regimes, across seven benchmarks spanning general knowledge, math, and code. \textsc{LESS} improves average accuracy over strong training-free adaptive samplers while using $72.1\%$ fewer reverse steps than fixed-budget decoding. Since each reverse step requires a Transformer forward pass, these step-count reductions translate into fewer forward evaluations, lower measured wall-clock latency, and lower estimated inference compute.

AI.tldr: LESS 提出了一种无需训练、模型无关的自适应采样器，通过联合稳定性规则动态决定 token 的揭示时机，在多个扩散语言模型上相比固定步数解码平均减少 72.1% 的反向步骤，同时提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型（dLLMs）虽能并行更新 token 并实现双向条件化，但现有采样过程固定去噪步数，在已稳定位置浪费计算，对不稳定位置又过早提交，导致推理效率低下。
AI.method: LESS 将 token 提交建模为在线停止问题，采用联合稳定性规则：只有当 token 的 top-1 预测高置信度、top-1 token 在连续反向步骤中保持不变、且预测分布在 top-K 跨步 Jensen-Shannon 散度下稳定时，才允许该掩码位置被揭开。
AI.result: 在 Dream-7B、LLaDA-8B、LLaDA-1.5-8B 三个模型和七大基准上，LESS 相比强基线的训练无关自适应采样器提升了平均准确率，同时比固定预算解码减少 72.1% 的反向步骤，进而降低前向评估次数、实际延迟和推理计算量。
AI.conclusion: LESS 通过自适应提前终止稳定 token 的反向扩散过程，在不牺牲准确性甚至略有提升的前提下，显著降低了扩散语言模型的推理开销，是一种高效且通用的推理加速方案。

title: DifFRACT: Diffusion Feature Reconstruction and Attribution for Circuit Tracing
summary: Mechanistic interpretability seeks to explain neural network behavior by decomposing model computations into interpretable features and circuits. While transcoder-based circuit tracing has recently enabled detailed causal analyses of large language models, multimodal diffusion transformers for image generation remain comparatively opaque. We still lack tools for understanding how semantic information propagates across denoising steps and how text and image representations interact within double-stream MM-DiT architectures. Existing methods provide only partial insight: attention maps expose a limited view of token interactions, while sparse autoencoders can discover interpretable features but do not directly reveal how these features are transformed and composed through nonlinear MLP layers. In this work, we extend transcoder-based circuit tracing to multimodal diffusion transformers. We train timestep-conditioned transcoders that faithfully approximate the input-output behavior of MLP sublayers in FLUX.1[schnell]. By replacing MLPs with transcoders and linearizing the remaining computation, we obtain exact feature-to-feature attribution and recover compact, interpretable circuits. Empirically, our transcoders match or slightly outperform sparse autoencoders on the sparsity-faithfulness tradeoff. The resulting circuits reveal mechanisms underlying attribute binding and cross-stream semantic propagation, and provide causal explanations for systematic generation errors. Moreover, circuit-guided interventions are substantially more precise and effective than standard SAE-based steering. Our results demonstrate that transcoder-based circuit analysis is feasible for state-of-the-art diffusion transformers and provides a powerful framework for understanding and controlling multimodal generative models. The code is available at https://github.com/Artalmaz31/DifFRACT

AI.tldr: 本文将基于transcoder的电路追踪方法扩展到多模态扩散Transformer（FLUX.1[schnell]），通过训练时间步条件transcoder近似MLP子层行为，实现精确的特征到特征归因，揭示属性绑定和跨流语义传播机制，并能更精准地控制模型生成行为。
AI.motivation: 多模态扩散Transformer（如FLUX）的内部工作机制尚不透明，现有方法（注意力图、稀疏自编码器）无法完整揭示语义信息如何在去噪步骤中传播以及文本与图像表示如何交互，缺乏理解和控制这类模型的有效工具。
AI.method: 训练时间步条件transcoder来近似FLUX.1[schnell]中MLP子层的输入-输出行为，用transcoder替换MLP并将剩余计算线性化，从而获得精确的特征到特征归因并恢复可解释的电路。
AI.result: Transcoder在稀疏性-忠实度权衡上匹配或略优于稀疏自编码器；所得电路揭示了属性绑定和跨流语义传播机制，并为系统性生成错误提供了因果解释；基于电路的干预比标准SAE引导更精确有效。
AI.conclusion: 基于transcoder的电路分析对于最先进的扩散Transformer是可行的，为理解和控制多模态生成模型提供了强大框架。

title: IMPACTeen: Intentions, Manipulation, Persuasion, Annotations, and Consequences in Teen Communication Dataset
summary: IMPACTeen is a dataset of textual social influence scenarios spanning interpersonal, media-based, and digital settings in an adolescent context. It contains 1,021 texts, 5,100 individual annotation records, and gold labels for social influence techniques, with each text annotated from five distinct perspectives: teenagers, parents, psychologists, communication experts, and teachers. The resource was constructed through constrained LLM generation, followed by a two-step human editing and validation phase aimed at ensuring youth-context realism. A multi-dimensional annotation covered influence presence, techniques, intentions, consequences, resistance, reactions, and annotation confidence. The dataset supports research on social influence detection, annotator disagreement, cross-lingual modeling, and the training and evaluation of language models. The dataset was created in Polish and is accompanied by a corresponding English version.

AI.tldr: IMPACTeen是一个包含1,021条文本、5,100条标注记录的社会影响力场景数据集，涵盖青少年人际、媒体和数字环境，由波兰语创建并配有英语版本，通过受限LLM生成和人工编辑构建，支持社会影响力检测、标注者分歧分析等研究。
AI.motivation: 现有社会影响力数据集缺乏针对青少年情境的细粒度、多视角标注，难以支撑青少年社会影响力检测及相关交叉学科研究。
AI.method: 采用受限LLM生成文本，经两阶段人工编辑与验证确保青少年情境真实性；从青少年、家长、心理学家、传播专家和教师五个视角进行多维度标注，涵盖影响力的存在、技巧、意图、后果、抵抗、反应及置信度。
AI.result: 构建了IMPACTeen数据集，包含1,021条文本、5,100条标注记录及金标准标签，同时提供波兰语和英语版本。
AI.conclusion: IMPACTeen为青少年社会影响力检测、标注者分歧分析、跨语言建模以及语言模型训练评估提供了有价值的资源。

title: CPS4: Class Prompt driven Semi-Supervised Spine Segmentation with Class-specific Consistency Constraint
summary: Vision Language Model (VLM) has great potential to enhance the quality of pseudo labels in semi-supervised spine segmentation by leveraging textual class prompts to generate segmentation map, but no one has studied it yet. Although promising, it lacks explicit constraints to ensure consistency between spine class prompts and spine unit region, resulting in unsatisfactory performance in multi-class segmentation map generation. In this paper, we propose CPS4, the first text-guided semi-supervised spine segmentation network using class prompts to enhance the quality of spine pseudo labels. Specifically, CPS4 is implemented through two training stages. (i) Class-specific consistency constrained VLM pretraining stage: we propose token- and pixel-level attention loss to optimize the consistency between class prompts and spine units, forcing the textual class prompt to be closely coupled with the target spine unit in the semantic space. (ii) Class Prompt driven semi-supervised spine segmentation stage: using the pretrained vision-text encoder, we derive each class-specific binary segmentation map for the unlabeled spine image and integrate them into an unified multi-class segmentation map, improving the quality of the spine pseudo label generated by the semi-supervised spine segmentation network. Experimental results show that our CPS4 achieves superior spine segmentation performance with Dice of 80.44%, only using 5% labeled data on the public spine segmentation dataset, surpassing popular semi-supervised learning and VLM methods. Our code will be available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CPS4，首个利用文本类提示（class prompts）增强半监督脊柱分割伪标签质量的网络。通过两阶段训练：类特定一致性约束的VLM预训练（提出token级和像素级注意力损失）和类提示驱动的半监督分割，仅用5%标注数据即在公开数据集上达到80.44% Dice，优于现有半监督和VLM方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在脊柱分割伪标签生成中缺乏确保类提示与脊柱单元区域一致性的显式约束，导致多类分割效果不佳，而此前尚未有研究探索VLM在半监督脊柱分割中的应用。
AI.method: 两阶段训练：(1) 类特定一致性约束的VLM预训练，通过token级和像素级注意力损失优化类提示与脊柱单元的语义一致性；(2) 利用预训练的视觉-文本编码器为无标签图像生成各类二值分割图并整合为统一的多类分割图，提升半监督网络的伪标签质量。
AI.result: 在公开脊柱分割数据集上，仅用5%标注数据即达到80.44% Dice，超越流行的半监督学习和VLM方法。
AI.conclusion: CPS4验证了文本类提示引导的半监督脊柱分割的有效性，为VLM在半监督医学图像分割中的应用提供了新思路。

title: Exploring Extrinsic and Intrinsic Properties for Effective Reasoning with Code Interpreter
summary: Reasoning with a Code Interpreter (CI) has emerged as an effective paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) through executable computation and iterative verification. Despite its growing adoption, the behavioral properties underlying effective code reasoning remain largely underexplored. In this work, we investigate code reasoning from two distinct perspectives inspired by prior studies of natural language reasoning: extrinsic properties, represented by crucial tokens, and intrinsic properties, represented by code-specific cognitive behaviors. Across multiple LLMs, we find that stronger CI reasoning models consistently exhibit a higher prevalence of crucial tokens and cognitive behaviors, particularly verification, backtracking, and backward chaining. Building on these observations, we examine how these properties can be leveraged during both inference and training. At inference time, appending code-specific crucial tokens improves performance on several reasoning capabilities, including mathematical, ordering, and optimization, while yielding limited benefits elsewhere. At training time, augmenting a state-of-the-art framework with code-specific cognitive behaviors improves supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning performance in two of three evaluated models. Further analysis shows that these behaviors reduce overthinking in incorrect responses and improve token efficiency, while also revealing factors that limit gains in a certain model. Our findings provide the first systematic characterization of effective reasoning with CI and demonstrate both the potential and limitations of leveraging key properties to improve CI-based reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了代码解释器推理中两种关键属性（外在关键令牌与内在认知行为），发现更强的推理模型更频繁出现这些属性，并通过推理时令牌增强与训练时行为注入两种方法提升性能，同时揭示了其适用边界与局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管代码解释器增强LLM推理能力的方法日益流行，但其背后有效的代码推理行为特性（如哪些token和认知行为对推理至关重要）尚未被系统探索，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 从两个视角分析：1) 外在属性——关键令牌（crucial tokens）；2) 内在属性——代码特异性认知行为（验证、回溯、反向链）。在多模型上观察这些属性与推理强弱的关联，并在推理阶段（追加关键令牌）和训练阶段（向SFT/RL框架注入认知行为）验证其效果。
AI.result: 更强的CI推理模型中关键令牌和认知行为更显著；推理时追加代码关键令牌提升数学/排序/优化任务但其他任务有限；训练时注入认知行为在2/3模型中提升SFT和RL性能，并减少错误回答中的过度思考、提高token效率。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统刻画了有效代码解释器推理的特征，展示了利用关键属性改进CI推理的潜力与局限性。

title: SACE: Concept Erasure at the Semantic Singularity in Visual Autoregressive Models
summary: The rapid progress of visual autoregressive (VAR) models has unlocked a transformative frontier for high-fidelity text-to-image synthesis, while heightening concerns over the safety alignment of generated content. Naive application of existing erasure techniques to VAR models causes catastrophic semantic collapse and visual artifacts, since they are predominantly designed for the homogeneous denoising steps of diffusion models. To address this foundational challenge, we first propose the Semantic Singularity Axiom, which posits that any target semantic concept embedded within a prompt is definitively locked at Scale-0. Then rigorously validate this axiom through our proposed Incremental Semantic Saliency Analysis (ISSA),which also enable the community to transparently inspect the coarse-to-fine semantic injection process. Guided by this insight, we introduce the first scale-aware concept erasure framework (SACE) for VAR models. By strictly confining interventions to the first scale, our approach couples an Entropy-Regularized Erasure Objective to prevent high-entropy sampling degeneration, alongside a restorative preservation loss to safely anchor the integrity of entangled benign priors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves surgical concept erasure performance across various domains with minimal training overhead, timely and elegently resolute the critical safety vulnerabilities inherent in emerging VAR architectures. Code is available at: https://github.com/limerenceysy/SACE}{https://github.com/limerenceysy/SACE.

AI.tldr: 针对视觉自回归(VAR)模型的概念擦除难题，提出语义奇点公理并验证，设计了首个性感知的概念擦除框架SACE，通过仅干预第一尺度实现精准擦除且不破坏良性先验。
AI.motivation: 现有擦除技术主要针对扩散模型的同质化去噪步设计，直接应用于VAR模型会导致语义崩塌和视觉伪影；VAR模型的渐进式尺度生成结构未被充分考虑，缺乏专门的概念安全擦除方法。
AI.method: 1. 提出语义奇点公理：目标语义概念在Scale-0处被锁定；2. 提出增量语义显著性分析(ISSA)验证该公理；3. 设计尺度感知的概念擦除框架(SACE)：仅干预第一尺度，耦合熵正则化擦除目标防止高熵采样退化，并添加保留性损失保护良性先验完整性。
AI.result: 在多个域上实现了手术级的概念擦除性能，训练开销极小，有效解决了VAR模型的安全漏洞问题。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次为VAR模型提供了可靠的概念擦除方案，证实了尺度感知干预的有效性，为新兴自回归架构的安全对齐奠定了基础。

title: TokenPilot: Cache-Efficient Context Management for LLM Agents
summary: As LLM agents are deployed in long-horizon sessions, context accumulation drives up inference costs. Existing approaches utilize text pruning or dynamic memory eviction to minimize token footprints; however, their unconstrained sequence mutations alter layouts, introducing prefix mismatches and cache invalidation. This reveals a critical trade-off between text sparsity and prompt cache continuity. To address this, we present TokenPilot, a dual-granularity context management framework. Globally, Ingestion-Aware Compaction acts as a framework harness to stabilize prompt prefixes and eliminate open-world environmental noise at the ingestion gate. Locally, Lifecycle-Aware Eviction monitors the ongoing residual utility of context segments, enforcing a conservative batch-turn schedule to offload content segments only when task relevance expires. Experiments on PinchBench and Claw-Eval under both isolated and continuous modes demonstrate that TokenPilot reduces costs by 61% and 56% in isolated mode, and 61% and 87% in continuous mode, while maintaining competitive performance compared to prior systems. TokenPilot has been integrated into LightMem2 at https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem2.

AI.tldr: TokenPilot是一个双粒度上下文管理框架，通过全局的摄入感知压缩和局部的生命周期感知驱逐，在保持提示缓存连续性的同时减少LLM Agent在长会话中的推理成本，实验显示成本降低61%-87%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM Agent在长会话中因上下文积累导致推理成本高昂，而文本剪枝和动态记忆驱逐等方法会改变序列布局，引发前缀不匹配和缓存失效，存在文本稀疏性与提示缓存连续性之间难以调和的矛盾。
AI.method: 提出TokenPilot双粒度框架：全局层面使用摄入感知压缩（Ingestion-Aware Compaction）稳定提示前缀并在摄入阶段过滤环境噪声；局部层面使用生命周期感知驱逐（Lifecycle-Aware Eviction）监控上下文片段的剩余效用，仅在任务相关性过期时保守地批量卸载内容。
AI.result: 在PinchBench和Claw-Eval上，隔离模式下成本降低61%和56%，连续模式下成本降低61%和87%，同时保持与现有系统相当的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: TokenPilot有效解决了文本稀疏性与缓存连续性之间的权衡问题，并已集成到LightMem2中供社区使用。

title: Learning a Sampling-Free Variational DNN Plugin from Tiny Training Sets to Refine OOD Segmentation With Uncertainty Estimation
comment: Accepted at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) frequently fail to generalize to out-of-distribution (OOD) medical images because of variations in scanners and acquisition protocols. Retraining DNN models to address these distribution shifts is often impractical due to the high cost of acquiring and annotating new medical datasets. To address this, we introduce VarDeepPCA, a novel lightweight variational DNN framework designed to restore/refine degraded segmentation maps by leveraging intrinsic geometric priors. Unlike existing approaches that require target-domain data or extensive pre-training, our VarDeepPCA explicitly learns a distribution of valid anatomical geometries using only small in-distribution (ID) datasets. Theoretically, our novel variational learning framework leverages a reinterpretation of the softmax mapping to implicitly perform exact distribution modeling, thereby enabling computationally efficient, sampling-free learning and inference. This also enables VarDeepPCA to provide uncertainty estimates associated with its restored segmentation maps. We empirically validate our framework across 4 distinct clinical applications, using 14 publicly available datasets, involving segmentation of the myocardium, neuroretinal rim, prostate, and fetal head. Comparisons against 15 existing methods demonstrate that VarDeepPCA consistently restores segmentation maps produced by the existing methods on OOD data to (i) significantly improve anatomical plausibility of geometries and clinical utility of the segmentations, and (ii) significantly reduce errors, without needing any more training data than that used by existing methods.

AI.tldr: VarDeepPCA是一个轻量级变分DNN框架，通过内在几何先验修复OOD医学图像的分割结果，无需目标域数据或大量预训练，仅用小规模ID数据集即可提升分割的解剖合理性和准确性。
AI.motivation: DNN在OOD医学图像上泛化失败，而重新训练模型成本高昂，因此需要一种轻量级、无需目标域数据的方法来修复OOD分割图。
AI.method: 提出VarDeepPCA，一种轻量级变分DNN框架，利用对softmax映射的重新解释进行精确分布建模，实现无采样的高效学习和推理，仅用小规模ID数据集学习有效解剖几何的分布。
AI.result: 在4项临床任务、14个公开数据集上验证，与15种现有方法对比，VarDeepPCA持续修复OOD分割图，显著提升解剖合理性和临床实用性，同时降低错误率。
AI.conclusion: VarDeepPCA无需额外训练数据即可有效恢复OOD医学图像分割质量，并能为修复结果提供不确定性估计，是一种实用且高效的解决方案。

title: DEEPRUBRIC: Evidence-Tree Rubric Supervision for Efficient Reinforcement Learning of Deep Research Agents
summary: Deep research agents synthesize long-form reports by searching and reasoning over retrieved evidence. Reinforcement learning with rubric-based rewards improves these agents by optimizing them against checkable criteria that translate report quality into reward signals, but its efficiency depends on whether those criteria reliably capture the task scope and evidence needs. Most existing studies ask an LLM to generate rubrics for a given query, but when the model fails to infer the underlying information needs, the generated rubrics may be incomplete and reduce RL efficiency. To obtain more reliable query--rubric supervision, we introduce DeepRubric, a data construction framework that reverses this process: instead of inferring evaluation criteria for a given query, it first determines what an evidence-backed report should be evaluated on and then synthesizes aligned query--rubric pairs from those evaluation targets. Starting from a sampled seed topic, DeepRubric builds an evidence tree by recursively expanding evidence-backed sub-questions, whose leaves serve as atomic and verifiable evaluation targets. It then uses the evidence tree to synthesize the training query and rubrics, ensuring that the reward evaluates exactly the information requested by the query. Using DeepRubric, we construct 9K query--rubric supervision examples and train DeepRubric-8B with rubric-based GRPO, achieving comparable performance to prior open state-of-the-art deep research models across three benchmarks with roughly 13x fewer RL GPU-hours.

AI.tldr: 提出DeepRubric框架，通过反向构建查询-评估标准对（先确定评估目标再合成查询），生成更可靠的奖励信号用于强化学习训练深度研究智能体，训练出的DeepRubric-8B模型在三个基准上达到与现有最优模型相当的性能，但RL训练GPU时长减少约13倍。
AI.motivation: 现有方法让LLM为给定查询生成评估标准（rubrics），但当模型无法推断底层信息需求时，生成的评估标准不完整，降低了RL训练效率。需要更可靠的查询-评估标准监督信号。
AI.method: DeepRubric框架：从种子主题出发，递归扩展有证据支撑的子问题构建证据树，以叶子节点作为原子化、可验证的评估目标；然后基于证据树合成训练查询和评估标准，确保奖励信号精确评估查询所请求的信息。构建了9K查询-评估标准监督样本，结合基于评估标准的GRPO训练DeepRubric-8B模型。
AI.result: DeepRubric-8B在三个基准上达到与之前开源最优深度研究模型相当的性能，但RL训练GPU时长减少约13倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过反转查询-评估标准的构建顺序（先确定评估目标再合成查询），可以生成更完整的评估标准，从而提升基于评估标准的强化学习训练效率。

title: EmoZone-Talker: Regional Semantic Control of Audio-Driven 3DGS Talking Heads via Facial Action Units
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has shown strong potential for high-fidelity talking head synthesis. However, enabling fine-grained, interpretable, and editable facial expression control remains fundamentally challenging due to intrinsic conflicts between speech-driven facial dynamics and explicit expression signals. Existing methods rely on implicit multimodal fusion, leading to spatial entanglement and temporal instability. We present EmoZone-Talker, a novel framework that reformulates audio-driven facial animation as a structured spatial-temporal coordination problem under cross-modal conflicts. Our approach introduces an explicit spatial disentanglement and temporal dynamics modeling of facial motion. Specifically, we propose Synergy Zones with Prioritized Attention Bias (SZ-PAB) to explicitly decouple modality contributions via region-wise constraints guided by anatomical priors, and a Channel-Independent Temporal AU Encoder (CIT-AE) to model temporally coherent AU dynamics. By integrating these representations into 3D Gaussian deformation, EmoZone-Talker enables precise and interpretable control over facial expressions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method improves expression controllability and realism, with notable gains in upper-face accuracy and temporal coherence, while preserving high rendering quality and accurate lip synchronization. Code will be publicly released to facilitate reproducibility and further research.

AI.tldr: EmoZone-Talker 提出了一种基于显式空间解耦和时间动态建模的3D高斯泼溅框架，通过协同区域与优先级注意力偏置（SZ-PAB）和通道无关时间AU编码器（CIT-AE），实现精细、可解释、可编辑的说话头面部表情控制，在表情可控性和真实感上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3DGS的说话头合成方法中，音频驱动与显式表情信号之间存在内在冲突，隐式多模态融合导致空间纠缠和时间不稳定，无法实现细粒度、可解释、可编辑的面部表情控制。
AI.method: 1) 提出Synergy Zones with Prioritized Attention Bias (SZ-PAB)，通过解剖学先验指导的区域约束显式解耦各模态贡献；2) 提出Channel-Independent Temporal AU Encoder (CIT-AE)，建模时间一致的动作单元（AU）动态；3) 将这些表示集成到3D高斯变形中，实现精确可解释的表情控制。
AI.result: 在表情可控性和真实感上取得显著提升，尤其在上半脸精度和时间一致性方面表现突出，同时保持高渲染质量和准确的唇部同步。
AI.conclusion: 将音频驱动面部动画重新定义为跨模态冲突下的结构化时空协同问题，通过显式空间解耦与时间动态建模，有效解决了隐式融合导致的纠缠问题，为高保真说话头合成提供了可编辑、可解释的新范式。

title: KVEraser: Learning to Steer KV Cache for Efficient Localized Context Erasing
comment: Oral at the ICML 2026 Workshop on the Impact of Memorization on Trustworthy Foundation Models
summary: Post-hoc context erasing over the KV cache is challenging because a local edit has a global consequence: once a span has been processed, its influence propagates into the cached states of all subsequent tokens. This issue arises naturally in long-context LLM applications, where stale retrieved facts, incorrect tool observations, retracted user preferences, or harmful prompt injections may be identified only after prefill. Exact erasing must then recompute all tokens after the deleted span, making its computational cost depend on suffix length rather than erased-span length. We introduce KVEraser, a learned KV-cache editing method for efficient localized context erasing. Given a processed context and a span to remove, KVEraser replaces only the KV states of the erased interval with learned steering states while reusing the remaining cache unchanged. To learn a transferable erasing mechanism, we build a two-stage training pipeline: generic span-neighbor pre-training teaches the eraser to suppress the influence of the erased span, while task-specific fine-tuning adapts this capability to downstream scenarios. Experiments show that KVEraser nearly matches full recomputation in post-erasure performance on in-domain tasks across 1K--32K context lengths, while its latency increases by only 24% compared with a 17.6x increase for full recomputation. KVEraser also generalizes to unseen long-document QA tasks with harmful factual distractors, achieving the best performance among approximate baselines with a 3--4x speedup over full recomputation.

AI.tldr: KVEraser是一种基于学习的KV缓存编辑方法，通过仅替换被删除区间的KV状态为学习到的引导状态，实现高效的局部上下文擦除，在接近完全重计算性能的同时，延迟仅增加24%（相比完全重计算的17.6倍），并支持1K-32K上下文长度。
AI.motivation: 长上下文LLM应用中，事后发现需删除的上下文时，精确擦除需重算后续所有token，计算成本与后缀长度成正比而非擦除跨度长度，亟待高效局部编辑方法。
AI.method: 提出KVEraser，仅替换被擦除区间的KV状态为学习到的引导状态，保留其余缓存不变。采用两阶段训练：通用跨度-邻居预训练抑制擦除跨度影响，任务特定微调适配下游场景。
AI.result: 域内任务上接近完全重计算的擦除后性能，延迟仅增24%（vs完全重计算17.6倍）；泛化到未见的长文档QA任务，实现3-4倍加速，优于其他近似基线。
AI.conclusion: KVEraser实现了高效且可迁移的KV缓存局部擦除，在性能和效率间取得良好平衡，且具备跨任务泛化能力。

title: A Dual-Branch Collaborative Framework for Joint Optimization of Underwater Image Enhancement and Object Detection
summary: Due to wavelength dependent light absorption and scattering, underwater images usually suffer from color distortion and blurred details, which limits underwater object detection performance. Existing underwater image enhancement methods mainly focus on visual quality improvement, while it is still difficult to balance enhancement quality, processing efficiency, and downstream detection performance. Therefore, this paper proposes an efficient dual-branch underwater image enhancement framework for object detection. The detail enhancement branch improves brightness and local contrast to recover texture details in dark regions. The color restoration branch uses adaptive compensation to reduce color distortion and improve color gradation. By combining the complementary outputs of the two branches, the proposed framework provides clearer and more informative images for object detection. On the UIEB and EUVP datasets, the proposed method achieves UIQM scores of 2.249 and 2.576. When applied to the YOLOv8 detection task on the URPC dataset, the proposed method improves mAP50 by 2.1\% compared with the baseline. Extensive experiments show that our method improves object detection in complex underwater scenes, while balancing enhancement quality and processing efficiency.

AI.tldr: 针对水下图像颜色失真和细节模糊问题，提出一种双分支增强框架：细节增强分支恢复纹理，色彩恢复分支减少色偏，在提升检测性能的同时兼顾增强质量和处理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有水下图像增强方法难以同时兼顾增强质量、处理效率和下游检测性能，亟需一种既能提升视觉质量又能有效改善目标检测的框架。
AI.method: 提出高效的双分支水下图像增强框架：(1) 细节增强分支提升亮度和局部对比度以恢复暗区纹理；(2) 色彩恢复分支采用自适应补偿减少色偏、改善色彩层次。两分支互补输出，为检测提供更清晰的信息。
AI.result: 在UIEB和EUVP数据集上UIQM分别达到2.249和2.576；在URPC数据集上结合YOLOv8检测，mAP50较基线提升2.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效提升复杂水下场景的目标检测性能，同时平衡了增强质量与处理效率。

title: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Meta-Analysis Articles from Nature Portfolio
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, preprint for arXiv, dataset and code available at https://github.com/BFTree/MetaSyn
summary:
Meta-analysis is a demanding form of evidence synthesis that combines literature retrieval, PI/ECO-guided study selection, and statistical aggregation. Its structured, verifiable workflow makes it an ideal substrate for evaluating systematic scientific reasoning, yet existing benchmarks lack ground truth across the full retrieval-screening-synthesis pipeline. We introduce MetaSyn, a dataset of 442 expert-curated meta-analyses from Nature Portfolio journals. Each entry pairs a research question with PI/ECO criteria, a retrieval corpus of 140k PubMed articles, verified positive studies, hard negatives that are topically similar but PI/ECO-ineligible, and complete search strategies and date bounds.
  Benchmarking twelve pipeline configurations (nine RAG variants and a protocol-driven agent) reveals a critical screening bottleneck: despite a retrieval ceiling of 90.9% recall at K=200, no system recovers more than 52.7% of ground-truth included literature. Current LLMs fail to reliably separate eligible studies from PI/ECO-failing distractors in pools of comparable topical relevance. Stage-attributed metrics capture where systems succeed and fail; a single end-to-end score does not.

AI.tldr: MetaSyn是一个包含442项专家策展Meta分析的基准数据集，用于评估系统在文献检索、PI/ECO筛选和统计聚合整个流程中的科学推理能力。测试12种流水线配置后发现，尽管检索召回率可达90.9%，但没有任何系统能恢复超过52.7%的已纳入文献，LLMs难以区分PI/ECO合格与不合格的干扰项。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏覆盖完整检索-筛选-合成流程的ground truth，无法系统评估科学推理能力。Meta分析因其结构化、可验证的工作流程成为评估系统化科学推理的理想对象。
AI.method: 构建包含442项专家策展Meta分析的数据集，每项配有PI/ECO标准、14万篇PubMed文章的检索语料库、已验证阳性研究、主题相似但PI/ECO不合格的硬负样本、完整搜索策略和日期范围。测试12种流水线配置（9种RAG变体+协议驱动代理）。
AI.result: 检索上限为K=200时召回率90.9%，但所有系统恢复的已纳入文献不超过52.7%。LLMs无法可靠区分PI/ECO合格研究与主题相关的干扰项。阶段归因指标比单一端到端评分更能揭示系统成功与失败的原因。
AI.conclusion: 当前系统在Meta分析的筛选环节存在严重瓶颈，LLMs在处理PI/ECO筛选时面临挑战，需要更精细的阶段级评估指标来指导系统改进。

title: Object Tokens as a Bridge Between Segmentation and Visual Question Answering in Robotic Surgery
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) in robotic surgery, referred to as surgical VQA, requires high-level understanding of complex surgical scenes and the integration of visual perception with language reasoning, with the potential to support surgical training and intraoperative decision-making. Recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown promising performance through parameter-efficient fine-tuning; however, most existing approaches rely on coarse visual grounding, typically limited to bounding boxes, which fails to capture the fine-grained spatial structure of surgical objects. In this work, we propose a unified framework that jointly performs pixel-level segmentation and visual question answering within a single framework. Our approach integrates a VLM with a Segment Anything Model (SAM)-based decoder and represents scene elements as object tokens generated by the VLM. These object tokens guide answer prediction and are further projected to the SAM-based decoder to produce segmentation masks. By optimizing the object token embeddings through both segmentation and question answering objectives, the model learns spatially grounded representations that enhance visual reasoning while providing explicit pixel-level grounding. We evaluate the proposed method on the private RAMIE (Robot-Assisted Minimally Invasive Esophagectomy) dataset and the public EndoVis18 dataset, where it consistently outperforms baseline methods for surgical VQA. These results demonstrate that incorporating context-aware object tokens into vision-language models improves fine-grained surgical scene understanding.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一框架，将像素级分割与视觉问答结合，利用VLM生成的对象token引导分割掩码和答案预测，在手术VQA任务上超越基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有手术VQA方法依赖粗粒度的视觉定位（如边界框），无法捕捉手术对象的精细空间结构，需要更细粒度的像素级理解。
AI.method: 将VLM与基于SAM的分割解码器集成，VLM生成场景中的对象token，这些token同时用于答案预测和投影到SAM解码器生成分割掩码，通过分割和VQA双目标联合优化。
AI.result: 在私有RAMIE数据集和公开EndoVis18数据集上，该方法在手术VQA任务中一致优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 将上下文感知的对象token融入视觉语言模型，能够提升对手术场景的细粒度理解能力，提供显式的像素级空间定位。

title: Context-Aware RL for Agentic and Multimodal LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often fail when answering requires identifying a small but decisive piece of evidence within a long or complex context, such as a single line in a tool trace or a subtle detail in an image. We propose ContextRL, a context-aware reinforcement learning (RL) method that improves long-horizon reasoning and multimodal performance through an \emph{indirect} auxiliary objective. Instead of supervising only the final answer, ContextRL presents the model with a query, an answer, and two highly similar contexts, and rewards it for selecting the context that supports the query--answer pair, thereby encouraging fine-grained grounding. We construct contrastive context data in two domains: for coding agents, trajectories serve as contexts, yielding 1k pairs built via condition filtering; for multimodal reasoning, images serve as contexts, yielding 7K pairs built via generative editing and similarity search. ContextRL achieves average gains of +2.2% over standard GRPO on 5 long-horizon benchmarks, and +1.8% across 12 diverse visual question answering benchmarks. To disentangle the effect of the proposed objective from that of additional data, we compare against data-augmentation baselines that repurpose the same contrastive contexts as standard query--context--answer examples. These baselines provide little to no improvement, showing that the gains arise from the proposed context-selection objective rather than from the contrastive data alone.

AI.tldr: 提出ContextRL，一种基于上下文感知强化学习的方法，通过在两个高度相似上下文中选择正确上下文作为间接辅助奖励，提升LLM在长程推理和多模态任务中的细粒度证据定位能力。在代码代理和多模态推理领域构建对比上下文数据，在5个长程基准上平均提升+2.2%，12个VQA基准上平均提升+1.8%。控制实验表明提升源于上下文选择目标而非额外对比数据。
AI.motivation: LLM在长上下文或复杂上下文中常常无法定位关键证据（如工具日志中的一行或图像中的细微细节），导致回答失败。现有方法仅监督最终答案，缺乏对细粒度证据定位的引导。
AI.method: 提出ContextRL，采用间接辅助目标：给模型提供查询、答案和两个高度相似的上下文，奖励模型选择支持该查询-答案对的正确上下文。在两个领域构建对比上下文数据：代码代理领域通过条件过滤构建1K轨迹对；多模态推理领域通过生成式编辑和相似度搜索构建7K图像对。
AI.result: 在5个长程推理基准上平均比标准GRPO提升+2.2%，在12个VQA基准上平均提升+1.8%。对比实验表明，将同样对比数据作为标准查询-上下文-答案示例的数据增强基线几乎没有提升，证明增益来自上下文选择目标本身。
AI.conclusion: ContextRL通过间接的上下文选择奖励目标，有效提升了LLM在长程推理和多模态任务中的细粒度证据定位能力，且该增益并非来自额外的对比数据，而是来自所提出的训练目标。

title: CogCanvas: A Benchmark for Evaluating Multi-Subject Reference-Based Image Generation
summary: Multi-subject reference-based image generation requires jointly preserving multiple human identities, binding per-person objects and fashion items, and respecting a specified background scene, a regime where current diffusion models remain brittle. Existing benchmarks evaluate only one axis at a time and none jointly captures multi-identity composition with human-object interaction, background grounding, and spatial plausibility. We introduce CogCanvas, a benchmark of 1,952 curated reference images spanning 100 celebrity identities, 115 distinctive objects and fashion items, and 29 real-world background scenes including landmarks, from which we construct 1,361 compositional prompts covering 2-5 person group sizes. The curation pipeline combines DINOv2-based deduplication, two-stage aesthetic filtering, and automated derivation of structured interaction and position graphs that serve as ground-truth supervision. CogCanvas supports three tasks, reference-based multi-human-object generation (primary), text-to-image compositional generation, and reference retrieval, under a unified six-axis evaluation protocol. We introduce two metrics tailored to the multi-reference setting: BG-Sim, which scores background fidelity on SAM 3-masked regions via DINOv3 feature similarity, and Attr-VQA, which uses a multimodal LLM to verify per-subject attribute binding and inter-person interactions against the structured graphs. Benchmarking five SOTA methods reveals that every model degrades substantially as group size grows from 2 to 5, with near-complete failure on object/fashion binding beyond three subjects.

AI.tldr: 提出CogCanvas基准，包含1,952张参考图像、1,361个组合提示，评估多人在复杂场景下的生成质量。测试5种SOTA方法发现，当人数从2增至5时，所有模型性能显著下降，三人以上物体/服饰绑定几乎完全失败。
AI.motivation: 现有基准只评估单一方面，缺乏同时评估多身份组合、人-物交互、背景接地和空间合理性的统一基准。
AI.method: 构建CogCanvas基准：包含100个名人身份、115个物体/服饰物品、29个真实背景场景，生成1,361个组合提示。采用DINOv2去重、两阶段美学过滤、自动化交互和位置图推导。引入BG-Sim（背景保真度）和Attr-VQA（属性绑定验证）两个新指标。
AI.result: 测试5种SOTA模型，所有模型随群体规模从2增至5性能大幅下降，三人以上物体/服饰绑定几乎完全失败。
AI.conclusion: 现有扩散模型在多主体参考图像生成中仍存在严重缺陷，尤其是处理大规模群体和复杂属性绑定时。

title: The Value Axis: Language Models Encode Whether They're on the Right Track
summary: We investigate whether language models internally track the value of their current trajectory, defined as the likelihood that their ongoing strategy will achieve their goals. Using synthetic, in-context reinforcement learning data, we construct a "value" axis for Qwen3-8B. We find that activations along this axis distinguish between high vs. low verbalized confidence, rollouts without and with backtracking, and correct vs. corrupted code. Steering towards high value causally suppresses self-correction and reduces explanatory verbosity, while steering towards low value induces backtracking and exploration. We demonstrate that direct preference optimization (DPO) can increase the internal value of rewarded behaviors (e.g. use a certain word), causing the model to act more confidently after exhibiting them. Finally, we apply the value axis to study in-the-wild settings. For example, we find that Qwen assigns low value to politically sensitive chat queries after post-training and that supervised fine-tuning increases internal confidence within the training domain. Our results suggest that language models linearly encode an estimate of expected goal success that modulates their confidence in pursuing a direction.

AI.tldr: 研究发现语言模型内部存在一条"价值轴"，用于追踪当前策略实现目标的预期成功率，通过干预该轴可控制模型的自我修正、探索行为和表达信心。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型在推理过程中是否内部跟踪其当前轨迹的价值（即当前策略达成目标的似然性），以理解模型何时以及为何选择自我修正、回溯或自信表达。
AI.method: 使用合成上下文强化学习数据为Qwen3-8B构建"价值轴"，通过激活分析区分高/低置信度、有无回溯的轨迹、正确/错误代码；应用价值干预、直接偏好优化（DPO）以及真实场景分析。
AI.result: 价值轴激活可区分模型的不同行为状态；向高价值干预可抑制自我修正、降低解释冗长性；向低价值干预诱导回溯和探索；DPO可增加奖励行为的内部价值；模型对政治敏感查询赋予低价值，SFT增加领域内置信度。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型线性编码期望目标成功率的估计值，该估计值调节模型在追求当前方向时的置信度。

title: Metis: A Generalizable and Efficient World-Action Model for Autonomous Driving and Urban Navigation
summary: World action models~(WAMs) have shown great promise for autonomous driving and urban navigation. Built upon Vision-Language-Action models or video generation models, existing approaches suffer key limitations: (1) High inference latency due to future observation prediction at test time, and (2) tightly coupled video and action modeling leading to representational mismatch and degraded generalization. To address both issues, we propose Metis, an end-to-end WAM framework that decouples video generation and action prediction. Specifically, Metis employs a Mixture-of-Transformers architecture with dedicated experts for video generation and action prediction, preserving the intrinsic distributional properties of each task. To enhance efficiency, we introduce an asymmetric attention mask that enables joint training of both experts while allowing the action model to bypass explicit video generation during inference. This design ensures training-inference consistency and significantly reduces computational costs without compromising planning performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on the NAVSIM navhard and navtest benchmarks and the CityWalker navigation benchmark, validating both the generalizability and efficiency across diverse tasks. Real-robot deployments further confirm the practical feasibility of our approach.

AI.tldr: Metis通过解耦视频生成与动作预测，采用混合Transformer架构和不对称注意力掩码，实现了高效的世界动作模型，在多个自动驾驶基准测试中达到SOTA性能，并成功部署到真实机器人上。
AI.motivation: 现有世界动作模型存在两大局限：(1) 测试时需预测未来观测导致高推理延迟；(2) 视频与动作建模紧密耦合引发表征不匹配和泛化能力下降。Metis旨在同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出Metis框架，核心包含：(1) 混合Transformer架构，设立视频生成和动作预测专用专家模块，保留各自任务分布特性；(2) 非对称注意力掩码，实现联合训练的同时允许动作模型在推理时跳过显式视频生成，保证训练-推理一致性并降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM navhard/navtest和CityWalker导航基准上达到SOTA性能，验证了跨任务的泛化性和效率；真实机器人部署进一步证明了实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: Metis通过解耦设计有效兼顾了世界动作模型的效率与性能，为自动驾驶和机器人导航提供了实用的端到端解决方案。

title: Deep Residual Injection for Full-Spectrum Forensic Signal Perception in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have been increasingly adopted in forensics for their robust semantic understanding. As AI-generated images become realistic, semantic-level inconsistencies alone are often insufficient for reliable detection. This motivates a critical question: whether MLLMs can achieve full-spectrum forensic signal perception, i.e., capturing low-level generator artifacts without sacrificing pre-trained semantic knowledge. We further perform a layer-wise analysis of forensic signal perception in MLLMs, showing that semantic information is primarily formed in the early-to-middle layers, whereas direct fine-tuning for artifact learning disrupts these semantic representations. Based on this insight, we propose Deep Visual Residual MLLM (Deep-VRM) to preserve early semantic processing while injecting artifact-specific visual signals as a residual path into an intermediate layer, where they are fused with semantic token representations and propagated through subsequent trainable layers. This enables later layers to jointly model semantic reasoning and signal-level forensic cues, and surprisingly, the model learns to adaptively leverage different levels of forensic signals depending on the input, achieving robust and generalizable detection performance. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art across most benchmarks. The code and data are available at https://github.com/KQL11/Deep-VRM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Deep-VRM，一种通过残差路径将低级伪造伪影注入多模态大语言模型中间层的方法，在保持语义能力的同时实现全频谱取证信号感知，在伪造图像检测任务上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在伪造检测中主要利用语义级不一致性，但随着AI生成图像越来越逼真，仅靠语义级线索已不可靠。需要探究MLLMs能否同时捕获低级生成器伪影（全频谱取证信号感知），同时不损失预训练的语义知识。
AI.method: 通过层析分析发现语义信息主要在早期到中间层形成，而直接微调学习伪影会破坏语义表征。基于此，提出Deep-VRM：保留早期语义处理层，将伪影特定的视觉信号作为残差路径注入中间层，与语义token表示融合，再通过后续可训练层传播，使模型联合建模语义推理和信号级取证线索。
AI.result: 在多个伪造检测基准上达到了最先进水平，且模型能根据输入自适应地利用不同层次的取证信号，具有鲁棒性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: Deep-VRM有效解决了MLLMs在伪造检测中语义与低级伪影信号联合感知的难题，为多模态大模型在取证领域的应用提供了新的设计范式。

title: Text region detection in historical astronomical diagrams
summary: Text detection is a crucial task in the analysis of historical documents. While datasets and benchmarks exist for text detection in manuscripts and maps, the study of text in mathematical diagrams has received little attention. To address this, we introduce a large-scale, diverse, open-access dataset of 948 historical astronomical diagrams containing 10,940 oriented polygonal text regions. Our dataset spans ten centuries (8th to 18th) and seven main linguistic traditions: Arabic and Persian (115), Chinese (332), Byzantine (233), Latin (185), Hebrew (48), and Sanskrit (35). It captures a wide range of diagram styles and textual content, from symbols to multi-line paragraphs. Each text instance is annotated with ordered polygons that precisely delineate text regions and encode the reading direction. In addition, we annotated the 2,293 regions in Latin diagrams with 20 class labels. We evaluated several strong baselines on our dataset, including TESTR, DeepSolo++, and Poly-DETR, a simple extension of DINO-DETR that we design to predict ordered polygon vertices. Poly-DETR achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MTHv2 and cBAD2019 benchmarks and provides a solid, simple baseline on our dataset. Code and dataset available online.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个包含948张历史天文图表、跨越10个世纪和7种语言传统的大型开放数据集，并设计了一种名为Poly-DETR的简单模型，在文本检测任务上取得了领先性能。
AI.motivation: 历史文献中的文本检测研究主要集中在手稿和地图上，而对数学图表（尤其是天文图表）中的文本检测关注极少，缺乏相关数据集和基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含948张历史天文图表、10,940个带序多边形文本区域标注的大规模数据集；设计了Poly-DETR（基于DINO-DETR的简单扩展），用于预测有序多边形顶点。
AI.result: Poly-DETR在MTHv2和cBAD2019基准上达到了最先进的性能，并在新数据集上提供了坚实的基线结果。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了历史天文图表文本检测领域的空白，Poly-DETR作为简单有效的基线方法，为后续研究提供了参考。

title: SiGnature: Explicit Motion Diffusion for Stylized Semantic Gesture
summary: While recent advances in co-speech gesture generation have achieved impressive rhythmic synchronization, synthesizing gestures that are both semantically meaningful and faithful to a speaker's unique non-verbal style remains an open challenge. Semantic gestures, such as iconic shapes or deictic pointing, are statistically sparse, making them difficult to learn effectively within standard generative models. We present SiGnature, a framework for Stylized and Semantic Gesture generation that reconciles precise semantic control with high-fidelity style preservation. Unlike prevalent methods that rely on entangled latent representations, SiGnature operates in an explicit joint-rotation space. This design enables our core contribution, Joint Motion Integration (JMI), a training-free inference mechanism capable of injecting any external motion sequence, particularly in-the-wild semantic gestures, directly into the diffusion process. JMI automatically identifies the specific ``active joints'' conveying a semantic action and injects them into the generation, while relying on the diffusion backbone to synthesize the remaining body dynamics, including posture and flow, in accordance with the pre-learned style of the target speaker. This allows for the plug-and-play integration of arbitrary motions, including complex semantic gestures, without retraining or introducing the ``Frankenstein'' artifacts typical of cut-and-paste methods. Extensive experiments and perceptual studies demonstrate that SiGnature offers superior semantic motion control while maintaining smooth and natural co-speech gesture generation and preserving the distinct characteristics of the speaker, thereby outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出SiGnature框架，通过联合运动集成（JMI）机制在显式关节旋转空间中将外部语义手势注入扩散过程，实现无需重新训练的语义可控且风格保真的共语手势生成。
AI.motivation: 现有共语手势生成方法虽能实现节奏同步，但在生成既语义丰富又保留说话者独特非语言风格的手势方面仍面临挑战；语义手势（如指示、象形手势）在统计上稀疏，标准生成模型难以有效学习。
AI.method: 提出SiGnature框架，核心是联合运动集成（JMI）机制：在显式关节旋转空间中操作，自动识别外部语义手势中的"活跃关节"并将其注入扩散生成过程，而扩散骨干网络负责合成剩余身体动态以保持目标说话者的风格。
AI.result: 大量实验和感知研究显示SiGnature在语义动作控制方面表现优越，同时保持流畅自然的共语手势生成和说话者独特风格，优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SiGnature证明了在显式关节空间中解耦语义控制与风格保持的有效性，为无需重新训练即可插入任意外部语义手势的共语手势生成提供了新范式。

title: High-Fidelity 4D Hand-Object Capture via Multi-View Spatiotemporal Tracking and Physics-Aware Gaussians
summary: The growing demand for high-fidelity 4D hand-object interaction (HOI) data in embodied AI and spatial computing is currently bottlenecked by the reliance on pre-scanned object templates and physical markers. While recent methods have demonstrated promising results in reconstructing 4D hand-object interaction from videos, they are highly sensitive to initial estimates of hand and object poses. Yet, estimating these poses from images is challenging, in particular under severe occlusion which is inherent in hand-object interaction scenarios. We propose a novel system for the robust and accurate reconstruction of hands and objects from synchronized and calibrated multi-view videos without requiring any templates or markers. Our system consists of two main components with key innovations: (1) a multi-view feed-forward transformer model that aggregates cross-view geometry and temporal cues to provide a reliable, metric-consistent initialization for both poses and dense object geometry, and (2) a hand-object physics-aware Gaussian-based optimization framework to refine the initial estimates, integrating tetrahedral constraints, collision refinement, and appearance decomposition to produce physically plausible and visually accurate reconstruction. Validated on public benchmarks and an extensive internal dataset, our pipeline achieves highly robust, artifact-free reconstruction, providing an efficient foundation for automated 4D asset generation. Our project page are available at https://zyshen021.github.io/HOSTPG/.

AI.tldr: 提出一个无需预扫描模板或物理标记、从多视角视频鲁棒重建4D手-物交互的新系统，包含跨视图Transformer初始化与物理感知高斯优化两大模块，在公开和内部数据集上实现了无伪影的高质量重建。
AI.motivation: 现有4D手-物交互重建方法依赖预扫描的物体模板和物理标记，且对初始手/物姿态估计高度敏感，在严重遮挡场景下鲁棒性不足，限制了其在具身AI和空间计算中的实际应用。
AI.method: 提出两阶段系统：(1) 多视图前馈Transformer模型，聚合跨视角几何和时序线索，为姿态和稠密物体几何提供可靠的度量一致初始化；(2) 手-物物理感知的高斯优化框架，整合四面体约束、碰撞细化与外观分解，生成物理合理且视觉准确的精细重建。
AI.result: 在公开基准和大型内部数据集上验证，该方法实现了高度鲁棒、无伪影的重建，为自动化4D资产生成提供了高效基础。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一套无需模板和标记、对初始化鲁棒的4D手-物交互重建系统，通过多视图Transformer初始化+物理感知高斯优化的组合，有效解决了遮挡下的姿态初始化难题，为4D资产自动化生成奠定了高效基础。

title: OmniOPSD: Rationale-Privileged On-Policy Self-Distillation for Affective Computing
summary: Reinforcement learning for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is often hindered by severe reward sparsity in complex reasoning tasks. This challenge is particularly pronounced in human-centered scenarios involving states, emotions, intentions, and behaviors, where heterogeneous multimodal signals and subjective human factors make high-quality chain-of-thought (CoT) annotations expensive and difficult to obtain. Although many multimodal datasets provide expert-annotated ground-truth labels, directly using these labels for supervised fine-tuning may encourage shortcut learning in multimodal perception and provides limited transparency for safety-critical human--AI interaction. To address these limitations, we propose OmniOPSD, a Rationale-Privileged On-Policy Self-Distillation framework that uses frontier-generated rationales as teacher-side privileged evidence rather than student imitation targets. OmniOPSD uses frontier-generated evidence-aware rationales only as training-time privileged evidence context for a local teacher. The student samples its own rollout from the original multimodal input, while the rationale-privileged teacher scores the same tokens and provides dense token-level supervision. Thus, the student learns on its own trajectory distribution without directly imitating frontier-model completions, and inference requires no labels, rationales, CoT annotations, or closed-source model access. Experiments on MER-UniBench show that OmniOPSD achieves state-of-the-art performance with an average score of $84.19$, and ablations further support the value of rationale-privileged teacher guidance.

AI.tldr: OmniOPSD 是一个面向多模态大语言模型的推理框架，通过利用前沿模型生成的 rationale 作为教师端的特权证据，在不依赖昂贵标注的情况下，实现学生模型在自身轨迹上学习，并在 MER-UniBench 上取得 SOTA 成绩（平均分 84.19）。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在复杂推理任务中面临严重的奖励稀疏问题，尤其在涉及人类状态、情绪、意图和行为的人机交互场景中，高质量思维链标注昂贵且困难。直接使用标注标签进行监督微调会导致捷径学习，且缺乏透明性。
AI.method: 提出 OmniOPSD，一种基于 rationale 特权的在线自我蒸馏框架。使用前沿模型生成的 rationale 作为教师端的特权证据（而非学生模仿目标），教师基于此提供密集的 token 级监督，学生在自身 rollout 分布上学习，不直接模仿前沿模型输出。
AI.result: 在 MER-UniBench 上平均得分 84.19，达到当前最优性能；消融实验进一步验证了 rationale-privileged 教师引导的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OmniOPSD 有效解决了多模态推理中的奖励稀疏和标注成本问题，推理时无需标签、rationale、思维链或闭源模型访问，为人机交互场景下的安全与透明推理提供了可行方案。

title: TurboGS: Accelerating 3D Gaussian Splatting via Error-Guided Sparse Pixel Sampling and Optimization
comment: Accepted by ICML2026. Project page: https://zhengdong.site/projects/TurboGS/
summary: Consumer-level applications require fast optimization of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with high-fidelity novel view rendering. However, existing 3DGS acceleration approaches still incur substantial computation on redundant pixels while sacrificing fine details. In this paper, we present TurboGS, an error-guided training framework that accelerates 3DGS by concentrating optimization on perceptually informative pixels. TurboGS is built upon four core components: (1) a tile-wise sparse pixel sampling, which, driven by multi-view reconstruction errors during training, prioritizes challenging regions and skips well-reconstructed ones to avoid redundant gradient computation; (2) a tile-wise structure-aware loss with sparse Normalized Cross-Correlation, which provides sparse yet effective supervision to preserve fine details and stabilize training; (3) an error-driven Gaussian density control strategy, which dynamically allocates model capacity and removes redundant primitives; and (4) a tailored hybrid optimizer that couples Hessian-informed updates with Adam moment damping to stabilize and improve convergence under sparse supervision. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that TurboGS can deliver on par or superior rendering quality within 100 seconds on a single RTX 5090 GPU card (up to 10x training speedup over vanilla 3DGS).

AI.tldr: TurboGS是一个基于错误引导的训练框架，通过感知重要性像素采样、结构感知稀疏损失、错误驱动的高斯密度控制和混合优化器四大组件，在100秒内实现与原始3DGS相当或更优的渲染质量，训练速度提升最高达10倍。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS加速方法在冗余像素上浪费大量计算，同时丢失了精细细节。用户级应用需要快速优化3DGS且保持高保真渲染。
AI.method: (1) 基于多视图重建误差的瓦片级稀疏像素采样，优先优化困难区域；(2) 瓦片级结构感知损失+稀疏归一化互相关(NCC)，用稀疏监督保留细节；(3) 错误驱动的高斯密度控制，动态分配模型容量；(4) 结合Hessian信息的混合优化器与Adam动量阻尼，提升稀疏监督下的收敛稳定性。
AI.result: 在RTX 5090上100秒内达到与原始3DGS相当或更优的渲染质量，训练速度提升10倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过感知错误的稀疏训练策略，TurboGS在极短时间内实现了高质量的3DGS优化，适合消费者级应用部署。

title: GOOSE-M2F: Adapting Mask2Former for High-Fidelity, Long-Tailed Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation in Unstructured Outdoor Terrain
comment: This solution has got 3rd position at GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation (FGSS) Challenge at ICRA~2026
summary: We present GOOSE-M2F, a task-specific adaptation of Mask2Former for the GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation (FGSS) Challenge at ICRA~2026. The GOOSE benchmark spans 64 fine-grained classes across unstructured outdoor terrain with a severely long-tailed distribution, where rare classes occupy fewer than 50 pixels per image. We extend the Swin-Large Mask2Former baseline with three targeted contributions: (1)200 Object Queries to eliminate representational saturation; (2)a Feature Refinement Module (FRM) combining ASPP-lite and CBAM dual-attention; and (3)an Auxiliary Supervision Head that delivers direct per-pixel gradients for rare classes. A multi-stage training strategy pairs Distribution-Balanced loss, Rare-Class Copy-Paste augmentation, dynamic IoU-aware re-weighting, and EMA. At inference, a dense sliding-window engine with 2D Gaussian kernel blending and 4-scale TTA adds +10.57\%. GOOSE-M2F achieves 70.08\% Official Composite mIoU (63.55\% fine, 76.61\% coarse), placing 3rd on the GOOSE 2D FGSS leaderboard. Code and trained models are publicly available at: \href{https://github.com/Aditya-Lingam-9000/GOOSE-M2F}{Github GOOSE-M2F Code} and \href{https://huggingface.co/XYZ9843/GOOSE-M2F}{Hugging Face GOOSE-M2F}.

AI.tldr: GOOSE-M2F是Mask2Former针对GOOSE细粒度语义分割挑战的改进版本，通过增加查询数量、特征精炼模块、辅助监督头和多阶段训练策略，在长尾分布的非结构化户外地形数据集上取得了70.08%的复合mIoU，排名第三。
AI.motivation: GOOSE基准数据集包含64个细粒度类别，呈现严重的长尾分布，稀有类别每张图像中像素数少于50，现有模型难以处理这种极端不平衡和细粒度分割任务。
AI.method: 基于Swin-Large Mask2Former基线，提出三点改进：(1)将目标查询数量扩展至200以消除表示饱和；(2)引入特征精炼模块(FRM)，结合ASPP-lite和CBAM双注意力机制；(3)添加辅助监督头为稀有类别提供直接逐像素梯度。训练采用多阶段策略，包含分布平衡损失、稀有类别复制粘贴增强、动态IoU感知重加权和指数移动平均。推理使用密集滑动窗口引擎，结合2D高斯核融合和4尺度测试时增强。
AI.result: 在GOOSE 2D FGSS排行榜上达到70.08%官方复合mIoU（细粒度63.55%，粗粒度76.61%），排名第三。推理时的密集滑动窗口和4尺度TTA带来+10.57%的提升。
AI.conclusion: GOOSE-M2F通过多组件协同设计，有效缓解了长尾分布下的细粒度语义分割难题，证明了针对特定任务调整Transformer架构和训练策略的重要性。

title: Learning Directional Semantic Transitions for Longitudinal Chest X-ray Analysis
summary: Chest X-ray (CXR) interpretation often requires longitudinal comparison to assess disease progression. Existing approaches typically rely on temporal feature fusion or inter-study discrepancy modeling, yet remain limited in capturing subtle progression semantics and overlook the inherently directional nature of disease trajectories. In this paper, we propose ProTrans, a novel vision-language pretraining framework that formulates disease progression as a directional semantic transition between paired CXR studies. ProTrans leverages radiology reports to anchor individual CXR representations within interpretable disease states, and introduces a learnable progression feature map to explicitly encode semantic shifts between states, aligned with report-derived progression descriptions. To enforce direction-aware perception, ProTrans incorporates a reversed temporal modeling process and imposes bidirectional reconstruction consistency across states and transitions, thereby disentangling directional semantics and promoting coherent trajectory modeling. Extensive experiments on longitudinal downstream tasks, including disease progression classification and progression captioning, demonstrate that ProTrans consistently outperforms existing methods, establishing a unified pretraining framework for longitudinal CXR understanding. https://github.com/RPIDIAL/ProTrans

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProTrans，一个用于胸片纵向对比的视觉-语言预训练框架，通过将疾病进展建模为方向性语义转换，结合放射学报告和可学习的进展特征图，在疾病进展分类和描述任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有胸片纵向对比方法多依赖时序特征融合或差异建模，但难以捕捉细微的进展语义，且忽视了疾病轨迹固有的方向性特征。
AI.method: ProTrans将疾病进展建模为配对的胸片研究之间的方向性语义转换。利用放射学报告将单个胸片表示锚定到可解释的疾病状态，引入可学习的进展特征图显式编码状态间的语义偏移。通过逆向时序建模和双向重建一致性约束，实现方向感知的语义解耦。
AI.result: 在疾病进展分类和进展描述生成等纵向下游任务中，ProTrans consistently outperforms existing methods，建立了统一的纵向胸片理解预训练框架。
AI.conclusion: ProTrans通过方向性语义转换建模和双向一致性约束，有效捕获疾病进展的方向性特征，为纵向医学影像分析提供了新的预训练范式。

title: You Don't Need Strong Assumptions: Visual Representation Learning via Temporal Differences
summary: Progress in AI has largely been driven by methods that assume less. As compute and data increase, approaches with weaker inductive biases generally outperform those with stronger assumptions. This is particularly characteristic of the field of Visual Representation Learning, where approaches have gone from being dominated by Supervised Learning, to Weakly Supervised Learning, to the now widespread success of Self-Supervised Learning without human labels. Yet, even modern Self-Supervised Learning approaches still depend on strong inductive biases such as augmentations, masking, or cropping. If this trend holds, even these remaining biases should become bottlenecks at scale -- and our experiments confirm this: the optimal strength of inductive biases decreases as data grows. This motivates the search for approaches that rely on fewer assumptions. To this end, we introduce Temporal Difference in Vision (TDV), a new paradigm for self-supervised learning from video that avoids existing inductive biases, relying instead on a causal assumption that the past causes the future. TDV functions by jointly training an image encoder and a motion encoder so that the current frame's representation plus the encoded motion equals the next frame's representation. Despite not leveraging any strong inductive biases, TDV matches state-of-the-art recipes on dense spatial tasks, laying the foundation for representation learning without strong assumptions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TDV（视觉时序差分），一种无需强归纳偏置的自监督视频表示学习方法，通过因果假设（过去导致未来）联合训练图像编码器和运动编码器，使得当前帧表示加运动编码等于下一帧表示，在大规模数据下实验证实强归纳偏置会随数据增长成为瓶颈，而TDV在密集空间任务上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 随着数据和算力增长，强归纳偏置（如数据增强、掩码、裁剪）逐渐成为表示学习的瓶颈，现有自监督方法仍依赖这些偏置，作者希望探索一种减少归纳偏置、仅依赖因果假设的表示学习范式。
AI.method: 提出TDV框架，联合训练图像编码器和运动编码器，通过等式约束：当前帧表示 + 运动编码 = 下一帧表示，仅依赖"过去导致未来"的因果假设，不使用传统自监督学习中的强归纳偏置。
AI.result: 实验证实归纳偏置的最优强度随数据量增长而下降；TDV在不使用强归纳偏置的情况下，在密集空间任务上匹配了SOTA方法的表现。
AI.conclusion: TDV验证了减少归纳偏置在视觉表示学习中的可行性和潜力，为构建更少假设、更可扩展的表示学习方法奠定了基础。

title: VEPHand: View-Efficient Photometric Hand Performance Capture at Scale
summary: Robust, high-fidelity 3D hand capture, while fundamental to digital human creation, remains challenging with practical multi-view systems that balance rich photometry with the geometric ambiguities of reconstruction arising from limited viewpoint density. This paper presents an end-to-end pipeline for dynamic hand performance capture and registration, specifically designed for view-efficient setups ($\sim$20 views). We address key challenges with two primary innovations. First, to overcome reconstruction difficulties like limited view overlap and background clutter, our mask-free neural method robustly extracts detailed hand geometry and appearance from unmasked images using scene parameterization and scenario-specific density regularization. Second, addressing registration challenges such as accurately capturing non-linear skin deformations and ensuring plausible results during severe self-contact, we propose a physics-inspired framework. It aligns reconstructions to a personalized hand model by optimizing intrinsic volumetric offsets within its canonical tetrahedral mesh, alongside pose parameters. This approach, supported by robust losses and optimization, captures fine surface deformations, ensures plausible results under severe articulation and self-contact, and demonstrates strong tolerance to input noise. We demonstrate the scalability and robustness of our automated pipeline on an extensive dataset of over 12,000 sequences, from which we also derive a large-scale, high-quality synthetic 2D/3D hand dataset for training downstream tasks. This showcases its effectiveness for single hands, intricate two-hand interactions, and natural hand-object manipulations. Our method achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction fidelity in view-efficient, unmasked scenarios and highly accurate registration. Our project page are available at https://zyshen021.github.io/VEPHand/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套端到端的动态手部性能捕捉与配准管线，专为视角高效的多视角系统（约20个视角）设计。创新点包括：1）无掩膜神经重建方法，利用场景参数化和密度正则化从无掩膜图像中提取手部几何与外观；2）物理启发的配准框架，通过优化规范四面体网格内的体偏移和姿态参数，实现精细形变与自接触下的合理结果。在超过12,000个序列的数据集上验证了方法的有效性，并构建了大规模高质量合成手部数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有3D手部捕捉方法在视角有限（约20个）的多视角系统中面临重建几何歧义、背景干扰、严重自接触下配准不准确等问题，亟需一种鲁棒、高保真的自动化管线。
AI.method: 1）无掩膜神经重建：利用场景参数化和场景特定的密度正则化，从无掩膜图像中提取手部几何与外观；2）物理启发的配准框架：在规范四面体网格内优化内在体偏移和姿态参数，结合鲁棒损失与优化策略，捕捉精细表面形变并确保自接触下的合理性。
AI.result: 在超过12,000个序列的大规模数据集上验证了可扩展性和鲁棒性；在视角有限、无掩膜场景下达到了SOTA的重建保真度和高度精确的配准；生成了大规模高质量合成2D/3D手部数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在单只手、复杂双手交互以及自然手物操作场景中均表现出色，验证了其在视角高效系统中的实用性和先进性。

title: Focus When Necessary: Adaptive Routing and Collaborative Grounding for Training-Free Visual Grounding
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in cross-modal reasoning, they often struggle to perceive fine-grained details in complex high-resolution images. Recent training-free methods address this through image scaling and localized cropping. However, applying these manipulations indiscriminately introduces computational redundancy for simple queries and can degrade accuracy by truncating essential global context or introducing irrelevant background noise. To this end, we propose LazyMCoT, a dynamic and training-free framework that adaptively allocates visual grounding efforts based on sample difficulty. The framework features an Adaptive Routing mechanism that evaluates predictive uncertainty using first-token statistics from a single forward pass. This efficiently bypasses confident cases while ensuring the recall of difficult samples via conformal calibration. For these challenging cases, a Collaborative Grounding module integrates the inherent cross-modal attention of the model with an external visual expert through a two-stage refinement process. This refinement process generates a precise localized display to recover small or occluded targets. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that LazyMCoT rivals training-based approaches by simultaneously improving reasoning accuracy and reducing average inference latency. Our code is availble at https://github.com/TencentBAC/LazyMCoT.

AI.tldr: LazyMCoT是一个无需训练的动态框架，通过自适应路由机制（基于单次前向传播的首词统计评估不确定性）和协同定位模块（结合模型内在注意力与外部视觉专家），在复杂高分辨率图像中根据样本难度动态分配视觉处理资源，在提升推理精度的同时降低平均推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在细粒度高分辨率图像感知上表现不佳，而训练-free的图像缩放和局部裁剪方法存在计算冗余且可能破坏全局上下文或引入噪声，亟需一种能根据查询难度自适应分配计算资源的方案。
AI.method: 提出LazyMCoT框架：1) 自适应路由机制，通过单次前向传播的首词统计评估预测不确定性，结合共形校准绕过简单样本并召回困难样本；2) 协作定位模块，对困难样本通过两阶段精炼（模型内在跨模态注意力+外部视觉专家）生成精确定位显示以恢复小或遮挡目标。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，LazyMCoT在提高推理准确率的同时降低了平均推理延迟，性能媲美基于训练的方法。
AI.conclusion: LazyMCoT通过动态分配视觉处理资源，有效平衡了效率与精度，为无训练框架在细粒度多模态推理中提供了可行方案。

title: CRIS: Cross-Plane Self-Supervised Isotropic Restoration for Anisotropic Volumetric Imaging Across Modalities
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures, supplementary material included. Submitted to Medical Image Analysis
summary: Anisotropic volumetric acquisitions are common in clinical MRI and volume electron microscopy (vEM), where sparse through-plane sampling creates thick slices or sections that degrade orthogonal reformats and downstream analysis. We present CRIS, a cross-plane self-supervised framework for isotropic restoration without paired isotropic ground truth. CRIS casts 3D restoration as 2D stripe completion on orthogonal reformats of an isotropic grid: high-resolution in-plane slices are synthetically degraded and periodically masked for training, while at inference blank slices define the isotropic grid, two orthogonal reformats are restored, and predictions are fused by multi-view averaging. We evaluate CRIS on two MRI cohorts and two microscopy benchmarks up to 8x anisotropy. On brain MRI, CRIS achieves 32.921 +/- 0.436 dB PSNR and 0.9631 +/- 0.0027 SSIM, outperforming interpolation, SMORE4, SIMPLE, SA-INR, and ATME, and gives the best segmentation consistency (Dice 0.940 +/- 0.004, ASSD 0.245 +/- 0.014 mm, HD99 1.275 +/- 0.061 mm). On reference-free abdominal MRI, CRIS reduces FID/KID to 48.714/0.023. On vEM, CRIS outperforms interpolation, NIIV, and vEMINR, reaching 29.133 dB/0.834 3D PSNR/SSIM at 4x, 27.123 dB/0.734 on EPFL at 8x, and 21.915 dB/0.699 on noisy hemibrain data. In a robustness experiment, one variable-gap CRIS model evaluated across gap factors 3--7 and coronal, axial, and sagittal degradations maintained higher PSNR/SSIM than interpolation (36.36--31.14 dB and 0.977--0.932 vs. 33.07--27.85 dB and 0.951--0.853). These results support CRIS as a modality-flexible route to isotropic restoration without paired isotropic targets or configuration-specific retraining. Code is available at https://github.com/adi-hatav/CRIS.

AI.tldr: CRIS是一个无需配对各向同性真值的自监督框架，通过在正交重切面上进行2D条纹补全，实现MRI和电子显微镜图像的各向同性恢复，在多种评估指标上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 临床MRI和体积电子显微镜中常见各向异性采集（厚切片），导致正交重切面和下游分析质量下降，而获取配对各向同性真值困难。
AI.method: 将3D恢复转化为正交重切面上的2D条纹补全任务：训练时对高分辨率面内切片进行合成退化并周期性掩码；推理时空白切片定义各向同性网格，恢复两个正交重切面并通过多视图平均融合预测。
AI.result: 在脑MRI上PSNR 32.921 dB、SSIM 0.9631，在无参考腹部MRI上FID 48.714、KID 0.023，在vEM上4x时3D PSNR/SSIM达29.133 dB/0.834，8x时EPFL达27.123 dB/0.734，且单模型可跨各向异性因子3-7工作。
AI.conclusion: CRIS是一种模态灵活的各向同性恢复方案，无需配对目标或特定配置的重训练，代码已开源。

title: HadBalance: A Plug-and-Play Unified Global Geometric Prior Framework for Generalizable Biomedical Segmentation
comment: Provisionally accepted by the 29th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2026). 11 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables
summary: Precise biomedical image segmentation is crucial for clinical diagnosis. Geometric cues (e.g., boundary, shape, and topology) can improve structural consistency, yet most are task-specific and lack a unified geometric foundation that generalizes across organs and modalities. We are motivated by the observation that several medical segmentation targets can be approximated as globally near-convex shapes. A convex region is one in which any two interior points can be connected by a line segment entirely contained within the region. In practice, medical targets may exhibit small local concavities or boundary irregularities; we refer to such globally convex-like shapes as near-convex. Motivated by this, we derive Hadwiger Shape Priors from Hadwiger's theorem as an interpretable global regularizer using three 2D measures: area A, perimeter P, and Euler characteristic chi, enabling transfer across organs and modalities. However, because medical datasets are shape-heterogeneous, enforcing near-convex priors uniformly can over-regularize non-convex anatomy with significant concavities, washing out concavities and fine details and degrading segmentation accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose Conflict-Aware Objective Balancing (CAOB), which integrates shape priors with segmentation in a gradient-aware manner. For each prior, CAOB removes only the gradient component that conflicts with segmentation while preserving the remaining aligned component, and adaptively regulates objective influences to prevent prior dominance. This enables stable use of shape priors on shape-heterogeneous data without erasing genuine concavities or fine structural details. We call this plug-and-play framework HadBalance.

AI.tldr: 提出HadBalance框架，基于Hadwiger形状先验（面积、周长、欧拉示性数）作为全局正则化器提升医学图像分割，并通过冲突感知目标平衡（CAOB）防止对非凸解剖结构的过度正则化，实现形状异构数据上的稳定分割。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割方法虽利用几何线索（边界、形状、拓扑），但大多任务特定，缺乏跨器官和模态的通用几何基础。观察到多数医学分割目标可近似为全局近凸形状，作者希望利用凸性先验设计可解释且通用的形状正则化方法。
AI.method: 1) 从Hadwiger定理推导Hadwiger形状先验，使用三个2D度量（面积A、周长P、欧拉示性数χ）作为可解释的全局正则化器；2) 提出冲突感知目标平衡（CAOB），对每个先验仅移除与分割冲突的梯度分量，保留对齐分量，并自适应调节目标影响以防止先验主导。
AI.result: 该方法能稳定地在形状异构数据上使用形状先验，不会抹去真实的凹陷或精细结构细节，提升分割精度。
AI.conclusion: HadBalance是一个即插即用的框架，通过Hadwiger形状先验结合CAOB，有效解决了近凸先验在异构医学数据上的过度正则化问题，实现了跨器官和模态的鲁棒分割。

title: VisualClaw: A Real-Time, Personalized Agent for the Physical World
comment: H. T. and J. C. contribute to this project equally
summary: Vision language models are serving as general-purpose interfaces for complex multimodal tasks. However, deployment still faces three gaps: VLMs typically incur high latency and cost when processing dense video frames and long prompts, the agent scaffold remains static after deployment, and standard video-QA benchmarks do not test whether agents can use visual evidence inside tool-using workspaces. We present VisualClaw, a self-evolving multimodal agent built around two principles. First, hybrid encoding reduces deployment cost by filtering less informative streaming frames with a cascaded gate and compressing the text skill bank through hot/cold top-k injection. Second, skill evolution lets the agent learn from failures: retrieved memories condition an evolver as direct concatenated context or as guided evidence, producing skill-bank updates that help future questions. Across 4 video-QA benchmarks with 2 VLMs, VisualClaw cuts per-question API cost by an average -98% versus full-frame upload and by -25.9% over the offline uniform 8 frame baseline, while boosting accuracy in most settings, e.g., an average +3.85% and a peak +15.80% on EgoSchema with Gemini 3 Flash. To address the gap, we curate VisualClawArena, a 200-scenario multimodal agentic benchmark built through a strict five-stage pipeline; models must use video evidence, documents, dynamic updates, and executable checks inside a workspace. On VisualClawArena, the same framework with computer-use agent backends improves macro accuracy by +2.9% for Codex (GPT-5.5) and +3.2% for Claude Code (Sonnet 4.6) over no-evolution baselines, with a -9.5% cost reduction compared to the uniform-sampled baseline. These properties make VisualClaw a natural fit for edge applications, where the cascade reduces a 1-hour streaming session from ~3,600 API uploads down to only 5-20 calls and the self-evolution makes it a perfect personalized assistant.

AI.tldr: VisualClaw 是一个自进化的多模态智能体，通过混合编码（级联门控过滤视频帧 + 热/冷 top-k 注入压缩技能库）和技能进化（从失败中学习并更新技能库）两大原则，在4个视频QA基准上平均降低98%的API成本并提升准确率。同时构建了VisualClawArena基准（200个场景），验证其在工具使用工作区中的动态更新能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM部署面临三个差距：处理密集视频帧时延迟和成本高、智能体框架部署后静态不变、缺乏测试智能体在工具使用工作区中利用视觉证据的基准。
AI.method: 1) 混合编码：级联门控过滤低信息帧 + 热/冷 top-k 注入压缩文本技能库；2) 技能进化：检索记忆作为直接上下文或引导证据，更新技能库以帮助未来问题。
AI.result: 在4个视频QA基准上，API成本比全帧上传平均降低98%，比离线均匀8帧基线降低25.9%；准确率平均提升3.85%，最高达15.80%（EgoSchema + Gemini 3 Flash）。在VisualClawArena上，宏观准确率提升2.9%~3.2%，成本降低9.5%。1小时流媒体会话从~3600次API调用降至5-20次。
AI.conclusion: VisualClaw通过混合编码和自进化机制显著降低了VLM部署成本并提升性能，特别适合边缘应用和个性化助手场景。

title: Mind the Gap: Diagnosing Constraint Discovery Failures in Text-in-Image Editing
summary: A key challenge in multimodal reasoning is determining which visual dependencies become relevant under a specific task, rather than merely recognizing visible content. We study this through edit-induced constraint discovery in text-in-image editing, a controlled diagnostic setting where a local text change can activate secondary consistency constraints: given a valid editing instruction and an image, can a model identify the secondary regions that must also change? Across 461 diagnostic cases, four MLLMs, and 19 constraint subtypes, models recover only 46% case-level macro recall under unguided prompting versus 94% when constraints are explicitly provided, suggesting that a substantial portion of the failure arises when models must decide which unstated dependencies to surface. Oracle-field decomposition shows that case-specific causal explanations are the most effective partial guidance (0.782 recall), above region names (0.610) or type labels (0.646), suggesting that edit-specific causal cues account for much of the oracle gain. A downstream experiment further shows that higher self-discovery recall does not necessarily improve task performance: unverified self-discovery introduces false positives that offset recall gains, motivating precision-aware constraint elicitation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态推理中的视觉依赖发现能力，通过文本图像编辑任务构建诊断框架。实验发现，当前MLLMs在自主发现隐性约束时仅达46%召回率，而显式提供约束时提升至94%，表明模型主要失败于决定哪些未明示依赖需要被激活。因果解释是最有效的部分引导信号，且更高的自我发现召回率并不必然带来下游任务性能提升。
AI.motivation: 多模态推理的关键挑战在于确定特定任务下哪些视觉依赖关系变得相关，而非仅仅识别可见内容。作者通过文本图像编辑中的编辑诱发约束发现问题，构建可控诊断环境来探究模型能否识别出那些必须随之改变的次级区域。
AI.method: 构建包含461个诊断案例、4个多模态大模型、19个约束子类型的评估框架，采用引导提示与显式约束对比实验，并通过Oracle场分解分析不同引导信号（因果解释、区域名称、类型标签）的效果，最后进行下游任务性能验证。
AI.result: 无引导提示下模型案例级宏召回率仅46%，显式提供约束时升至94%。Oracle场分解显示，因果解释是最有效的部分引导（0.782召回率），优于区域名称（0.610）和类型标签（0.646）。下游实验表明，更高召回率不一定提升任务表现，因为未经验证的自我发现会引入假阳性。
AI.conclusion: 当前MLLMs在自主发现隐性视觉依赖方面存在显著不足，主要瓶颈在于决定哪些未明示依赖需要被激活。因果线索是最有效的引导方式，但需要谨慎处理精度-召回率权衡，建议采用精度感知的约束启发策略。

title: A Text Recognition Dataset from Sahidic Coptic Ancient Manuscripts
summary: In this work, we target Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) in low-resource scenarios, which arise from underrepresented languages, rare scripts, and degraded visual conditions typical of historical documents. We introduce SCAM (Sahidic Coptic Ancient Manuscripts), a new line-level dataset built from digitized ancient manuscripts written in the extinct Sahidic Coptic dialect. The dataset reflects a realistic and challenging setting, as it combines heterogeneous acquisition conditions across libraries with typical manuscript degradations such as ink fading, bleed-through, and material deterioration. In addition to visual complexity, SCAM poses significant linguistic challenges due to the scarcity of resources for Sahidic Coptic, its uncommon alphabet, and dialect-specific diacritics. To support research in low-resource HTR, we benchmark several state-of-the-art approaches based on different paradigms, highlighting their limitations and strengths in this setting. Our results underline the gap between current HTR performance on well-resourced modern scripts and historically grounded, low-resource scenarios, thus providing a reference point for future developments.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SCAM数据集——一个基于灭绝语言Sahidic Coptic古代手稿的新行级数据集，专为低资源手写文本识别研究设计。该数据集融合了复杂的视觉退化条件和稀缺的语言资源，并评估了多种前沿方法，揭示了当前HTR技术在处理低资源历史文档时的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有HTR研究主要集中于资源丰富的现代语言和脚本，对低资源场景（尤其是灭绝语言、罕见文字及历史文档退化）关注不足，缺乏基准数据集来推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 构建SCAM（Sahidic Coptic Ancient Manuscripts）行级数据集，包含数字化古代手稿，涵盖多种采集条件和文档退化类型；使用多种前沿HTR方法（基于不同范式）在该数据集上进行基准测试。
AI.result: 当前HTR方法在低资源历史文档上性能显著低于现代资源丰富的脚本，揭示了二者之间存在明显性能差距。
AI.conclusion: SCAM数据集为低资源HTR研究提供了有挑战性的基准，凸显了现有方法的局限性，为未来方法改进指明了方向。

title: Multi-Task Tennis Stroke Biomechanics Analysis Using MediaPipe Pose
summary: We built a multi-task pipeline for tennis stroke biomechanics from plain RGB video. On top of pose-based stroke recognition, it adds two new tasks, predicting shot direction and grading posture quality, plus a rule-based feedback layer that suggests coaching tips. Strokes are found automatically using a weighted joint velocity score, s(t) = 0.5 v_wrist + 0.3 m_elbow + 0.2 m_shoulder, removing the need for manual annotation. Pose comes from MediaPipe Pose Landmarker (33 landmarks, metric world coordinates), with each stroke turned into a 30-frame by 39-feature sequence for TennisTransformerGPU, a compact 564,103-parameter transformer (4 layers, 4 heads, d=128) with three parallel output heads. Trained on 1,281 labeled strokes from 7 pros and 1 amateur across 11 videos, it hits 83.7% stroke-type accuracy, 61.9% on direction, and 62.6% on posture under a random 80/20 split. The interesting test is cross-player: train on pros, evaluate on the amateur. Stroke type barely budges, 82.9%, a 0.8% drop. Direction prediction does not transfer; it just falls back to the majority class. An ablation shows why world coordinates matter so much here: switching to image-space landmarks tanks cross-player stroke-type accuracy from 83% to 47% and direction from 68% to 21%. Everything runs on Kaggle's free T4 GPU tier and is fully reproducible.

AI.tldr: 提出一个多任务网球击球动作分析流程，从RGB视频中自动识别击球类型、预测方向、评估姿势质量，并生成教学建议。使用TennisTransformerGPU模型，在跨运动员测试中击球类型识别表现稳健（82.9%），但方向预测无法泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需要手动标注击球动作，且缺乏对击球方向和姿势质量的自动评估，难以在实际教练场景中提供反馈。
AI.method: 基于MediaPipe提取33个关键点的世界坐标，用加权关节速度分数自动检测击球时刻；构建TennisTransformerGPU（4层,4头,d=128,56万参数），三个输出头分别预测击球类型、方向和姿势质量；加入基于规则的反馈层生成教学建议。
AI.result: 击球类型准确率83.7%，方向61.9%，姿势62.6%。跨运动员测试中击球类型仅下降0.8%（82.9%），方向预测退化为多数类。使用图像空间坐标时跨运动员准确率从83%跌至47%。
AI.conclusion: 世界坐标对跨运动员泛化至关重要；击球类型具有跨运动员可迁移性，但方向预测依赖特定运动员的动作模式；所有代码在T4 GPU上可复现。

title: Stringalign: Moving beyond summary statistics with a transparent Unicode-aware tool for evaluating automatic transcription models
summary: Comparing text strings is crucial when evaluating and understanding the performance of various text processing tasks such as document recognition and audio transcription. With an increasingly complex landscape of AI-based handwritten text recognition (HTR), optical character recognition (OCR) and automatic speech recognition (ASR) models, there is a need for tools that facilitate evaluation in a flexible and reproducible way. This paper presents Stringalign, a Python library designed to simplify the evaluation process for automatic transcription projects and facilitate transparent evaluation.
